C: 综合各方面因素考虑，你们还是决定与这位忆者合作。\n现在，是时候向她转达你们得出的结论了。
E: After considering every factor, you have decided to cooperate with this Memokeeper.\nNow, it is time to give her the conclusion that you have reached.

C: 你的█ ██ ██ █注意力彻底被那█ ███ █埃维金男孩夺去了。他到底是██ █ ██ █ 什么来头？还有时间，或许你可以追上█ ███ ██，问问他究竟是什么██ ███ ██ ██。
E: You are c█m█lete██ ██tranc█d by t█e █vgin boy.██ust who ███he? There█s sti█l tim███Mayb█ you ███ catch up ██ h██ and as█ █im exactly wha█ █████████.

C: 登上舞台\n不要害怕\n不要回头
E: Get onstage\nFear not\nNever look back

C: 你靠「江湖智慧」为自己争得了应得的权益。那位可怜的大堂经理顶不住你的威逼，为你们安排了贵宾休息厅的酒水位稍作休息——虽然看起来只是提供了微不足道的情感支持，但你深知这是自己备用计划的一部分…至于现在？就祈祷事情进展能再稍微顺利一点吧。
E: You used your "street smarts" to win your deserved rights. That poor lobby manager crumbled in the face of your intimidation tactics and organized refreshments for you in the VIP lounge... Though it may look like all they have offered is thoroughly insufficient emotional compensation, you know this is just one part of your backup plan... What now? Let's pray that things can go a little more smoothly from here.

C: 公司决定与家族携手共建匹诺康尼，全宇宙的学者们也将不遗余力地提供帮助…好一派皆大欢喜的热闹景象。至此，「梦想之地」匹诺康尼之旅也便告一段落。\n是时候踏上新的旅途了。
E: The IPC decides to develop Penacony alongside The Family, and scholars from all over the universe will assist in every way they can... It is a lively scene where all's well that ends well. With this, your journey to Penacony, the "Land of the Dreams" has come to an end.\nIt's time to embark on a new adventure.

C: 你在入梦池中醒来，惊觉自己已经返回现实「白日梦」酒店。根据三月七的说法，这次你确实是从太一之梦中醒来了——在你昏迷期间，星核已被封印，而橡木以外的四大家系正在尽力平息事件余波。她还说列车组受到了邀请，要去家族的「晖长石号」上一坐，以见证人的身份参与重要会谈。\n高档游轮、豪华宴会…这才是庆功宴该有的样子。还等什么？做好准备就出发吧。
E: You wake up in the dreampool and find yourself back in the real Reverie Hotel. According to March 7th, you really have woken up this time from Ena's Dream — the Stellaron was sealed while you were out, and all the major lineages, except for the Oak Family, are dealing with the aftermath. She also said that The Family has invited the Crew to The Family's Radiant Feldspar as witnesses for an important meeting.\nHigh-end cruise ships, luxury banquets... Now THIS is what a celebration banquet ought to look like. What else are you waiting for? Get ready to set off.

C: 终于，匹诺康尼的「开拓」之旅还是迎来了美好的结局。是时候迎接新的冒险了——但在那之前，列车组还想和一些人做个正式的道别。\n为逝者的故事画上圆满的句号，就是最好的告慰。去吧，他们都在流梦礁…就在这里。
E: Finally, the trailblazing expedition on Penacony has come to a preferable conclusion. It's time for a new adventure — but before that, the Crew would like to wish say a formal farewell to certain people.\nDrawing a firm line under the stories of those who passed is the best form of comfort. Go on, then — they're all at the Dreamflux Reef... right here.

C: 烈火…悲伤的哭喊…草烧焦的味道……他宝贝的。\n我听见我那野蛮原始的呐喊越过世界的屋脊。
E: The conflagration... the screams of anguish... and the scent of burnt grass... son of a fudge.\nI sound my barbaric yell over the roofs of the world.

C: 很快，这里的所有人都会变成与游侠缠斗的恶猿，这是他们踏入「源究丛林」时就注定的命运。你知道，他的忍道已经终结了，但你到最后也没戳破他对你许下的谎言。而你要带着这个谎言活下去，然后狩猎，狩猎至忍道的尽头。\n你的忍号是真实的，你的忍道是真实的，你脚下的路也是真实的。所以，往前冲吧。
E: Soon, all here will deteriorate into savage monkeys obstructing the Rangers, a fate sealed the moment they entered the AtaviSearch Forest. You know that his way of the ninja has ended, yet you chose not to debunk the false promises he offered you even till his end. Now, you will continue to live with this lie, then conduct your hunt. You will hunt until the way of the ninja's bitter end.\nYour name as a ninja is true, your way of the ninja is true, and the path beneath your feet is true. So, press forward.

C: 即将回到仙舟，但还未选好给故人的伴手礼——你决定使尽浑身解数，让返乡的停云小姐长长面子。\n与停云一同前往奥帝购物中心选购礼品。
E: You are about to return to the Xianzhou, but you still haven't decided on a souvenir for your old friends. You have decided to give it your all and get something that will make Miss Tingyun shine in the eyes of others.\nGo to Oti Mall with Tingyun to buy gifts.

C: 「圣城」奥赫玛…据说是如今的末世长夜中，唯一的永昼之地。我们决定在城中游历一番，了解此处风土人情，同时收集可靠信息。
E: Okhema, the holy city... It is said to be the only place with eternal daylight amidst the end times' long night. We decide to tour the city to familiarize ourselves with the area and gather reliable information.

C: 虽然我们成功来到欧洛尼斯所在，可它拒绝提供帮助。为了及时救援万敌，白厄不惜动用极端手段。在这剑拔弩张之时，欧洛尼斯的态度却在见到{NICKNAME}后发生了转变。
E: We arrived at Oronyx's residence, but they refused to offer any assistance. In a desperate attempt to save Mydei, Phainon was prepared to take drastic measures. Just as the sword was being drawn, Oronyx's demeanor shifted upon noticing {NICKNAME}.

C: 我们成功进入了三相神殿。只是，欧洛尼斯并不欢迎我们，反而以各种谜题刁难，阻止我们进入神殿深处。
E: We successfully entered the Temple of the Three Fates. However, Oronyx does not welcome our presence and complicates our path with various puzzles, blocking us from reaching the temple's deeper chambers.

C: 自重渊归来，我们再次兵分两路。我与白厄前去援助死战多时的万敌，而{NICKNAME}则利用欧洛尼斯赋予的力量，收集记忆碎片，想办法前往悬锋城的往世，与遐蝶一同破解尼卡多利的不死神躯。
E: After returning from the Abyss, we split into two groups. Phainon and I headed to assist the battle-worn Mydei, while {NICKNAME} planned to harness Oronyx's power to gather the memory fragments. Once this was done, we would devise a plan to journey into Castrum Kremnos' past, where we would join forces with Castorice to destroy Nikador's immortal body.

C: 白厄的火种试炼失败，意味着承载尼卡多利神权的重任落到了唯一的悬锋王储——你的身上。但纵然身为「纷争」的正统继承人，你的心中却似乎有一处难以抹消的病灶……
E: The failure of Phainon's Coreflame trial means the responsibility of bearing Nikador's divinity now falls to the lone crown prince of Kremnos — you. Yet, even as the orthodox heir to "Strife," you seem to have an absurd extent of hesitation and objection to accepting the god's authority...

C: 浴场中多人离奇昏倒，经风堇诊断，病因竟是水温过高。而其幕后黑手究竟是…？
E: Multiple visitors suddenly pass out in the baths. Hyacine's examination shows an unexpected reason: overheated water. But who is the culprit...?

C: 泰坦断崖——整个翁法罗斯中距离刻法勒奥体最近的地方。你的心中早就盘算着觐见负世之泰坦的计划。\n你的身体在云崖圣道上攀登，灵魂却在冥河滩涂上缓行…那些亡魂与登山道重合在一起，究竟想要讲述什么……
E: The Titan Cliff — the closest one can get to Kephale's mystic body in all of Amphoreus. You have been planning to seek an audience with the Worldbearing Titan.\nYour body climbs the Sacred Path of Dawncloud, but your soul lingers at the shores of River of Souls... The souls along the mountain path — what do they want to tell?

C: 次日午时，扎格列斯的半神将成为冥河之行的向导。今日今时，应为远行留存体力。\n{NICKNAME}就像学黉里准备春游的学生…即便性命危在旦夕，{F#她}{M#他}还是这么松弛，姑且算作是好事吧。
E: At noon of the next day, Zagreus's demigod will become a guide to traverse the River of Souls. Today, stamina should be conserved for the long trip ahead.\n{NICKNAME} is like a student preparing for a spring break trip... Even if lives are at stake {F#she}{M#he} is still so relaxed. That might be a good thing.

C: 在风堇的呼唤中，索拉比斯恢复了神智。既而，塞涅俄丝的两位随伴翼兽愿意为我们带路，前往艾格勒的所在处。
E: Responding to Hyacine's call, Solabis regained its sanity. Then, Seliose's two companion winged beasts offered to guide us to Aquila's location.

C: 在风堇的呼唤中，索拉比斯恢复了神智。既而，塞涅俄丝的两位随伴翼兽愿意为我们带路，前往艾格勒的所在处。
E: Responding to Hyacine's call, Solabis regained its sanity. Then, Seliose's two companion winged beasts offered to guide us to Aquila's location.

C: 在风堇的呼唤中，索拉比斯恢复了神智。既而，塞涅俄丝的两位随伴翼兽愿意为我们带路，前往艾格勒的所在处。
E: Responding to Hyacine's call, Solabis regained its sanity. Then, Seliose's two companion winged beasts offered to guide us to Aquila's location.

C: 塞涅俄丝的过往似乎与故事所述相差甚远，在她曾经的两名随伴奇兽陪同下，我们即将揭示被掩藏的古老真相。
E: Seliose's past seems to diverge greatly from what was told in bygone stories. Now, accompanied by her two mythical companion beasts from ages past, we stand poised to unveil the ancient and hidden truths.

C: 赛飞儿将刻法勒的火种带至斯缇科西亚保护起来，并独自解决了前来抢夺的「清洗者」。只是，威胁并非只有元老院的刺客，于此同时，盗火行者的身影也已触抵冥岸。
E: Cipher brought Kephale's Coreflame to Styxia for safeguarding, then single-handedly fended off the Cleaners who sought to seize it. Yet the threat goes beyond the Council's assassins, for at the same moment, the Flame Reaver's figure has settled upon the nether shore.

C: 激动人心的全新冒险即将展开，本姑娘却在临出发前突发恶疾…不对，身体抱恙，甚至还陷入了昏迷？！\n等到恢复清醒，眼前的景象却让本姑娘大吃一惊——光怪陆离的心像世界，恶魔低语般的切切呢喃——这里莫非就是……\n…完全没头绪！话说回来，我真的清醒了吗？
E: Just when an exhilarating new adventure was about to begin, I'm suddenly hit with some mystery illness... Wait, no, I got sick, and even fell into a coma!?\nWhen I finally came to, what I saw nearly knocked me off my feet — a bizarre, psychedelic world of mind, with hissed demonic whispers. Could this be...\n...No, I have no clue at all! Come to think of it... am I even really awake?

C: 知更鸟带来了一个奇怪的宝贝，能实现愿望的圣杯？哦，伙计，这可太酷了。
E: Robin just showed up with some weird treasure — a Holy Grail that grants wishes? Man, that's awesome.

C: 驻足的命运终将流动，英雄之旅的尽头，是永恒不变的归返和落幕。
E: Even the stillest fate must one day move. At the end of every hero's journey lies the same return and curtain fall.

C:
奥赫玛，最后的城，有着好多好多神话。
她曾像一位天真的宁芙，受着律法的庇护，穿着浪漫的华服，沐浴天空的曙光，在大地上起舞，听海洋的歌声，受着理性的教导，避开追求者的诡计，远离纷争和死亡，在一扇扇漂亮的门径间穿行，背负世界的拥护……
直至岁月带走了她的快乐、容貌、生命和更多。一具骸骨静静躺在石棺中。而在像白玉雕的肋骨下，心还没有枯萎。
扫却美丽心脏的灰，去听，听为你留存的心跳。
E:
Okhema, the last city, was a cradle of countless myths.
Once, she was like an innocent nymph, sheltered by law, draped in flowing finery, basking in sky's dawning light. She danced across the earth, listened to the ocean's songs, followed reason's teachings, slipped past suitors' trickery, untouched by strife or death. Through ever more beautiful passages she wandered, and people supported her in her worldbearing...
Until time took her joy, her beauty, her life, and more. A skeleton lies quietly in a stone coffin. Yet beneath ribs carved like white jade, her heart hasn't withered.
Wipe away the dust from that beautiful heart, and listen... listen to the heartbeat preserved for you.

C: 为什么父亲要献祭自己的女儿？为什么女儿要杀死自己的母亲？为什么神明在折磨凡人？为什么飞鹰要将龟壳掷向诗人的脑袋？\n在数不胜数的酒神诗歌中，人们愤恨、哀叹、无奈，因为那悲剧的起因总是无情无形的，无法被斩首或施以绞刑。就像水手杀不死海。
E: Why would a father sacrifice his daughter? Why would a daughter slay her mother? Why do gods torment mortals? Why would an eagle cast a tortoise shell upon a poet's head?\nIn countless poems of the wine god, people rage, grieve, and despair. It was because the roots of these tragedies are elusive and impassive, beyond the reach of blade or noose. Just as sailors cannot slay the sea.

C: 权杖内核层已严重损毁，宛如废墟。要想在此搜寻德谬歌的痕迹，无异于大海捞针。真是欲盖弥彰呀，这只说明一件事——\n我找对地方了。
E: The Scepter's kernel is severely damaged, little more than rubble. Seeking traces of the Demiurge here would be like finding a needle in a haystack. How revealing... This only confirms one thing...\nI'm exactly where I need to be.

C: 探索遇到阻碍，十四行代数式屏障将空间隔离。螺丝咕姆提议骇入独立信源终端，通过逆转算力来攻击屏障，开启权杖内核层的封印。
E: Exploration hit a snag. A barrier of quatorzain algebraic expressions has isolated this space. Screwllum suggests hacking into the independent signal terminal and using reverse computation to break through the barrier, unlocking the seal on the Scepter's kernel.

C: 愿望，只是救世主执念的一部分。深入归墟的旅途中，我们又与刻律德菈、海瑟音、缇安、缇宁等伙伴重逢。每位黄金裔都目睹了白厄一路走来的孤独抗争，也都毫不犹豫地化身同行的记忆，只为与救世主并肩作战。
E: Wishes are but a part of the Deliverer's obsession. During our journey deep into the ruin, we reunited with other companions such as Cerydra, Hysilens, Trianne, and Trinnon. Each Chrysos Heir witnessed Phainon's solitary defiance along the way, and they transformed without hesitation into memories that walk with us, only to be able to fight alongside the Deliverer.

C: 历经希拉与古恩这场经由时光埋藏的秘密后，你将录像带归还给以斯帖。\n她向你讲述了一则唏嘘的故事，而你将带着故事继续上路。
E: Once you uncover the secret of Sheila and Gunn from many years ago, you return the tapes to Esther.\nShe tells you a pitiful story. You will continue your journey with it in mind.

C: 防卫科人手不足，科室负责人阿兰建议先去探探目击者的口风。\n在交谈中，你渐渐了解到所谓的「诡影」究竟是什么……
E: Security is understaffed, and their director Arlan suggests first interviewing some of the eyewitnesses.\nDuring your chat, you gradually come to realize what this Shadow actually is...

C: 某位科员的所有物被「军团」怪物抢走，呜呜伯拜托你帮忙夺回来。\n清理空间站的「军团」余孽是防卫科的分内之事，阿兰与你答应了这个请求。
E: A researcher was robbed blind by monsters of the Legion. The Wubbaboo asks you to help retrieve the goods.\nGetting rid of Legion remnants around the space station is the Security Department's job. You and Arlan both agree to this request.

C: 维修工程师手动为你开启了光学身份校验程序，对你来说，这压根算不上什么难题。
E: The maintenance engineer starts the optical identity verification for you manually. So far, so good.

C: 一艘飞船…与星穹列车发生了追尾？\n你决定去鼓励一下那个与纯美骑士态度不同，看上去是在公司里上班跑龙套的职员…这两个人看上去完全不是同路人！为什么会一起出现？
E: A spaceship... has somehow rear-ended the Astral Express!?\nYou decide to go and encourage the IPC staff member whose attitude is wildly different from the Knight of Beauty and who looks just like another minor character... These two don't seem like they'd get along! Why are they appearing together?

C: 记忆盲点已经收集完毕，接下来是面对质询以及做出申辩的时间
E: You have finished collecting the Cognition Chasms. Now, it's time to face the interrogation and defend yourself.

C: 质询结束，你暂时洗清了嫌疑，但真理医生点名要求你一同前往阿兰处寻求协助
E: You have temporarily exculpated yourself by the end of the interrogation, but Dr. Ratio specifically asked for you to go with him to Arlan to ask for help.

C: {NICKNAME}的开拓日报：\n很多矿民，魂不守舍的。上去打听打听。
E: {NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:\nLots of miners look dazed. Need to chat with them.

C:
{NICKNAME}的开拓日报：
前情太复杂。总之：布洛妮娅&贝洛伯格，危。
先去找人收集意见。上层区开始。
帕姆注：到底发生了什么，倒是把细节说清楚啊帕！
E:
{NICKNAME}'s Trailblaze Daily Report:
Story leading up to this is too complicated. Basically, Bronya & Belobog = in danger.
Need to find people to get some ideas first. Starting from the Overworld.
Pom-Pom's Notes: What exactly is happening! Write down the details first, at least!

C: 矿车工老师傅为你准备了眼前的「矿车难题」——三下五除二地解决掉吧。
E: The senior mine cart operator prepared the Mine Cart Puzzle in front of you. Solve it promptly.

C: 不愿配合复诊的患者们各执一词，围绕着某种「特效药」的谜团也令你陷入深思。\n那些患者似乎都对娜塔莎颇有微词，你的内心也不由得感受到了一丝动摇。\n为了确认真相，或许你最好自己先去铆钉镇跑一趟，尝试发掘出「互助会」的真相。
E: The patients who refuse to come to the clinic for follow-up visits are each telling their own story, and the mystery surrounding this "wonder medicine" has left you deep in thought.\nThese patients seem to have some grievances against Natasha, which has caused you to feel a little unsettled.\nTo find out the truth, perhaps it would be best for you to make a trip to Rivet Town yourself and investigate the mutual aid society.

C: 你与佩拉一同来到「残响回廊」深处，并决定从此处开始向入口搜索。\n不多时，你与佩拉便找到了有用的线索。可惜这仅仅是个开始——因为老巴拉金似乎并不想让你们太轻松——总之，根据那位祖先的留言继续向前搜索吧。
E: You and Pela have come to the depths of the Corridor of Fading Echoes, and decide to start looking for the entrance from here.\nSoon, you find a useful clue, but this is just the beginning. It looks like old Balakin didn't want you to solve the puzzle easily... Anyway, keep searching according to the clues in his message.

C: 与佩拉充分交换了信息，你这才明白先前发生了什么事。但好在佩拉已经确认了「钥匙」所在的位置，只可惜似乎有些凶悍的怪物盘踞在附近。\n这大概是最后一道难关了——打倒怪物，取得茉莉的宝物吧！
E: After exchanging your findings with each other, you finally understand what happened just now. Fortunately, Pela has confirmed the location of the "key," but there are some fierce monsters lurking around.\nThis is the last challenge. Defeat the monsters and get Molly's treasure back!

C: 你与娜塔莎一同前往雪原，试图在一片白皑中寻找瓦赫生活过的痕迹。\n在打败了棘手的敌人之后，瓦赫的实验据点出现在你们眼前。\n也许他早已死去，也许他只是暂时离开了这里…无论如何，你们都应该仔细翻查一下这片区域。
E: Natasha and you head towards the Snow Plains, searching for traces of Vache's life.\nAfter defeating some troublesome enemies, you finally arrive at Vache's lab.\nMaybe he had already died long ago, maybe he only temporarily left this place... Either way, you should investigate this area carefully.

C: 根据铁卫的指示，击败盘踞在矿区大桥下的裂界生物
E: Under the Silvermane Guard's command, defeat the Fragmentum creatures roaming under the bridge in the mining area

C: 无论如何，次元扑满离开了两人的露营地——但它似乎为两位女孩留下了某些物什。\n两位女孩决定上前检查，看看那神秘生物究竟准备了怎样的惊喜。
E: Either way, the Warp Trotter leaves the camping ground, but it seems to have left something for the two girls.\nThe two girls decide to move up to investigate what the mysterious creature had prepared for them.

C: 佩拉提到，正在历经翻修工程的贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆遇到了一些阻力。\n跟着她逛逛博物馆，了解一下事情的原委。
E: Pela mentioned that the Belobog History and Culture Museum, currently being renovated, is facing some problems.\nVisit the museum with her to understand the issues at hand.

C: 丹枢是丹鼎司公认的「天才丹士」，也许她可以帮你阐明这份「龙蟠虬跃」的药理。
E: Dan Shu is the alchemist extraordinaire in the Alchemy Commission. Maybe she could help you understand the prescription of this Draught of Draconic Surge.

C: 你很警惕，没有吃下丹枢为你准备的「餐云承露丹」。丹鼎司的丹士长为什么会突然塞给你这么可疑的药物？情况不太对劲，快去和青镞商量一下吧。
E: You are cautious and didn't swallow the Brumedew Concentrate Pellet Dan Shu has prepared for you. Why would the Chief Alchemist of the Alchemy Commission give you a suspicious pellet like this? Something's afoot, go and discuss it with Qingzu.

C: 你找到了陶德的笔记本，但上面并非如他所说那样记满笔记，你对此有些奇怪，却毫无头绪…无论如何，你都得将笔记本交还给他。
E: You find Todd's notebook, but it's not full of notes as he mentioned. You find it a little odd, but don't know what to make of it... In any case, you ought to return the notebook back to him.

C: 你总算等来了陶德的消息，他约你前往某处见面再聊……
E: You finally receive a message from Todd. He's asking you to meet somewhere to talk...

C: 梅姐没有携带玉兆，也回答不上你的问题，只想着要找回散落的笔记。也许笔记上写着联系方式，你可以通过笔记联系上她的亲属，帮她找找看吧。
E: Mei doesn't have a jade abacus and can't answer your questions — she just wants to get the notes back. Perhaps there're some contact details on the notes and you can use them to contact her next of kin?

C: 「美丽狐仙聊天」的话术似乎也不太高明，但是你从她略显暧昧的言语中猜到，就这样聊下去，电信诈骗即将发生。再和艾丝妲再商量一下吧。
E: The manipulation of the Foxian Beauty Chat doesn't seem too great, but you can guess from her slightly vague words that if things carry on like this, some fraud is bound to happen. It might be best to discuss this with Asta again.

C: 被十王司的判官当作是误入迷途的市民了，幸好半夏有魔阴身症状一事没有暴露，该继续前进了。\n半夏要撑不住了，见上爱人最后一面应该还是有机会的。
E: You got misidentified as a lost citizen by the Ten-Lords Commission, fortunately Banxia's Mara-struck symptoms were not exposed. Move on.\nBanxia is on her last straw, but she should still have a chance to see her loved one a final time.

C: 去海边完成放生仪式吧。话说事情到底是怎么演变到这一步的…算了，无所谓了。感恩行善，功德无量，药王慈怀。
E: Go to the coast to complete the release ceremony. Actually, how did things get to this point... Never mind. It doesn't matter. Be grateful and do good deeds, obtain immeasurable merit, mercy of Sanctus Medicus.

C: 受怀炎将军所遣，三月七与云璃登上竞锋舰参与演武仪典。除了要在擂台上争逐胜利，她们还要承担起抵御危机，戍守擂台的职责。只是，初登场的少女剑士难免心怀忐忑……
E: General Huaiyan tasks March 7th and Yunli with boarding the Skysplitter and participating in the Wardance. Apart from striving for victory in the arena, they must also take up the responsibility of defending the arena against potential crises. However, the young swordswoman who will be making her debut can't help but feel anxious at such a prospect...

C: 眼前的芙洛拉竟然是莱斯利•迪恩生前的演员助理。\n追随她留下的影子，见证她和莱斯利之间的故事吧。
E: It turns out that the lady named Flora was Lesley Dean's former assistant during his lifetime.\nFollow her shadow and witness the stories between her and Lesley.

C: 从柯柯娜的内心世界中回来之后，柯柯娜消失不见，护理师乔凡娜或许知道发生了什么情况。
E: You have returned from Cocona's inner world, only to find that she is nowhere to be found. Giovanna the dream nurse may know something.

C: 柯柯娜朝花坛走去，看看她想做什么。
E: Cocona is walking towards the flower beds. See what she is up to.

C: 音乐制作人埃夫姆似乎正沉醉于美梦之中，忘记了此行是为了谈生意。快找到他，免得埃夫姆和合作伙伴们的心血付之东流。
E: Music producer Ephraim seems to have overindulged himself in his dreams, and forgotten that he is here on official business. Find him quickly, before Ephraim and his partners' hard work go up in smoke.

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 我知道他们后来是怎么评价我的——荒诞无稽、杀人为乐…他们说错了。\n掌权后，我再也没有快乐过，甚至再也没能睡过一整个晚上。恐惧像深海中涌出的巨型乌贼，将我的心死死缠住，试图将它拖进黑暗的深渊。\n除了不断地清除掉那些恐惧的源头…灰骑士，我又能怎么办呢？我又该怎么办呢？
E: I know what they said about me later — outrageous, murdering for pleasure... But they were wrong. \nAfter gaining power, I've never been happy, neither have I gotten a peaceful night's sleep — the fear surges forth like a giant squid from the abyssal depths, entwining its tentacles around my heart, attempting to pull me back into the black abyss.\nApart from severing the origins of these fears... Gray Knight, what can I do? What do I do?

C: 听巴罗说，猎犬家系正在追捕筑梦师，帮助巴罗将那些人引开。
E: According to Barlow, the Bloodhound Family is arresting Dreamweavers. Help Barlow to distract them.

C: 你已经变身为哈努兄弟，现在你再也不用担心身高问题了。\n混进「四尺圣堂」的集会所，找到青雀吧…如果你感兴趣的话，或许也可以和那位「矲主」罗伊罗伊聊聊。
E: Now that you have transformed into Brother Hanu, your height is no longer a concern.\nBlend into the gathering place of the Four-Foot Hall and locate Qingque... and if you are interested, you may also talk with that "Master" named Royroy and see what you can find out.

C: 记忆的舞台从纷争的剑下来到了负世的座下，危险与灾厄暂且远离了这段往事，你接下来或许可以欣赏一段没那么沉重的故事。但你要知道，以厮杀与苦难作为进场歌的戏剧，往往也以此作为退场——逛街，促进感情的好方式，无论在哪个时代、哪个世界，都是如此。\n「迅速接受情人是可耻的，应该经过一段时间，因为时间对于许多事物常常是最好的考验。」
E: The stage of this memory has transitioned from under Strife's blade to beneath Worldbearing's seat. The threat and disaster have subsided for now, and maybe you might even be able to immerse yourself in a slightly less heavy story. But you must be aware that any play that begins with slaughter and suffering often meets a similar end... Shopping — it is a wonderful way to increase intimacy in any world or time.\n"It is shameful to accept a lover too quickly. One must take their time — as time is often the best test."

C: 最后一站，空间站「黑塔」！\n这可是一手资料哦，站长一定会喜欢的。
E: Final stop, the Herta Space Station!\nThis is first-hand intel. The Lead Researcher is sure to love it.

C: 你的学生希拉竟是一名仿生人，你答应要教导她的也并非什么寻常知识，而是教她如何做人。
E: Your student, Sheila, is an android, and you're going to teach her how to act like a human.

C: 出于一些原因，塔米拉并不想和华劳斯做朋友。\n真是糟糕的消息…回去和华劳斯说明情况吧。
E: Tamila does not want to be Wallace's friend due to reasons.\nWhat a terrible news... Go back to Wallace to explain the situation.

C: 民间科学家雷金希望能把他的「大宇宙时间隧道」论文递交给大守护者。\n但他似乎与贝洛伯格教育部的官员有些过节，因此「雇佣」了你来作为他的代理人。\n去上层区转转，找找有没有能帮他递交论文的人吧。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, hopes to submit his thesis about the big universe time tunnel to the Supreme Guardian.\nHowever, he seems to have had some conflict with the Belobog Ministry of Education officers, and "hired" you to be his proxy.\nWalk around the Overworld and search for someone who can submit the thesis for him.

C: 民间科学家雷金正在找人帮忙。\n他似乎对贝洛伯格教育部的题库产生了兴趣，还指望你能帮上些忙。
E: The Civilian Scientist, Regin, is looking for help.\nHe seems to have currently taken an interest in the Belobog Ministry of Education's question bank. Maybe you can help him.

C: 丹鼎司洞天重开之后，鱼龙混杂。仅仅依靠护珠人在海滩巡逻是不够的，他们向善良勇敢的志愿者发出了邀请。\n护珠人跃渊希望你能参与海滩巡逻…真是的，守护这片沙滩的人到底是谁呢？
E: After the Alchemy Commission delve reopened, people honest and crooked walked betwixt each other. As such, the Pearlkeepers alone are no longer enough to patrol the beach. They have offered invitations to brave and noble volunteers for the task at hand.\nYueyuan the Pearlkeeper hopes that you can help patrol the beach... Seriously, though, who's the one that actually protects this place?

C: 「明明是瑟希斯的造物，却将浪漫的线相连。若你触碰它的根须，便能打下缘分的结。」简单易懂的谜语…是吧？
E: "A creation clearly of Cerces, but connecting the threads of romance. Touch its roots, and you can tie the knot of fate." A simple riddle... right?

C: 「幽灵」托付给你一件物品，并希望你能将它带向天空。试着达成她的心愿吧。
E: The "ghost" entrusts you with an item and hopes that you can bring it to the sky. Try to fulfill her wish.

C: 黑塔要求你以「开拓」的身份进入天才俱乐部制作的「模拟宇宙」，试着从虚拟星神口中套出星神与命途的奥秘。
E: Herta asks you to enter the Simulated Universe created by the Genius Society while pretending to be the Aeon of Trailblaze, and try to glean the secret of Aeons and Paths from the simulated Aeons.

C: 帕姆似乎有什么礼物要给你，快回去看看吧。
E: Pom-Pom seems to have something to give you, go back and have a look.

C: 帕姆建议你去车窗边走走，或许会有不一样的收获。
E: Pom-Pom suggests you to take a walk near the window, maybe you'll discover something.

C: 此前，创世涡心与其他场所一样，部分结构产生了虚浮化。为你提供馈赠的那只水盆对此做何反应呢？去看看吧。
E: Parts of the Vortex of Genesis's structure had started to float like many other structures did. How would the basin that provided you gifts react to this? Go and take a look.

C: 辩论的风气在奥赫玛流行已久，而你恰巧碰见了两位精通修辞学的教师，去听听他们会提出什么样有趣的观点吧。
E: The culture of debate has been popular in Okhema for a long time, and you just so happen to have met with two teachers that are proficient in the art of rhetoric. Go and see what kinds of interesting perspectives they put forward.

C: 果蔬摊老板德墨忒尔的女儿失踪已久，然而就在昨天，她梦到了自己最亲爱的孩子。或许你回溯记忆的能力能够帮到她。
E: The fruit and veg store owner Demetria's daughter has been missing for a long time. However, she dreamt of her beloved child just last night. Perhaps your ability to rewind memories could be of assistance?

C: 由于黎明云崖的准入规定，渴望与刻法勒说话的希瑞雅被守卫拦在入口。试试和守卫沟通一下，让他为这个小女孩淳朴的心愿放行吧。
E: Due to Dawncloud's entry regulations, Serena, who wishes to speak with Kephale, is stopped by the guard at the entrance. Try talking to the guard to allow this little girl's innocent wish.

C: 雷金的感应仪又有了新动静！去歌德宾馆瞧瞧具体情况吧！
E: Regin's sensor found something again! Head to the Goethe Hotel to learn about the details!

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n博物馆的展品修复员鲍里斯似乎正在犯难——前往修理间帮帮他吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nBoris, the restorer of the museum, seems to be troubled. Go and find him at the restoration room.

C: 贝洛伯格历史文化博物馆开展在即。为了展览顺利举行，于尔丹正在收集合适的藏品。\n大守护者布洛妮娅似乎想要为此找你谈谈——听听她想说些什么吧。
E: Belobog's History and Culture Museum will be opening soon. Uldan is collecting appropriate exhibits to ensure a successful opening.\nSupreme Guardian Bronya seems to have something to tell you. Go meet with her.

C: 工业展馆的展品似乎已经全部集齐了——为此，馆长于尔丹有话想对你说。
E: All the exhibits in the Industrial Hall seems to have been collected. Uldan the curator has something to tell you regarding that.

C: 在西衍先生的故事中，你需要化身机巧鸟，破除禁制、收集丹药、获得初代司鼎的秘宝…你感觉怪怪的，但西衍先生说，这是象征着你如鸟儿一般自由。
E: In Mr. Xiyan's story, you need to become a cycrane to break the containment mechanism, collect pellets, and obtain the secret treasures of the first Cauldron Master of the Alchemy Commission — You feel odd about this, but Mr. Xiyan says this symbolizes you are as free as a bird.

C: 谈判将近，先确认一下手上的谈判材料吧。\n与小秘书一起确认材料，争取在接下的言语交锋中取得优势。
E: The time of negotiations is drawing near. You should go over your negotiation materials first.\nConfirm your negotiation materials with Miss Secretary and strive to claim the advantage in the upcoming clash of words.

C: 为了重振金人巷，商会希望充分利用码头物流，与金人巷的商户们建立紧密的合作。\n商会派你来劝说「寿考堂」与商会建立合作关系。但「寿考堂」的老板小天此时却碰上了一些麻烦……
E: In order to revitalize Aurum Alley, the merchant guild aims to fully utilize the docks' logistics capacity and establish close collaborations with the stores in the alley.\nThe guild has sent you to persuade Longevity Hall to establish a partnership with the guild. However, its proprietress Little Tian has encountered some troubles at the moment...

C: 原来乔瓦尼一直有意引导你们达成某个目标，仿佛摆弄掌心里的玩偶。这种感觉可真不痛快，要赶快找他问清楚才是。
E: As it turns out, Giovanni intended to use you as a means to his ends all along, manipulating you like a puppet. The entire thing leaves you with a nasty feeling, and you need to find him at once to get some clear answers.

C: 使用调虎离山计的浮烟趁绥园中没有判官，再次纠集起巨大的力量。显然这一次它也不会得逞。\n浮烟将这次策动看作是逼景元与它决战的一手棋。
E: Cirrus, having distracted the attention of everyone, gathered its power once again while the judges were absent from Fyxestroll Garden. Evidently, its plans failed once more.\nCirrus perceives this part of its plan as a step to force Jing Yuan into a fight.

C: 当前收集的造物数据还不够，继续培育造物，努力提升研究进度吧，这个重任依然在你肩上……
E: There's still not enough data on the creations. Keep nurturing them and work hard to improve the research progress. The weight of this task still rests upon your shoulders...

C: 合照已拍好，你准备将这合照发给阮•梅，不知道她看完会作何感想呢……
E: The group photo has been taken, and you prepare to send it off to Ruan Mei. Who knows what she'll think of it...

C: 美食庆典正在进行中！去问问杰伊今日需要什么食材吧。
E: The gourmet carnival is in progress! Ask Jay what ingredients are needed for today.

C: 混乱的梦境卷走了美梦小镇赖以生存的物资。你必须深入梦中，将这些物资一一找回。
E: The chaotic Dreamscape has swept away the supplies Dreamville relies upon to survive. You have to enter the dream and recover all of them.

C: 混乱的梦境卷走了你的同伴们，你必须深入其中、将失散的大伙重新集结起来。
E: The chaotic Dreamscape has swept away your companions. You have to delve into the dream to reunite with your lost companions.

C: 据说某些品类的苏乐达在梦中拥有颠倒重力的能力…当然也可能是梦泡制作组单纯需要一个玩法包装。\n总之，借用它的力量踏上墙壁吧。
E: It's said that certain types of SoulGlad can reverse gravity in the dream... but it could be that the dream bubble producers needed to package their gameplay with some in-game lore.\nAnyway, use its power to walk on walls.

C: 迷宫又发生了变化，但你怀疑这不是最后一次。
E: The maze has changed again, but you suspect that this may not be the last time.

C: 在「钟表把戏」的影响下，米莫萨改变了想法。她动身前往流梦礁，寻找关于钟表小子的秘密…\n米莫萨好像遇到了什么麻烦，去帮帮她吧。
E: Under the influence of clockwork, Mimosa changed her mind. She headed to Dreamflux Reef to search for a secret regarding Clockie...\nIt looks like Mimosa is in some kind of trouble. Go and help her.

C: 米莫萨归还了《美梦大机密》的胶卷，去完成这最后一部影片的剪辑吧。
E: Mimosa returned the Dreamjoy Secrecy film. Go and wrap up editing for this last film.

C: 《哈努兄弟大劫案》的拍摄开始了，按目标完成拍摄任务吧！/本层的拍摄已经完成，去下一个片场吧！
E: Filming for Brother Hanu's Great Heist has started. Complete filming missions according to the goals!\nFilming on this floor has concluded. Go to the next location!

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•枪火的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将扮演钟表小子动画系列亦正亦邪、充满魅力的形象——哈努兄弟。\n「这到底是要比什么？」你想，「比谁的『哼』更酷吗？」
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Gunfire Trial arena. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role of the evil-retributing, charisma-overflowing character from the Clockie series — Brother Hanu.\n"What is this competition supposed to be about?" You wonder. "Are we trying to see who has the coolest 'hmph'?"

C: 第二次选择！你和流萤来到了「戏梦奇战•枪火时间•时间的试炼」的舞台。根据引导员的说法，你们将与钟表小子动画系列中广受欢迎的角色——钟表小子——一道，突破重重难关，最终……\n…帮助这位并非真正的钟表小子的钟表小子克服与生俱来的存在主义危机。游戏也可以很深刻，不是吗？
E: The second choice! You and Firefly arrive at the Dreamplay Fantasia — Gunfire Time: Time Trial stage. According to the guide's instructions, you need to play the role ever-popular protagonist from the Clockie series — Clockie. Smash through the final obstacles together...\n...Help this inauthentic Clockie overcome an existential crisis. The game can also be rather profound, can't it?

C: 你收到了一封来自家族的邀请函——鸢尾花家系的缇娜诚邀你去测试一款名为「折纸小鸟对对碰」的三消对战游戏。\n看起来倒不像是诈骗…那么，去看看也没什么损失吧？
E: You have received an invitation from The Family — Tinah of the Iris Family invites you to test a match-3 puzzle battle game called "Origami Bird Clash."\nIt doesn't seem like a scam... So, go take a look? There's nothing to lose.

C: 紧张刺激的比赛暂告一段落，可以暂时休息一下了。\n利用这段时间，为接下来的比赛做好准备吧。
E: The tense and exciting match draws to a temporary close. It's time to have a quick breather.\nUse this time to prepare for the upcoming match.

C: 名为奢摩的挑战者，会是怎样的一位选手？赶快开始接下来的比赛吧。
E: What kind of opponent would the challenger named Samatha be? Hurry and start the next match.

C: 你成为了「音乐派对」表演乐队的经理。现在，你的乐队需要在校园中央的舞台上完成三场演出。\n万事俱备，该前往此行的「战场」了！
E: You've become the manager of the music party's performing band, and now your band needs to complete 3 performances on the stage in the middle of the campus.\nAll is ready. It's time to head to the battlefield!

C: 既然这只奇美拉为战胜你做了如此多的准备，那就拿出真本事来，让它好好见识你的厉害吧！
E: This chimera has gone to great lengths to challenge you. Show it what you are truly capable of and give it your best shot!

C: 今日待鉴定宝物已准备好，去找西塔罗斯吧。
E: The treasures up for appraisal today are ready. Time to talk to Theodoros.

C: 拜访丹恒的房间
E: Visit Dan Heng's room

C: 寻找「地火」的踪迹
E: Look for traces of Wildfire

C: 前往奥列格为众人安排的住处
E: Go to the accommodation arranged by Oleg

C: 开启通向史瓦罗基地的大门
E: Open the gate to Svarog's base

C: 直面史瓦罗
E: Face Svarog

C: 搭乘星槎，前往星槎海中枢
E: Take a starskiff to Central Starskiff Haven

C: 与停云交谈
E: Talk to Tingyun

C: 找到石头老板的财宝
E: Find Boss Stone's treasure

C: 前往殿堂的出口
E: Head to the hall's exit

C: 观看回忆
E: Watch the memory

C: 在珍品室中寻找沙盘的线索
E: Look for the sandpit clue in the treasure room

C: 前往克劳克影视乐园
E: Head to the Clock Studios Theme Park

C: 跟随三月七和丹恒前往甜品社摊位
E: Accompany March 7th and Dan Heng to the Dessert Club booth

C: 继续探索奥赫玛
E: Continue to explore Okhema

C: 接受阿格莱雅的拷问，最好坦诚些吧
E: Submit to Aglaea's interrogation — it's better to speak the truth

C: 继续前进，深入悬锋城
E: Continue onward deep into Castrum Kremnos

E: Chat with Tantan and try to deduce the whereabouts of the offending starskiff

E: Escort Jingliu

C: 向明阅打听消息
E: Ask Mingyue for more information

C: 探索绥园！出来吧！小鬼们！
E: Explore Fyxestroll Garden! Bring it on, shades!

E: Find the exit of the Illusory Maze

E: Speak with Dr. Edward

E: Defeat the IPC's armed forces

E: Head to the Palace of Astrum to see the General

C: 搜查引擎室，找出故障源

E: Collect strange paper balls

E: Taste the teahouse's new Nerve Soothing Tea

E: Return Artakama's sword back to Old Fabio

E: Defeat the attacking Black Tide Creatures

E: Confirm the negotiation materials and speak with Mingxi

E: Enter the Planar Infinity

E: (Optional) Talk to Jing Yuan

E: Visit Wenyuan and check on him

E: Try to capture heliobi using the cycrane

C: 前往金人巷，等待桂乃芬的安排
E: Head to Aurum Alley and wait for Guinaifen's directions

E: Talk to Herta

E: Talk to Jay

E: Return to the Rebels' Maze

E: Experience The Way of the Wolf (End) Part 1

E: Head to the deck of The Radiant Feldspar / The Trailblaze's Stern / The Tatalov / The Soaring Clock Hand and talk to Tinah

C: 前往磐岩镇，找娜塔莎聊聊
E: Go to Boulder Town and chat with Natasha
