E: Go check out the stage with Rappa

C: 与布凯辛对话，汇报你的测试结果
E: Talk to Grumpy and report your test results

C: <color=#f29e38ff>感知训练</color>的效率提高#1%
E: Increases <color=#f29e38ff>Acuity Training</color> efficiency by #1%

C: 良性Bug
E: Positive Bug

C: 长盈
E: Evergreen

C: 手眼身法
E: Corporeal Maneuver

C: 我是谁，原来叫什么，我来自哪里…这些我都忘得一干二净了。连「三月七」这个名字，也只是为了纪念我被唤醒的日期而起的。
E: Who I am, where I'm from, my name... it's like everything was erased from my mind. "March 7th" was the day they found me, so it stuck.

C: 什么啊，这叫自得其乐！
E: Don't be silly — this is fun!

C: 我们的下个目的地是颗很小的行星，编号是「雅利洛-Ⅵ」。
E: Our next stop is a small planet called Jarilo-VI.

C: 帕姆参与过冒险吗？
E: Have you been on an adventure before, Pom-Pom?

C: 现在你来了，解放的大概也不会是我。
E: And even after you arrived, I didn't suppose I'd be the one to be liberated of that duty.

C: 说不定这就是你的老家。
E: This might actually be your homeworld.

C: 勇敢无畏的开拓者，天行为善的无名客，想来不会坐视不理。
E: Oh you brave and fearless Trailblazers, you benevolent Nameless, can you really remain indifferent to that?

C: 可以说是宇宙中已知势力里排得上号的存在了。
E: It's fair to say that it ranks highly among the known forces in the universe.

C: 你不是说要投反对票吗？！
E: Didn't you say you were voting against!?

C: （她似乎完全忘了是下去执行任务的。）
E: (I wonder if she even remembers we've got a job to do down there...)

C: 那算了。不管他了，这次咱俩多拍些照片，让他狠狠羡慕羡慕。
E: *sigh* Fine, I'll leave him alone then. We'll just have to take loads of selfies till he gets super jealous.

C: 千年过去，这些介绍还有用吗？
E: Are these destination overviews still useful after a thousand years?

C: 这白胡子老头儿是谁？
E: Who's this old guy with a white beard?

C: 似乎是用于监控特殊死角的屏幕，并没有出现异常状态。
E: This screen seems to be used to monitor unique blind spots. Nothing abnormal is showing up.

C: 箱子和货架，闲人勿近。
E: Boxes and shelves. Do not approach.

C: 去下一个地方，为准备好的未来铺路。
E: The next stop, to pave the way for the future that is written.

C: 我…什么都不记得了。
E: I... don't remember a thing.

C: 姬子～你早点来嘛！最后那票反物质军团和蝗虫似的。咱可是用箭的，打起来多费劲呀。
E: Whew, Himeko~ What took you so long! That last wave of Antimatter Legion came at us like a swarm of locusts, have you ever tried shooting locusts with a bow?

C: 倒是你们星穹列车的乘员，个个身手不凡……
E: On the other hand, the entire crew of the Astral Express seems to be extraordinarily skilled.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着希儿：「<unbreak>33</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Seele: "<unbreak>33</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着彦卿：「<unbreak>99</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Yanqing: "<unbreak>99</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 这把怪枪到底是根据什么来打分的……
E: What on earth is this gun basing its scores on...

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着乱破：「<unbreak>59</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Rappa: "<unbreak>59</unbreak> points!" it announces.

C: 定分枪的眼睛看着遐蝶：「<unbreak>0.1</unbreak>分！」它宣布。
E: The Rating Pistol gazes at Castorice: "<unbreak>0.1</unbreak> point!" it announces.

C: 保不准就在附近！我视力好，先去瞅瞅。
E: It has to be nearby! Let me go take a peek with my sharp eyes.

C: 「星核」是首要原因，但也不是唯一的原因。
E: While that might be the biggest reason, it's not the only one.

C: 我可以留在空间站吗？
E: Can I stay at the space station?

C: 品位…啊，你说这辆列车？我是在问你的身体状况。
E: Tasteful... Oh, you mean the train? I was asking how you felt physically.

C: 那这里呢…
E: What about here...?

C: ——什么人？
E: Hm? Who's there?

C: 列车的过去…
E: About the history of the Express...

C: 我有别的问题…
E: I have another question...

C: 日思夜想。
E: All the time.

C: 克里珀堡？
E: Qlipoth Fort?

C: 嗯，我也有类似的感觉。就像那个房间里不只有我们几个一样。
E: Hmm, I had a similar feeling. Almost as if we weren't the only people in the room.

C: 杰帕德大人那么英明果决，而且还出身高贵…他肯定会帮我的。
E: Captain Gepard is wise and decisive, and of noble birth... I'm sure he'd help me.

C: 这个世界真是多灾多难。
E: This world really is in dire straits.

C: 寒潮似乎并非简单的自然灾害，百年前的气象学记录也无法解释它的成因。简单来说，这是困扰了贝洛伯格科学家们好几个世纪的难题。
E: The Eternal Freeze is no ordinary natural disaster — meteorological records from hundreds of years ago cannot explain the cause. To put it simply, it's a problem that has plagued Belobog scientists for centuries.

C: 嗯。行动低调点，我们现在仍是被通缉的状态。
E: Mm. But... we must keep a low profile — we're still wanted fugitives.

C: 上下层被隔绝实在太久了…太久了。
E: The Overworld and the Underworld... We've... We've been cut off for so long.

C: 你通常不叫我的大名。
E: You don't normally use my full name.

C: 你不用回去上班吗，茉莉？
E: Don't you have to go back to work, Molly?

C: {NICKNAME}，这次事件的犯人我已经心里有数了…他们的名字都在我的记录册上，一个也跑不了。
E: {NICKNAME}, I already know the people responsible for this... their names are all in my records. They won't get away.

C: 啊…那六七百年前的加密算法是什么样的呢？
E: So, what encryption algorithm did they use then?

C: 看姓氏，这位理查德确实是我的祖辈——等等，这不就是刚刚佩拉小姐提到的那个人吗？而且他到底在说什么谜语？
E: Based on the surname, this Richard is indeed my ancestor. Wait, isn't this the guy Miss Pela just mentioned? And what on earth does this mean anyway?

C: 嗯，但布洛妮娅似乎还没到场。先找个地方歇息片刻吧。
E: Looks like it. Bronya hasn't arrived yet, though. Let's find somewhere to wait.

C: 我们一定会尽全部的努力，坚持到「开拓者」返航的那天。就算要再花上七百个年头…雅利洛-Ⅵ的孩子也会一直仰望星空，心怀希望。
E: We will hold out with everything we have until the day you Trailblazers return. Even if it takes another <unbreak>700</unbreak> years, the children of Jarilo-VI will look up to the sky with hope in their hearts.

C: …什么啊，居然连及格分都没有吗？
E: ...What!? That run-of-the-mill, huh?

C: …不要意气用事，希儿！我不会放你——
E: ...Come on, Seele! I won't leave you to—

C: 哈哈，也别喝太多啦，小心晚上睡不着。
E: Haha, don't drink too much, or you won't be able to sleep tonight.

C: …你到底是帮哪边的啊？！
E: ...Hey, you're taking his side already!?

C: 我还没搞清楚情况，我不站边。
E: I'm not taking sides — I don't even know what the deal is.

C: 上车？
E: Join the Express?

C: 哦，那个啊～那是我们家最可爱的玲宝刚出门科考时寄回家的植物标本。
E: Oh, that~ It's a botanical specimen — little Lynxy sent it during one of her research trips.

C: 按刚才约定好的，我来给你讲讲这小暖炉背后的故事吧。
E: As promised, let me tell you the story behind this little heater.

C: 当夜晚来临时，一盏盏点亮的路灯将为人们指明回家的路。
E: When night draws near, street lamps light up the way home.

C: 你看见《水晶日报•周末版》，上面有笑话版，显然周末的报纸不那么严肃。
E: You spot the Crystal Daily — Weekend Edition. There's also a section for jokes. Apparently, the weekend issue isn't so serious.

C: 这辆汽车的车窗上积了厚厚的灰，你越往里面瞧，越觉得自己看见了深渊。
E: There's a thick layer of dirt on the car window. The more you look at it, the more you feel like you're looking into the abyss.

C: 这是广场的小卖部。你意外地发现：对面也有一座小卖部。
E: It's a small shop in the plaza. Unexpectedly, there's another one on the opposite side.

C: 你盯着垃圾桶看了许久，它们好像变了，寒铁桶边不再锈迹斑斑，桶身上的凹陷也平整了许多。
E: As you continue staring at the trashcans, they seem to turn before your very eyes. The edges are no longer rusty and the dents are smoothed over.

C: 别这么说嘛！我桑博一向关照朋友，这几人帮了我的忙，怎么也得把人情还上啊。
E: Hey now! Sampo Koski's primary concern is taking care of his friends. These guys scratched my back. How could I live with myself if I didn't scratch theirs?

C: 你见过了…我们承诺的世界。
E: You have witnessed... the world we have promised.

C: 谁知道呢，神神秘秘的。他自称是倒货商，也不晓得在地下有什么货供他倒，但那家伙确实有不少门路。
E: Good question... he's a man of mystery. He claims to be a simple cross-border businessman — not that there's much to interest an Overworlder down here. Either way, he's got a surprising number of connections.

C: 那就好…你这不是全都听见了吗！
E: Hehe, good. Wait a second... You did too hear everything Hook was saying!

C: 我是奥列格头儿的贵客。
E: I'm Oleg's guest.

C: 这前面是流浪者的聚集地，现在入口被封起来了。估计是怕愤怒的矿民报复吧。
E: This area up ahead is a vagrant dwelling, but they've sealed off the entrance. I guess they're afraid that angry miners might try to take revenge.

C: 怎么会闹到这个地步？
E: How could the situation here become such a mess?

C: 他们会出现在这里就是证明。
E: As evidenced by their presence here.

C: 你不是说在搏击俱乐部拿到冠军，才能得到线索吗？
E: You said I'd uncover a clue if I became the Fight Club champion.

C: 我们一起风中来雪里去！并肩迎战杰帕德•朗道！我不顾生命危险闯入裂界，从布洛妮娅•兰德的魔爪下救了你们！
E: What do you mean!? We battled wind and snow — fought shoulder to shoulder against the great Gepard Landau! I risked life and limb in the Fragmentum to save you from the evil clutches of the fearsome Bronya Rand!

C: 你这个人，多少有点问题……
E: ...There's... something wrong with you.

C: 就像古老传说中，那些身携星神的意志，各色各样的星际旅行者。
E: Just like the interstellar travelers of ancient legend — people of all kinds that carried the will of the Aeons.

C: 我没有听说过什么「星核」，真的。
E: Truthfully, I've never heard of this Stellaron.

C: 为什么愿意和我们合作？
E: Why are you willing to cooperate with us?

C: 明白了，你可以随时来找我。
E: No problem, come find me any time.

C: 明白了，你可以随时来找我。
E: No problem, come find me any time.

C: 梦？
E: Dreams?

C: 你看那边，看见了吗？那儿以前是整个铆钉镇最乱的街区，也是我长大的地方。
E: Over there, see that? That used to be the worst street in Rivet Town... and it's also where I grew up.

C: 我带你们下来，当然也得负责带回去～这是免费的售后服务，包君满意。
E: I brought you down. I can take you back up! Free of charge, satisfaction guaranteed.

C: 你的通道贡献出来！
E: Just tell us the path you used before!

C: 怎么，舍不得地底啊？去吧去吧，我在这儿等着你们。
E: What's the matter? Got too attached to the underground? Go ahead, I'll be waiting here.

C: 我在听…说下去。
E: ...I'm listening. Go on.

C: 什么？凭什么只有虎克挨批评了呀！
E: What? Why did she only yell at Hook!?

C: 哼…如果不能引领潮流，就注定会被时代淘汰…是时候了！我要探索全新的商业模式……
E: Hmph... In this world, you either lead or die... so it's time for me to start exploring a completely new business model...

C: 我手下的人什么样儿我还不清楚？你说的这些纯属瞎操心，别费这个劲了。
E: Hey, I know my boys, no need for you to get all worked up for nothing.

C: 粉丝？什么粉丝？拳赛只是消遣而已，我劝各位还是不要带入太多感情……
E: Fan? What fan? It's just games, don't drag yourself too deep into it...

C: 看来那个一直寄送包裹的好心人就是科鲁泽……
E: So the anonymous donor was Kluzer...

C: 听虎克大人说，他们就是……
E: Boss Hook said they are...

C: 老弟，还有精神吗？我想跟你聊两句。
E: If you're not too tired, Gepard, can I talk to you for a moment?

C: 我…想去看看星核。我想去看看可可利亚牺牲的地方。
E: I... want to see the Stellaron. I want to see the place where Cocolia sacrificed herself.

C: 哦？{M#大哥哥}{F#大姐姐}也知道《冒险鼹鼠队》吗？
E: Oh? {M#Mister}{F#Miss}, do you know about The Adventurous Moles too?

C: 当然相信了！
E: Of course I do!

C: 我也找不到。不然我早就找齐了，哪儿还有你的事。
E: But I don't know where to look either. Otherwise, I would have found them myself. What would I need you for?

C: 这页后记是娜塔莎大姐姐交给我的，你正好没有，我就交给你了呗。
E: The postscript was given to me by big sister Natasha. You happened to be missing it, so I gave it to you.

C: 这根路灯不会掉落道具和素材，也不提供新的任务。
E: This street lamp will not drop items or material, and it will not unlock a new mission.

C: 从沙袋上你能学会的事：重是有好处的，当别人攻击你时，他的手会疼。
E: What you learned from observing the sandbag: It pays to be heavy. When people are attacking you, their hands will hurt.

C: 你很想搞点恶作剧，但你不具备这样的条件：就是说，你甚至没有得到过崇高道德的赞许，在这种情况下做坏事，它会很不高兴的。
E: You want to conduct something so mischievous, but you are unable to do it. Or you can put it that way: You have never received the Praise of High Morals. In that case, if you insist on doing bad things, it will be really upset.

C: 据悉，绝灭大君「铁墓」常出现于科技发达的世界，以残酷无情的手段摧毁高度发展的文明。
E: Sources indicate that the Lord Ravager Irontomb frequently targets technologically advanced worlds, employing ruthless methods to obliterate highly developed civilizations.

C: 你们的来意，停云已经悉数向我禀报过了。本来我的职责并不包括接见旅客。
E: Tingyun has informed me of the purpose of your visit. Receiving guests isn't normally one of my responsibilities...

C: 我们曾经阻止过星核的灾难，这一次前来，也只是为了助各位一臂之力。
E: We have experience in preventing Stellaron disasters, and we've only come here to lend you that experience.

C: 私底下，她老人家也不是这么不近人情的啦。
E: She's actually a very reasonable old girl in private.

C: 同时她还吩咐，要是各位瞧见什么喜欢的，想吃的，跟老板说，全都记在天舶司的账上。
E: She specifically mentioned that if you wish to buy anything at the inn, be it food or otherwise, just let the innkeeper know. The commission will cover the cost.

C: 我想起一件事。
E: There's something I want to say.

C: 请冷静一点，生命和生意哪个更重要？请您掂量清楚。
E: Please calm down. Which is more important: Your life, or your deal? Consider this carefully.

C: 我们和卡芙卡对峙时，她好像知道符玄会出现……
E: When we confronted Kafka, she seemed certain that Fu Xuan would show up...

C: 那个云骑军到底怎么了？
E: What happened to that Cloud Knight?

C: 散了散了，不要围观。
E: Nothing to see here folks — go home.

C: 您辛苦了。
E: Thanks for everything you're doing.

C: 这怎么可能？
E: How could this happen?

C: 不会。
E: Of course.

C: 咦，小素裳，你怎么也来了——
E: Huh? Sushang? What are you doing here...?

C: 信号弱？
E: Bad signal?

C: 刚刚有狐人女孩从这儿路过吗？
E: Did you see a foxian girl pass by here?

C: 最好的未来？对谁而言最好的未来啊？我才不信你会为别人着想呢。
E: Best future? Best for who? As if you'd consider anyone but yourself.

C: 等等，你们看，「谛听」发现了个奇怪的箱子，上面还有掌印……
E: Look, Diting found a strange chest... and there's a hand print on it...!

C: 这里！这里还有人活着……
E: Here! There are still survivors here...

C: 云骑军强撑着自己的身体站了起来。
E: The Cloud Knight propped herself up so she could stand.

C: 可怜…
E: I feel sorry for them...

C: …也给诸位吃颗定心丸罢。各位还不知道「魔阴身」是什么，对么？
E: ...Though I'm sure a little reassurance wouldn't hurt. You don't know what being mara-struck actually means, do you?

C: 炉身开始震动，原本冷却的丹炉中喷涌出烟雾。
E: The crucible starts to shake, and smoke emits out of the cold elixir crucible.

C: 前方捷报！云霞紫府那边的「药王秘传」歹人已全数歼灭。
E: Good news from the front lines! The Disciples over at Evemist Mansion have been defeated.

C: 好了，朋友叙旧的事且先放一放罢。
E: Let us save such reminiscence for later, shall we?

C: 古海之水，澡洁吾心；古海之水，疗护吾身。
E: Waters of the ancient sea, cleanse me, waters of the ancient sea, protect me...

C: 此世善缘，俱已完纳；此生恶业，悉已净空。
E: This world's good karma is settled. This life's misfortune is erased.
Hmph...

C: 那叛徒早已死了。你是谁？想对龙尊大人做什么！
E: That traitor is already dead. Who are you? What do you want with the high elder?

C: 「持明俣俣，云吟水舞。苍龙于飞，各有所归。」……
E: "Our people sing the hymn of clouds, and dance to water's cherished sounds, and high above the dragon flies, to each is destined different skies."

C: 狡辩之词，进幽囚狱再说也不迟。
E: Save your excuses for the Shackling Prison.

C: 幻胧已攫取建木的力量为己所用…
E: Phantylia has usurped the power of the Arbor...

C: 这一路上也没见停云小姐拿类似的东西来防身吧…唔，显然它也是一件没来得及送出去的礼物。
E: I've never seen Miss Tingyun use anything like that to defend herself... It must be another gift that she never had time to send.

C: 我明白了，咱们出发吧。
E: We should get going.

C: 当初她在我这儿吃饭，听我说起「不吃不能打倒自己的食材」的信条。随后又让我讲讲自己在其他世界做菜、狩猎的经历。
E: When she first ate here, I told her my motto: "You can't better your own food unless you taste it." Then she got me to talk about my hunting and cooking experiences out on other worlds.

C: 谢谢你为天舶司，为罗浮所做的一切。这方小小印章，是仙舟繁荣的基石。
E: Thank you for everything you've done for the Sky-Faring Commission and the Luofu. This small seal is the foundation of the Xianzhou's prosperity.

C: 「闷葫芦」是说丹恒吗？
E: ...Silent But Deadly?

C: 我从小就想成为顶天立地的大英雄，云上五骁的故事怎么听都听不厌，你肯定也会喜欢。
E: Ever since I was a little kid, I've always wanted to be an epic hero... I never get tired of hearing about the Quintet — I'm sure you'll love it.

C: 是我，我打算离开罗浮了。
E: It's me. I'm planning on leaving the Luofu.

C: 第一，匹诺康尼所处的阿斯德纳是一片「忆质」充盈的星系，历史上曾是忆域泄露的「大孔洞」之一。尽管过去了数千年，前方的忆质浓度仍高于均值。
E: First: Penacony is located in Asdana, a star system brimming with memoria, which has historically been one of the Macro Voids that leaked out from the Memory Zone. Even after eons, the memoria concentration up ahead is above normal levels.

C: 那么本次航线会议就到这里吧。离跃迁还有一段时间，大家可以再花些时间检查行李。
E: We'll conclude today's navigation meeting on this point. There's a bit of time left before we jump. In the meantime, might be a good idea to double-check your bags.

C: 那我岂不是能给行李箱再腾点空间出来？再带点什么好呢……
E: That means I can make more room in my suitcase. What else should I bring...

C: {NICKNAME}，你醒啦？准备得怎么样了？杨叔和姬子已经先下车了，我在这里等你一起出发。
E: {NICKNAME}, you're up? How's your prep going? Welt and Himeko beat us to the punch, but I stuck around for you. Let's get going.

C: 「…将梦中的不可能之事尽收眼底，寻得匹诺康尼之父『钟表匠』的遗产，而后解答：生命因何而沉睡。」
E: "...Witness the impossible in the realm of dreams, find the Legacy of the Watchmaker, Father of Penacony, and thus the answer to the question: Why does life slumber."

C: …你的房间？
E: ...Your room?

C: 看来这位客人还不习惯从现实到梦境的变化啊。别担心，这种「失重」在初入梦境的旅客间很常见。
E: Seems like our guest here hasn't gotten used to the transition. Fret not, feeling a sense of weightlessness is normal for new visitors.

C: 也许您已经在梦境护照里阅读过了，但我可以再为您介绍一遍！
E: You've perhaps read about it in your Dreamscape Pass, but I can explain one more time!

C: 怎么没声了？
E: Why isn't there any sound now?

C: 你这开拓之旅还挺「欢愉」…
E: This trailblazing expedition of yours is indeed an "Elating" one...

C: ——你是否认罪帕？
E: ...Do you plead guilty to this charge?

C: 非常感谢——期待您下次光临！
E: Thank you. Hope to see you next time!

C: 你在看什么？
E: What are you looking at?

C: 我好像被吸进电视机里了…
E: I think I've been sucked into the TV...

C: 想做什么都行？
E: Any dreams we want?

C: 现在吧。
E: I'm ready.

C: 朋友…得了吧，你们只会把别人当作筹码。
E: Friends? Oh, please. You guys only treat others as your bargaining chips.

C: 是的，我看到了他。
E: Yes, I saw him.

C: …我哪里不够直率、纯真、有童心了…！
E: ...Just how so!?

C: 于是，他指使自己的手下搅乱了梦境，把大家的好情绪全都抽走了！美梦小镇从此充满了焦虑和纷争，大家再也不是一家人！
E: He instructed his underlings to wreak havoc in the Dreamscape, taking away everyone's positive emotions! Since then, the town has been filled with anxiety and disputes! We're no longer a family!

C: 你自己怎么不上？
E: Why don't you do it yourself?

C: 应该…是的吧？不然，他怎么会突然开始笑呢？
E: It... must have been? It's rather out of character for him to start cracking up like that all of a sudden.

C: …看来我也已经过了这样的年纪。
E: ...It seems like I'm too old to qualify for that.

C: 这里就是秘密据点？
E: Is this your secret stronghold?

C: 这里就是…秘密据点？
E: Is this... your secret stronghold?

C: 我知道。
E: I know.

C: 噢，当然不能——规矩就是规矩！
E: Oh, no way! Rules are rules!

C: 在哪里…在哪里……
E: Where are you... Where could you be...

C: 米哈伊尔…？
E: Mikhail...?
...was you.

C: 不必了，凶手已经在祂的光照下露了马脚。用不了多久，他便会因自己的计谋跌倒在地。
E: There's no need. The malefactor has been exposed under THEIR radiant gaze and will soon fall by their own machinations.

C: 目前还不是。但因为你，我们或许能够借此机会加深对彼此的了解呢。
E: Not quite yet. But thanks to you, we might be able to use this opportunity to get to know each other a little bit better.

C: 那么它大概率和「钟表匠的邀请函」有关。
E: ...Then it likely has something to do with the Watchmaker's invite.

C: 如果有心事，不妨向我倾诉吧。这世上可没有比忆者更适合做心理治疗师的存在了。
E: You can talk to me if you've something on your mind. In this world, there's no one who heals the heart better than a Memokeeper.

C: 流萤？她为什么在这里？
E: Firefly? What's she doing here?

C: 我…还有件未完成的事。
E: I... have some unfinished business.

C: 「正下方」？
E: Right below?

C: 很简单，看见这盏大吊灯了吗？接下来…我们要制造一些符合常识的*小动静*。
E: It's really easy — see this chandelier? Next... we want to create some reasonably *small movements*.

C: 在我看来，他是个值得信任的人，不为别的，只因他是个优秀的商人。在这茫茫寰宇中，没有人比商人更注重诚信和契约。
E: In my view, he's a trustworthy individual. Not for any other reason, but because he's an exceptional businessman. In this vast universe, no one values honesty and contracts more than a merchant.

C: 但我想要的并不多，不妨先听我说完吧，可以么？
E: But I'm really not asking for much, so why don't you at least hear me out, okay?

C: 你们能查明真相、伸张正义，而我能借此完成公司的任务…这就叫双赢。
E: You get to find out really what happened and seek justice, and I get to put it toward completing my mission for the IPC... It's what you call a win-win situation.

C: 必须给流萤一个交代。
E: For Firefly's sake, we must get to the bottom of all this.

C: 如果人们能像钟表小子一样，从苏乐达瓶中的汽水里获得解决一切难题的力量，无辜的生命是否就能逃离「死亡」？
E: If people could, like Clockie, find the power to solve all problems in the soda from the SoulGlad bottle, would innocent lives be able to escape "Death"?

C: 对了，在你临走前，我还有个比较私人的问题。
E: By the way, before you go, I have a personal question.

C: 星期日把这么个微缩模型摆在每天起床就能看见的地方，他真把自己当成匹诺康尼的*巨人*了？
E: Funny that Sunday puts a miniature that makes him seem like a giant by comparison right where he can see it first thing in the morning. Insecure much?

C: 四下搜查一遍，只要看见，我就能认出来。
E: Let's look around. When I see it, I will know it.

C: 喂，{NICKNAME}，你看！这声音…是贝洛伯格那帮公司员工？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}, check it out! That voice... Could it be the IPC Workers from Belobog?

C: 还记得我吗？
E: Remember me?

C: 我没认错！上次就是你，一边喊着友情努力钟表把戏，一边和那个银发小姑娘一起把我胖揍了一顿！
E: Not possible! It was you the last time, yelling about some clockwork friendship while beating me up with that silver-haired girl!

C: 嗯…那是一座森严得如同要塞的金融之城，梦境的经济心脏。苜蓿草家系的皮皮西们在那里维持它的运转，将纸钞构成的血液送向巨人匹诺康尼的各处。
E: Yes... It is a fortress-like financial city, the economic heart of the Dreamscape. The Pepeshi people of the Alfalfa Family are there to keep it running, sending blood that is made from money everywhere on Penacony.

C: …我结束了那个男人的生命，独自一人。
E: ...I ended that man's life, alone.

C: 我能说的就这些。忘了吗？你已经背叛过我了，教授。
E: That's all I can say. Have you forgotten, Doctor? You betrayed me.

C: 瞧你这鬼鬼祟祟的样子！闻闻这里、嗅嗅那里——
E: Look at you, snooping around and sticking your nose everywhere...

C: （不知不觉间，袋子要见底了啊…看看最后一位幸运儿，能不能再给我个惊喜吧。）
E: (The gems in my bag are running low... Let's see if my last lucky interviewee brings some surprises.)

C: 你们看上我珍藏的那瓶糖浆了？放心，这是在梦里，不会闹肚子的。陈放了好久，味道应该相当不错。拿去吧，招待你们这样可爱的客人正好。
E: Did you find the bottle of syrup I've been hoarding? Don't worry, it's all just a dream, and it won't upset your stomach. It's been aging for years, and should have a refined taste by now. Feel free to have some. It's perfect for entertaining lovely guests like you.

C: 时间有限，我们得抓紧了。
E: Time is running out. We need to hurry.

C: …很可笑吧？明明清楚我们的人生只是两条平行线，可我却依然紧抓着她不放……
E: ...It's ridiculous, right? Our paths were never meant to cross, yet I'm still holding on to her...

C: 没什么，应该是我多虑了…如果这名叛徒真的存在，会不会就是他害死了流萤和知更鸟小姐？
E: No, nothing... Maybe I'm just overthinking things... However, if this traitor really exists, could they be responsible for Firefly and Robin's deaths?

C: 啧啧…抱憾终身啊。
E: Tsk tsk... A lifelong regret, indeed.

C: 这座游乐园，这片美梦，真的很安详。所有人都喜欢它。
E: This amusement park, this beautiful dream, they really are peaceful. Everyone loves it.

C: 看来没有异议了。那…黄泉小姐？
E: Sounds like we've reached a consensus. Now... Miss Acheron?

C: 我从茨冈尼亚的荒漠走来，为了六十枚赤铜币，人们在我身上烙下印记，为我戴上枷锁，将我送上刑架，埋入黄沙……
E: I came from the wastelands of Sigonia. For just sixty red copper coins, people paid to brand me, put me in chains, place me in the gallows, and bury me in the golden sands...

C: 每一夜的入梦与赴死无异，正如此时此刻的你我，心怀死志，躲入睡乡。而「死亡」…也将应我们的梦呓前来。
E: Every night is practice for the end. You and I are escaping into our dreams for fear of death at this very moment. And "Death"... will surface in our dreams.

C: 你在乐园的表演十分精彩，虚张声势…单纯但实用的技巧，骗过了几乎所有人。
E: Your performance at the theme park was wonderful and grandiose... A simple yet practical technique that fooled almost everyone.

C: 先生……
E: Mister...

C: 准备好什么？
E: Preparing for what?

C: 如果我真是巡海游侠，这么做你绝对不会吃亏。
E: If I truly am a real Galaxy Ranger, you stand to lose nothing.

C: 我相信你们。不过关于影视乐园发生的事，各位猎犬又是怎么想的呢？没关系，说出心底真实的想法就好。
E: I trust you guys. But... regarding what happened in the theme park, what do you Hounds think about it? It's okay. Feel free to speak your mind.
Three...

C: 又是这个男人，总是恰到好处地出现在每一个关键的地方…倒也为我们省去了寻人的麻烦。
E: It's that man again, always in the right place at the right time... though that does save us the trouble of looking for him.

C: 各位，请看！这里能够见到流梦礁最壮观的景色——
E: Everyone, look! From here, you can see the most spectacular view of Dreamflux Reef—

C: 从你们踏入匹诺康尼的那天起，我就一直在关注各位的动向。可惜，若非流梦礁与十二梦境早已隔绝，我们本该以更体面的方式相见。
E: I've been keeping an eye on you since the day you arrived in Penacony. We would have met under more appropriate circumstances if Dreamflux Reef hadn't been isolated from the Twelve Dreamscapes.

C: 不如多饮苏乐达……
E: Might as well drink more SoulGlad instead...

C: 虽然它还小，连羽毛都没长齐，也不会唱歌…可它不是为了在笼子里生活才破壳而出的。
E: Even if it's small and not fully feathered, and can't sing... it didn't come into this world just to be locked up in a cage.

C: 要实现这一壮举，若非「记忆」或「神秘」的令使出手，就只有使用星核一条路。
E: To achieve this feat, without the help of an Emanator of Remembrance or Enigmata, the only way is to use a Stellaron.

C: 已经没什么好怕的了！
E: Ain't nothing to fear no more!

C: 啊？连杨叔都这么说，这梦主得有多厉害啊？
E: Huh? Even you're saying that, Mr. Yang? How powerful is that Dreammaster?

C: 触摸米哈伊尔手中的梦泡。
E: Touch the dream bubble in Mikhail's hand.

C: 咦？突然变得热闹起来了，有好多人……
E: Huh? The atmosphere sure has livened up with all these people in here...

C: 梦主极少现身人前，我们也很难得见。但此次事关重大，他承诺会亲自前来与我等一道磋商。
E: The Dreammaster rarely grants an audience — even for us. But given the urgency of the situation, he's agreed to meet us in person.

C: 记得小时候收养的那只谐乐鸽吗？我们是如何对待它的？
E: Do you remember how we took in that little Charmony Dove when we were young?

C: 「试问：你是否始终对你的神虔诚，从未敬拜别神？」
E: "Question: Have you devoted your life to your God, never worshiping other Gods?"

C: 随意，我都可以。
E: Anything you recommend is fine.

C: 而是为了在不可胜数的道路中，凭借自己有限的见识和判断，尽力选择「适合自己的道路」。
E: It's more about doing your best to choose the "right path" for yourself among countless possibilities, even with limited insight and judgment.

C: 雨露是神的眼泪，因人世的悲伤而淌下。但正因它们还会落下，代表众神尚未对这个世界失去希望。
E: Raindrops are said to be the tears of the Gods, shed in response to the sorrows of the world. Their constant pouring is a reminder that the Gods haven't abandoned us yet.

C: 但你知道，这些血罪灵…毕竟不是他们。
E: But you know, these Sin Thirsters... They are not who they used to be.

C: 观众们好呀！接下来请欣赏刷新通关速度记录的超级三月七大冒险！
E: Hello everyone! Next up, get ready for the mega March 7th adventure, where I'm going to break the speed run world record!

C: 匹诺康尼是对手的主场，我们可用的筹码本就少之又少。与其在家族的封锁下坐以待毙，不如选择主动进攻。
E: Penacony is our rival's home turf, and we already have very few chips left to play with. Rather than idly sit around while The Family's got us blocked off, an offensive approach might be a wiser course of action.

C: 不对吧…这句台词听上去也不是很「惊喜」。
E: That's not right... That line doesn't sound very "surprised".

C: 准备好了吗？一，二，三……
E: Ready? One, two, three...

C: 这一定就是迷钟内心缺失的零件，太好了！
E: This must be one of the missing parts that Big Ticker needs. That's great!

C: 噢，不！这可不行，你必须直面自己内心的恐惧！
E: Hmph, no! This is unacceptable. You have to face your fears!

C: 抱歉了，我的挚友。如果你们不能拿出令人心悦诚服的证据，我便绝不能退让，以免辱没纯美骑士之名。
E: Forgive me, my dear friends. If you cannot present irrefutable evidence, I must not yield, lest I dishonor the name of the Knights of Beauty.

C: 自然选择——世界遵循这一法则，将全人类的福祉建立在弱者的遗骸上。只有{RUBY_B#「秩序」的命途行者}我们{RUBY_E#}，或者说我，有能力终结这出荒唐的闹剧。
E: Natural selection — the world abides by this principle, establishing the well-being of humanity atop the corpses of the downtrodden. Only {RUBY_B#Pathstriders of Order}we{RUBY_E#}, or rather I, possess the power to put an end to this farce.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>还是保持沉默，任凭他在猎犬的追踪下苟延残喘，直到注定的裁决来临？</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Or will you remain silent, leaving him to languish while the Hounds are hot on his heels, until his inevitable judgment arrives?</color>

C: 再想想看。
E: Think it over some more.

C: 知更鸟小姐的勇气令人敬佩，我本以为她只是在舞台上绽放光芒的明星……
E: Miss Robin's courage is admirable. And here I was, thinking she was just another superstar celebrity...

C: 不会吧……
E: Wait... no way...

C: 所以现在，该你决定自己的下一站了。
E: So now, it's up to you to decide your next destination.

C: 呵呵。我有个损友，总说我一辈子弯弯绕绕，最后又回到了起点…可能这就是每个无名客都要经历的阶段吧。
E: Well, I have a sarcastic friend who says I always take big detours and end up back where I started... Perhaps that's what every Nameless has to go through.

C: 既然如此，我谨代表匹诺康尼的梦主，和橡木家系十万七千三百三十六位同胞向各位正式发出邀请——
E: If that's the case, on behalf of the Dreammaster of Penacony and the <unbreak>107,336</unbreak> members of the Oak Family, I'm extending a formal invitation to all of you...

C: 三、三次死亡？！这一定是打引号的吧……
E: Three times!? This can't be serious, right...?

C: 只有赢得这场胜利，匹诺康尼才有未来可言。也唯有如此，那尚未到来的第三次，也是最后一次死亡…才不会以最糟糕的样子呈现。
E: Only by achieving victory in this battle can we secure a future for Penacony. And only then, my third and final death... won't come true in the most terrible form.

C: 不过，有一点你说得对。在这阴雨绵绵的死水边待久了，只有望着这团鲜红的火时，我才发觉自己原来还活着。
E: But you're right about one thing — After spending so much time near this stagnant water, only when I look at this vibrant red fire do I realize that I'm still alive.

C: 那无名客确有一手，我等的{RUBY_B#「秩序」}秘密{RUBY_E#}已在家系间不胫而走，公司的星舰也在向阿斯德纳集结……
E: The Nameless is quite the diplomat. Our {RUBY_B#Order}secrets{RUBY_E#} have spread like wildfire within The Family, and IPC starships are gathering towards Asdana...

C: 所以，利用「星核」操纵梦境的人果真不是您，而是——
E: So, it's not you who manipulates the Dreamscape with the Stellaron, but...

C: 就算我们来晚了，这么大的剧院也不可能空无一人。
E: Even if we're late, a grand theater like this shouldn't be completely empty.

C: 「可敬的旅人，感谢你们留下。可你也无法驱逐那些狱卒，即便他们早已不在阿斯德纳。」
E: "Thank you for staying here, honorable travelers. However, not even you could banish the guards, though they are no longer in Asdana."

C: 「和平从未真正降临在流放之地。这段历史千头万绪，太过复杂，请允许我用寓言的方式向诸位呈现。」
E: "Peace never truly graced land of the exiles. The history in this era is rich and intricate, so please allow me to present it in allegorical form."

C: 「我就在幕布后方等待各位。在盛典开场前，遵循阿斯德纳的古老传统，我想邀请诸位一同观赏三出幕前剧。」
E: "I'm waiting for you behind the curtain. Following the Asdana tradition, I invite you to enjoy a stage play in three acts before the Festival begins."

C: 「外来的宾客，我请求你帮助这间宅子，摆脱潜藏的教唆者的毒害。」
E: "Dear outsider, I beseech your aid in purging this mansion of the poison spread by the lurking instigators."

C: 那…{NICKNAME}来看看，是不是他们也需要调整下情绪什么的。
E: So... {NICKNAME}? Do you think their mind needs tinkering or something?

C: 姬子小姐，事到如今，您依旧认为「秩序」只想把全宇宙变作祂的提线木偶么？
E: Do you still believe that the Order only seeks to control the universe as THEIR puppet, Himeko?

C: 看来各位始终误解了我的用意。在此正式敬告：我的理想并非复活星神，也非飞升成神——
E: It seems you have misunderstood my intentions. Allow me to clarify — My desire is not to resurrect a fallen Aeon or become one myself...

C: 唔，说得对，那我们这就去大堂吧。
E: You're right. Let's head to the lobby then.

C: 哈哈，猜得不错！
E: Haha, good guess!

C: 在向你道出缘由前…我要向你道歉，{NICKNAME}。其实我给你的这份「临别礼物」并非忆域的罗盘…而不过是一枚<color=#dbc291ff>「空光锥」</color>而已。
E: Before I explain... I would like to apologize to you, {NICKNAME}: This farewell gift I gave you isn't really a compass from the Memory Zone... but merely an <color=#dbc291ff>empty Light Cone</color>.

C: 所以你想收藏我的记忆？
E: Which is why you want to collect my memories?

C: 三月七说得没错。虽然「求救信号突然中断」意味着我们多半来不及了…但我觉得还是先去确认一下为好。
E: March is right. Though the fact that the distress signals have ceased means we're probably too late... but I still think we should investigate the situation there.

C: 姬子
E: Himeko

C: 歌斐木
E: Gopher Wood

C: 他因机缘巧合登上列车，在旅途中与众多旅伴结缘，并为匹诺康尼繁荣发展做出巨大贡献。
E: It was just by happenstance that he boarded the Express, making many travel companions along the way while contributing greatly to the prosperity and development of Penacony.

C: 是啊，生命因何而沉睡…我们仍未知晓这一问的答案，却已然要从这场梦中清醒。
E: Why does life slumber...? We don't know the answer yet, but we're about to awaken from this dream.

C: 然后，{NICKNAME}…就由你去为众人指引方向吧，不是作为救世主，而是与凡人同在的无名客。
E: As for now, {NICKNAME}... It is time to guide them, not as a savior, but as a Nameless among those mortals.

C: 我正在来匹诺康尼的路上，等余下的事安排妥当，我们就一同返回庇尔波因特，迎接开牌吧。
E: I'm on my way to Penacony. Once everyone is settled, we'll return to Pier Point for the final showdown.

C: 好熟悉的对话…
E: Woah, this conversation is such déjà vu...

C: 虽然已经过去一天了，但回想起来还是汗流浃背，列车的「开拓」之旅差点就要交代在这匹诺康尼了……
E: Even though it's been a day, I still break into a sweat when I think about it. Our Trailblazing expedition almost ended in Penacony...

C: 希望您能在晖长石号上度过一段愉快的时光。
E: I wish you a great time aboard the Radiant Feldspar.

C: 只要「同谐」的影响还没有深入骨髓，个人的欲望就总能占据一席之地。我们运气不错，至少在匹诺康尼，还没有哪位大人物的音级高到彻底丧失了私欲。
E: As long as the influence of Harmony hasn't completely permeated their core, personal desires will always have their way. Thankfully, influential figures in Penacony haven't entirely suppressed their own desires.

C: 托帕小姐，你刚才好像用了一个词——「现实的困局」。但别忘了，这可是梦的世界！想在这里获得成功，想法就得够大、够野！
E: You used the term "real," Miss Topaz, but let's not forget that this is the realm of dreams! If you want to succeed here, you need ambition and unconventional thinking!

C: 星期日和知更鸟会怎样？
E: What will happen to Sunday and Robin?

C: 自家族入驻匹诺康尼以来，「秩序」残党便一直以橡木家系为掩护潜伏其中，用星核的力量不断加强对美梦的控制，最后酿成了大祸。
E: Since The Family took up residence in Penacony, the Order has been hiding in plain sight under the guise of the Oak Family, using the Stellaron's power to strengthen their hold on the sweet dream, which eventually resulted in disaster.

C: 说来有些令人哑然，在无边无际的梦中，我得以回到故乡，与分别已久的朋友重逢。而因为一些特殊的原因…我想起了黄泉小姐。
E: Well, it was somewhat surprising. In that dream, I returned to my homeworld and reunited with my long-lost friends. And for some reason... Acheron resurfaced in my mind.

C: 好，这样就大功告成了……
E: Well, it's done...

C: 敬沉眠于地下的无名客们，还有我的好友，加拉赫。
E: Here's to the Nameless resting in peace... and to my friend, Gallagher.

C: 翡翠女士？你好。谐乐大典的开幕典礼搬至「晖长石号」了，我提前上来做些准备。
E: Miss Jade? Greetings. The opening ceremony for the Charmony Festival has been moved to the Radiant Feldspar, so I'm here making some preparations.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「家族对匹诺康尼的保护已经失效，在梦境中发生意外或将导致永久性的脑死亡。」</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>"The Family's protection for Penacony has expired. Any mishaps in the Dreamscape could result in permanent brain death."</color>

C: 嚯嗬嗬，果然如此…眼前这位美丽的女士就是星穹列车的领航员？幸会，幸会。
E: Ohoho! This stunning lady is the navigator of the Astral Express? It's a pleasure to meet you.

C: 一场定输赢…我和你赌我的全部家当！
E: This will be our final game... I'm betting my entire fortune!

C: 能帮人实现愿望的当铺…
E: A pawnshop that grants wishes...?

C: 虽然已经过去一天了，但回想起来还是汗流浃背，列车的「开拓」之旅差点就要交代在这匹诺康尼了……
E: Even though it's been a day, I still break into a sweat when I think about it. Our Trailblazing expedition almost ended in Penacony...

C: 就是那位令使有点用力过猛…我的身体支撑不了多久，否则这事还能结得更利落。
E: But that Emanator didn't pull any punches... My body couldn't hold out too long, otherwise this would have been settled in a much cleaner manner.

C: 感谢你，也愿「纯美」常伴你！
E: Thank you, and may the Beauty always be with you!

C: 祝你在大典上玩得愉快。
E: I hope you have fun at the festival.

C: 公司战略投资部的翡翠女士，你认识吗？「慈玉典押」就是她名下的财产。
E: Do you know Miss Jade from the IPC's Strategic Investment Department? Bonajade Exchange belongs to her.

C: 我知道你是为了什么而来！你收了那家伙的贿赂，那个既虚伪又腐败的花火帮领袖，想要坐上花火城市长位子的败类——火子哥！
E: I'm on to you! You're here because you accepted bribes from the duplicitous and corrupt leader of that Sparkle Gang, the scoundrel who wants to become mayor of Sparkle City — Blazin' Bro!

C: 卟卟——回答错误！大锤不过是凶器罢了，但这两起案子都不是谋杀案！
E: Bzzt — Wrong answer! The hammer is a murder weapon, but these two cases aren't murder cases!

C: 我发现，这里的人们不把亚文化当文化。他们管它叫迷…迷……
E: I've come to realize, the people here don't treat subcultures as actual culture. They call them me... me...

C: 其实，像我这样能打的娃娃，在这艘「晖长石号」上还有<unbreak>998</unbreak>个啾。请把它们叫回「黄金花火大树」吧——我会为您准备好谢礼的啾！
E: Actually, there are <unbreak>998</unbreak> more dolls that can pack a punch just like me on the Radiant Feldspar, tweet. Please call them back to the Golden Sparkle Tree. I will prepare a worthy gift for your troubles, tweet!

C: 无论如何，这很难令人接受。
E: No matter what, that's very hard to accept.

C: 而它的意义，也将由后来的我们诠释。
E: And its meaning will be interpreted by those who come after — us.

C: 哈哈，那可太多了，准备入学材料时慢慢和你说吧。
E: Haha, too many to count. Then again, these admission documents will take us a while to complete — I'll see if I can dig up any stories for you.

C: 作为匹诺康尼的最高学府，折纸大学严苛的考核与昂贵的学费让无数考生望而却步，能进入其中就读的不是声名显赫的富商，就是天赋过人的才子。
E: As the top university in Penacony, the strict examinations and expensive tuition have deterred many potential candidates. The people who are admitted to the school are either well-known wealthy merchants or exceptionally talented geniuses.

C: 搞快点！听人说大股东们已经到大堂了，千万不能惊动了人家！
E: Hurry up! I hear that the major shareholders have already arrived at the lobby. Don't alarm them!

C: 喂！灰头发，黄眼睛，衣服上挂着几条莫名其妙的带子…{F#她}{M#他}好像就是那位大股东！
E: Wait a second! Gray hair, yellow eyes, ribbons that serve no purpose on {F#her}{M#his} clothes... I think {F#she}{M#he}'s the major shareholder you were talking about!

C: （箱子打不开，总觉得心里有个疙瘩……）
E: (I can't open the box... Something just doesn't feel right...)

C: 多么恐怖、千钧一发的场面。在这丑时三刻，庄严的摩天楼将化为壮绝狩猎的起点！
E: A most terrifying close call that was. But fear not! The darkest hour of the night may be upon us, but this majestic skyscraper shall now welcome the start of an epic hunt!

C: 阁下确实在做梦。
E: You are indeed.. ...dreaming.

C: {NICKNAME}——我们在这呢！
E: {NICKNAME}! We're over here!

C: 哦，你听过？可以，很新潮嘛。
E: Oh? You know the song? Not bad. You're keeping up with the trends.

C: 朋友，需要助学贷款吗？
E: My friend, do you need a student loan?

C: 唔，学生们的专业是家族安排的？会不会太不「同谐」了。
E: Hmm, The Family assigns every student their major? Doesn't sound very "harmonious" to me.

C: （我的考试结束了，先等等三月七和丹恒吧。）
E: (My exam is over. I'll wait for March 7th and Dan Heng.)

C: 最后是辅料…匹诺康尼的甜梦糖霜，阿斯德纳特产肉桂粉，还有酒店特调辣椒酱。
E: Finally, for added flavor, we have Penacony's sweet dream icing, Asdana's specialty cinnamon, and the hotel's special chili sauce.

C: 这玩偶还会说话？
E: The toy talks?

C: 这里怎么会有…
E: How did she get here?

C: 真是的，陪我们演下去嘛！人家还录着像呢！
E: Aw, come on, just play along! The camera was rolling!

C: 算是认识
E: I suppose.

C: 为小伙伴们拍下照片吧！
E: Take photos of your friends!

C: 等等…他香蕉的，先不管了，大不了少说两句。
E: Hold on! Banana my sundae... Forget it, guess I could afford to say less.

C: 嗯…形象也好，文化也罢，就像每一种曾经流行过的事物。
E: Hm... Maybe it's the appearance or the cultural significance. Just like every other thing that was once trendy.

C: 猴子…猴子…全他宝贝的是猴子。
E: Monkeys... Monkeys... And more monkeys. They're all muddle-fudgin' monkeys!

C: 现代，能人，猿
E: Human, Denisovan, Ape.

C: 呃，逃节课的后果这么严重吗？
E: Ugh, are the consequences of skipping one class that serious?

C: 在这场戏中，我既是导演，也是演员。对于自己杀青前的最后一幕……
E: I am the director of this film as much as I am an actor in it. When it comes to the last scene that I will appear in...

C: 别无他法了么……
E: Have we really come to this...?

C: 说到底，我只是一位守夜人，并非流梦礁的领袖，也不该干涉居民们选择的权利。
E: At the end of the day, I'm just Dreamflux Reef's Night Watch... not its leader. I'm loath to interfere with people's right to choose.

C: 走着。
E: Let's go.

C: 因为桶之一族的出现，你失去了许多分数。
E: Due to the emergence of the cans, you lose a lot of points.

C: 我们都是被囚禁的果肉，永远无法挣脱它的束缚。
E: Like bananas within their peels, we can never break free of its encapsulation.

C: 好呀，那你也不要叫我蒙塔娜了——我现在的名字是「能人<unbreak>426</unbreak>」！
E: Gotcha. You can drop "Montana" too! I'm now known as Denisovan <unbreak>426</unbreak>!

C: 呀！看看时间，梦境营销课马上就要开始了蕉。
E: Bana gosh, look at the time! I have to get ready for my Dreamscape Marketing class!

C: 蕉！蕉蕉！
E: Bana, bana~!

C: 嗯…这位邪祟阁下是龙是猴？
E: ...Hmm, is this evil fiendling a dragon or a monkey?

C: 那么来分配演员吧。首先是作为主角的「勇者小猴」……
E: Let's assign the actors to their roles then. The leading role of Brave Monkey shall be...

C: 等等，请再给我一次机会——
E: Wait! Please, just give me one more—

C: 所以，这就是我的结论了：任何深思熟虑的行为，并不比「跳起来」这个简单的动作高级多少。
E: So here's my conclusion: Even if a behavior is generated after thorough deliberation, it is no more sophisticated than the simple act of "jumping."

C: 那你在流梦礁查到什么没？
E: So, did you find anything at Dreamflux Reef?

C: 但无论如何，唯一的源头肯定存在，我们马上就能见到了——没有被胡乱加上各种定义，回归本真的睡蕉小猴。
E: No matter what people choose to believe, there has to be a Slumbernana Monkey that started it all, and we're about to see it! The original Slumbernana Monkey in all its unfiltered glory, free from all sorts of stereotypes.

C: 这倒是有意思，我非得会会它不可。还得一会儿是吧？
E: Well, ain't that somethin'. I reckon I gotta see it myself. Still got a bit to wait, huh?

C: 呃，不是吧……
E: Uh, that can't be right...

C: 还有大把事情呢，一会儿得是被尼克踢醒了。
E: There's a lot of things I should be doing. I guess Nick's gonna kick me awake soon.

C: 又是你们，之前的事也就算了，但在普利蒙蕉授面前诋毁睡蕉小猴…你们知道自己在干什么吗？
E: You two again? I can forget everything else you've done, but slandering the name of Slumbernana Monkey before Profnana Primon? Do you even know what you're doing?

C: 游侠先生，或许回归原始……
E: Mr. Ranger, perhaps going back to our origins—

C: 比如您的「仇恨」，对公司的仇恨。
E: Say, your hatred for the IPC.

C: 多么令人敬佩的觉悟！为与邪忍抗衡，你还需要一个新的名字，属于忍者的名字。
E: An admirable resolution! To contend with the Evil Ninja, you will also need a new name — a name befitting a ninja.

C: 但要成为忍侠，必须每日服用…以此在体内开创忍•力•大宇宙，乃是磨炼身心之行。
E: However, to become a Ninja Hero, I must consume these pills every day... Only then can I create a never-ending source of Cosmic Ninja Strength within my body. Yes, this is a trial to temper my mind and body.

C: 在巴克斯-Ⅱ，道德是每家的次子要被当作纳努克的祭品；在天马星际公国，道德是双足生物必须成为四足生物的奴隶；在卡帕卡拉星，道德是蓝色眼睛的人不许踏上街道。
E: On Bacchus-II, morality is how every family's second son must be sacrificed to Nanook. On the Interstellar Principality of Pegasus, morality is how bipedal organisms must be enslaved by quadrupedal ones. On the Kapakala planet, morality is how blue-eyed individuals are forbidden from walking on the streets.

C: 玩偶？你是小可爱吧，你那蛤蟆都比他更像玩偶。
E: A puppet? You lil' fudgehead, even your toad looks more like a puppet than he does.

C: 在下的忍道，当然就是成为缭乱•忍侠啊。
E: Of course, becoming the Dazzling Ninja is my way of the ninja.

C: 了解——那么告辞，三月•忍者。
E: Understood — then farewell, Ninja March.

C: 匹诺康尼的未来依旧悬而未决。可喜的是，经列车组斡旋，家族与公司同意让渡部分权益，达成一致。匹诺康尼重新获得了决定自己命运的权利。
E: The future of Penacony remains uncertain. However, thanks to the mediation of the Crew, The Family and the IPC agree to cede some of their interests, and reach a consensus. Penacony regains the right to determine its own destiny.

C: 开始创作
E: Start creating

C: 我们快到了。
E: We're almost there.

C: 会有人帮助我的……
E: Someone will help me...

C: 「纷争」为锤，斗士为砧，炽热与冲击为其刻留伤疤，而半神从中崛起……
E: When the hammer of Strife strikes the anvil of the warrior, the heat and impact will leave behind scars, and between them, a demigod shall rise...

C: 你认得我？
E: You know me?

C: 恕我直言…与黄金裔结盟，是否意味着我们会被卷入奥赫玛的内部纠葛？
E: With all due respect... won't forging an alliance with the Chrysos Heirs embroil us in the conflicts within Okhema?
Hehe...

C: …只要小缇安别再叫粉色小狗，人家就答应你哦！
E: Only if you promise to stop calling me a pink puppy!

C: 唔，好像没有反应…是不是没起效果呀？
E: Ahh, there isn't a reaction... Did it not work?

C: 面目可憎的扭曲生命——过去也曾是一颗能为伤痛恻隐的鲜活灵魂，如今却只能对旁人锋锐相向，直到其魂息无声飘离躯壳。
E: A despicable, twisted life form — it was once a living soul that could mourn pain, but now it can only turn its head at others, until its soul drifts silently out of its shell.

C: 但你们大错特错——贤人们已经在黑潮抵近前，设法将绝大部分人疏散。他们此时正在前往圣城奥赫玛的路上。
E: But that is where you're wrong: While the black tide was still approaching the Grove, the sages found a way to evacuate the vast majority of the scholars. They are heading toward the holy city of Okhema as we speak.

C: 吾方才所述是上届赛况，胜者为白厄，此子并已蝉联足足十届辩论桂冠。另外，为打消汝疑虑，吾再附赠一道比那大辩论会更有用的讯息好了——
E: What I just mentioned happened during the previous debate. Phainon emerged victorious and obtained his tenth consecutive debate wreath. Also, to alleviate your worries, I shall provide you with a piece of information that's more valuable than the great debate...

C: 没错，就该这么打——不对，应该说只能这么打！摧毁一切障碍，「毁灭」与「开拓」交织正是你的美学，也是你身为银河球棒侠、身为《开拓豪侠传》主角的理由！
E: Exactly, this is how it should be done — no, how it can only be done! To destroy all obstacles... It's your art where "Destruction" and "Trailblaze" intertwine. This is the reason you are the Galactic Baseballer and the protagonist of Legend of the Trailblazer!

C: 欸…难道说真的能行么？
E: Huh... Can that really work?

C: …不，那只是普通的一滴露水，遵循水的三态变化之规律，而非因灵感而生。
E: ...No, it was merely an ordinary drop of dew, following the natural laws of water's three states, not born of inspiration.

C: 这深井不会是陷阱吧…
E: Could the deep well be a trap...?

C: 如果她最终的目标不幸是阁下…请放心，我会及时出手的。
E: If you unfortunately turn out to be her ultimate target... Please don't worry. I will promptly intervene.
Mmm...

C: 唔，理由很简单哪？
E: Oh, the reason's quite simple.

C: 正是，更与方才那失物有关。其主人乃是沉默且多疑的猎手，似是自黑潮中脱胎，与黑潮一道袭来。
E: Indeed, and it's even more related to that lost item from before. Its owner is a quiet and paranoid hunter who seems to have been reborn from the black tide and is attacking along with it.

C: 将「金枝誓言」化作柴薪，令理性之火种再度燎燃……
E: Turn the Golden Bough of Vows into firewood to reignite the Coreflame of Reason...

C: …你带我们来这里，想做什么？
E: ...Why exactly did you bring us here?

C: …你怎么知道得这么清楚？
E: ...How do you know this place so well?

C: 你觉得自己博古通今？那我考考你，你可知道悬锋城的黄金狮首，是怎么被砌到墙上去的？
E: So, you think yourself knowledgeable? Then here is a question for you: Do you know how Chryseus Leo in Castrum Kremnos came to be mounted on the wall?

C: 可现在呢？难道你想用短短几句话，洗清自己染血的双手么？
E: But listen to yourself now! Do you truly believe you can cleanse the blood from your hands through mere words alone?

C: 「纷争」站在我这边！
E: Strife is on my side!

C: 当然。虽然不知道他们究竟在打什么算盘，但是时候结束这场闹剧了。
E: Yes. While their intentions elude me, it's time to bring this farce to a close.

C: 既然看不清现场赛况…闲着也是闲着，不如来听我讲一段与「王」有关的故事吧？
E: Since we can't see what's happening in the competition... Why don't I regale you with a tale of "kings" to pass the time?

C: 我唯一能见到它的场合就是在梦中。还有……
E: The only times I get to see it are in my dreams... and in...

C: 乘着西风，出发咯。
E: It's time to head out with the west wind!

C: 这个男人以武力挟持了缇宁，强迫她带自己来到创世涡心。
E: This man abducted Trinnon by force and forced her to bring him to the Vortex of Genesis.

C: 真是勇猛的斗士…软弱的奥赫玛人，竟也拥有如此豪杰。
E: A fierce fighter... I did not expect such heroism from a feeble Okheman.

C: 「自此，创生已毕。谁来背负灵魂的重，换取世人步伐之轻？」
E: "Thus, creation was complete, who then will bear the weight of humanity's souls, to lighten the steps of the living as a whole?"

C: 用纺锤，连系大家！
E: Use the spindle to connect everyone!

C: 不了…*我们*的心脏还在怦怦跳呢。
E: No... Our heart is still racing.

C: （果然…还是得先去趟<color=#dbc291ff>命运重渊</color>才行。希望{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}愿意帮帮*我们*。）
E: (Just as expected, another trip must be made to the Abyss of Fate. Hopefully, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#} will be willing to help us.)

C: 缇宝，缇宁，你们在说什么悄悄话呢？
E: What are you two whispering about, Tribbie? Trinnon?

C: {RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}…消失了？
E: {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}... disappeared?
Oh...

C: 但我的事不重要。迈德漠斯，我看到了…最后，你还是拥抱了自己的命运。
E: But this isn't about me, Mydeimos. I saw it... You've finally decided to embrace your own fate.

C: 这是…什么意思？
E: Wha—What do you mean by that?

C: 好了…就送到这里吧。
E: Alright... It's about time for us to part ways.

C: 走了，救世主——记得活到最后。
E: I'll be on my way, Deliverer. Remember to stay alive till the final act.

C: 我曾盲信那些字句，直到你的父亲将你抛入冥海。
E: I once believed those words without question until your father cast you into the Sea of Souls.

C: 再见了…悬锋的拯救者。
E: Farewell... Savior of Kremnos.

C: 那…旅途也该抵达终点了。
E: It is time for this journey to reach its end.

C: 看啊，迈德漠斯回来了！
E: Look, Mydeimos is back!

C: 那刻夏老师只是有些…桀骜不驯。别担心，你会习惯的。
E: Professor Anaxa can be a bit... Unrestrained. Don't worry. You'll get used to it.

C: 是啊。这短短几日，真是发生了好多事……
E: Yeah. A lot has happened in the past few days...

C: 怎么背后说人坏话！
E: How could you talk smack about Mydei behind his back!

C: 我想问，怎么才能赶走黑潮！
E: I want to know how to chase the black tide away!

C: 上前来吧，忠诚的守卫，至少做好这事…刺穿我的胸膛。
E: Come forth, loyal guards. At least do it properly — pierce me in the chest.

C: 「乘着西风，展翅远行。」
E: "Ride the west wind and let the wings carry us far away."

C: 真是极富煽动力的演讲，奥帝先生。就算是{RUBY_B#公司创始人}路易斯•弗莱明{RUBY_E#}本人也没法做得更好。
E: What an inspiring speech, Mr. Oti. Even {RUBY_B#Founder of the IPC}Louis Fleming{RUBY_E#} himself couldn't have done it better!

C: 单论实力，过去的我确实不是这个怪物和{F#她}{M#他}那些同伙的对手。但是，现在的我，已经脱胎换骨了。
E: Yeah, in terms of pure strength? The old me couldn't compete with that monster and {M#his}{F#her} crew. But the person I am today? I'm not the same man I was back then.

C: 嚯嗬嗬…放心吧，本次「圣杯战争」规则的最终解释权，都归我老奥帝所有。
E: Hohoho... Rest assured. For this Holy Grail War, I have the final say on all the rules.

C: 在召唤现界的时刻，圣杯给予了我参与这场圣杯战争所必需的知识。但这些知识中却充满了难以理解的概念。这里似乎和我熟悉的世界…完全不一样。
E: The Holy Grail granted me the knowledge I need to participate in this war, but much of it makes no sense. This world... is completely foreign to me.

C: 「不属于自己」？我们大部分时候都处在「不属于自己」的境遇里。时代、国家、战争，都是属于别人的。
E: "Aren't our own"? Most of the time, we're in situations that are foreign to us: someone else's era, nation, war.

C: 这似乎也并非我的本来面目。但很抱歉，我只能以如今这样平庸的形象与您见面。
E: This isn't quite my true form. But I'm afraid this is the only way I can appear before you.

C: …我自然希望能与您坦诚相待。不过，每次我尝试说出自己的「真名」时，就会变成这样——███、███、███。
E: I would, of course, prefer to be honest with you. But every time I try to say my own True Name, it turns into this — ███, ███, ███.

C: 该怎么解释呢？这似乎是个神秘存在极为稀薄的世界，我所认知的「魔术」恐怕也无法如常生效。因此，这场「圣杯战争」中很多事物的存在方式都和过去不同了。
E: How should I explain this... This is a world where Mystics are extremely rare. The "magecraft" I know likely can't function as usual. So many things in this Holy Grail War are different from in the past.

C: 不管为了谁，我的愿望依然自私，它和我兄长的愿望并没有区别。很抱歉，音符小姐，在召唤出你的那一刻，我也明白了自己的心意。
E: Regardless of my intentions, my wish is still selfish. It's no different from my brother's wish. I'm sorry, Miss Note, but the moment I summoned you, I realized my true feelings.

C: 嗯，我也是这么想的。如果现在赶过去，也许还有机会营救波提欧先生。你们怎么看？
E: Yeah, I was thinking the same. If we rush over now, there's still a chance to save Mr. Boothill. What do you all think?

C: 如果我没有成为王，不列颠会成为真正的理想国吗？我又会过上怎样的生活？
E: Would Britain have truly become the utopia I dreamed of? And what kind of a life would I have lived?

C: 你读了读他的工牌，上面除了一个言简意赅的「A」字别无其他。所属科是「家政科」…话说回来，空间站有这一科吗？
E: You glance at his work tag. On it, just a single letter — A. Department: Domestic Services. Wait... since when does the space station have a Domestic Services Department?

C: 身为国王的荣耀。
E: The innate glory of being a king.

C: 一年后。
E: One year later.

C: 像你这种想要登上列车的科员，每年都会出来几个，可事到临头，他们毫无例外都退缩了。
E: Every year there are researchers who want to go with the Express, but when it's time to leave, they all back down without fail.

C: 所以，你被她关到哪儿去了？
E: So, where did she put you?

C: 御主，虽然我双手双脚赞成你的观点，但时间似乎已经不够了。圣杯解体后，我们也该回到原来的地方了。
E: Master, while I'm all in on that suggestion, time's running out. Without the Holy Grail holding us up, us Servants need to go back to where we belong.

C: 「圣杯战争」要结束了，漂泊的灵魂也该回到休憩中了。米沙…要回匹诺康尼了。
E: The Holy Grail War is coming to an end, and wandering souls must return to their rest. I... need to go back to Penacony.

C: 敢情这玩意儿是赔礼？
E: So THIS is his apology?

C: 认得我这张脸蛋的公司成员比茨冈尼亚沙漠里的沙子都多…我哪儿能费心记得他们每一个？
E: There are more IPC employees who know my face than there are grains of sand in Sigonia's desert. You think I can remember them all?

C: 不过这些都将成为过去！砂金？呵，就让我代替你，成为新的石心十人！
E: But hey, all of that will soon be a thing of the past. Aventurine? Heh, I'll replace you and become the new Stoneheart of that name!

C: 如果没有声音，你又怎么知道我刚刚说了什么？
E: If there's no sound, then how'd you know what I just said?

C: 先观望观望。
E: Let's stay back and observe for now.

C: 和各自从者失散的你们，偶然邂逅了另一对熟悉的敌人。至于你们的牛仔和歌星朋友，更是不见人影。
E: Separated from your Servants, you run into another pair of familiar enemies. As for your cowboy and songstress companions? Vanished without a trace.

C: 我只知道克劳克影业…
E: I've only heard of Clock Studios...

C: 没事，就扣在我御主头上吧。
E: Whatever, just put it on my Master's tab.

C: 出现了，斯科特的求饶特技！
E: There it is. Skott's special begging technique!

C: 有我的「秘剑•电锯回返」，你们就算插上翅膀，也别想从这儿逃离！
E: With my "Concealed Sword: Chainsaw Reversal," you won't escape me even if you turn into a swallow!

C: 钟表匠，梅芙恩，他们凭什么得到比我这个业界先驱更高的声誉！
E: The Watchmaker and Maeven... What did they do to deserve more fame than me, the pioneer of the entire industry!?

C: 请相信，我并非带着恶意重返故地，「秩序」也不可能再临匹诺康尼了。
E: Please believe me when I say that I didn't come back here with ill intent. Penacony will never experience the Order again either.

C: 也许原因不仅如此。
E: Could there be more to it?

C: 不提当年勇。
E: I'm not one to boast about past feats.

C: 那就是徘徊在生死边缘，犹如中阴之身？
E: So, I'm trapped between life and death, existing in a limbo?

C: …照您的意思，即便我能够醒来，这些置我于死地的创伤，也会存留此身，永不愈合？
E: ...Based on what you said, even if I should wake up, these wounds that caused my death will remain on my body and never heal?

C: 可否给我一些思考的时间？
E: Could you give me some time to think about it?

C: 驭空大人？
E: Madam Yukong?

C: 啊！知更鸟女士！我是您的粉丝啊！
E: Oh, Miss Robin! I'm a big fan!

C: 为何是我？
E: Why me?

C: 在入梦的起点，那条思绪的长廊上，我选择将自身的天环彻底剥离。
E: While I was in the Gallery of Thoughts, at the entrance of the dream, I chose to completely sever the halo from myself.

C: 至于你的理想，我相信它能以另一种更正确的形式实现。七休日…虽然只是个比喻，但我很期待那一天。
E: I believe there is a way — a better way — to achieve your ideal. Seven rest days may be just a metaphor... But I look forward to the day when it comes true.

C: 大家都是第一次吧？
E: Same for everyone else, right?

C: 列车头一回迎来这么多客人，有些不习惯。你先去派对车厢吧。待会儿见。
E: We've never had this many passengers on board before... I'm still not used to it. Why don't you head to the Party Car first? I'll see you later.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>「永恒之地，翁法罗斯」</color>。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The Eternal Land, Amphoreus</color>.

C: …从三月七的记忆来看，她突然变得十分虚弱，像是被什么东西压住了身体，变化发生在一瞬间，应该不是病理因素。
E: ...I'm seeing March 7th hit by a sudden bout of weakness in her memories, as if something was weighing on her. The onset of it far too quick to be any kind of sickness.

C: 这…这是什么？！哪来这么多恶心虫子？
E: Wh—What in the...!? How did all these disgusting bugs get in here?

C: 我们要做的事如此重要，可不能被一个小小的窃贼给钻了空子啊。
E: Considering the gravity of our endeavor, we can't allow a little thief to spoil the show.

C: 啊，忘记说了。刚刚提到的<color=#dbc291ff>百分之一</color>……
E: Ah, I should make myself clear. When I said <color=#dbc291ff>a hundredth of a lifetime</color>...

C: …等等！等等等等……
E: ...Wait! S—Stop whatever you're about to do...

C: …对不住了，丹恒。
E: ...Sorry, Dan Heng.

C: 朋友们，历史课只能一会儿再上了，先帮帮诺杜斯先生！
E: The history lesson will have to wait, my friends. We must help Mr. Noldus!

C: 大地兽性格温驯，哪怕第一次骑乘也能轻松驾驭。来试试吧，记得握紧缰绳。
E: Dromas are very docile, even first-time riders can steer them easily. Here, give it a try. Remember to hold the reins tight.

C: 看吧，是不是很轻松？
E: See? Easy, wasn't it?

C: 「预言中的救世之人」…看来白厄他们深受民众信赖。
E: "The Deliverers mentioned in the prophecy"... It seems the people have a lot of faith in Phainon and the others.

C: 不慌不慌，交给*我们*吧——「我呼唤你，{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}！」
E: Don't panic. Leave this to us! "I summon thee, {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}!"

C: 情况如何？
E: How's the situation?

C: 对哦，那还要我们做什么？
E: Right, then what do you even need us for?

C: 我没忘正事，退下吧。前方有我足矣。
E: I have not forgotten about what needs to be done. Stand down. I'm more than capable of taking care of what's ahead by myself.

C: 请保持五步之遥。
E: And kindly keep five paces distance.

C: 尽是些小打小闹。还不如你我死斗一场，余波就能震碎它们。
E: Mere child's play. A true fight between us would shatter them with the aftershocks alone.

C: 请问，你们需要帮助吗？
E: Excuse me... Do you need help?

C: 复原？只靠人力，这得修上两三天吧。
E: Restore it...? With just human effort, that's going to take a couple of days, at least.

C: （保持沉默）
E: (Remain silent)

C: 感觉没能骗过他。
E: I don't think that we managed to fool him.

C: 但如果诸神眷顾，<color=#dbc291ff>属于我的火种</color>应该已经不远了。
E: But if the gods favor me, I believe that <color=#dbc291ff>my Coreflame</color> won't be far.

C: 两位是想和这孩子合影吗？那样的话，我或许能帮上忙。
E: Would you two like a photo with this child? In that case, I might be able to help.

C: 什么人会喜欢泡冷水澡？
E: Is there anyone who is fond of cold water baths?

C: 悬锋城是{RUBY_B#纷争之泰坦}尼卡多利{RUBY_E#}的领地，也是它如今的居所，一座隐于迷雾的移动城邦。
E: Castrum Kremnos, both {RUBY_B#Strife Titan}Nikador's{RUBY_E#} territory and their current abode, is a moving city-state enveloped in fog.

C: 房间内的躺椅看上去是如此地舒适诱人，你担心自己一旦躺上去便会彻底失去「开拓」的动力。
E: The lounge chair in the room looks so comfy and enticing. You're worried that you'll completely lose the motivation to Trailblaze if you lie on it.

C: 砝码似乎被泰坦施加了祝福，无法使用扎格列斯之手抓取。
E: It seems that the weights have been blessed by the Titans and cannot be seized by the Hand of Zagreus.

C: 三步，遐蝶。
E: Three steps, Castorice.

C: 金色的丝线平静如初。
E: The golden thread remains calm and unchanged.

C: 经历了这一遭，你凭什么觉得我们还会帮助你们？
E: You seriously still expect us to help you after what we just went through?

C: 如果不能赢得诸位——不，如果无法赢得你的信任，阿格莱雅女士——我们会自觉离开。翁法罗斯并不是无名客唯一的选择。
E: If we cannot gain people's — no, if we cannot gain your trust, Lady Aglaea — we'll depart. Amphoreus isn't the only option for the Nameless.

C: 不必让彼此都落得不体面的收场。
E: Things don't have to end on a sour note between us.

C: 又一个没有尽头的黎明，白昼何光，永夜何长。
E: Another never-ending dawn. How bright is the day, and how long is the night.

C: 如果记载无误，「天谴之锋」的正下方就是举世闻名的「悬锋斗技场」。我们脚下这条路，或是通向荣耀，或是通向死亡……
E: If the records are correct, directly beneath the Blade of Fury lies the world-renowned Kremnos Arena. The path before us leads either to glory or to death...

C: 太慢了。
E: You took your sweet time.

C: 穿过这里，就是铸魂区。
E: After we pass through here, we'll reach the Soul-Forging Zone.

C: 就是这样，做得不错。
E: That's it! Nice work.

C: 嗯，我们很接近了……
E: Yeah, we're getting pretty close—

C: 看来…我们只能依靠自己寻找方法了。
E: I suppose... we'll have to rely on ourselves, then.

C: 前进吧。记住，留心脚下。
E: Push onward, my friends. But watch your step.

C: 一切顺利…目前为止。
E: Everything's going well... so far.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 卡芙卡？
E: Kafka?

C: 刃的余光扫过你的面庞，留下了一道炽热的轨迹。在与他有限的晤面次数里，你从未见过那么…冷静的目光。
E: Blade's glance brushes over your face, leaving a burning trail. In your limited encounters with him, you've never seen such... a calm and logical look in his eyes.

C: …我能听懂你说的话了？
E: ...I can understand what you're saying now?

C: 离开…到了，时间。
E: Leave... It's, time.

C: 我该走了，流萤。
E: It's time for me to leave, Firefly.

C: 您想听些什么？古老黄金裔的情与爱…黄金战争的乱世…沿海百邦的崛起与没落…利波这里应有尽有！
E: What are you in the mood for? The love stories of the ancient Chrysos Heirs? The turbulent era of the Chrysos War? The rise and fall of the Seaside States? Lipos has it all!

C: （很黑，很吓人…我不敢伸手去拿……）
E: (It's so dark and scary... I'm too afraid to reach in...)

C: （…抱歉，看来我已经忘记了该如何与孩童沟通。你们身上的童真，离我有些远了。）
E: (...Sorry, it seems I've forgotten how to talk to a child. Your innocence feels so distant to me now.)

C: 拿走吧！把我辛辛苦苦得来的收获全都拿走吧！
E: Go on, take it all! Help yourself to everything I've toiled for!

C: 凯妮斯阁下，你这是何意？
E: What are you up to, Elder Caenis?

C: 请告诉我，吾师……
E: Please enlighten me, Trinnon...

C: 虽然我们身处记忆中，{NICKNAME}阁下…但还是克制下消费的欲望吧？
E: {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... Much as we're in a memory of the past, impulse buying is still an undesirable behavior.

C: 前进吧，勇士…去回应召唤吧。我已年迈…疲倦…但我会目送你远离这里，为你念诵战无不胜的祷言啊……
E: Forge on then, warrior... heed the call. I am elderly... and weary... but I shall watch you depart and pray for victory in every battle encounter...

C: 现身吧，战士之魂…我知道你尚未安歇。
E: Reveal yourself, O warrior spirit... I know that you have yet to rest.

C: 很简单……
E: The answer's very simple...

C: 战斗的声音，那是……
E: The sounds of battle. That's...

C: 在这破碎的时代，仍有凡人在反抗命运——了不起。
E: So, there are mortals who fight against fate even in this hopelessly bleak era. I am impressed.

C: 「即便面对那来自迷雾彼端、不可触及的黑潮，它亦孤身举剑，赫然迎战……」
E: "Even against the formless black tide from beyond the dense fog, they alone have raised their sword and faced the enemy head-on..."

C: 他们代表了无数次失败的尝试。在你们的帮助下，我终于能给这一切画上句号。
E: They represent countless failed endeavors. With your help, I can finally put an end to everything.

C: 这帮家伙，可比看上去强多了……
E: Hmph, these goons are much tougher than they seem...

C: 我一时找不到合适的辞藻…但我知道你并不平庸，白厄阁下。万敌常戏称你为「救世主」…我想他的语气中并不都是玩笑。
E: I don't have the right words for you now, but... I know you're far from ordinary, Lord Phainon. Mydei often calls you "Deliverer" in jest, but I don't believe he means it mockingly.

C: 它好像用不着吃东西。
E: They don't seem to need food.

C: 简单来说，这张牌的意思就是…你会成为被所有人崇拜的英雄，用你手里的剑保护世界，从可怕的敌人手中救下很多、很多的人！如何，很棒吧？
E: All you need to know is, this card means... you'll be a hero worshiped by all! You will protect this world and save lots and lots of people from scary enemies with your sword! Do you like the sound of that?

C: 他在盗火行者一役中立下了功劳，我愿意退让一步，给他时间找出剥离火种的方法。
E: In light of his assistance in the battle against the Flame Reaver, I am willing to grant him some time to find a way to remove the Coreflame.

C: {NICKNAME}，你来了。
E: You're here, {NICKNAME}.

C: ——别打退堂鼓呀，{NICKNAME}！
E: Don't give up now, {NICKNAME}!

C: 我走过翁法罗斯的许多城邦，可从未了解过天外的世界。如果有机会……
E: Despite having visited many cities in Amphoreus, I still understand nothing about the world beyond the sky. If there is an opportunity...

C: 唔…眼睛一闭一睁就要试炼了，还有点紧张呢。
E: Ahh... The trial feels like it's just around the corner. I'm starting to feel nervous.

C: （泰坦的低语）
E: *Titan's murmurs*

C: 母亲…呼唤着你……
E: Mother... is calling for you...

C: 果然…什么也感受不到……
E: Just as I expected... I cannot feel anything...

C: 她还能给死人把脉…？
E: She can even take the pulse of someone who's dead...?

C: 因为人家太担心，就全部坦白了…唔，不要讨厌我，好不好？
E: I was too worried, so I told them everything... Ugh, please don't hate me, okay?

C: 实不相瞒，正是。毕竟他们的工作是清理害物。而就在刚才，您还站在黄金裔那边……
E: I don't deny it. After all, they're responsible for cleaning up any threats and just a moment ago, you were on the side of the Chrysos Heirs...

C: 这片小小的舞台，正是奥赫玛千百年来最深刻的缩影。而在十五个日夜后，此地也将成为奥赫玛历史最重要、也是最后的转折点……
E: This tiny stage is the most profound embodiment of Okhema in centuries. In fifteen days, this site shall also become the most important, as well as the final turning point in Okhema's history...

C: 呵，没想到阁下还是留了一手，是我棋差一着。不过，我个人倒是十分乐见她的出现……
E: Heh, so you were holding back just now? Seems like you are better at playing this game than I. In any case, I am glad that she's arriving here...

C: 哦？你怎能如此断言？
E: Oh? How can you be sure of that?

C: 啊呀，很可惜……
E: Ahh, well, regrettably...

C: 人子啊，汝又看到方才那幻觉了？
E: Hey? Are you seeing that same hallucination again?

C: 呀，伙伴，辩论会终于结束了？你们赢了吗？
E: Hey, friend! Is the debate finally over? Did you win?

C: 奥赫玛今天也很和平。
E: Just another peaceful day in Okhema.

C: 我需要对死囚、战俘和英雄们一视同仁，赐予他们「仁慈的死亡」。
E: I was expected to grant "merciful deaths" to war captives, prisoners bound for execution, and heroes alike.

C: 什么…？
E: Wh—What do you mean?

C: 当我心中终于涌起近乎奢望的希冀……
E: When an almost unattainable hope finally welled up in my heart...

C: 是啊，难道这一次就会有所改变吗？我不是不明白，只是不愿意接受现实罢了。
E: And did I really think this time would be any different? It's not that I don't understand this reality — just that I'm unwilling to accept it.

C: 用料朴素，但做工一如既往地精湛。好久没见，手艺不减啊。而且…还特别用心。
E: The materials are nothing to wow at, but the workmanship is superb as always... You're still skilled as ever even after all this time. And you've put a lot of heart into this one... Hehe.

C: 这是…灵魂的残留吗？
E: Is this... a remnant of his soul?

C: 神谕已然昭示你的姓名，「死亡」的黄金裔，奥赫玛理应将你奉为贵宾。
E: Since the prophecy has already pronounced your name as Chrysos Heir of "Death," Okhema ought to treat you as an esteemed guest.

C: 因为我并非不慎跌入冥河，而是为了求死一跃而下。
E: That's because I didn't fall into the River of Souls by accident. Instead, I leaped into it to seek my death.

C: 你…难道就是…
E: You... Are you...

C: 那位少年，他受到了{RUBY_B#律法之泰坦}塔兰顿{RUBY_E#}的眷顾，从神手中习得了一式「秘剑」。借此，他在与人的争斗中可以一击制敌，永不落败。
E: That young man was favored by {RUBY_B#Law Titan}Talanton{RUBY_E#}, who taught him a move that will defeat any mortal enemy with a single blow and emerge victorious every time.

C: 我们在{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的盛宴中酣醉了太久，才开始寻求神赐的「死亡」，好让自己摆脱命运的无常…然而，我们反受其害。
E: We had been inebriated in {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#}'s feast for too long before we began to seek divine-bestowed "Death," so that we could be freed from the whims of fate... However, that brought doom upon us.

C: …你们……
E: You...?

C: 「追忆符文」装置并没有任何反应。
E: The Rune of Recollection device does not respond.

C: 唔，附近好像也没有其他能用的了……
E: Hmm, there doesn't seem to be anything else nearby that can be used...

C: 小缇安？你不是已经……
E: Trianne? Aren't you...

C: 这许许多多我不曾奢望的第一次，回忆起来的时候…我的生命好像从数百年、数十年，变成了每一分，每一秒……
E: Looking back at all these experiences I never thought were possible... it feels as though the scales of my life had shrunk from centuries and decades down to minutes and seconds, and all of them are so precious...

C: 那，现在要拍一张吗？
E: Then shall we take one now?

C: 那就…别再思考无用之事。
E: Then... cease wasting your thoughts on futile matters.

C: 我也出发，看咱们谁先到冥界…
E: I'll go too. Let's see who gets to the nether realm first...

C: 是呀。
E: Yes.

C: 如果是你，在经历过生与死的锤炼之后，一定能为这片荒原带来第一抹生机……
E: You've been tempered by life and death. I know you'll be able to give this wasteland its first breath of life...

C: 要是丹恒在，冥河水肯定能升天吧……
E: If Dan Heng was around, he'd definitely be able to raise the waters of the River of Souls into the sky...

C: 当然，你是最称职的祭司。
E: Of course, you're the most competent priest ever.

C: 没错。背负「火种」的半神，将在世界尽头成为新的泰坦……
E: Indeed. The demigods that bear the Coreflames eventually become the new Titans at the world's end...

C: 如果「死亡」的双子能够跨越两世，在冥海边重逢——我的猜想便不再是一纸空谈，你的问题也能得到解答了。
E: If the twins of Death can bridge two cycles to reunite at the shores of the Sea of Souls... then my hypothesis will no longer be just a hypothesis, and you, too, will get the answer to your question.

C: 谨遵您吩咐。
E: As you command.

C: 放肆！你怎么敢在圣地——
E: You insolent whelp! How dare you—

C: 那刻夏老师！你究竟在干什么……
E: Professor! What are you doing?

C: 可还算满意，尊贵的泰坦？
E: Are you satisfied, honorable Titan?

C: 第二面镜，准备「思维折射」。从星穹列车到翁法罗斯天体还有一段距离，你得把我发射过去——
E: Second Mirror, prepare for the Thought Refraction. There's still some distance from the Astral Express to the Amphoreus celestial body. You're in charge of sending me over...

C: 这是什么？看着怪阴森的。
E: What's this? How creepy.

C: 不打算回答我的问题吗？你是谁？
E: Are you not going to answer my question? Who are you?

C: 格奈乌斯阁下，你多虑了。我能感觉到，他的魂息仍在此地盘桓。
E: You're overthinking, Lord Gnaeus. I can still sense Khaos' soul in the area.

C: 话说回来，小玻吕茜亚，此行怎只有汝独自前来？
E: That reminds me. Why are you making this trip alone, Polyxia?

C: 可怜见…汝二人生来便为接过{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}的权柄，却比任何人都心怀恻隐哪。
E: Such a pity... Both of you have hearts kinder than anyone else, yet you are born only to take over {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#}'s divinity.

C: 恩贝多克利斯的学生？我听说他的观点和「敬拜学派」截然相反。
E: A student of Empedocles? I hear that his views run counter to the Venerationists.

C: 黄金裔与半神…
E: The Chrysos Heirs and demigods...

C: 「智种学派」，核心课题是藉由炼金术达成对「灵魂」的修补。
E: Nousporists primarily study the application of alchemy in soul repair.

C: 一名「山羊学派」学者申请的多个研究课题，及学派贤人对其研究课题的回复结果……
E: A record of the many research topics a Caprist scholar had applied for, and the replies from their school's Sage about these topics...

C: 去吧，准备好创立你自己的学派——
E: Go. Establish your own school of thought...

C: 问题不在辩术。我已成为半神太久，人性将尽，不知不觉间竟也和这些伪君子踏上了相似的道路，离民众越来越远。
E: It is no longer about eloquence or arguments. I have been a demigod for far too long that I hardly have any humanity left. Before I realized it, I have become no different from these hypocrites, no longer capable of relating to the people.

C: 若果真如此，知晓她的去向，自然就能得知死亡泰坦的所在。
E: If this is true, as long as we can find out where she went, we'll naturally be able to figure out the location of the Death Titan.

C: 终于…这一天还是来了。
E: I knew this day would eventually come.

C: 我的审判是公正的，只有滚烫的黄金方能净化你们的原罪……
E: My judgment is just — only burning gold can purify your sins...

C: 塞涅俄丝，我们遵守了那位无名黄金裔对你许下的约定，回到了这里。不仅如此…我们还为你带来了答案——
E: Seliose, we have honored the promise made by that nameless Chrysos Heir and returned here. We also bring you the answer to your question —

C: 看，那边——
E: Look, over there —

C: 当心！到处都在崩塌，一不小心就会坠落！
E: Watch out! Everything is collapsing, and a misstep could lead to a fall!

C: 畏惧…猩红的天空……
E: Fear... the bloodred sky...

C: 我见识过，那家伙虽然性格有点…幽默，但实力也是强得惊人哪。
E: I've crossed paths with them before. They're a little quirky, but their power? Absolutely terrifying.

C: 「求你了……」
E: "Please..."

C: 难怪流光忆庭要找星穹列车合作，不借助「开拓」的力量，还真没法挖出这地方的秘密。可到头来忆庭平安无事，遭殃的却是无名客，真是好奇心害死阿维啊。
E: No wonder the Garden of Recollection wants to work with the Astral Express — without the power of the Trailblaze, it'd be impossible to unearth this place's secrets. But in the end, the Garden emerged unscathed, and it was the Nameless who got burnt. Curiosity definitely killed Aki.

C: 最终，从冥界旅至现世的死亡半身，决意驻身那片花海，为你寻回「未来」。
E: At the end, the Incarnation of Death who journeyed from the nether realm to the living world chose to remain in that sea of flowers, retrieving your future.

C: …原来这便是您口中「星穹列车」的一节。我的忆库又增添了一则有趣的见闻。感谢您的引领，丹恒阁下。
E: ...So, this is the car of the Astral Express you've spoken of. My repository of memories has been enriched with another fascinating piece of information. Thank you for leading me here, Lord Dan Heng.

C: 负重训练呀，你这是。
E: Weight training, huh?

C: 奇怪…我认识的那个人，她也说过类似的话。回想起来，每次她为我解读卡面，我的心情都会莫名地忐忑…哪怕我并不相信占卜的结果。
E: Strange... That person I knew used to say similar things. Looking back, whenever she interpreted a card for me, I couldn't help but feel uneasy. Even though I never believed in the outcomes.

C: 嚯，重振家业的大小姐，多么令人钦佩…呵，少开玩笑了，至少你确实享受过那些荣华富贵。
E: Wow, a daughter rebuilding her family business — how admirable... Heh, enough with the jokes. At least you did get to enjoy those luxuries.

C: 呃，那个，我有一个，小提议？不如，我们，七三……
E: Uh, well, I have a suggestion... How about <unbreak>70</unbreak>-<unbreak>30</unbreak> instead?

C: 巴特鲁斯开启了挖掘模式，找出了藏于地底的宝藏……
E: Bartholos activated excavation mode, unearthing the treasure buried deep underground...

C: 可、可不是嘛，这世界真是不公平呀……
E: Yeah, the world just isn't fair, is it?

C: …谁让你想了？再说了，千年前的祭祀长袍，款式和现在根本也是两样。
E: ...Who asked you to picture that? Besides, priest robes from a thousand years ago were nothing like the ones today.

C: 嘁，哪冒出来的路障？
E: Tsk, where did this roadblock come from?

C: 别小看那虫子，它跟裁缝女的金线一样神通广大。你稍有松懈就有可能被它接管，像操纵傀儡一样——然后，你就会随口蹦出些平时绝不会说的字句。
E: Don't underestimate that bug. It's every bit as dangerous as the seamstress's golden thread. Let your guard down for even a second, and it might take over — make you spill secrets you'd never share otherwise.

C: 裁缝女，你真怪。大人们常说，经常撒谎的孩子本性难移……
E: You're weird, seamstress. You know, they say a child who often lies remains a liar for life...

C: 我知道阿格莱雅对我的期望。当下，奥赫玛最不需要的就是一个自怨自艾的引路人。
E: I know what Aglaea expected of me. Right now, the last thing Okhema needs is a leader wallowing in self-pity.

C: 找到凶手！严惩他们！
E: Find the murderer! Make them pay!

C: 起初，我也想在这里与你们一同痛斥罪人的恶行，商讨该如何追讨他们，在他们的头顶降下惩罚……
E: I wanted to stand here beside you, to condemn the sinners, to discuss retribution, and to see justice brought down upon them...

C: 听你刚才那番话，是觉得我教给你的辩论术是邪门歪道么？
E: I heard what you said. Are you suggesting the debate tactics I've taught you are nothing but sleight of hand?

C: 对，昔涟。
E: Yes, Cyrene.

C: 如你所见，阿格莱雅为黄金裔挣得了全城公民的支持。人们一致认为是元老院中反对逐火的派别谋害了她，公民的激愤让藏在阴影中的险恶无处可躲。
E: You're probably aware that Aglaea has earned the support of the entire city for the Chrysos Heirs. Everyone believes that she died at the hands of Council members who are against the Flame-Chase, and the citizens' fury has been dragging these schemers out of the shadows one by one.

C: 危险的不是黑潮，是人啊…
E: The black tide's not the threat... it's the people...

C: 为了取回{RUBY_B#天空之泰坦}艾格勒{RUBY_E#}的火种，建立彩虹桥是必需的。如此重要的仪式，你只身行动未免太过冒险。
E: The rainbow bridge is essential to retrieve the Coreflame of {RUBY_B#Sky Titan}Aquila{RUBY_E#}, but undertaking such a vital ceremony alone is far too risky.

C: 就是…和祭仪水盆相比…眩晕感确实有些强烈。
E: But... This does feel way more disorienting than the ritual basin...

C: 不能以貌取人呀，飞儿。小风堇在她的领域可是很厉害的专家哦，整个翁法罗斯都没有比她更靠谱的医师啦。
E: Don't judge a book by its cover, Ciphy. Cinny is a master of her craft. She's the most skilled and dependable physician in all of Amphoreus.

C: 先不说她的事啦。小风堇会来到这里，是因为你身负的使命吧？
E: Well, enough about her for now. You're here because of your mission, aren't you, Cinny?

C: 说吧，雅辛忒丝。我们应该还有时间。
E: Speak, Hyacinthia. We should still have some time.

C: 挺会来事的嘛。
E: Quite the flatterer, aren't you?

C: 这附近一定有先祖的记忆。
E: There must be memories of an ancestor nearby.

C: 一切事物都会随时间流逝磨损，传说也是如此。但无论它是真是假，我们要做的事不会变。
E: Even legends are corroded by time, but that won't change what we must do.

C: 虽然天空与海洋的对立不算严重…但很显然，艾格勒的子民对后者的态度也算不上友善。
E: Though the conflict between sky and ocean wasn't particularly severe... it is obvious that Aquila's people weren't exactly cordial to the latter.

C: 继续赶路吧，跟上露奈比斯阁下。
E: Let's hurry on. Follow Lady Lunabis.
...Doot!

C: 穹顶呈现的仍是烈日的图景。只要让阴云也布满此处的画壁，艾格勒就无处可去了吧？
E: The dome still displays a vivid sun. By also covering this mural in clouds, we'll leave Aquila with no place to hide.

C: 嗯。逐火之旅已然走到最后，无论所谓的历史真相如何残酷，任何事都不会动摇我完成使命的决心。
E: Yes. The Flame-Chase Journey is reaching its final chapter. No matter how cruel the truth may be, nothing will sway my determination to finish this mission.

C: 解开「西风罗盘」…来雨之民的殿堂和我汇合吧。
E: Solve the West Wind Compass... and come meet me in the hall of the Rainfolk.

C: 刻法勒的火种已经消失无踪。你们…要如何践行神谕？
E: Kephale's Coreflame is long lost to the winds. How will you... fulfill the prophecy?

C: 只能逼凯妮斯帮我们了。
E: We'll just have to force Caenis to help us.

C: 该去哪找火种…？
E: Where should we go to look for the Coreflame...?

C: 你就这么相信她？
E: You trust her that much?

C: 这里没有受困的公民，也没有黑潮造物的影子…我们没理由在此逗留。
E: There are no citizens trapped here, nor any signs of black tide creatures... We have no reason to linger here.

C: 能正面打倒它吗？
E: Can we defeat them head-on?

C: 时间…无多……
E: Time... running out...

C: 把火种拿去吧，小鬼！去完成你的使命！
E: Take the Coreflame with you, brat! Go finish your mission!

C: 而如今，这个与世隔绝的沙盒世界正在急速坠入第三道命途——<color=#dbc291ff>「毁灭」。</color>
E: And now, this isolated sandbox world is rapidly falling into a third Path — <color=#dbc291ff>Destruction</color>.

C: 这是名为「识刻锚」的奇物，二位可以将其视作<color=#dbc291ff>「智识」世界中的界域定锚。</color>
E: This Curio is called a "Chronocognitive Anchor." The two of you may view it as <color=#dbc291ff>a kind of Space Anchor in the world of Erudition</color>.

C: 在此世行将终结之际——以神礼观众之名，向您致意。
E: As our world draws its final breath... I stand before you as the Theoros.

C: 你和螺丝咕姆是什么关系？
E: What's your connection to Screwllum?

C: 来吧，{NICKNAME}，和我一起。
E: Come, {NICKNAME}, join me.

C: 只记得一个声音…到底是谁在呼唤呢…？
E: Only a voice remains... who was that...?

C: 如何？阁下所见的风景，正是背负{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}火种的无名英雄的故乡：<color=#dbc291ff>哀丽秘榭</color>。
E: Beautiful, isn't it? This is <color=#dbc291ff>Aedes Elysiae</color>, home of the nameless hero who carried {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}'s Coreflame.

C: 喜欢幻想那些英雄故事，把自己当成里面的角色，可不是大人会做出的举动呀。
E: Still fantasizing about being in heroic adventures and imagining yourself as one of the characters. That's the kind of thing kids do, not grown-ups.

C: 嗯…就当是少女的直觉吧。
E: Oh... just a girl's intuition.

C: 呵…我还真从来没有想过有这种思考方式。
E: Heh... never thought of doing it that way before.

C: 哎，怎么说话呢？你这人，看不出来……
E: Ouch, where did that come from...

C: 刚才您不是说，翁法罗斯大灾将至吗？倘若如此，我和昔涟应该会一直留在哀丽秘榭才对，又怎会与形形色色的人相遇？
E: Didn't you say disaster would strike Amphoreus? If so, shouldn't Cyrene and I stay in Aedes Elysiae? How could we possibly meet all these people?

C: 嗯，伙伴说得没错…我们必须挺身而出。
E: Indeed. Our friend is right... we must take action.

C: 「『以「世界」为师者，方能背负它的命运——你可准备好了？』」
E: "Only one who treats the world as their teacher can bear its eventual destiny. Are you prepared for such teachings?"

C: …你们打算用这种方式代替光荣的角斗？
E: ...Is this your idea of an honorable duel?

C: 理智告诉我，这些还远远不够。哀丽秘榭只是个小村庄，在翁法罗斯面前，它的消逝不过是一道无足轻重的伤疤。
E: Speaking rationally, I know it's not nearly enough. Aedes Elysiae was just a small village, its loss barely a scar on Amphoreus's face.

C: 嘻，我本该跟着祭司一起撤离的，但听说圣女大人身边有一位白发青年……
E: Hehe, I was supposed to leave with the priests, but then I heard Lady Maiden was with a white-haired young man...

C: 明明在每一个正确的时间点，大家已经尽己所能，做出了最正确的选择。
E: We made the best choices we could, whenever we could!

C: 随后，让我们所有人为灭亡预备……
E: After which, we shall all face oblivion...

C: 你疯了，万敌！哪怕你是不死之身，哪怕你已成为「纷争」的半神……
E: Are you crazy, Mydei!? Immortal or not, even if you're the demigod of Strife...

C: 再等等吧，等你再长高一点！
E: Wait till you grow a bit more!

C: 好好想想吧！在这个故事里，究竟谁才是那个被束缚的囚徒？是谁被一则无趣的「复仇」奴役至今，又误把反抗神明的勇气当成了愚蠢？
E: Think about it. In this story, who is truly the one in chains? Who is the one shackled to mindless "vengeance," mistaking courage, the courage to rebel against the gods for foolishness?

C: 翁法罗斯的命运，不止「毁灭」一种结局。
E: Destruction is not the only outcome for the fate of Amphoreus.

C: 我能一路走到这里，就是证明。
E: I've come this far, and that's proof enough.

C: 桀桀桀…好啊，好啊……
E: Heh, heh... Fine, fine...

C: 现在，我找到答案了。<color=#dbc291ff>原来那浑身着火的恶魔，满脑子幻想的都是要成为「救世主」哪！</color>
E: Now, I have the answer. <color=#dbc291ff>It turns out that fiery demon has been fantasizing of becoming this world's Deliverer!</color>

C: 在那唯一一次并肩同行后，每一次，我们总会像这样……
E: After that one and only time we walked side by side, every time since, it always ends up like this...

C: 无数次…无数次…无数次。
E: Over and over... and over again.

C: 恍惚间，我看见了宇宙的「毁灭」。
E: For a moment, I saw the Destruction of the universe.

C: >>>永劫回归#134：对象卡厄斯兰那第<unbreak>103</unbreak>次对权杖内核层发动攻击失败。「避免过去同伴牺牲」决策权重趋近于<unbreak>0.00018</unbreak>，注意到过拟合风险。

E: It's that déjà vu~♪

C: <color=#dbc291ff>刚才…我不是还在和姬子他们说话吗？</color>怎么一转眼就到了这里……
E: <color=#dbc291ff>But I was literally just talking to Himeko!</color> How did I... when did I...?

C: 但有一件事，我记得特别清楚。
E: But there's something I'll never forget.

E: ...I see. You've got people who mean the world to you too.

C: 岁月祭司的仪式剑。不知为何，总觉得拿着它就能让人安心。
E: The ceremonial blade of the Priests of Time. Holding it calms me down for some reason.

C: 首先，要找一个隐蔽的角落……
E: Firstly, we need to find a well-hidden spot...

C: 当然，这场会晤并非全无价值。您的到访为「神话之外」留下了一行新的注释。
E: Of course, this meeting was not without merit. Your presence has inscribed a new footnote in the Exomyth.

C: 恕我冒昧，但各位对我们，还有「天外」…了解到什么程度呢？

E: Perhaps the upcoming meeting will hold even more surprises.

E: Thank you for your trust, Imperator.

C: 啊，这、这是……
E: Ah... This... this is...

E: Roarrr, I'm the far-seeing eye and all-hearing ear of Okhema. I see and hear every single thing that happens in the streets and alleys of this place. I'm the perfect partner for research...

E: I reserve judgment on this.

C: 敬新世界！
E: Hail to the New World!

C: 有些…受宠若惊呢。

Ahh...!

C: 咕嘟咕嘟咕嘟……
E: Glug glug glug...

C: 谨言慎行。你只需知道，我在试炼中胜出已是定局。

E: Talk about Irontomb's true identity.

E: I walk the Path of the Trailblaze. My friends and I have always obeyed the creed of "explore, understand, establish, and connect"... Conquest and destruction are never the ways to build bridges between people!

C: 现身吧：救世主已经归来，行刑的时刻到了。

C: 人和人的相处，真是不可思议呀。
E: Human interactions are truly fascinating.

C: 从那书页中……
E: From that page...

E: But once I stepped onto land, I found myself caught in a play. Every land-dweller wore a mask in their life. So I, too, donned a costume and tried to find my role in this show. I became your blade in war and the violin strings at banquets...

E: I'll now answer your other question about who returned the Coreflame of Time in this cycle.

C: 可我不能什么都不做，这个世界…太过恐怖。
E: But I can't just do nothing. This world... is super terrifying.

E: So what did they decide to do?

C: 因为你们的介入会切实影响到「铁墓」的结局。

E: Didn't move at all, huh. I just got here, and I'm already locked out...

E: A truly splendid journey, if I may say so. With the "Era Nova" now complete, you have granted the hero the perfect conclusion.

C: 这场异变的源头，果真是三月么？
E: Is it true...? That March is behind all of this?

C: 随你。我要动身了。
E: Do as you please. I'm moving ahead.

E: Because only I could make that choice and protect all of this. Now, for the sake of your companions, for the sake of those two who walk alongside you...

C: 而对于执意阻拦星穹列车，威胁世界命运的害兽……

C: 三月，她一定在等待和我们重逢。
E: March 7th is surely waiting to see us again.

C: 为何是一片死寂？
E: Why is it so quiet here?

C: 呵呵，我没有协助您的立场。

C: 属于你们的泰坦，「智识」的星神……

C: 感谢各位无私奉献。

C: 歌颂「万径之门，缇里西庇俄丝」，是您开启万千门径，令游离的足迹于此「同谐」。
E: Praise be to "Tribios, Gate of Infinity," for you open up countless passages, bringing wandering footsteps into Harmony.

C: 可惜，本人最爱刨根问底。这次又得仰仗你了，螺丝，一起把系统翻个底朝天吧。

C: <color=#dbc291ff>就让「锁」来当钥匙吧。</color>

C: 离开这里，也意味着《如我所书》将就此搁笔。
E: Leaving this place means As I've Written will conclude here.

C: 「从今以后，不再有离别。」

E: you/i were/weren't once progeny of deities cast/fallen to the mortal realm for blessings/sins the verses written/erased by your/my hands were/shall be your/my remembrance/oblivion in the eden of blessed insight.

C: 这么远的路，一个人多少有些寂寞呀。

C: 愿岁月的长河逆流而行，将未来的风景送至眼前。在那无人记得的永恒之地，{RUBY_B#逐火之旅}「开拓」的神话{RUBY_E#}将要开篇……
E: May the river of time flow backward, bringing scenes of the future before our gaze. In The Eternal Land that no one remembers, the {RUBY_B#Flame-Chase Journey}legend of the Trailblaze{RUBY_E#} is about to begin.

C: 每一次，「爱」都会冲破固执的轮回……
E: Each time, "love" breaks through the stubborn cycles...

C: …久…疏…问候。
E: ...My... belated... greetings.

C: >>>关联：粉蒸。
E: >>> Related to: Stripe.

C: 「都会像小小的钥匙，打开你心里的一扇门，对不对？」
E: "Is like a little key that opened a door in your heart, no?"

C: 不够。不够。
E: Not enough. Not enough.

C: 有时候，它是不甘，遗憾。是知道往事充满痛苦，希望以更美的样子将它记住。
E: Sometimes, it's unwillingness and regret. It's knowing that the past is full of pain, yet wanting to remember the past in a more beautiful way.

C: 而这次轮回，仰望天空的时候。我看见一颗流星，还有一抹「记忆」的粉色。我相信，那就是黎明的色彩。
E: And when I looked up at the sky in this cycle, I saw a shooting star and a dash of the Remembrance's pink. I believe that must be the color of dawn.

C: 「赞达尔」最不愿看见的，就是我们的机会：完成身心结合，让权杖重归完整，然后……
E: The last thing "Zandar" wants to see is an event that gives us a chance of winning: For the two halves to rejoin and for the Scepter to become complete again. Then...

C: 但无论如何，在这史诗的尾声，我不想再做沉默的听众，或是被供奉的神明……
E: Either way, I no longer wish to be a silent onlooker or a worshiped god at the end of this saga...

C: 这是我的课题，你休想插手。别废话，脑袋借我一用——
E: It's my topic, so stay out of it. Be quiet and let me borrow your head.

C: 来吧，起飞。该去会会你的小宠物了，前辈。
