E: Come on. Let's take off. It's time to go meet your little pet, Senior Society Member.

C: 再创世的所有条件均已达成。我们回到大墓深处，开启了最后的再创世仪式……
E: With every condition for the Era Nova fulfilled, we returned to the depths of the great tomb and initiated the final Era Nova Ceremony...

C: 回答。
E: Answer.

C: 只有这种货色，拖不住星穹列车那伙人啊。
E: This lot won't be able to slow down the Astral Express crew.

C: 这是监控室，删库跑路一条龙，业内传统了。
E: This is the monitoring room, they must have deleted the records and made a run for it. Classic.

C: 这对不上呀…你看，他还给了我执行书。
E: This makes no sense... Look, he also gave me this executive order.

C: 也怪我自己，清理轴承阻塞，还非把瓶子揣上；瓶子揣上就算了，把起子忘了。
E: It's my own fault for bringing it with me when I went down to unblock those bearings. Why did I forget the bottle opener?

C: 时间也过得真快，我现在连汽水起子都忘了带，不得不服老了。
E: Time flies, though. Now, I even forget to bring a bottle opener. I can't deny I am old.

C: 十张星轨专票？
E: Ten Star Rail Special Passes?

C: 既然这样，那我就给你露一手。
E: Well, in that case, let me show you something.

C: 现在，我将它的配方公之于下——
E: Now, I'll make it public once and for all.

C: 它可值五百万啊。且听下回分解。
E: It's worth five million! Please stay tuned.

C: 提示：它需要用到一种特殊显影法。
E: Tip: A special method is required to reveal the text.

C: 看到没有，这痕迹…空间站有「裂界」化迹象的传闻看来也不是毫无根据。
E: Did you see it? Look... It seems like the rumors about the station are true — there are Stellaron traces here.

C: 你说你们是朋友。
E: You said you were friends.

C: 拿这股劲头去搞研究该多好，黑塔女士看到大家这么努力工作一定会很开心的。
E: Wouldn't it be better to apply that drive to your research? Madam Herta would be delighted to see everyone working so hard.

C: 你是哪个科室的？
E: Which department are you from?

C: 究竟要怎么样，才能从混乱的人群中一眼认出一名科员呢？
E: How on earth are we supposed to recognize a researcher in a crowd?

C: 唉！你们这帮小崽子……
E: Hmph! A bunch of hooligans...

C: 壮绝寂寞的奇观，未知美丽的危险，以及我所苦苦追问的那个人…
E: Spectacular wonders, enigmatic dangers, and the woman I am chasing after...

C: 你也担心洛奇的情况吧…
E: You must be worried about Rocky...

C: 谢谢，你对这里很上心。
E: Thank you. You seem to care a lot about this place.

C: 那太好了，我正愁抽不出人手前去找人。
E: That's great. I was just getting worried that I can't spare anyone to go find him.

C: 那些录像带里有希拉的过去。
E: Those videos are records of Sheila's past.

C: 我连轴转好多天了，既然能偷个懒，何乐而不为？再说，希拉的身体本来也没问题。
E: I've been busy for days. Can't I take a little break? Besides, there's nothing wrong with Sheila's health.

C: 现在，你们可以对她发布几条指示，例如「祈祷」、「歌唱」、「呼喊」。
E: Now, you can give her some instructions, like pray, sing or shout.

C: 对了，还未自我介绍吧。我是法政科的创始人古恩，如你们所见，我拥有与年龄相匹配的知识和权限。
E: By the way, I haven't introduced myself yet. I'm Gunn, the founder of the Department of Galactic Geopolitics. As you can see, I have the knowledge and authority that matches my age.

C: …什么录像带？我不明白你在说什么。
E: ...What videos? What are you talking about?

C: 按照如今两人的年龄差推算，如果你在录像带里见到了年轻的古恩，那么彼时的希拉一定还只是个襁褓中的婴儿——这和录像带对不上。
E: Given their age difference, if you saw a young Gunn in the videos, Sheila must've been a baby at the time — but that's not what you saw.

C: 并且严格按照古恩的剧本生活。
E: And she is strictly following Gunn's script.

C: 你想多了，我什么世面没见过？
E: Get over yourself. There's nothing I haven't seen.

C: 但我没想到，这个希拉——又或者说，原型机<unbreak>157</unbreak>的认知能力已经超出了我的想象。
E: But I didn't expect Sheila, or should I say, prototype <unbreak>157</unbreak>, to become so human.

C: 又开始了…无尽的循环。不过她的身体指数一切正常，对她来说，一个中庸的收场不失为一个最好的结局。
E: Again... Endless cycle. However, her health parameters appear normal. For her, this ending may be the best outcome.

C: 是我们这儿的一件奇物。看上去只是个普通的海螺，但凑近了可以听见从里边远远传来的没品笑话。
E: It's one of our Curios. It looks like an ordinary conch, but when you get close, you can hear the dirty jokes coming from the inside.

C: 为啥？我不明白。
E: Why? I don't understand.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>工程师每天都会手动开启光学身份校验程序</color>，用来检验进入房间的每位访问者的生物电是否正常，以此确保终端机房间不被入侵。
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The engineer would turn on the optical identity verification program manually every day</color> to check whether the bioelectricity of each visitor entering the room is normal, thus ensuring that the terminal room is not invaded.

C: 你来啦！
E: Here you are!

C: …你这样的想法很危险啊，这可不行，乔安是个大活人，你怎么能这么想。
E: ...That was a dangerous thought. Of course not. Joanne is a living human being. You shouldn't think like that.

C: 去前面看看吧，那里的敌方反应十分密集，说不定能找到剩余的密钥。
E: Let's go check up ahead. Enemies reaction is very dense, and you may be able to find the remaining keys.

C: 临时识别程序运转正常，请多留意相机提示，接下来它或许会派上用场。
E: The temporary scanning program is working normally. Please pay attention to the camera hints, as they may come in handy later.

C: 现在出发吧。
E: Let's go.

C: 我现在有点忙，如果不是什么要紧事的话待会儿再说。
E: I'm a bit busy here. If it's not urgent, come back later.

C: 你小子的点子挺毒啊。
E: That's pretty sadistic, Dan Heng.

C: 要不咱还是别看了。
E: Let's skip the clues for now.

C: 还有「和三月七小姐一起执行任务，应该可以完成最终的修行。」
E: Oh, he did say that completing an assignment with me would help him "complete the final trial."

C: 好吧，看在你们不是奇物再收容小队成员的份上，告诉你们也无妨。毕竟我不能为了它们的自由，牺牲大局的利益……
E: Alright, seeing that you're not from the Curio Collection Squad, I guess it wouldn't hurt to tell you. After all, I can't sacrifice the safety of the masses and ignore the bigger picture just for the freedom of the few.

C: 啊，你们两个大人真是不害臊，竟然跟踪我。
E: Gah! Both of you adults are so shameless, going out of your way to stalk a kid like me.

C: 它还劝你们不要多管闲事，否则它们中最可怖的那一个，早晚会来找你们的麻烦！
E: It also said, "Mind your own business or the Scariest of Us All will eventually come and make your lives difficult!"

C: 唉，还是不提了。现在事情已经平息，我本以为自己会被追责，但黑塔女士大人有大量，竟然允许我继续调查这件事，真是不幸中的万幸。
E: Ugh, I don't want to think about it. Now that everything has calmed down, I thought they'd be on my case already. The silver lining? Madam Herta was generous enough to allow me to continue investigating this matter.

C: 好久不见啊！
E: Long time no see!

C: 嗐，不怎么样，你看，还是老样子，和《太空大战争》那会儿没什么区别……
E: *sigh* Not so good. Still the same as before... just like during Cosmic Warfare...

C: 点对点，不需要动力源支持的，单凭计算实现的信标传送？难怪他们能攻入空间站…有这种能力，恐怕连黑塔女士的办公室都不安全……
E: Beacon transmission that doesn't require a power source and can be implemented solely through computation? No wonder they were able to break into the space station... With this, I'm afraid not even Madam Herta's office is safe...

C: 不太可能，你看，她有个穿过墙的过程，很明显。
E: I don't think so, that's not the same as passing straight through a wall — look.

C: 要不要先反思一下自己…
E: Maybe you need to "check yo' self before you wreck yo' self"

C: 你说的巡海游侠是？
E: Who are the Galaxy Rangers that you speak of?

C: 哼，你早就发现了啊。
E: Hmph, you knew it all along, didn't you?

C: 如果你想再进行一次模拟测试，也都可以安排。
E: If you want to run the test again, I can arrange it for you.

C: 被太空巨兽袭击了！
E: We've been attacked by a giant space beast!

C: 听说你已归顺纯美星神？
E: I heard you became a follower of Aeon of Beauty. Is that true?

C: 一如既往光滑的红色皮革座垫，你没发现什么特殊的。
E: Nothing's wrong with the seats' red leather.

C: 嗯。恰逢你的航线与列车星轨交汇，说不定我们遭遇的是同一只「巨真蛰虫」。接下来，就要证明这一猜想……
E: Yes, and your flight path happened to intersect with the Express's star rail, meaning we might have encountered the very same Giant Sting. Now, we need to see if we can prove the theory correct...

C: 这个脑袋一根筋的家伙！难道对于他来说，信仰真比命更重要？不行，我得去跟他吵一架！
E: Why is he so difficult!? Are his beliefs more important than his life? No way, I've got to talk some sense into him!

C: 抛出记忆盲点
E: Use Cognition Chasm

C: 嗯，现在迈开腿开始奔跑，或许能在四个系统时后追上公司的接驳星船——眼下，没有第三者能为{F#她}{M#他}作证。
E: Well, if you lace up those boots and start sprinting now, you might just catch the IPC shuttle in four system hours. But as it stands, not a single soul can corroborate {F#her}{M#his} story.

C: 嗯嗯，没有啦没有啦，还好的啦。
E: Heh, I'm not that wonderful. I'm just okay.

C: 黑塔是这么说的。
E: That's all Herta said.

C: 但对于奇物的特征，黑塔做了详细的描述，显然不是我杜撰的。
E: However, she did give a thorough description of the Curio. I didn't make that up.

C: 但已经好几个系统时了，我一直联系不上他，甚至调用监控都找不到他的踪影……
E: ...but it's been a few system hours, and I still can't reach him. Even the surveillance cameras can't find any trace...

C: 在过去永火官邸引发的混乱中，曾有人目击「暴徒自火焰中降临」的景象。
E: During prior unrest instigated by the Ever-Flame Mansion, some testified to seeing "miscreants materialize from the inferno."

C: 我还是很生气。
E: I'm still upset.

C: 嘿，看我搞到了什么？据说这是他们通过流言还原出来的，低配版阮•梅生命培育配方。
E: Hey, guess what I got my hands on? Word on the street is that this is the downgraded version of Ruan Mei's life cultivation formula.

C: 嗯…现在把它们混在一起，等等！配方上说「阮•梅在培育生命时会有不同的表现……」
E: Mm... and now we mix them together. Wait! It says on the recipe: "Ruan Mei makes different expressions when nurturing life..."

C: 你身边不知从何处冒出一位科员……
E: A researcher appears out of nowhere next to you...

C: 你不知道吧，「芝士流心」是阮•梅女士的头号追随者，它用这种方式进行宣教。献上爱心的人，都表达了对阮•梅女士的尊敬与爱戴。
E: Oh praise be! You don't know? Molten Cheese Tart is Madam Ruan Mei's top fan! This is how it preaches. Those who offer their love are expressing admiration and affection for Miss Ruan Mei.

C: 斯蒂芬的追随者们呢？
E: What about Stephen's followers?

C: 那我就开门见山了——我认为是时候为模拟宇宙再找一位合作伙伴了。
E: Let me get straight to the point. I think it's time to find another partner for the Simulated Universe.

C: 会吧，根据记录，{NICKNAME}挺喜欢这个事件。
E: I probably will. Records indicate {NICKNAME} likes this Occurrence.

C: 它似乎非常歉疚，它的眼里闪烁着一丝不甘，似乎想要得到阮•梅的认可。
E: It seems deeply remorseful, and there's a glint of resentment in its eyes, as if it yearns for Ruan Mei's acknowledgment.
(Meow...)

C: 这个舱段是干嘛的？
E: What is this zone for?

C: 女人。她脖子上的丝巾挺时髦，我对她很感兴趣。
E: Female. Wears a fashionable scarf. I find her rather fascinating.

C: 相位灵火的火种很有趣，可惜研究还未完成，它就消失不见了；我开启了新的尝试。
E: The kindling for the Phase Flame is fascinating. Unfortunately, before the research could be completed, it vanished. I've initiated new attempts.

C: 已载入列车轨迹数据，导航服务已开启。
E: Express trail data downloaded successfully, navigation system engaged.

C: 其实我是想让你带着小机器人出去，做一些实地训练，这样用起来才能更贴合你的习惯。
E: I actually wanted you to take this little robot along with you to do some field training. This way, it will become more suited to your habits.

C: 干什么？当然是传播科学啊。
E: What am I doing? Spreading scientific theory, of course!

C: 想挑束花送人。
E: I need to pick a bouquet for someone.

C: 这是基于列车组行为模式的学习成果。
E: This is a learning outcome based on the Express Crew's behavior patterns.

C: 他们永远离开了。
E: They are gone forever.

C: 但愿如此吧，我受够折腾了。
E: I hope so. I've had enough of these twists and turns.

C: 与此同时，在铆钉镇……
E: Meanwhile in Rivet Town...

C: …算了算了，不重要。关键是，公司的人突然跑来雅利洛-Ⅵ干嘛？
E: Never mind, it's not that important. The important question is: What are the IPC doing on Jarilo-VI?

C: 哇…人声鼎沸呀！这还是我记忆里的贝洛伯格吗？
E: Wow! There are people everywhere. Are you sure we're in Belobog?

C: 拖着不还会怎么样？
E: What happens if you don't pay it off in time?

C: 放心吧，布洛妮娅！朋友有难，热心的无名客怎么可能拒绝？
E: Have no fear, Bronya! When a friend's in need, the Nameless will always be at their side!

C: 谢谢，{NICKNAME}。我相信你们。
E: Thank you, {NICKNAME}. I believe in you.

C: 这博物馆里的展品，大部分都有些无趣。
E: Most exhibits in this museum are of little value.

C: 我们想帮布洛妮娅求求情。
E: We want to ask for a favor on behalf of Bronya.

C: …喂喂，好人可不是你这么当的呀！
E: Hey! Nobody agreed to that!

C: 灭、灭口？！
E: T—Take us out!?

C: 哎呀，在外人面前，你倒是谦虚点嘛！
E: Huh? Geez, can you be a little more humble?

C: 那是「星际和平公司」的标志。你为什么会出现在这里？
E: You bear the insignia of the Interastral Peace Corporation. What is your motive for coming here?

C: 负债人未能在执行期限内还款的情况，公司有权跳过协商阶段，直接接手其资产。都是按规矩办事，你们有什么不服？
E: In cases where debtors fail to repay within the set time frame, the IPC reserves the right to skip negotiations and take over all assets. We're simply following the rules — what exactly is your problem?

C: 呃…没想到真的要撕破脸皮，早知道就提前申请加班了……
E: Ugh, if I knew things were going to get this heated, I'd have applied for overtime...

C: 你们看——
E: Look...

C: 你的想法和我一样…这对我来说是种慰藉，谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。
E: That thought has crossed my mind, and it comforts me to hear you say that, {NICKNAME}.

C: 审批？什么审批？
E: Approval for what?

C: 你在雅利洛-Ⅵ玩朋友游戏的时候，「钻石」搞定了筑材物流部的大佬。缺席今天的「圆桌会议」，就是因为这个。
E: While you were enjoying your playtime on Jarilo-VI, Diamond was busy taking care of the head honcho of the Building Material Logistics Department. That's why he didn't attend today's meeting.

C: 虽然这次下来没能体验到节日庆典的气氛，但是往好处想，能和托帕小姐这样的公司高管搭上线，也算是不虚此行了吧？
E: Well, we didn't get to enjoy the festivities this time round, but at least we still got to meet a top IPC executive!

C: 话说回来，姬子是怎么知道这里发生的事的？
E: I've been wondering, how did you figure out what was happening here on Belobog, Himeko?

C: 如果「互助会」是在瞒着我这个主治医生，做些可能危害到患者的事…那我坚决不能坐视不理。
E: If I find out they're preventing me from doing my job... or if they're bringing harm to my patients... I won't just sit on the sidelines.

C: 对于我们这种人，缓慢又痛苦的疗程跟被宣判死刑也没什么两样。与其说服我们去受那种折磨…还不如来个干脆痛快的。
E: For people like us, a slow and tortuous treatment is the same as a death sentence. If it's between that and a quick result, we'll take the latter.

C: …不是，老太太，你怎么还向着她啊？我们这特效药吃得好好的，现在说断就断了？凭什么——
E: ...Ma'am, please think for a moment. How can you still be siding with her? That wonder medicine was working fine for us, and now it's gone because she wants it to be? How can she—

C: 面对火力全开的机械战将，{NICKNAME}该何去何从？屏住呼吸吧，现场的各位观众——
E: Facing the full-scale mechanical warrior, what should {NICKNAME} do? Hold your breath, because...

C: <size=36>怎会如此？！</size>
E: <size=36>How could this be!?</size>

C: 是一种神器。
E: It's an artifact.

C: 我才发现，我个人的愿望，又哪里重要呢？我可以做个劣下的科员，但黑塔不能赶走我。
E: That's when I realized that my personal wishes were not important. I can just be a low-level researcher, but I can't let the space station drive me out.

C: 我也早就看出来，那封信中所写的共犯就是我。只是我真的…不敢面对。
E: I had already figured that the "accomplice" in that letter was referring to me. It's just that I didn't really... have the courage to face it.

C: 对，我不想要。从今以后，我不会再帮你做饭、洗衣擦鞋、代笔写信，也不会再做你的傀儡，听明白了吗？
E: That's right, I don't want any of it. From now on, I won't help you cook, wash your clothes and shoes, write your letters, or be your puppet. Get it?

C: 爸爸？不对，不是。他是重要的人…但不是爸爸。
E: Dad? No, nope. He's important, but he's not my dad...

C: {F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}不愿意告诉我你的名字吗？
E: {F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}, don't you want to tell me your name?

C: 我不能跟{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}走。我必须找到走出去的方法才行。
E: I can't go with you, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}. I have to find a way to get out.

C: …不必麻烦了，{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}。
E: ...Don't bother, {F#ma'am}{M#sir}.

C: 不也挺好的吗？
E: Isn't that great?

C: 没什么，我现在就去挑花。
E: Nothing. I'm going to go pick out some flowers.

C: （只要确保枪架上摆放着「3把枪支」，那么适当地调整一下枪支的摆放也是可以的吧？）
E: (As long as you make sure there are three guns on each rack, switching around the order of the guns won't be a problem — right?)

C: 名字好像是叫…斯薇塔，对，想起来了。走吧，我们过去找她。
E: I think her name was... Swetta? Yes, that's right. Let's go pay her a visit.

C: 马马虎虎。
E: It has its ups and downs.

C: 然后，然后我们就悄悄地把装零件的箱子拖到了这里，想把它们还给史瓦罗先生……
E: And then, and then — we quietly dragged away the boxes with the parts in, a—and gave them to Mr. Svarog...

C: 那卷胶片上有一些十分珍贵的图像素材，之前我们还没来得及复制原片…不得不说，那些窃贼下手又快又准，而且很有辨识展品价值的眼光。
E: There were some very valuable images on that film, and we hadn't gotten around to making a backup... I must admit, the thieves chose a good target, and they were fast and efficient.

C: 总觉得我们的运气出奇地好。
E: It feels like we've gotten very lucky.

C: {NICKNAME}，我们走吧。
E: {NICKNAME}, let's move on.

C: 才不是客气！在我看来，现在开放这座博物馆的意义十分重大…比过去任何一次都更值得铭记。
E: I'm just stating the obvious! The way I see it, the museum's reopening is a very significant event... and worth remembering more than any other time in the past.

C: 听听他这回又有什么要说的吧。
E: Let's see what he's talking about this time.

C: 轻敲两次，重敲三次。
E: Tap twice and knock three times.

C: 轻敲三次，重敲两次。
E: Tap three times and knock twice.

C: 很明显，你回答错了。寒腿叔叔这下不做声了…糟糕。
E: You obviously answered wrong. Not a peep can be heard from Mr. Cold Feet. Uh-oh....

C: {NICKNAME}，抱歉让你久等啦，我来了。
E: {NICKNAME}, I'm here. Sorry to keep you waiting.

C: 开始吧。
E: Let's begin.

C: 好啦好啦，我们快走吧——去做志愿者咯！
E: Fine fine fine. Then let's go be volunteers!

C: 好啦，克拉拉——你如实回答就好了，不用害怕！我们的面试很轻松的啦！
E: Take it easy, Clara... Just answer truthfully, and don't be scared! We're just having a casual conversation here!

C: 我身为鼹鼠党的老大，甚至都不知道发生过这种事…是我失职了！
E: As the leader of The Moles, I didn't even know about this... I have neglected my responsibilities!

C: 不过，佩拉倒是也说得没错：这城里没人不知道我和她平时有来往。要是不走这么个正式流程，难免给人落了口实。
E: Still, Pela's right. Everyone in this city knows we are friends. We'll get flak if we don't go through the normal process.

C: 技能特长这栏，「除了赚钱都很擅长」——您写得非常简洁嘛！
E: For skills and expertise, you say you are "good at everything except making money." How concise and to the point!

C: 如果因为我个人原因，导致博物馆出现了经营不善的状况——这部分损失将由我个人承担！如果需要的话，我甚至可以倒贴！
E: If the mismanagement is the result of my individual mistake, I'll bear the loss and even pay compensation!

C: …哎。这家伙怎么总在这种奇怪的事情上固执得很。
E: *sigh* This woman is always so stubborn when it comes to odd things like this...

C: 怎么，这就沉默了？
E: Um... Why the silence?

C: 个人经历…居然是「没有」吗？但其实你经历过很多事情吧？
E: You have... no personal experience? You went through a lot, didn't you?

C: …哼，这回你倒是没说错。
E: ...Hmph, you're not wrong about that.

C: 怎么伊蕾恩也没出来啊！走走走——
E: Elaine was in there too!? Quick, we have to—

C: 他啊，他是旧时代的智能机器人，地下刚开始建设时就存在了——我知道的就这么些。
E: Svarog? He's an artificially intelligent being from the Old World. He was here when the underground was first constructed. That's about all I know.

C: 有什么可以帮你的吗？
E: Can I help you with anything?

C: …实在没有底气这么说啊。
E: ...Heh, who could ever say that confidently.

C: 我这一生也算光荣…
E: I'm too young to die...

C: 矿脉探测器是个什么玩意？
E: What is a vein detector?

C: 感觉你还在骗我。
E: Feels like you're trying to trick me.

C: 这探测器的探针都没了，就像是没了眼睛耳朵，根本没有人会买这些破烂。
E: The detector's probe is gone, it's like searching for something without eyes or ears. Who's going to want a pile of junk?

C: 从刚才开始就一直这样…
E: She's been like this ever since just now...

C: 你要的东西我拿回来了。
E: I got what you wanted.

C: 说啥啊，能先处理下我的问题吗？我明天可是有排班的，不带齐矿具我没法睡觉…啊不是，我没法上班啊！
E: What are you two talking about? Can you deal with my problem first? I have a shift tomorrow, I can't sleep without the mining equipment... Erh I mean... I can't work without the mining equipment!

C: 哎呀呀，这找东西的开销也得算到代理费里…看在咱俩的交情上，这次只多收你三成吧？
E: Hey, the cost of finding things has to be included in the agency fee... But since we are such good friends, I will only charge you <unbreak>30%</unbreak> more this time, okay?

C: 救命啊！
E: Help!

C: 快逃啊！
E: R—Run for your lives!

C: 那种怪物…我在禁区前线时也与它打过几次照面。
E: I've seen this type of monster a few times near the restricted zone.

C: 你这女人…真是阴魂不散。
E: You... You just won't stop haunting me.

C: 哟，{NICKNAME}来啦！我们俩正等你呢。
E: Oh, {NICKNAME}! We were just waiting for you.

C: 原来你们认识啊，那就好说了。
E: So you know her! Well, that makes this easy.
Hmm...

C: 等等，不对——你为什么会在这里啊？！
E: Wait — where did you come from all of a sudden!?

C: 那，接下来怎么说——就这么解散吗？还是说，晚上要不要再约个夜宵？
E: Anyway, what now? Back home? Wanna go out for a midnight snack later?

C: 裂界生物不需要人类的物资，它们抢东西也不会这么…有礼貌。
E: The monsters of the Fragmentum don't need any materials we humans use. And if they did take anything, this place would look much messier...

C: 哈，万一他还是没有悔改呢？
E: Hah, and what if he doesn't?

C: 你、你小时候？！你确定吗……
E: Wh—When you were a child!? Are you sure...?

C: 有一次，他们给鼹鼠党发来了挑战书，说是要和我们进行打弹珠比赛！
E: One time, they sent us a formal declaration of war — challenging The Moles to a marbles competition!

C: 先、先不要跟虎克说话…让虎克冷静一下！
E: J—Just don't talk to me right now... I need to calm down!

C: 不是都说了嘛，先不要和我说话！虎克必须好好想想……
E: I said don't talk to me right now! I need time to think...

C: 虎克其实根本没有这个打算…不过，尤利安拿到了宝贝，虎克却什么都没有…好亏！
E: ...*sigh* I wasn't actually planning on selling these marbles... But Julian gets his treasure and I get nothing... What a lousy bargain!

C: 不行，老爹说那个叔叔走丢了，后来再也没见过他。听说，他好像是去了很遥远的地方……
E: Not possible. Daddy said that guy went missing one day, and he never saw him again. Maybe he went to someplace far away...

C: 呜哇，「菌菌」——你怎么这么脏呀，而且还有好几处开线了…不好好清理一下的话，肯定没人会买你的。
E: Whoa, Junjun... How did you get covered in dirt? And why do you have so many loose threads? If we don't get you cleaned up, no one will buy you.

C: 本机正在执行例行巡逻任务，并未收到来自机械网络中枢的其他指令。
E: I am on a standard patrol mission. I have not received any other orders from the network hub.

C: {NICKNAME}，克拉拉，游览，愉快，是否？
E: {NICKNAME}, Clara, tour, enjoyable, is it?

C: 也不是矿工喝醉以后的胡言乱语。
E: Ravings of a drunken miner is a little harsh.

C: 重新评估中——个体威胁指数：高。战斗模组启动，准备清除威胁。
E: Reassessing... Subject threat index: High. Initializing combat module. Threat elimination activated.

C: 我试试重置它的系统……
E: Let me try and reset its system...

C: 她究竟是什么来头，权限还要问她申请……
E: We need to get permissions from her? What's she got to do with this?

C: 虽说她不像外表那么柔弱，但还是……
E: Her strength belies her appearance, but even so...

C: 所以，我不能带大家去见他…如果你们和史瓦罗先生起了冲突，肯定会有人受伤的。无辜的人们也可能被波及。
E: So, I can't take you to see him... If Mr. Svarog and you had a fight, someone would get hurt for sure. Maybe even bystanders...

C: …你非得加这最后一句嘛！
E: ...Did you really have to add that last part!?

C: …克拉拉，太过善良可是会被坏人利用的。
E: ...Y'know Clara, if you're too kind, people can take advantage of you.

C: 史瓦罗大佬的算法，根本不可能把我们这几个变量囊括进去吧？
E: There's just no way that Svarog's calculations would have included variables like us, y'know?

C: 我看到聚落的供能系统重新上线了。谢谢你，克拉拉。
E: I see that the energy supply system is back online. Thank you, Clara.

C: 付出的代价太大了。
E: The cost was too great.

C: 嗐，等你再呆上一段时间就懂了……
E: Well, you'll understand when you've been here a while longer.

C: 没什么！这孩子喜欢说胡话…
E: No one! This kid's always spouting nonsense...

C: 什么破拍卖会，浪费时间。
E: Lousy auction. What a waste of time.

C: 虎克，交给你了。
E: Over to you, Hook.

C: 可惜没能搞来地髓探针…光有这探测器有啥用啊，唉。
E: Sadly, I wasn't able to get hold of the Geomarrow Probe... *sigh* What good is this detector on its own?

C: 科鲁泽的信件和包裹
E: Kluzer's letter and parcel

C: 唔…克拉拉没法通过这些线索联想到什么。{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}有什么想法吗？
E: Hmm... I'm struggling to make sense of these clues. Do you have any thoughts, {F#big sister}{M#big brother}?

C: 可能是逻辑语言中枢出了问题吧。这样的话，这个小家伙应该听不懂我们说的话……
E: Perhaps there's an issue with its language module. This little guy probably can't understand what we're saying either...

C: 实在不行就去扒一副外壳下来…
E: I can always go grab one from another robot if needed...

C: 这副机械外壳…唔…看样子，似乎不是小家伙原来的款式呢？
E: This shell... Hmm... It doesn't appear to be the same design as this little fella's...

C: 但是…这件事对克拉拉来说真的很重要！拜托{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，请你再帮克拉拉一次吧。
E: But... it's very important to me! Please... help me one more time.

C: 这台机器看上去已经失去机能了，但{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}接近它的时候还是要谨慎一些……
E: Although it doesn't seem to be functioning, you should still be cautious when approaching it...

C: …看来，留给我们的时间不多了。还有其他细节吗，史瓦罗先生？
E: It appears we don't have much time left. Mr. Svarog, have you discovered anything else?

C: 史瓦罗先生，他已经替我考虑到这点了吗？或许克拉拉不该辜负他的心意？
E: Did Mr. Svarog consider that for me? Maybe I shouldn't disappoint him...

C: 等等…我想再找史瓦罗聊聊。
E: Wait... I want to talk again to Svarog.

C: 你带来的这些人，其实不是机械屋的助手吧？
E: These people you've brought, they're... they're not workshop assistants, right?

C: 抱歉，把你卷进来。
E: Sorry for getting you involved in this.

C: 你就这么信任我？
E: You trust me?

C: …喂，打住！你别说话了。
E: Hey! Cut it out.

C: 机关有反应了？
E: It worked, right?

C: 非要在这个时候问吗？
E: Is now a good time?

C: 这是什么东西啊…噫，真可怕！
E: Wh—What is this? ...It's scary!

C: 带你来这的另一个原因，是时候告诉你了，布洛妮娅。
E: It's time I told you my other reason for bringing you here, Bronya.

C: 我一直在苦想，苦想该怎么向你传达这一切。承诺中的明天总会到来，但如果你不能待在我的身旁，和我一同守望那个新世界……
E: I have agonized — long agonized over how to convey all this to you. Inevitably, the promised tomorrow will transpire... but if you were not there beside me, to watch over that new world...

C: 哪怕注定走入灭亡，我们也会手牵着手，勇敢地走入那片黑暗——
E: Even if we are doomed to destruction, we will go bravely, walking hand in hand into the darkness...

C: 我会解救所有人……
E: I... will save everyone...!

C: 她的状况好像不太妙啊！怎么办怎么办…{NICKNAME}，想个法子呗？
E: She's exhausted! Quick, we need to think of something... {NICKNAME}, help me out here!

C: 我想知道…我的命运为何会是这般。我猜答案就被封存在这里，但我对这些谜语无能为力……
E: I want to know... why my fate is like this. I guess the answer is sealed in here, but there's nothing I can do about it...

C: 谢谢你，陌生人……
E: Thank you, stranger...

C: 你如果有什么需要就尽管告诉我哦，我可以帮你代购。只要记得回空间站取货就好啦。
E: If you ever need anything, just say the word. I can help you buy it. All you need to do is remember to come back to the space station to pick it up.

C: 想再看看照片。
E: I want to see the photo again.

C: 俺头脑不聪明，只好全都记下来了。你看就算俺不在了，这本笔记也能发挥用处，嘿嘿。
E: I know my mind isn't that sharp, so I jotted down everything. Even if I'm gone later, these notes will still be very useful to Ms. Luhui.

C: 下了决心之后再后悔吗？可以这样啊。
E: Regret making a decision like this? Can I still...

C: 云骑军已经入驻戒严了。
E: The Cloud Knights are already imposing a curfew over there.

C: 很遗憾，这棵树不为所动，回应你的只有凝固的寂静，那册书与你之间凭空生出了一种疏离感。
E: Unfortunately, the tree doesn't even shake. Only stupefied silence answers you. The book now suddenly feel more distant than ever.

C: 收集一根小小的、来历不明的枝条又能有什么罪过？何况这根枝叶是你亲自交到我手中的呀？
E: What crime is it to collect a small twig that could have come from anywhere? Besides, you gave me this twig yourself.

C: 你怎么突然哭了？
E: Why are you crying suddenly?

C: 列车长好勤劳，又在扫地啊？
E: Pom-Pom is so hardworking... sweeping again?

C: 你买下「矿脉探测器」了？
E: Did you buy the vein detector?

C: 你不是找我有要紧事吗？
E: Don't you have urgent matters for me?

C: 嗯，没错，除了「忧郁诗人」，我还做了好几个其他的类型的「诗人」。
E: Mmm, that's right. I made several other poets besides the gloomy one.

C: 我说，「蘑菇」，你应该能定位到其他几个诗仙机巧的位置，对吧？
E: Mushroom, you should be able to pinpoint the locations of the other poet ingenia, right?

C: 你好懂啊。这么熟练，你一定经常助人为乐吧？
E: You get it. You're so proficient. You must help people out for fun, right?

C: 即使有最棒的诗，也无济于事。
E: Even if you have the best poems in the world, they won't help you.

C: 小聪…对于持明而言，蜕生便会褪去过去的记忆。不知为什么，每一次转生，他都会找上我，随即像过去那样陷入热恋。
E: Cong... For the Vidyadhara, the hatching rebirth will wash away their memory. However, for some reason, he will always find me after every reincarnation and fall head over heels for me.

C: 毕竟你是小聪嘛。
E: Well, you sure can, because you're Cong.

C: 你还会去继续追求她吗？
E: Will you keep trying to win her heart?

C: 看上去，你遇到了麻烦？
E: Are you having trouble with something?

C: 你平仄不清，对仗不工，韵律不对，缺乏章法…
E: Your counterpoints and rhymes are wrong, and your verses lack structure...

C: 尘寰相见，好礼相送。
E: Acquaintance from the mortal coil, luxurious gifts from beyond.

C: …你好，找我有事？
E: ...Good day. Can I help you?

C: 所以，我劝你别在「美丽狐仙聊天」里投入什么真感情，也别和仙舟人建立什么情感羁绊……
E: So, I advise you to not invest much of yourself in the Foxian Beauty Chat service. If possible, don't create any sort of relationship entanglement with a Xianzhou native...

C: 确实，他们对羞耻程度的把握上有点水平。
E: Truly so. They really have complete control of the level of embarrassment of the sentence.

C: 明知故问嘛，虽然我是被迫的。
E: You already knew the answer, although I was forced to do this.

C: 该怎么说呢，一开始的猜测得到了验证。不过，对温符瑞科员来说，还真是遗憾。
E: How should I say it... My initial guess was proven right. But it would be very discouraging to Researcher Wen.

C: 那我再问一个问题，你们两个谁是{NICKNAME}？
E: I'll ask you another question, which one of you is {NICKNAME}?

C: 你们抓错人了吧。
E: You have the wrong people.

C: 怎么会，这是真的吗…我不相信。
E: How could this be... Is it true? I can't believe it.

C: 礼物是寄给黛青小姐姐的，「她孤身一人住在远离尘世的地方」。我们寄给她的礼物，怎么就落在你的手里了？
E: The gift we sent is for Ms. Daiqing, "who lives alone, away from the world." How exactly did it fall into your hands?

C: 那么问题来了，到底谁才是线下工作人员呢？简直是胡闹。
E: So the question is, who exactly is this in-person operative? What a hot mess.

C: 等等，怎么是一个男人在签收快递？
E: Hang on — why is a man signing for this?

C: 你又打算利用我调查什么？
E: Are you asking me to investigate something again?

C: {NICKNAME}，我的笔记本…我的笔记本不见了。
E: {NICKNAME}, my notebook... It's missing.

C: 你做了什么…
E: What did you do...

C: 我一生恪守学会的对等回报原则，现在也是如此。若没有你的帮助，我绝对无法走到今天。
E: My whole life I've always been sticking to the rule of reciprocity, and nothing's changed now. Without your help, I would never be where I am today.

C: 恕兄弟我多嘴一句，如今的丹鼎司十分可疑，如果你遇上他们的人想带走龙女，最好留个心眼。
E: Oh, one more thing... There's a lot of suspicion surrounding the Alchemy Commission these days. If you discover someone from the commission on the hunt for the Dragon Lady, watch your step.

C: 你是在套我的话吧，你说你是从丹鼎司洞天过来的，证据呢？
E: You're trying to get me to say something, aren't you? You said you came from the Alchemy Commission. Where's your proof?

C: 我也只是听说过罢了。要不是在丹鼎司观颐台的卷牍里看过一些记载，「药王秘传」这四个字仙舟上知道的人怕也不多。
E: I don't know much. If it weren't for those scrolls in the Alchemy Commission's Elixir Research Terrace, I doubt anyone in the Xianzhou would've heard of them.

C: …病情不等人，我们就只等一会儿，一会儿。
E: ...I don't have long. We'll wait for a while... just a short while.

C: 拜托，{NICKNAME}，什么都不用做。你能来和我聊聊，我已经很高兴了。
E: Please, {NICKNAME}. There really is no need for anything. Just coming to chat with me is cause enough for celebration.

C: 我想吃点甜的！
E: I want something sweet!

C: 好…我尝尝……
E: Alright... Let me have a taste...

C: 说起来，我可去过很多地方
E: Speaking of which, I've been around the block, y'know...

C: 人被变成了…怪物，对吧？
E: ...They were turning humans into monsters, weren't they...

C: 我不想知道那些年里发生了什么难熬的事情，我没有兴趣知道自己这一生经历了什么，反正都是些琐碎的事。
E: I wasn't interested in anything that had happened to me up to then — the things I'd experienced. None of it mattered...

C: 白露小姐停留丹鼎司…
E: Miss Bailu is currently at the Alchemy Commission...

C: 持明长老希望另选龙尊。
E: The Vidyadhara elders want to choose a new High Elder.

C: 合理！
E: Seems reasonable!

C: 丹鼎司希望龙尊仍旧是白露。
E: The Alchemy Commission hopes that Bailu can stay on as High Elder.

C: 继丹枫逊位后，他们抗衡龙师，维持白露的体面，也算是苦心孤诣了。
E: After Dan Feng's abdication, they fought against the Preceptors and saved Bailu's dignity. They demonstrated a true devotion.

C: 哇哦！真够壮观的！这就是「建木」？
E: ...Wowwww, what a magnificent sight! Is that the Ambrosial Arbor?

C: 走吧，差不多该回到行医市集了，我今天还有别的事要忙呢。
E: Hmm... We should head back to the Healer's Market, I have other things to do today. Let's go.

C: 龙师们对白露小姐忌惮深重。他们要求每一位伺候大人的侍女都必须记录您的梦境和日常行为，一开始我也照做了。
E: The Preceptors are very fearful of you, Miss Bailu. They asked every maid to record your dreams and daily activities. And I did so, at first.

C: 可是后来，我觉得龙师们并非是出自关心，而是另有所图，就再也无法坚持下去。
E: After a while, I felt that the Preceptors were asking this not out of concern for you, but for some malevolent purpose... so I stopped.

C: 这位先生是谁？…我想看看他的资料。
E: Who's he? ...I'd like to see more information on him.

C: 关于机巧鸟的影像…
E: About the cycrane footage...

C: 就知道你最可靠了！
E: I knew we could rely on you!

C: 罗刹走进了一个角落，但那个角落直通一家客栈…罗刹从客栈中出来，走进了三余书肆，什么都没买。
E: Luocha turns a corner, but the corner leads straight to an inn... Then he exits the inn and goes into Spare Time Book Shop without buying anything.

C: 还是不看了。
E: Not now.

C: 那丢失的部分还能修复吗？就像我们刚才做的那样。
E: Are the corrupted parts recoverable? Can we use the same methods again?

C: 嗯嗯，请一定常来。
E: Glad to hear that! Please come by anytime!

C: 他在睡午觉？
E: Afternoon nap?

C: （我个人并不认为罗浮上会有这么危险的地方…这种会有危险分子和黑市买家接头的地方，至少在建木生发之前，应该是不存在的。）
E: (Monster lairs and black market spaces... I doubt the Luofu has any of that. At least, I doubt things of that nature existed before the Ambrosial Arbor's resurrection.)

C: （请先暂停一下，先别打。小三月，我认为他们应该没有打架…不然怎么进行交易呢。）
E: (Hang fire, March — I don't think Luocha was here to beat people up... He wanted to make a deal, right?)

C: 每天求我的人可多了，我难道都要通融一下？
E: People ask for favors every day. Am I supposed to say yes to all of them?

C: 云骑听到骚动，一定很快就会赶来，还是赶紧去码头吧。
E: The Cloud Knights will have been alerted by now — I need to hurry to the dock.

C: （和他交接星核的坏家伙藏在这里，他就是来和那些家伙见面的。）
E: (His villain friends must have been waiting on the other side to buy the Stellaron. He went to meet them.)

C: 这一次多亏了二位英雄，晴霓才能安然无恙。我的感激之情难以言表。
E: It was because of both of you that Qingni escaped unscathed. Words cannot express my gratitude.

C: 无论宝箱藏得有多深，你都能把它找出来。你敏锐的观察力总是令我叹服，这件事交给你来做，我绝对放心。
E: Your powers of perception are impressive — no matter how well a treasure chest is hidden, you're always able to spot it... I think you're the right person for the job.

C: 有了！就是这个！这就是妈妈的挂饰…嗯？里面似乎有个东西？
E: Yes! This is it! This is Mom's trinket... Huh? There's something inside...

C: 您误会了，我只是…想知道母亲究竟在想什么。
E: You misunderstand, I just... wanna know what she's thinking.

C: 如果是为了解答晴霓小姐的好奇心，我们不妨将话题放得更遥远一些？对于身为飞行士的驭空，你们想了解什么呢？
E: If you wish to dispel Miss Qingni's curiosity, perhaps we can take a small step back from the topic at hand. What do you wish to know about Yukong the pilot?

C: 她想借着这件东西，打听驭空大人当年的经历，还有…她不再飞行的理由。
E: She thought it might be a way to find out more about Madam Yukong's past, and... why she no longer flies.

C: 我不奢望你的原谅，但只希望…你能听听我的辩解。
E: I don't expect to gain your forgiveness. I just hope you can... understand my reason.

C: 杨叔，咱们先撤吧…
E: Mr. Yang, let's get out of here...

C: 说来听听吧。
E: Tell me.

C: 嗯，没错。
E: Yeah, you're right.

C: 云骑军来了，我需要你帮我打发他们。
E: The Cloud Knights are here — I need you to help me get rid of them.

C: 以前的我？…曾经是个「纯美骑士」。
E: The old me? I used to be a Knight of Beauty.

C: 刃以前是什么人？
E: Who is Blade?

C: 他醒来的时候什么也不记得，后来有个女人找到了他，教他剑术，然后杀死他，一次又一次，直到他不堪忍受。
E: When he woke up, he didn't remember anything. Sometime later, a woman found him. She taught him swordplay, and then killed him, over and over again, until it was too much for him to bear.

C: 因为我想改变自己。
E: Because I wanted to change myself.

C: 我是{NICKNAME}。
E: I'm {NICKNAME}.

C: 我不是云骑军。
E: I'm not a Cloud Knight.

C: （现在可不是分心干别的事的时候。）
E: (Now it's not the time to get distracted.)

C: …代表无法医治。
E: ...There's no cure.

C: 我本以为「饮月君」就此不复存在。但重回罗浮，却再次得见你分海引潮的绝景，真是恍若隔世。
E: I thought Imbibitor Lunae had been wiped from this world... but then I returned to the Luofu and watched as you parted the sea. After all these years, it was a magnificent sight to behold.

C: 那这一次，咱们是要祭拜那位短生种前辈吗？
E: Hmm... So are we here to commemorate your short-life species friend?

C: 珍惜此刻吧，我给你短暂一死的机会。
E: Savor the moment. I will deliver you a brief moment of death.

C: 来吧，谛听，顺着气息找一找。
E: Here Diting, let's follow the scent!

C: 因此你的剑曲，收尾处多少显得杂乱了。
E: ...which causes your sword's song to become somewhat mumbled at the end.

C: 不要紧的，小弟弟，我和你无冤无仇，也不曾想对仙舟不利啊。这罩黑纱，正是我不愿触景生情，身陷魔阴，再造狂孽的证明。
E: Fear not, young man, I hold no grievance against you and have never held ill intent towards the Xianzhou. The black veil covering my eyes is merely proof of my resolve to never look back, to never fall again into mara and destruction.

C: 「刃」，这是他现在的名字吗？弃身锋刃，刀剑研心，倒是会挑名字呵。
E: He goes by "Blade" nowadays? A fitting name for someone who dedicated his mind and body to the ways of the sword.

C: 若是查到了什么蛛丝马迹，希望您能知会地衡司，一则我和同僚们能及时应对，二则，若有帮得上的忙，我也可以及早出力。
E: If you come across any clues, remember to inform the Realm-Keeping Commission straight away. My colleagues and I will handle any situation with haste and to the best of our ability.

C: 这封信的作者，恐怕正是那个被你打败的魔阴身——他受人蛊惑，以治病为名遭毒害，成了你所见到的模样。
E: The author of this letter was likely the mara-struck you defeated. My guess is he was led astray and poisoned while under the pretext of being cured. You saw how he ended up...

C: 到地方了，就是这里。
E: Here we are. This is the place.

C: 你放心好了，药王慈怀，我是不会害你的。
E: Relax. By the mercy of Sanctus Medicus, I will not harm you.

C: 「药王秘传」，是奉慈怀药王为正教正法的组织，而「莳者」，就是我们这些追随者们的自称。
E: The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus is a devout group, holding firm in their belief that Merciful Medicus is the one, ultimate faith. As followers, we refer to ourselves as disciples, dedicated to our cause.

C: 井圆是谁…
E: Jim Yan? Never heard of him...

C: 「说是语时，莳者九万九千九百九十九人俱，皆断生老病苦。」
E: "As they spoke the words, the <unbreak>99,999</unbreak> disciples were liberated from youth, old age, sickness, and suffering."

C: 过来，过来，别抄了，快过来。
E: Psst, hey, stop writing — get over here!

C: 无论如何…恭喜你成为了一名莳者。你的代号就叫做…「灰牡丹」吧！
E: In any case... my hearty congratulations on your admission to the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus. From now on, you will be known by the code name... Gray Peony!

C: 我确实很强。
E: How much can you bench?

C: 你看起来倒是很弱。
E: You look kind of weak.

C: 无妨…我喜欢你的性格。
E: Easy, Hibiscus... I like this kid.

C: 青镞让我向你咨询…
E: Qingzu asked me to find you...

C: 向丹士说明了情况。
E: You explain what's transpired to the alchemist.

C: 还是一起吧！
E: Come onnnn⁓ Together is better!

C: 云骑的小姑娘，将军怎么只派了你一个人来？
E: Miss Cloud Knight, why did the general send you out here all alone?

C: 你是谁？我的记忆中没有你。
E: Who are you? I don't remember you.

C: 可是卡芙卡那个时候…
E: But with Kafka...

C: 不要大意，准备战斗。
E: Don't let off now. Get ready for combat.

C: 什么？
E: What?

C: 我对这件事也越来越有兴趣了。
E: Hehe, very well. I must admit that I'm finding the whole matter more interesting by the minute.

C: （清除「失真」）
E: (Clear distortion)

C: 这些经历扭曲得越来越离谱了……
E: These experiences are becoming increasingly distorted...

C: （再等等）
E: (Wait)

C: 的确，那些谜题对于您这样经验丰富的开拓者而言，是有些简单了。
E: Sure enough, those puzzles are going to be easy for a Trailblazer with the vast experience that you have.

C: 也许三月七就在…
E: Maybe March 7th is actually...

C: 你就别替她找借口了。
E: Don't make excuses for her.

C: 对不起！
E: I'm sorry!

C: 哪有什么不好的，麻烦你了。
E: Don't worry about it. I need your help on this.

C: 既然我那孙女说要与我明日对话，我自会等等她。顺便一问，你照顾了她半晌，很累吧？
E: Since my granddaughter mentioned talking to me tomorrow, I'll be waiting for her. By the way, you watched over her for quite some time. You must be exhausted, aren't you?

C: 还一件事我很在意，窃贼偷走了剑，却留下剑匣。难不成是像我一样，把剑熔了？
E: There's something else bothering me. Why would the thief take the sword but leave the case behind? Did they melt down the sword like I wanted to?

C: 剑匣锁扣
E: Sword Case Lock

C: …对不起！
E: ...I'm sorry!

C: 说一千道一万，你还是要带着魔剑离开仙舟，把剑给我！
E: Whatever your reasons are, you're planning to take the cursed sword away from the Xianzhou! Hand it over to me!

C: 不过，孤云剑能得偿所愿，也是件好事。关于这点我倒是不后悔。
E: But at least Guyun got what it wanted. I have no regrets there.

C: 还真开口说话了！黑天鹅小姐，它们果真是冲着你来的——
E: So they can talk after all! Miss Black Swan, they're heading straight for you...

C: 看来，胜负的关键不在谜题本身，如果我们不能看穿花火小姐古怪行径下的真实意图…恐怕这场追赶永远不会结束。
E: Looks like the key to winning lies not in the puzzle itself, but in the motives behind Miss Sparkle's strange behavior... I'm afraid this chase may just go on forever.

C: 哦，黑天鹅警探，桑博警探，你们可终于来了！
E: Oh, Detective Black Swan and Detective Sampo. You finally made it!

C: 啊，不…我，这…哈哈，这密室杀人事件有点意思，我还想猜猜看呢……
E: Ah, no... I, it's... Haha, this locked-room murder case is pretty fun. I wanna guess who it was...

C: 没问题。你想问哪件事？
E: No problem. What would you like to know about?

C: 毕竟是你费心准备的谜底，我不想错过。
E: Why, I wouldn't miss it for the world — seeing as you put so much work into everything.

C: 哎？这…不好吧？我就是客气客气，其实也没什么不好的。
E: Huh? Oh, uh... no need. Actually I was just being polite, I don't see why not.

C: 这下好了，我的太卜司轻轻松松职业生涯彻底泡汤了。
E: Now I actually have career prospects... this is terrible.

C: 你安排后手，却不告诉我们。
E: You didn't give us the full picture of your plan for Kafka.

C: 盖因人无时无刻不行于命途之上，在时间与空间中移动，成就种种因果。
E: Every one of us walks a Path, moving ceaselessly through time and space, creating all manner of karma in our wake...

C: 你不会是谜语人吧…
E: I sense more Fu Xuan riddles on the horizon...

C: 塔伊兹育罗斯是怎么死的？
E: How did Tayzzyronth die?

C: 不要慌张，符卿，相信穷观阵是不会说谎的。你所述的卡芙卡之逻辑非常可靠，它正为我添上了一块拼图。
E: Stay calm, Diviner Fu, the Matrix of Prescience does not lie. The logic you have laid out concerning Kafka makes sense — it has helped me to fill in another piece of the puzzle.

C: 生活就是这样，充满了意外。所以能偷个懒让自己舒坦一会儿是一会。谁知道麻烦的活儿什么时候会找上门。
E: Such is life, full of surprises. That's why you gotta seize any opportunity to take a break — who knows when trouble will come knocking at your door.

C: 呼，没事啦。看来，这件宝贝还真是用对地方了，一定是那木精吃痛，浑身不爽了吧，哈哈哈。
E: Phew, seems like it worked! That tree demon must be writhing in pain, hahaha.

C: 它缠绕的是工造司至宝：「造化洪炉」！
E: They've encoiled the Artisanship Commission's most precious invention: The Creation Furnace!

C: 各位走路时且留神着……
E: Take care where you walk, friends...

C: 这么快便有下文了？看来这几位丹士确实颇有水平。
E: Wow, even for those alchemists, that was fast.

C: 我猜她眼下是往那儿去了。不成，眼下遍地都不太平，她一个目不视物的孩子，可不能放着她乱跑。
E: In all likelihood, that's where she'll be. *sigh* There's danger around every corner these days — especially for a sightless child. Let's go.

C: 交换一下联系方式吧，我手头还有其他生意要处理…法乌努斯红毛羊的事就交给您了。
E: Let's exchange numbers to keep in touch. As I have other businesses to manage, I'll leave the Faunus Red Sheep case to you.

C: 它们先动手，就非要下死手不可吗？人类的聪慧之处就在于，可以根据情况使用有限度的暴力。
E: Even so, did you really have to kill them? Humans are intelligent because we can decide how much violence to use based on the situation.

C: 「保育派」的放生标准…
E: What are the criteria for a species that can be released by the Nurture Faction...?

C: 好了，一介小小机械师的牢骚，想必不能改变「放生帮」的心意。
E: Anyways. I don't expect the opinion of a mere mechanic like me to hold sway over the Unshackled.

C: …模式…启动…灭杀…
E: ...Mode activated... Kill...

C: 怎么样，你现在就回去吗？还是说你要先去和老朋友们叙叙旧？我是打算去见一位旧友，现在还不急着走。
E: Are you heading back right away or staying to catch up with your old friends? I'm going to meet a friend of mine first, so there's no need to rush.

C: 喂喂喂，你们在干什么呢？别往水里倾倒电子垃圾好吗？你知道这水里有多少无辜的微生物吗？
E: Hey, hey, what are you guys doing? Can you please stop dumping electronic waste into the water? Do you know how many innocent microbes are living in it?

C: 而且，他们身边的人都说再也没见到他们几个……
E: Also, none of those who are close to them has seen them so far...

C: 家人你的关注点也太清奇了吧？
E: Why are you so focused on all the wrong things?

C: 闹鬼传闻虽然听起来荒诞，但这次十王司来人可是真的。
E: I know it's easy to cast doubt, but the Ten-Lords Commission actually showed up this time.

C: 你能自由移动，也算被封印着？
E: You can roam free even though you're sealed?

C: 你已经做得很好了，藿藿。
E: You're doing very well already, Huohuo.

C: 机巧假身，更换轻而易举，不必在意。
E: It is only an artificial ingenium body. I can swap into another one easily. Do not worry.

C: 好像没有找到寒鸦判官…
E: I don't see Judge Hanya anywhere...

C: 礼数齐备，客人请进吧。
E: The courtesies have been performed. Enter, oh honored guest.

C: …请稍等一下，我、我想问几个问题辨别真伪。
E: ...Wait. I want to ask a few questions... to see if you're the real person.

C: …先、先提问，问些与藿藿有关的问题。
E: I—I need to ask you some questions about myself first...

C: 我想从事音乐相关的工作。
E: I'd like to work in something related to music.

C: 我是…您是哪位？
E: That's me... And you are?

C: 这首歌的名字叫「想象一朵未来的玫瑰」——我想把它献给您…同时也献给我自己。
E: This song is called "Envision a Rose Forthcoming" — I wish to dedicate it to you... and to myself.

C: 你说那几个围着他的人？
E: You mean the people crowding that man?

C: 该怎么形容这种感觉？就好像…就好像我被丢进了一间画廊，墙上挂着许多画作，画中记录的都是我过去的人生经历——
E: How should I explain this feeling? It was like... Like I had been cast into a corridor of paintings, all of these paintings recording my past experiences...

C: 莱斯利抬起头来。你从他涣散的目光中捕捉到一丝笃定。
E: Lesley raises his head. Inside his lax gaze, you catch a glimpse of determination.

C: 「你大可把自己想象成一个烈士、英雄，但别忘了，归根结底你们只是一群雇佣兵，是拿钱办事的战争贩子。不要以为天堂给你们留了位置，舰长。」
E: "You imagine yourself a martyr and a hero, but do not forget... When it comes down to it, you are no more than just a group of mercenaries, warmongers that settle matters for credits. Do not think the afterlife has a place for you, captain."

C: …我、我知道了，我相信您不会把这件事说出去。
E: ...I, okay. I believe that you will not tell anyone about this.

C: <unbreak>16</unbreak>K的分辨率，起码他是这么说的——怎么样，要不要去租他的带子？
E: It's <unbreak>16</unbreak>k res. At least that's what he said... Well, you want to rent it?

C: 他开始了一场忘我的旅程，试图找到理想中的莱斯利•迪恩。但他从始至终都没能意识到…他以为自己是在抗争，实际却是在逃亡。
E: He began a journey of losing himself, trying to find the Lesley Dean that exists in his ideals. What he never realized was... Though he thought he had been fighting back all this time, he was really just running away.

C: 后会有期了…迪恩先生。
E: May we meet again... Mr. Dean...

C: 我同意，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}…我同意。
E: I agree, {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}... I agree.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，我能最后再问您一个问题吗？
E: {F#Ms.}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}, may I ask you a final question?

C: 尊敬的船长，我叫冷芯，很荣幸能成为您的大副。
E: My esteemed captain, I am Caldwick — it is an honor to be your first mate.

C: 我相信这将进一步提升我们的品牌形象，不知您是如何看待此事的？
E: I believe this change will be able to elevate our brand image. Can I get your opinion on this?

C: 他们还挺会做人的。
E: How very gracious of them.

C: 别丧气，你又没被炒！
E: Don't fret, you haven't been fired!

C: 哈哈哈，您说笑了！您该不会觉得这份工作有什么专业知识需求或者门槛吧？
E: Hahaha, you jest! You thought this job would have professional knowledge requirements or entry barriers?

C: 外人可能会将之评价为「一片狼藉」，但你会告诉他们，这应该叫「除旧布新」——当然，你当然知道这个成语是什么意思。
E: Outsiders might rate it as "a run-down mess," but you tell them that's just "out with the old, in with the new" — and of course, that's just as you intended it.

C: 这下，你理应学到教训了吧？
E: Now, you have learned your lesson, haven't you?

C: 多谢关心，我现在还能站在这里跟你聊天，全都多亏了那位红发的纯美骑士出手相救。
E: Thanks for the concern. The fact that I'm standing here and talking to you is all thanks to that red-headed Knight of Beauty coming to my rescue.

C: 我这身行头是不是有点寒酸…
E: Isn't my wardrobe a little shabby...?

C: 我是来救你的，姐妹！
E: I'm here to rescue you, my friend.

C: （指向楼下）
E: (Point at the lower floor)

C: 我去，这又是从哪冒出来的妖孽？！
E: Shoot, who's this monster that popped up out of nowhere!?

C: 如此说来，波提欧兄弟——轻易放那个所谓的「矲主」离开，是否会成为隐患？伊德莉拉在上，我绝不想放任一个邪恶组织的头子在外逍遥…他甚至可能找到机会卷土重来。
E: Speaking of which, could Boothill's going easy on that "master" become an unseen misfortune? With Idrila's blessing, it's against my wish to let an evil leader go unpunished... He might even make a comeback when the opportunity arises.

C: 啊，说来也巧，我刚入梦不久就遇到了一位从仙舟远道而来的少女棋士，她极力向我推荐「帝垣琼玉」，在座的几位也一下就被这游戏给吸引住了。
E: Oh, it was just pure luck! Right after I dived into the Dreamscape, I met a young lady proficient in the game from the distant Xianzhou. She highly recommended this game called "Celestial Jade," and we got hooked right away.

C: 我有点担心路上喝了会吐出来…
E: I'm worried they'll be sick if they drink that on the journey...

C: 至于成果嘛，虽然你们贵为仙舟盟友，但此时此刻并非是揭露的最佳时机，本座还需要进一步与景元商讨…你们只需静候佳音就好。
E: As for the results, although you are all precious Xianzhou allies, this is not the best time to reveal all. I still need to discuss things with Jing Yuan so... You just await my good news.

C: …还是我进去找找，你在这里守着吧。
E: ...How about I go in and look for it. You keep watch out here.

C: 有道理，全都怪这些怪物，就算我们不来找，它们也会把手稿破坏的。
E: That's a good point. We can just blame it all on monsters. Even if we don't find it, they would have been all damaged by monsters.

C: 长生种和短生种交往，大多是这样的结局了。
E: That's how things usually end when a long-life species makes friends with a short-life species.

C: 有的！我想看看星槎制造的整个过程，你们能带我去吗？
E: Okay! I want to see the whole manufacturing chain for starskiffs. Can you take me to see it?

C: 哦哦哦！我已经好像看到星槎的模样了，这就是育成阶段吗？
E: Oh oh, I think I can see the shape of a starskiff! Is this the nutritive phase?

C: 完全成长的星槎会从培养舱里取出，经过组装之后就暂时停靠在这里。
E: Fully-grown starskiffs are extracted from their incubators and temporarily moored here following assembly.

C: （向前行驶）
E: (Move forward)

C: 对吧？
E: Right?

C: …算了。现在担忧来担忧去也无济于事。
E: ...Forget it. Being a worrywart now isn't going to help.

C: 吾给的已够多了。不仅将卷宗向汝等开放，还亲手拘提罪囚……
E: I've provided more than enough. Not only have I made the dossier available to you, but I also captured the criminals myself...

C: 好吧。
E: Alright.

C: 这个纸船还剩一个，送给你好了。
E: There's one more paper boat left. You can have it.

C: 以前发生过什么吗？
E: ...Again?

C: …哎呀，可别墨迹太久，时间不等人！
E: ...That is, unless you're planning a big delay!

C: 好吧，先把手头要紧事结了。但是丑话说在前头，我们可没那么健忘……
E: Fine, let's finish up here. But I'm gonna put it out there — we're not gonna forget those lines of yours anytime soon...

C: 别着急，我正要说呢。
E: Easy, I'm about to tell you.

C: 我很难解释…
E: Not really...

C: （裂界呼啸的声音）
E: (The sound of howling in the Fragmentum)

C: 难得啊。
E: I agree.

C: （也许该听听当事人打算如何善后处理，也方便神策府了解情况，）
E: (Maybe I should gather more details from others so that the Seat of Divine Foresight can have a better understanding of the situation.)

C: 无妨，你来得正是时候。星穹列车的诸位，好久不见！
E: Don't worry. You're just in time. It's been a while, my friends from the Astral Express!

C: …但我可以尽力做好将军交代的每一件事。我们走吧，在将三位的住宿安排妥当后，我还要去工造司处理公司的抗议。
E: ...Still, I'll do my best to follow his instructions. Let's go. Once I've taken you to your accommodations, I need to go to the Artisanship Commission to handle the IPC's protest.

C: 本来不需要。我们原本只做了些进一步的扫描检测。但，扫描结果却发现货箱中存放的不只有机械结构，还有一些…近似生物组织的特征。
E: In most cases, we don't. However, our scans discovered that the cargo doesn't only contain machinery but also some... substance that resembles biological tissue.

C: 简单来说，就是如果你执意要拒绝我们搜查货物，我们就不得不将它当做赃物收缴了。
E: Simply put, if you insist on hindering the inspection, we'll have to treat the cargo as unlawful items and confiscate it.

C: 通常只要四十七个星历年就够了。
E: Normally it'll only take around forty-seven star calendar years.

C: 嗯？谁？我？我吗？
E: Huh? Who? Wait, me...?

C: 我准备好了…但你可得手下留情啊！
E: Yeah, I'm ready... but please go easy on me!

C: 但凡学有所成的剑士都懂得「扬长避短」。先发扬长处，再反哺短处，这才是正确的学习方式。
E: Skilled swordmasters know how to play to their strengths and work on their weaknesses. Start with what you're good at, then tackle your weaknesses. That's the right way to learn.

C: 这些人…是走私者吗？他们要做什么？
E: So, are they... smugglers? What exactly are they up to?

C: 我有异议！
E: I object!

C: 罪囚呼雷，乃丰饶孽物步离人之战首、巢父，狐人之大敌。其人需为先后两千一百二十三场侵略战争及其连带罪行负责。
E: Prisoner Hoolay, the Warhead and Brood Lord of the borisin Abominations of Abundance and the arch-nemesis of the foxians, is responsible for <unbreak>2,123</unbreak> wars of aggression and countless associated crimes.

C: 他们探访的对象…也许就是这些狼形机甲被送入此地的目标。若是让镇压在底部的那头恶兽逃了出来…恐怕罗浮仙舟也将有大灾难！
E: And the prisoner they came to visit... might be the target whom these wolf-shaped mechs were delivered here for. If that vicious beast manages to break free... it will be a catastrophe for the Xianzhou Luofu!

C: …还没到这时候。
E: ...It's not time yet.

C: 看不见的入侵者？
E: The invisible intruders?

C: 那只自烬灭军团伸向仙舟的手，已经将「毁灭」的种子埋下了。从这一刻开始直至不可见的未来，仙舟联盟将要面对更可怕的挑战——来自「毁灭」与丰饶孽物的双重挑战。
E: The hand of the Ruin Legion has already sown the seeds of "Destruction." From this moment on, the Xianzhou Alliance will face an even greater challenge, from both the Abominations of Abundance and the "Destruction" itself.

C: 此次劫狱事件的幕后操纵者，想必会高举双手赞成你的看法。
E: The mastermind behind this incident would fully support your opinion presumably.

C: 谈谈发生的事…
E: Discuss what happened...

C: …不愧是神策将军，连让人兴师问罪的话茬都不留一个。
E: ...Your eloquence is indeed impressive, Divine Foresight. You won't even leave me any excuses to hold a grudge against you.

C: 你想玩什么把戏？
E: What game are you playing?

C: 我还不想死……
E: I don't want to die yet...

C: 我被步离人挟持来到了这儿。请务必把消息报上去。
E: I was brought here by the borisin. Please make sure to report this news.

C: 了解，如果您需要帮助，请来找我。
E: Understood. Please come to me if you need any help.

C: 小姑娘，你好啊。你也是来参加守擂竞锋的吗？
E: Hello, Miss. Are you here to take part in the Ringmaster's Challenge, too?

C: 来自朱明仙舟的天才剑术少女云璃。很期待两位交手的盛况！
E: The talented swordswoman from the Xianzhou Zhuming, Miss Yunli! I look forward to a spectacular battle between you two!

C: 素裳。
E: Sushang.

C: 唉，开口就冷场，果然是我的弱点啊。
E: Ah, making things awkward really is my weakness...

C: 「颠踬散」…我早早喝下了它，药毒已流遍我的全身…迟早…会在你身上见效。
E: Tumbledust... I drank it a while ago, and the poison is already flowing through my veins... Sooner or later... you will begin to feel the effects.

C: 「我将尽力医治」…飞霄，我兑现承诺了。用这条微不足道的性命……
E: I will do my best to cure you... Feixiao, I kept my promise. At the cost of this insignificant life...

C: 幸亏将军赶到救了一命。
E: You saved my life there.

C: 我很清楚自己身体的状况，一直很清楚。这股永不停歇的愤怒不是什么「疾病」。它是潜藏在我血脉中，来自步离人的「月狂」。
E: I know very well what is happening to my body. I always have. This ever-thirsting fury is no "sickness," it is the borisin Moon Rage that flows through my veins.

C: 很奇怪吧，作为敌人，我比你的战友更了解你。
E: Isn't it strange? That as your enemy, I understand you even better than your own allies?

C: 就像豺狼与羔羊，鹰隼与雀鸟，镰刀与麦穗，猎人与猎物…这一切本该如此。
E: The wolves and the sheep, the hawks and the sparrows, the sickles and the wheat, the hunter and the prey... This is how it should be.

C: 他们宁可将求存的希望寄托在虚无缥缈的救主身上，却连一丝垂死搏杀的勇气和力量都没有。这样的步离人，不如让他们尽数灭亡吧！
E: They would rather place their hopes of survival on an imaginary savior than gain the courage and strength to fight to the death. Borisin like that deserve no more than to be sent to their deaths!

C: 灵砂、丹恒，往者已矣，但持明的未来仍然握在你们的手里。如今罗浮仙舟上形势遽变，我等持明原该团结一心，切莫再蹈前世饮月之过。
E: Lingsha, Dan Heng, the past is behind us, but the future of the Vidyadhara still lies within your grasp. The situation on the Xianzhou Luofu has changed rapidly. As Vidyadhara, we must unite in purpose and avoid the mistakes of the previous Imbibitor Lunae.

C: 丹恒先生，麻烦您将这里的香炉找出来，香里的气味有问题。
E: Dan Heng, could you please find the incense burner? The incense smells... wrong.

C: 丹鼎司、太卜司中常见的焚香小炉，里面静静燃烧着几乎难以辨识的烟气。
E: A small incense burner, commonly seen in the Alchemy Commission and Divination Commission, quietly smolders, its wisps of smoke nearly indistinguishable.

C: 触犯了联盟的天条，将为持明全族带来刀兵之灾。就算重获了繁衍的可能，又能如何？
E: Breaking the covenant of our alliance will bring war upon the Vidyadhara. Even if we are able to have offspring again, what difference will it make?

C: 这是白露的主意！
E: This was Bailu's idea!

C: 好玩吗？
E: Are you amused?

C: 唉，剑术造诣最低的我却没什么事，得好好感谢二位师父替我分担成吨的伤害才行啊。
E: I'm the least accomplished in swordplay, but I came out unscathed. I really ought to thank my masters for taking all the blows on my behalf.

C: 彦卿…终究是没撑住吗？
E: Master Yanqing... didn't make it in the end?

C: 只是…罗浮仙舟数百年来负责囚禁呼雷，押解移交前，他却死在了竞锋舰的擂台上。这件事传入联盟高层的耳朵里，又会惹来不少非议。
E: It's just... the Xianzhou Luofu's longstanding duty of keeping Hoolay imprisoned ended with his death on the Skysplitter. This event is likely to bring much criticism from the Alliance's upper ranks.

C: 此前还对景元先生说什么「幸好此行是我前来，若是换做戎韬将军，问话或许就不会这么友善了」——我可是瞧得一清二楚，不知这场对话成真了没有？
E: You once told Jing Yuan, "You're lucky that I'm the one who came this time. If it were the Seer Strategist, this conversation might not be so friendly." I'm intrigued — did that conversation really come to pass?

C: 为了这点「小事」去找猎犬？得了吧！肯为这等「小事」劳心费力的人，全匹诺康尼也只有陛下一位。
E: Ask the Bloodhounds? For such a paltry matter? Forget it! There is only one person in all of Penacony who would aid in earnest for such a triviality — Her Majesty.

C: 做好事不留名。
E: I do good deeds not for glory.

C: 感谢皇帝陛下！如果不是您出手相救，我们这桩生意很可能真要黄了……
E: Thank you, Your Majesty! If it weren't for your generous aid, our business would have been ruined...

C: 你应该找回记忆。
E: You should find your memories.

C: 你这畜生！「帕斯德鲁克市」这个地名对你来说真的那么陌生吗？
E: You beast! Does Pasdrak truly mean nothing to you!?

C: 送花，主要是为了让哥哥觉得，我还是他天真的妹妹。这样接下来很多事都好谈。
E: The gift of flowers is mainly to let my brother think that I'm still his naive younger sister. That will make the discussion of many future matters much more amicable.

C: 灰骑士，开车吧。不要走大路，从郊区绕个远出城，他们应该还来不及封锁得那么严密。
E: Gray Knight, you drive. Stay off the main roads and take a detour through the countryside to exit the city. They probably won't be able to set up stringent blockades so quickly.

C: 蒂索克，人是你杀的吧？
E: Tizocic, you were the one who killed them, didn't you?

C: 又有一批禁卫军叛逃了。这批人带着很多不利于朕的所谓「证据」，准备去投靠星际和平公司。
E: Another batch of imperial guards has deserted. These guards have plenty of so-called evidence against me that they intend to use when they join IPC.

C: 你为什么要继承「皇位」？
E: Why do you want to inherit the throne?

C: 大概吧，也许…但那感觉不太一样，很不一样。我不想顺着那条思路走下去……
E: That's probably the case... But there's something different about that sensation. I don't want to continue that train of thought...

C: 什么意思？
E: What do you mean?

C: 那么，女士们先生们，请进——
E: Well, ladies and gentlemen, please come on in...

C: 不必感谢我，博士。您和您的同僚在此取得的成果令我深感震撼。
E: You're welcome, Dr. Chadwick. I'm floored by you and your colleagues' achievements.

C: …谢谢您的忠告，螺丝先生。希望有朝一日我们还能再见。
E: ...Thanks for your advice, Mr. Screwllum. I hope I'll see you again one day.

C: 现在…按下它吧。
E: Now... Do it.

C: 令人不解的是：随着武器威力的擢升，那些原本被用来限制滥用的繁杂规则却被愈发简化。当刀尖的方向从向内变成向外，人们对暴力的态度不约而同地变得宽容。
E: Bewilderingly, those complicated rules in place to limit the abuse of weapons became increasingly simplified as more and more powerful weapons were invented. People were more tolerant of weapons when they were used against enemies.

C: 依然是那双积虑的眼睛，眼白里又多夹杂了几分浑浊。
E: He still has those contemplative eyes, now tinged with a hint of gloominess.

C: {NICKNAME}{F#女士}{M#先生}，我们一起送它最后一程吧。
E: {F#Madam}{M#Sir} {NICKNAME}, let's pay our final respects to him together.

C: 请…靠近…些……
E: Please... come... closer...

C: 在这间死气沉沉的客房里，唯一能提醒你时间仍在流动的便是入梦池内那些呼吸着的、窜动着的液泡。
E: In this dingy, stuffy room, the only thing that reminds you of flowing time is the pulsing, hovering liquid bubbles in the Dreampool.

C: 但它们也不会告诉你查德威克博士身在何处。
E: But they won't be able to tell you where Professor Chadwick went.

C: 没错。好好珍惜吧，匹诺康尼可再难有我这么优秀的筑梦师了，我——
E: That's right. Treasure all this, for Penacony will be hard-pressed to produce another Dreamweaver as gifted as me. I...

C: 告诉教授，我不干了，我要跑路！
E: Tell the professor I'm done, I'm gone!

C: 而不认可这份美好的人们，我也为他们留下了流梦礁，没人会在梦中流浪……
E: For those who don't agree with this beauty, I offer the Dreamflux Reef as their sanctuary — no one will ever feel deserted in dreams.

C: 思想和情绪可以在忆域中化作具象，这是最基础的筑梦知识。
E: Thoughts and emotions can materialize in the Memory Zone — That's the foundation of dreamweaving.

C: 你！
E: You!

C: 不听话的湛蓝弟弟，终于找到了啾～
E: Naughty little Blues, we finally found you! Tweet!

C: 愿你能寻到自己的巢，愿你能书写自己的诗。
E: May you find your own nest, and write your own poem.

C: （乔伊与冯恩，看样子是「妃色夫人」与「黄金公子」的原型。比起档案中简短的介绍，这里的他们显然更加生动……）
E: (Joey and Vaughn — they seem to be the inspirations for Lady Vermilion and Young Master Gold. Compared to the brief descriptions in the files, the people they are in the memory are obviously far more lively...)

C: 原来如此…上任家主费歇尔先生并未向我转述这段往事。
E: I see... Mr. Fischer, the former family head, did not tell me about this past.

C: 如果你不喜欢，倒也存在其他解释：比如这头大地兽并没有受到祝福，只是出奇脆弱而已；又或者…划痕根本就不是那位先生弄的。
E: If you didn't like that, there are other theories as well: That this dromas wasn't blessed at all, and is just unusually frail. Or... the scar wasn't even made by that gentleman to begin with.

C: 抽签？什么抽签？
E: Drawing lots? What lots?

C: 别误会，我可不是什么嗜血观众。只是他这么喜欢做局，不看个戏总觉得吃亏。
E: Please don't misunderstand, I am no onlooker baying for blood. I just reckon it'd be a waste not to witness a troublemaker get his just deserts.

C: 啊，看来你的心中的确存在着善。割让自身的利益——无论多么微小，其背后的高尚都值得赞扬…但我们不能强迫所有公民都这么选。
E: Ah, looks like kindness does indeed exist within you. To forgo one's benefits, no matter how small they may be, is still a noble act worth commending... But we cannot force all the citizens to do the same.

C: 而你是和黄金裔并肩作战的英雄。有你在，我们才能平安归来——等这件事结束之后，我请你吃饭。
E: And you are a hero who fought alongside the Chrysos Heirs. We will return safely with your company. I must treat you to a meal when we return to Okhema.

C: 妈妈，我们会死吗？
E: Mama, will we die?

C: 苏克提瑞斯轻咳两声，把你们拽到了一旁。
E: Soctires softly clears his throat and pulls you to the side.

C: 这是你最后一次看见这个商贩。在把货箱交给你之后，她便朝着远离市场的方向狂奔，直到消失在视野尽头。
E: This is the last time you see this peddler. After giving you the crate, she sprints off into the distance, far away from the market, and fades beyond the horizon.

C: 他没有说谎。至于被抓的原因，即便我不说，相信你也能猜到大概……
E: He wasn't lying. As for the reason I was caught, even if I said nothing, I'm sure you can guess the gist of it...

C: 是啊，谁会愿意跟嫌犯扯上关系呢——为了帮外邦人找到药品，我溜进了圣城存放物资的仓库。
E: Yes, who would want to be involved with a suspect... To help the outlanders secure medicine, I slipped into the holy city's supply warehouse.

C: 在最后的时刻到来前，我唯一的愿望就是能再吃一个苹果。
E: Before the final moment arrives, my only wish is to eat another apple.

C: 应该缓刑。
E: The sentencing should be suspended.

C: 照你这么说，外邦人也算敌人了？明明我们应该和他们团结对外，一同抵抗黑潮才对。
E: So you mean that outlanders are enemies too? We should be united with them against external threats, to fend off the black tide together.

C: 你、你这说法未免太理想化了……
E: Y—Your rhetoric reeks of sheer idealism...

C: 你、你要干什么？这里可不是竞技场啊！
E: Wh—What are you doing? This isn't an arena!

C: 在结束之前，介意我补充几句吗？
E: Before we conclude, may I add a few words?

C: 公民们发出一串哄笑——德高望重的苏克提瑞斯借钱不还，还有比这更大的乐子吗？
E: The citizens erupt in laughter — what could be more amusing than the esteemed Soctires not returning money he owes?

C: 战胜黑潮？那是很久以后的事。至少现在，圣城不需要外邦人也足够热闹。
E: Defeating the black tide? That's in the distant future. For now, the holy city is lively enough without the outlanders.

C: 你所谓的外邦伙伴能帮上我们什么？举办庆功宴会？还是站在旁边加油喝彩？这活「粉霞天女」也能干。
E: What can your so-called outlander buddies do to help us? Host a victory banquet? Or stand by and cheer us on? Even the Rosy Celestial Maiden can do that.

C: 看来不得不上了。
E: Looks like I have no choice.

C: 帕里斯？我从来没听过这个名字。
E: Paris? I have never heard that name before.

C: 我诞生的地方是尼卡多利的城邦，漂泊于永夜天帷之下的堡垒。这里的人不知何为山海。他们的山是战场的余烬堆积的灰山，他们的海是战败敌人流淌的血海。
E: I was born in the city of Nikador, a castle that floats below the Evernight Veil. The people here know nothing of mountains or oceans. Their mountains are piles of burning ash that litter the battlefield, and their oceans are a sea of blood that flows from their enemies.

C: 你…戍卫长，先去看看远处靠近城门的是何人吧。
E: You... Captain, go and see who that is that approaches the city gate.

C: 不，她也是从天谴之矛下逃离的可怜人，请收留她吧。
E: No, she is an escapee of the Lance of Fury that deserves our mercy. Please, you must offer her shelter.

C: 出现了！阿卡迪亚！
E: There it is! Arcadia!

C: 帕里斯，你这套话术逗逗城里的姑娘就算了，对那种东西也能说出口啊？
E: Paris. I get you teasing the city girls with that sweet talk, but you'd really say those things to something like that?

C: 我还有一个问题…
E: I have a question for you...

C: 等等，姑娘，小心——
E: Wait, girl, look out—

C: 啊，大恩人，真是太久没见了！你总是在我最需要帮助的时候出现，让我不得不相信命运的眷顾了！
E: Ah, my savior! It has been far too long! You always appear when I need you most. I cannot help but feel that fate is always watching out for me!

C: 啊！我不能背负叛逃的罪责！俄诺涅，我的公主，请你帮帮我吧！
E: Ah! I cannot bear the blame of betrayal! Oenone. My Lady! Come and aid me!

C: 听，快听。
E: Listen, listen now!

C: 怎么不让我来戳穿！
E: Why couldn't I be the one who thwarted her!

C: 祭司的声音突然高了几度，就连正在为祭祀动作而慌乱的帕西提亚，都不禁回过头来。
E: The priest suddenly raises his voice. Even Pasithea, who has been fretting over the ritual, can't help turning her head.

C: 很好，把草药送到圣女那里吧，向欧洛尼斯的祭祀马上就要开始了。
E: Very good. Send the herbs to the Holy Maiden. The ritual to Oronyx is about to start.

C: …大人，愿众神的目光照耀我们荣耀的前路。
E: ...My lord, may the gods' gazes shine radiant on our glorious advance.

C: 有谁在你的耳边说话，「危险」、「停下来」…是迷迷吗？你想要辨别，但一股无法抵抗的力量正在诱惑你闭上双眼。
E: Someone is whispering in your ear. "Danger," "Stop" ...Is it Mem? You try to discern the voice, but an irresistible force is enticing you to close your eyes.

C: 如果当时没能成为圣女，一切会变得不同吗？没有约束，自由自在，像一只鸟儿。
E: If you did not become the Holy Maiden then, would everything have turned out differently? Unfettered, free among the free, like a bird.

C: 睁大眼睛看看，帕西提亚，你的丑态。
E: Open your eyes and look, Pasithea. Look at your miserable visage.

C: 别再想这件事了，那个抛弃了你的女人。即使你有一万个理由替她辩解，饥饿和恐惧仍让你不由自主地去憎恨。
E: Stop thinking about that event and that woman who abandoned you. Even if you had a million reasons to speak up for her, hunger and fear will fuel your instinctive hate for her.

C: 很快，你就要死在这里了。
E: Very soon, you will die here.

C: 诓骗他们，就说自己什么也没看见，欧洛尼斯从未向你揭示过任何事物。
E: Deceive them, claiming to have not seen anything, and that Oronyx never revealed anything to you.

C: 各位，今天我休息一天，大家散了吧。
E: Everyone, today is my day of rest. Let's reconvene another time.

C: 熟悉的触感，上一次站在这里是什么时候？我已经记不得了。
E: A familiar touch. When was the last time I stood here? I can't even remember.

C: 你们已经超越了命运。
E: You have both already transcended destiny.

C: 预言，果然很让人在意……
E: Sure enough. People really care about prophecies...

C: 你们交换一下不就好了！
E: Why don't you just swap with each other?

C: 被神明封闭的虚假天空，挑战禁忌、前赴后继的探索…听起来像是某种寓言呢。
E: A false sky sealed by a pantheon, an exploration of challenging taboos one after another... Sounds like some kind of fable.

C: 唉，你说这……
E: *sigh* This is so...

C: 操纵杆摆动着，发出响亮的嘎吱声。
E: The control stick shakes, making loud creaking noises.

C: 你充分听取了家具们的建议，指导性几乎为零。
E: You take the furniture's advice to heart, which provides practically zero guidance.

C: 听好了：我将以《如我所书》为研究对象，探寻神话历史、真实虚构的双向互动，为原始文明演化提供一整套可参考的理论资源。
E: Listen up: I'll be using As I've Written as my research subject to explore the two-way interaction between mythology and history, providing a complete theoretical framework for the evolution of primitive civilizations.

C: 别提了，人家本来就内向，又赶上联觉信标出故障…幸好丹恒会说粘土语。
E: Don't even get me started. I'm already shy as it is, and then the Synesthesia Beacon had to break down... Thank goodness Dan Heng can speak the Clayese language.

C: 《如我所书》一事，我会尽力去办，绝不让英雄事迹被星空埋没。
E: Regarding As I've Written, I will do my utmost, and won't let these heroic deeds be buried by the stars.

C: 是我不会忘记的故事。
E: A story I'll never forget.

C: 有了这玩意儿，就不愁我那星系摩…不，是空间站的设备再出岔子了！
E: With these fine parts, I won't have to worry about my galaxy-class motorcy... I mean, the space station equipment breaking down again!

C: 我已经搜索到相关知识点了。音乐、小说、萌宠…美食，美食，美食…无法进食，排除。
E: I have searched some relevant facts. Music, novels, and pets... Food, food, food... Unable to eat, search result excluded.

C: 听老师这么说，我倒是想起了一些事——之前为法政科提供向导服务的时候，虽然感觉大家对我都很礼貌客气，平时聊天也不会避开我。
E: Your words remind me of something. Earlier when I was providing guiding services for the Department of Galactic Geopolitics, everyone spoke to me very politely, and they never avoided me during conversations.

C: 他们爱怎么说就怎么说，我才不在乎！
E: They can say what they want. I don't care!

C: 要求还挺高。
E: That's quite the request.

C: 但要是别人没问我有没有在听呢？感觉有点奇怪啊……
E: But what if people never asked me if I was listening or not? It feels kinda cringe...

C: 我想不到更好的了。
E: I can't think of anything better.

C: 嗯嗯，这几句应该足够应付之后的聊天了。谢谢你啦。
E: Mmm, these phrases should be enough to deal with future conversations. Thank you.

C: 我正在调查空间站里里流传的怪谈故事，其中有些内容或许会引起你的不适…我建议你做好心理准备，再来找我！
E: I'm currently investigating the ghost stories circulating in the space station. Some of the following contents may be disturbing... So, only talk to me once you're mentally prepared!

C: 因此，在空间站诸多防盗门中，有一扇门，是会说话的！大概就是这样。
E: Therefore, among the many security doors on this space station, there's one that can talk! That about sums it up.

C: （将呜呜伯的事告知阿德勒）
E: (Tell Adler about the Wubbaboo.)

C: 防盗门…别过来！
E: Security door... stay away!

C: 我听艾丝妲站长提起过你，你见多识广，想必在时尚一道上也有独到见解。
E: I've heard of you from Lead Researcher Asta. You seem to know a lot, and might have your own insights on fashion.

C: 哦，我懂了！他是需要专业的法律咨询服务，对么？说吧，是汽车保险合同纠纷还是交通事故理赔？
E: Oh, I know what he wants from me! He needs professional legal advice, doesn't he? Tell me, is it about a car insurance contract dispute, or perhaps a traffic accident settlement?

C: 没错，年轻人。我，华劳斯•凯特博瑞屈•莱姆士汀，想继续在这茫茫人海中寻找真心朋友。
E: Yes. I, Wallace Cambridge Limestein, wish to continue to seek true friends.

C: 你不按套路出牌…
E: I didn't expect you to say yes...

C: 我没听过这个名字，怎么这么突然？难道又是哪位疯狂的戏迷……
E: I've never heard of this name. This is all very sudden. Is he another crazy fan of mine...?

C: 如此奇妙的人，竟然是个街头的拾荒者…还是说，他其实另有身份，只是甘愿体会这种生活呢？
E: What a weirdo. I still can't believe he's a scavenger... Does he actually have another identity and is he doing this to experience another kind of life?

C: 姐姐你要记住哦，鼹鼠党才是下层区最厉害的组织！虎克老大会满足大家的所有要求！
E: Keep this in mind — The Moles is the best organization in the Underworld! Boss Hook will make sure all your needs are satisfied!

C: 不惧前路，不耍态度，只为每个孤单无助的灵魂都能被在乎，
E: Show no fear. Bring no veneer. Take care of the lost souls that are here.

C: 城郊雪原…
E: Outlying Snow Plains...

C: 但是，我需要您提交自己的一些个人信息。请问您的毕业院校是？
E: But I need some details about you. What school did you graduate from?

C: 选项3是正确的。
E: Option three is correct.

C: 考我。
E: Test me.

C: 听说波瓦大臣要退休了？
E: I heard Minister Bova is thinking about retiring soon?

C: 您是不是漏读了题面的信息？这嘈杂的环境确实不适合深度思考。我相信以您的聪明才智，只要有足够的时间，一定能给出正确答案……
E: Did you miss all the info in the question? It really is too noisy in here for cognitive testing. I'm sure with your wits, it's only a matter of time before you come up with the right answer...

C: 小女子还是比较满意现状的，为塔米拉小姐配音，做塔米拉小姐的影子，这有什么不好呢？
E: I'm happy with my lot at the moment, dubbing voices for Tamila and being her shadow. What's wrong with that?

C: 塔米拉小姐会喜欢一本爱情小说，这倒是不意外……
E: It's no surprise that Tamila would love a romance novel...

C: 「陛下、陛下~你应当遮蔽世间的明镜~连同平静的湖水~你需道出她的真名实姓~驱逐千面的妖妃~」
E: "Your Highness, Your Highness~! You must shield yourself from all mirrors of the world, even the serene lakes! You must ask for her true name and banish that duplicitous succubus!"

C: 哈，你来得正好！来来来，你来给我们父子俩评评理！
E: Ha, you're here at a good time! Come and tell me what you think about my son's actions!

C: 呃…是……
E: Um, it's...

C: 如果你也需要帮助的话，就通过老歌德发布委托吧。我看到你委托的话，一定会第一时间前来帮忙的——
E: If you ever need any help, you can send out a commission with Old Goethe, too. If I see your commission, I'll rush over to help as soon as I can —

C: 那就拜托你了，记得帮我拍得英俊、高大一点——这可是要给我女儿看的！
E: Please, make me look tall and handsome — This photo is for my daughter.

C: 不要…不要啊…我好害怕…！
E: No... No! I'm scared!

C: 离家出走？
E: Ran away from home?

C: （万一能打听到落难者的消息呢？）
E: (Maybe I can get some information on the castaway?)

C: 不对不对不对！这漂流瓶就是从海上漂过来的！但是你别扔！
E: Wait! I mean! No! This definitely did float across the ocean! But you still can't throw it!

C: 你仔细看过漂流瓶里的信了，你是不是应该回应漂流瓶里的请求呢？
E: You've read the drift bottle messages. Do you think you should really be responding to their requests?

C: 你背后的酒坛是做什么的？
E: What are you doing with those wine jars behind you?

C: 有些故事里是三个愿望，有些故事里是一个愿望，我这里只有一个。
E: Some stories have three wishes. Some have just one. I can only give one.

C: 这「烈焰浓茶」新品，已经按照你先前的建议，保证「燃」味十足。
E: This is the new flavor for Flaming Potent Tea. I've followed your suggestions from last time, and this one is sure to lift your spirits with its spicy kick.

C: 杜老板为你亲自斟茶，倒了满满一杯茶。
E: Boss Du personally pours a cup of tea for you.

C: 不过还是好想见识见识十六条腿的外星人啊。
E: Though you still hope to meet an alien with sixteen legs.

C: 修复后的雕像在阳光下闪烁着温润的光泽，仿佛从未破碎过。就连时间也不愿看到美的事物蒙尘，或许这就是欧洛尼斯留给世人最后的慈悲。
E: The refurbished statue glimmers under the warm sunlight, as if good as new. Even time is reluctant to lay its dust upon such a magnificent article, or perhaps this is Oronyx' final act of benevolence bequeathed unto humanity.

C: 架子上摆放着精致的杯盘与点心，但所有食物都纹丝未动——看来连最尊贵的客人也无法同时享用这么多美食，这或许就是法吉娜教导世人知足的方式。
E: Exquisite cups, plates, and delicacies line the shelves, but all the food has remained thoroughly untouched — it seems that even the most distinguished guests aren't able to indulge in such luxuriant fare simultaneously. Perhaps it is Phagousa's way of teaching temperance to the people.

C: 现在你不是很饿，只不过是想对当地特色多些了解——必要的话，说是馋了也可以。
E: You're not very hungry now, you just want to learn more about the local cuisine — if need arises, you can just say you're peckish.

C: 法吉娜的赐福
E: The Benediction of Phagousa

C: 知名窃忆者「千楼冢」自首。该通缉犯曾多次破坏珍贵的宇宙文化遗产，托耳塔尼石刻群、梅洛星云画卷和普罗多夫时空堰遗址都遭受过其人毒手。
E: The infamous Memosnatcher "Mausolea" has turned herself in. This criminal is wanted for destroying many precious cultural relics throughout the universe, including the Tortani stone inscriptions, the Merlo Nebula scroll paintings, and the ruins of the Plodov spacetime dam.

C: 雅努斯宝库
E: Janus Vault

C: 象征着秩序与和谐的彩色玻璃…有一瞬间你很想听听把它打碎的声音。这种可怕的想法让你猛摇脑袋——「我这是中了什么邪？又被纳努克瞥视了？」
E: The stained glass symbolizes order and harmony... For a fleeting moment, you really want to hear the sound of it breaking. This dreadful thought makes you shake your head violently — "What's gotten into me? Have I been glimpsed by Nanook again?"

C: 拍摄「神识之蝶」。
E: Take a photo of the Butterfly of Divine Mind.

C: 而此刻，只有风吹过附近花丛的沙沙声留下。
E: But now, only the rustling of nearby flowers in the wind remains.

C: 想要更符合常识的世界，很好。在这个设定下的国家，每当有人登上王座时，扎格列斯都会为{F#她}{M#他}投掷硬币，一面是伟大，一面是疯狂。
E: A world governed by common sense, very well. In this setting, whenever someone ascends to the throne, Zagreus will cast a coin for {F#her}{M#him} — one side for greatness, the other for madness.

C: 「一群自以为是的泰坦，还有你，逐火而来的无名客，你们全是一丘之貉！」
E: "A band of self-righteous Titans. And you, the Nameless here seeking the Flame — you're all the same filth!"

C: 她只是给我递来提前准备好的茶水、饼干和蜜饯，请我慢慢述说我的心结。
E: She simply handed me some tea, biscuits and sugared candy that she had pre-prepared and asked me to share my worries with her.

C: 姐姐，你还真是五十步笑百步呢。我们两个，哪个不叫老爹操碎心？说起来，小时候还是你带着我到处惹事……
E: Guess we're both troublemakers, sis. Dad never caught a break with either of us, did he? Remember how you used to drag me into your schemes...

C: 看来你的「奇异阈值」已经很高了，所以早就见怪不怪了。
E: It seems that your "weirdness threshold" has risen quite high, so this doesn't phase you anymore.

C: 你发现装置底部似乎藏着某种开关。
E: You notice what appears to be a hidden switch at the base of the device.

C: 谁是翁法罗斯最勇敢的人？
E: Who is the bravest in all of Amphoreus?

C: o((•'ω´• )っ「是提摩斯老师欧！他退场了，现在福利都在我手里」)∋
E: o((•'ω´• )っ "It's Timos! He's left the scene and now I hold all the goodies." )∋

C: o((〒ω〒; )っ「别走欧，豹还有没发完的福利欧~」)∋
E: o((〒ω〒; )っ "Wait! I still got leftover freebies~" )∋
o((҂◔∀◐҂ )o "Oh, that's just me..." )∋

C: …刚刚那是…被人袭击了？当你回过神来，你已经被好心人安置于此处了。
E: ...Were you just... attacked by someone? As you come to, you find yourself placed here by a kind soul.

C: 你再次操控圣烛，金色流体在装置中起伏。你的意识不再悄然离开，它清晰地留在此刻。
E: You manipulate the holy candle once more and the golden liquid rises and falls inside the device. This time, your consciousness holds its ground firmly in the present.

C: 与列车的跃迁不同，这古旧的驳船并未通电，甚至连光照都不足，实属无聊，你决定——
E: Unlike the Express' warp jump, this old barge isn't powered by electricity, and the lighting is scarce — boredom sets in, so you decide —

C: 唉，以前的生命花园是多么热闹，偏偏这会儿冷清得要死…我这满腹遗言都没人可以倾诉。
E: Ahhh, the Garden of Life used to be so lively. Why does it have to be so quiet right now... I have so much to say before I go, yet no one to share them with.

C: 阿格莱雅，浪漫之半神、黄金裔的领袖，已为逐火之旅燃尽了最后一缕金辉。现在你之所见，只是记忆复现出的残像。
E: Aglaea, the demigod of Romance, leader of the Chrysos Heirs, has burned her last golden radiance for the Flame-Chase Journey. What you now behold is merely an afterimage reproduced from memory.

C: 你可以清晰地看见岁月在泰坦身上凿磨出的痕迹，而它胸口流淌的金血，似乎比往日暗淡了些。
E: You can clearly see the marks left by time on the Titan's body, and the golden blood flowing from their chest seems dimmer than before.

C: 当然，以上纯属胡诌，换言之就是「保密」。别问啦，只要知道都是珍品就行。
E: Obviously, I made all that up. In other words — classified information. Don't ask. Just know they're all treasures.

C: 哼，超级神秘商品——法吉娜曾经摆在寝宫内的海螺！
E: Hmph, the ultra-mysterious goods: Phagousa's conch! Straight from their royal chambers!

C: 不再聆听「燃薪」。
E: Stop listening to "Kindling."

C: 破碎的战旗、折断的箭矢…在久远的过去，冥河之下似乎曾发生过激烈的战斗。
E: Tattered war banners and broken arrows... It seems a fierce battle took place beneath the River of Souls long ago.

C: 我掉的是金色的怪物。
E: I dropped the golden monster.

C: 专门为小妖精设计的信箱，里面空荡荡的，只有一封摊开的信件——
E: A mailbox designed specially for fairies. It's empty, save for one open letter.

C: 致那些为了逐火而牺牲的黄金裔们——他们的命运不为神谕所示，却不因其微渺而自惭自卑，决然地将金血挥洒于逐火的道路。
E: To the Chrysos Heirs who gave their lives chasing flame — Their fates were not foretold by prophecy, yet they bore no shame in their insignificance. With unwavering resolve, they shed golden blood along the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 长得这么像葡萄呢……
E: ...looking so much like a grape today?
Hey~~~ there~~~

C: 在那场盛宴里，末日的灾厄永不降临，逐火之旅永世延续。你所爱的人都会与你相伴……
E: In that grand feast, the calamity does not approach, the Flame-Chase Journey continues forever, and all who you cherish will be by your side...

C: 若虫不再言语，金色的光辉在深海中点点消散，如同一触即灭的火光。
E: The nymph no longer spoke. Golden bits of light disperse in the deep sea like transient firelights.

C: 离群的它…在海中迷惘，追逐太阳的火光……
E: Alone it strays... lost in the sea, chasing the blazing light of the sun...

C: 抱紧我心爱的电路板…
E: Hold my precious circuit boards...

C: 一定要找出来帕！
E: We have to find it!

C: （好像只有我能看见它…）
E: (Seems like I'm the only one who can see it...)

C: 实话说，没什么变化。我们每清理一群杂鱼，就会有更多的怪物从裂界里涌出来。
E: Honestly, nothing much has changed. Every time we clear out one swarm, more monsters just pour out of the Fragmentum.

C: 你的梦想一定会实现的。
E: Your dreams will surely come true.

C: 嘤…你身上好像有它的味道…还真是，谢谢嘤……
E: Eeep... you do have its smell on you... You're right, thank you...

C: 质疑
E: Interrogate

C: （好像不对，先天的一切都需要后天的培养，它跳过了它的自主行为没说，这里面肯定有问题！）
E: (Something is not right. Everything innate still needs to be nurtured. It didn't mention anything about its motivation. There must be something wrong here!)

C: （让佩佩给它一个滑铲）
E: (Have Peppy give it a sliding tackle)

C: 请回吧。
E: Please leave.

C: 虽然但是，有奖励吗？
E: But still, is there any reward for this?

C: 嘘——这个要悄悄说，人家好不容易才打听到的，可不能被别人听走了，只告诉{NICKNAME}一个人哦？
E: Shh — this has to stay quiet! It was really hard for me to find out, so I don't want anyone else to just hear it. This is for your ears only, {NICKNAME}.

C: 我完全忘了。
E: I completely forgot it.

C: {NICKNAME}，其实呀，我一直很喜欢你呢。
E: {NICKNAME}. You know, I've always had a soft spot for you.

C: 仙舟有句俗语叫「来都来了」，意思是说，「来了」就可以省去一切多余的解释。
E: There is a Xianzhou proverb that says "we've already come this far," which means since you've already come all this way, we can dispense with all other unnecessary explanations.

C: 滴答！钟表又转起来啦！
E: Tick tock! The clock is working again!

C: 与洞天内相比，舟外作战环境想必十分复杂。那么，岁阳能量武器或许会因环境因素损失射击精度和伤害……
E: Compared with the inside of the delve, the combat environment outside the ship must be very complicated. So, heliobus energy weapons may lose shooting accuracy and damage due to environmental factors...

C: 请随我来。
E: Come with me.

C: 不知道{NICKNAME}是否听过「泰科铵机动球」？
E: Have you ever heard of a game called Taikiyan Roboball, {NICKNAME}?

C: 你没看出来吗？我之前应该讲的很明白了吧…
E: Can't you tell? I should've been clear from the very outset...

C: 没有。
E: No.

C: 虽然咱们圈内人都认为「寻径指津」天下第一，但放眼整个游戏市场，「寻径指津」还是小众游戏，您知道为什么吗？
E: Those of us in the community may think the world of "Pathfinder" as a game, but if you look at the gaming market as a whole, you'll find that "Pathfinder" ultimately remains a niche game. Why do you think that is?

C: {F#她}{M#他}来了……
E: {F#She}{M#He} is here...

C: 我知道什么是私服…
E: Yeah, I do...

C: …您这是不是算玩得挺投入的？
E: ...Can I consider you as a hardcore fan of this game?

C: 让我见识下真正的谜题！
E: Show me a real puzzle!

C: …滴答，说得有点多了。我打算去派对逛逛…等我那两个朋友都到齐了，就来舞池找我们吧。
E: ...Tick-tock, I have said too much. I intend to go wander around in the party... When both my friends are here, come to the dance floor and look for us.

C: 你手下没有其他能找的人吗？
E: Don't you have anyone else you can ask?

C: 失去了金丝牵引的人台吐出不成词句的话语。那声音好似阿格莱雅，却又有着细微的区别，仿佛经过多次转录的《钟表小子第一季》。
E: Without the pull of the golden thread, the mannequin sputters incomprehensible phrases. The voice sounds a bit like Aglaea, but there is also a subtle difference, as if an over-copied version of Clockie Season 1.

C: 能复述下预言的内容吗？
E: Can you repeat the prophecy?

C: 桀桀桀…不对，喀喀喀——预言的使者终于还是来到了这里吗？
E: Kekee... No wait, crrrkkk... Has the messenger of the prophecy finally arrived after all?

C: 很难描述那种感觉…就好像自己是副被清洗的手套，衬里朝外翻了个面，感觉和思绪都颠倒了。
E: It's difficult to describe this feeling... I feel like a pair of gloves that has been washed and turned inside-out... My mind feels like it's been completely flipped around.

C: 我是欧洛尼斯本尊。
E: I am Oronyx in the flesh.

C: 正事暂且放到一边，您要是有什么想聊的，咱陪你唠唠也无妨。
E: Let's leave that matter aside for now and tell me what you wanted to talk about. I'll banter with you.

C: 切，那我可是得让你吃惊一下了……
E: Then I'll have to surprise you...

C: ——巴特鲁斯突然意识到自己根本没有头发！桀桀桀桀。
E: I suddenly realized I had no hair! Hahaha!

C: 等等等等，还有隐藏的宝藏？
E: Wait a minute. There's hidden treasure?

C: …嗷呜。
E: ...Awoo.

C: 桀桀。能在一千年以后对上暗号，这就是我们的缘分！
E: Heh-heh. To nail the passphrase a thousand years later, what a beautiful twist of fate!

C: 啊…呃，是我一下说得太多了吗？
E: Um, did I speak too much?

C: 我决定用一顶由细铜丝特制的帽子，把自己的头皮和黄金替罪羊零距离连通…然后在这里睡上一觉，试试能不能用梦境和世界背后的真实沟通！
E: I've decided to connect my scalp directly to the Golden Scapegoat with a hat made from thin copper strands. I will then take a nap here to see if I can communicate with the truth behind this world in my dream!

C: 哇！不过，树庭真的会同意让我们……？
E: Wow! But... will the Grove really let us...?

C: 恩维尔。树庭…不久前遭遇了黑潮的袭击……
E: Avilius. The Grove... it was recently attacked by the black tide...

C: 你从树洞中滑到了下层……
E: You slip through a hollow in the tree and descend to the lower level...

C: …这肯定不是委托人想要的答案。幸好，先前出现类似状况时，我研究过补救方法。只需细化问题后再次提问即可。由我来……
E: This surely isn't the answer the client wants. Luckily, I've studied remedial methods for such cases. By refining the question and asking again, we may get a better result. Allow me —

C: 迷津隆隆作响……
E: The Maze groans deeply...

C: 我就猜你会感兴趣。选一卷吧。
E: I knew you'd be interested. Choose one.

C: 我是「执笔人」。每次推演后，你所见到的石板，都是石笔自行移动勾勒而出的，而此期间需要由执笔人来握持。
E: I'm the "scribe." Each time an extrapolation concludes, the slate you see is etched by the self-moving stone stylus, but someone must hold it throughout the process.

C: 为了谜题能够继续，不要走来时路，我们从另外一侧绕过去吧！
E: To keep the puzzle going, let's not take the same route back. We'll go around from the other side!

C: 吕枯耳戈斯元老把秘术锁传授给元老院后，他们也会用火种匣寄存些不便透露给外界的私人物品，这大概也是其中之一。
