E: After Elder Lycurgus taught the art of arcane seals to the Council of Elders, they also began storing personal belongings in the Coreflame Caskets — items they preferred to keep hidden from the outside world. This is likely one of them.

C: 我想至少今天，至少这次…呃啊…可档案里的线索都用尽了，我还是想不起来…找不出那个火种匣。时间不多了…果然，我还是和以前一样没用……
E: At least for today, at least this time — ugh... I've gone through all the records, but I still can't remember... I still can't find the right Coreflame Casket. We're running out of time... I really am useless, just like before...

C: 能不能用人话解释下。
E: Please explain in the human language.

C: 「{RUBY_B#星神}丰饶{RUBY_E#}」……
E: The {RUBY_B#Aeon}Abundance{RUBY_E#}...

C: 那不重要。脑波是什么？不重要。你不需要知道任何事情也可以活着，就像一棵无知无觉的猴面包树，你吸收养分，成长，然后消亡。生命不就是那样？片刻的欢愉，欢愉之后徒留虚无，日复一日，没有变化，没有未来，没有光亮……
E: That's unimportant. What are brain waves? Not important. You can live without knowing anything, just like a mindless baobab tree. You take in nutrients, grow, then die. Isn't that what life is? A moment of elation, after which there is nothing. Day after day, timeless and unchanging, having no future, having no light...

C: 你睁开双眼，却发现自己身在一片绚丽的画廊中央！趁着蓝皮肤的老头史学家出门，你那积蓄已久——渴望更加迅捷的<color=#dbc291ff>巡猎</color>信仰压制了其他的躁动，你迅速吸取了无数图画，它们像春天的剖面一样变换着花瓣的颜色…意象的王国在加速流动的时空里愈筑愈高。
E: You open your eyes and find yourself in the middle of a colorful gallery! While the blue-skinned elderly historian is out, your long-accumulated desire for greater swiftness in <color=#dbc291ff>The Hunt</color> overpowers your other impulses. You quickly absorb numerous paintings, their petals changing colors like the cross-section of spring... The imaginary kingdom grows stronger in the accelerated flow of time.

C: 蒸汽浮现，你有种熟悉的感受——更多幽灵生命从黄油中绽开，巨大的城墙下满是虫壳蝶翅的尸骸，那些寰宇灾祸被祂的城墙挡在了外边；更多生灵正在巨大的城墙脚下运土，将它愈筑愈高……
E: As the steam is rising, you experience a familiar sensation. More specters come to live from the butter, and there are heaps of insect carcasses and butterfly wings at the bottom of the fortress. THEIR walls keep the disasters in the universe at bay. Many creatures are toiling away to build the fortress higher and higher.

C: 谁还没点*多重*面孔？
E: Who doesn't?

C: 「古老的『均衡』星神，祂的决定不容质疑。」阮•梅陈述，「祂所做一切皆为『均衡』…如此夺目。」
E: "The decision of ancient Aeon of Equilibrium cannot be questioned." Ruan Mei states, "Everything THEY do is for the sake of Equilibrium... and that's magnificent."

C: 「我也这么觉得。但无所谓，好玩就行。」
E: "I think so too, but it doesn't matter as long as it's fun."

C: 他不会来了！明天…后天，无论你如何等待诺巴蒂，他都不会来了。
E: He won't be coming! Tomorrow, or the day after tomorrow... However long you wait for Norbati, he will not come.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>模拟宇宙：</color>\n你听到一阵歌声：「宇宙将要着火，而我撒把孜然。阿哈什么也不管——只要这世界够乱！」
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Simulated Universe:</color>\nYou hear someone singing: "Universe about to burn, and on it I toss cumin. Aha cares for nothing — as long as this world is a mess!"

C: 「我们得挑最重要的数据保存。」阮•梅说，「譬如星神。」
E: "We have to select the most important data to store." Ruan Mei says, "Like the Aeons."

C: 「阿哈老是这样，下次我们给祂设一个『威胁值』，把模拟阿哈的威胁降低好了，别让祂老这么吓人。嗯…继续吧。」
E: "Aha's always been this way. We should assign a 'threat meter' for THEM next time to reduce the simulated Aha's hostility. That'll stop THEM from frightening everyone all the time. Hmm... let's move on."

C: 「唷。天才们的聚会？就这？」黑塔耸了耸鼻子，「大家总是各有各的算盘，想一起做点什么可真难。最后还得靠模拟宇宙——我是说，我们什么时候觐见博识尊？说真的，我不指望能还原祂的大脑袋，我只想再见祂一面。」
E: "What's this, a gathering of Geniuses? With this lot?" Herta snorts. "Everyone's got their own agenda — it's so hard to get people to work together. We still have to rely on the Simulated Universe in the end — I mean, when do we pay our respects to Nous? Honestly though, I doubt I can restore THEIR big head. I just want to see THEM again."

C: 「{NICKNAME}，做的不错。」黑塔耸了耸鼻子，「看吧，你熟悉的地方。我猜我们离觐见星神不远了。」
E: "Well done, {NICKNAME}." Herta wrinkles her nose. "Look, a place you're familiar with. I'm guessing we're not too far from greeting the Aeons."

C: ……万机之王，「博识尊」，祂计算的时刻到来了。
E: ...Monarch of Myriad Machines, Nous, the moment of THEIR calculations has arrived.

C: 判定无机：「受难的*慈父*」•其一
E: Judged as Inorganic: The Suffering *Father* (I)

C: 此刻，你身处一片喧闹的会场中。作为高度机械改造的<color=#dbc291ff>雇佣兵</color>，你感觉自己在一群普通人中有如异类——他们议论纷纷，为边境的新消息吵得不可开交：贸易战争已在公司控制之下，很快就能平息了。
E: You find yourself in a cacophonous ballroom. As a highly mechanized <color=#dbc291ff>mercenary</color>, you feel like the odd one out among a bunch of normal humans. They are babbling on and arguing animatedly about the latest happenings on the borders — the trade war will soon draw to a close under the IPC's control.

C: 不再有纷争和恐惧，童话作家都不敢创造的乌托邦，那才是你们的未来。
E: There will be no more strife or fear. A utopia that the fairy tale writers would not dare to create — that is your future.

C: 真是格外温暖的时刻。
E: Truly an extraordinarily warm moment.

C: 导师关上盒盖，你的宇宙回归黑暗。
E: The teacher closes the box, and the universe returns to darkness.

C: 「我们的星球不是盘子形状。」另一个男孩站起来反驳「我看过电视上的科普节目，所有的星球都是六角星型。」
E: "Our planet isn't flat!" Another young man stands up to rebuff her argument. "I saw on TV that every planet is the shape of a 6-pointed star!"

C: 「未来？呵，未来，何必匆匆向前呢。星际能源战争，它需要更长的时间来沉淀。」声音像是讽刺，带着雀跃，「你问我？就当是…来为心理历史学派扫墓的老友吧。」
E: "The future? Heh, why in such a hurry to advance? The Interstellar Energy War will need an even longer time before it settles down." The statement sounds like a taunt, with a tone of euphoria. "You're asking me? Let's just say... I'm an old friend here to pay my respects at the School of Psychohistory's tomb."

C: 「未来学大会」缔造的脆弱和平轰然倒塌，合作的高墙背后，赫然是一场<color=#dbc291ff>学派战争</color>。胜者将占有所有「权杖」，创造出完美学者，败者则成为受人耻笑的附庸。
E: The fragile peace that the Futurological Congress founded collapsed thunderously. What lies on the other side of the high wall of partnership is a bloodletting <color=#dbc291ff>Scholars' Strife</color>. The victor will seize control of all the Scepters, create the perfect scholar, and the losers will become a laughingstock.

C: 天才也相信运气？
E: Geniuses believe in luck too?

C: 你要消灭他们，打破宇宙的定局。结论：杀戮=拯救。
E: You will eliminate them and break the predetermined outcome of the universe. Conclusion: Slaughter = Salvation.

C: 警告，警告，对方机能远高于通常有机个体，尝试更改应对策略。
E: Warning, warning. Other party's functions far surpass standard organic entities. Attempting to revise countermeasures.

C: 在「智识」的思维世界，她看到了梦寐以求的那片海洋。从最初捕捉到的信号，到完整的孤波，虚数背景中的涟漪，它们在海洋里，也仅是涟漪下的涟漪。
E: She sees the great ocean that she had dreamed of in the vast thoughts of the Erudition. From the first signals she captured to the entire solitary wave to the Rippling Waves in the Imaginary background — When placed inside this great ocean, are no more than waves below the waves.

C: 出去再聊吧。
E: Let's talk about this outside.

C: 「关于寂静领主一意追杀天才，我们几个猜想过一千种理由…为嫉妒？为权势？为掠夺知识？我们唯独没想到这个——熄灭混沌的可能性？你的犯罪动机还真是别具一格啊。」
E: "We have speculated over a thousand reasons regarding the Lord of Silence's relentless hunt for geniuses... Envy? Power? Or the plundering of knowledge? This is the only reason we hadn't considered — Extinguishing chaotic possibilities? Your motive for your crimes is truly unique."

C: 大家都活下来了。
E: They all survived.

C: 不知道。螺丝咕姆好像提起过，那多半是位智械吧。
E: No idea. Screwllum seems to have mentioned it before, so it's likely to be an Intellitron.

C: 「恭喜你啊，来到这里真不容易。」黑塔敷衍地应付，「如果你有多余的<color=#dbc291ff>宇宙碎片</color>，可以在我这里全部用掉，强化你的祝福。不然也没机会用了。」
E: "Congratulations. Well done on getting here." Herta responds carelessly. "You can use up all your <color=#dbc291ff>Cosmic Fragments</color> here to enhance your Blessings. You won't get another chance to use them otherwise."

C: 你慢慢地深入虫巢。你拨开倒悬的虫卵，惊奇发现半透明的虫泡中，新生命正用触须挠它还未睁开的复眼。
E: Slowly, you make your way into the insect nest. As you brush off the eggs hanging upside down from the roof, you discover to your amazement that newborns within the translucent egg sacs are scratching their still unopened compound eyes with their antennae.

C: 你来到一个埃尔韦风味小酒馆，这里气氛十分快活。
E: You reach an Elway-style tavern with a lively atmosphere.

C: 你遇到一位栗色卷发、满脸雀斑的男士，他称自己是「黑森林」地带的挖掘者。在他的形容下，那是一个充满神秘气息的地带：据说森林中有着无数预言机、写诗机以及各种齿轮机械生命，有机生命对此少有涉足。
E: You encounter a freckled man with curly chestnut hair who introduces himself as a digger in the Black Forest. He describes the forest as a mysterious place. It is said that in the forest there are numerous prophecy machines, poet machines, and all kinds of mechanical lifeforms operating on gears. Organic lifeforms rarely set foot there.

C: …你昏沉地失去了意识，原来被欲望吞没的员工，都会被*奇妙处理*，并成为公司秘密会议室墙上的一枚头像画章。
E: ...You slowly lose consciousness. As it turns out, all employees consumed by greed are subject to a mysterious treatment that will turn them into portraits on the walls of the IPC's secret conference room.

C: 终于到了这一刻——你来到这里，黄沙吹起你的披风，你将直面刺杀「古脑体」。
E: Finally, the moment has come. Your cloak flaps in the sandy wind, and you will soon be facing the *ancient brain*.

C: 你获得了丰厚的*投资*回报！
E: You get a great return on your *investment*!

C: 希望黑塔不会生气。
E: I hope Herta won't be angry.

C: 「已纳入，确认次级造物需求——你所需要的物品，是否具备可复现性？」
E: "Properties integrated, confirming secondary creation requirements. Is the object you require reproducible?"

C: 只要不选择，就不会困难。
E: If there is no decision to be made, then there can be no challenge.

C: 「嘿嘿，我的软乎乎。」它有些困惑地盯着你，但很快放弃了思考，苍猿转过身去，背对着你，似乎在暗示你继续抚摸下去。
E: "Heh-heh, my floofy floof." It stares at you, somewhat confused, but very quickly abandoning all thought. The ape turns around with its back to you, as if hinting at you to keep caressing it.

C: 冷静，冷静，抽了这么多次，也该出个稀有角色了。要不，咱再试试？
E: Calm down. You've already pulled so many times. It's about time a rare character pops up. Why not give it one more twist?

C: 为首的学士启动实验，于是，新的电流又在意识里泛起。
E: As the lead scholar initiates the experiment, a new electric current surfaces within the consciousness.

C: 「只需用『谜语』稍微撩拨看待事物的角度，世界便会因你而改变模样。」女人微微一笑，消散在夜市的琴声里。
E: "With a subtle shift in perspective through 'riddles,' the world will alter its form around you." The woman offers a faint smile before vanishing into the music of the night market.

C: 你驾驶舰船向上加速，赶在它被撕裂前，回到朋克洛德相对友好的一面。
E: You hasten the ship's pace, steering it back to the comparatively hospitable side of Punklorde before it succumbs to destruction.

C: 「嘶嘶，可不要太得意，一妖更比一妖高。」店长笑着吐出信子，「妾身只是不眨眼四天王里最弱的那个。」
E: "Hiss... Don't get too cocky now. There is always a stronger opponent," the shop owner laughs and flicks her forked tongue. "I am the weakest among the Four Unblinking Kings."

C: 抱歉，我没听清。
E: Sorry, I didn't catch that.

C: 你将珍藏的蜜酿倾倒进大海，漂浮在浪花上的琼浆令海兽也陷入沉醉，就连歌吟中的海神眷属，也不由地分心舔舐起嘴唇。
E: You pour the precious honey brew into the sea, its drifting nectar intoxicating the sea monsters. Even the singing Titankin are momentarily distracted as they lick their lips.

C: 你将法吉娜的传说咏唱，从诞生的瞬间，到欢宴的如今。歌声中，如痴如醉的眷属们为你敞开了道路，并将沉没在海域中的宝藏作为你的报偿。
E: You sing of Phagousa's legend, from the moment of birth to the revelry of the present. Amid the melody, the intoxicated Titankins open a path for you, presenting treasures sunk to the bottom as your reward.

C: 它曾在宴会上偷走法吉娜酿造的器皿，哪怕是长年沉溺在享乐中的泰坦，也因此掀起狂风巨浪。
E: They stole Phagousa's crafted vessels at a banquet, provoking a storm from a Titan usually lost in pleasure.

C: 当然，它也试过偷走那台巨大的机器，但弱不禁风的影子，显然无法负载此世的「黎明」。
E: Indeed, they attempted to steal the colossal machine known as "Dawn," but their fragile shadow was incapable of carrying the weight of the world.

C: 冰冷刺骨的雨水，惊醒了沉睡的大地。它的耳畔充斥着大雨的嘈杂，身体成为酿造的器皿。于是它立下誓言——海洋与大地将永恒对立！
E: The icy rain startles the sleeping earth awake. Their body becomes a vessel for brewing, and their ears ring with the downpour's roar. They then swear an oath — the land and ocean shall forever oppose each other!

C: 可无常的法吉娜怎会遵守约定？海浪一刻不停地拍击沙滩，神志不清的海洋呼唤大地参与到它的狂饮，而吉奥里亚永远以沉默回应。
E: But how can the fickle Phagousa obey an agreement? Waves ceaselessly lash the shores, and the drunken ocean calls to earth to join their revelry, but Georios always answers with silence.

C: 可海洋总是笑着。
E: But the ocean always laughs.

C: 可全世之座并不满意这样的道路，它祈求命运将绳索解开，散乱的丝线垂落，有的随风缠绕住山岭，有的飘进了云层，有的沿着河流延伸进海洋。
E: Yet, the Throne of Worlds is not satisfied with these paths. They plead for fate to untangle the ropes, letting the threads fall and entwine around mountains, drift into clouds, or flow along rivers into the sea.

C: 在那田园牧歌般的黄金世，欧洛尼斯是最被人类忽视的神明，它的真言几乎得不到倾听，它的祭坛前没有贡品和信徒，有的只是累累灰尘。
E: In that pastoral Era Chrysea, Oronyx was the most overlooked of the gods. Their words were barely heard, and their altar was devoid of offerings and followers, only accumulating dust.

C: 好想让欧洛尼斯帮我算一卦。
E: How I wish Oronyx would divine a fortune for me.

C: 或许这些抗议声，本身也是维持天平配重的一枚砝码呢？
E: Perhaps these very protests were themselves but another counterweight on the scales of balance?

C: 可它是否知道，这样做会为自己树敌无数，它的天平，也成为了每一个窃贼梦寐以求的战利品。
E: But did they know, from this, countless enemies would arise? That their scales would become every thief's coveted prize?

C: 墨涅塔曾好心指点他，愿意教它精致的线条和缤纷的颜色，吉奥里亚却摆摆大手，声称自己没有兴趣。
E: Mnestia kindly offered to teach them the delicate lines and vibrant colors, but Georios waved it off with their big hand, claiming they had no interest.

C: 非常严酷的考验。
E: What a harsh and brutal test.

C: 这便是谢绝爱意的琥珀，将一切都埋入遗忘的地底。
E: This was the amber of rejected love, burying everything in the forgotten depths of the earth.

C: 换个角度，它们也算是凝结在了一起。
E: From another perspective, they're technically all condensed together.

C: 神明也无法弃绝骄傲。
E: Not even divinity is safe from pride.

C: 当黄昏降临时，天空泰坦就必须阖上自己的眼睛，进入短暂的睡眠，直到黎明将他唤醒。
E: When dusk fell, the Sky Titan would be compelled to close their eyes and enter a momentary slumber — until dawn called them back to wakefulness once more.

C: 夜晚让人休养生息。
E: Nighttime allows people to recuperate and rest.

C: 人子当为万物之灵。
E: Humanity shall bear the spirit of all things.

C: 哎，你怎么这样。
E: How could you turn down such an offer?

C: 不拍了。
E: Don't tap it.

C: 黑塔女士！
E: Madam Herta

C: 你输入后，设备上跳出一行冰冷的红字：<color=#eb4d3dff>「密码错误，请重新输入正确密码。」</color>
E: You enter it, but all that pops up on the device is a line of cold red text: <color=#eb4d3dff>"Password error. Please enter the correct password."</color>

C: 你正打算离开，屏幕上却突然出现了一个弹窗…上面写着<color=#dbc291ff>「粉丝奖励」</color>。
E: Just as you are about to leave, a pop-up window appears on the display... It says <color=#dbc291ff>"Fan Reward."</color>

C: 可我没听到声音呢……
E: But I can't hear anything...

C: 忆员是什么？
E: Who are the Memokeepers?

C: 碰到文明的忆员未尝不是件好事，他们也许会用神奇的记忆和你交换；但要特别小心流光忆庭里的激进派，那群「窃忆者」——他们偷你记忆时一声招呼都不打。
E: You could get lucky if you meet civilized Memokeepers, since they might use an amazing memory to exchange with yours. However, watch out for the Memosnatchers, the radicals in the Garden of Recollection. They won't give you a heads-up before stealing your memory.

C: 那个…这里是我的「专属休息区」，没什么事的话能不能请你暂时先出去，我想清净会儿……
E: Um... This is my private rest area. If you don't mind, could I please ask you to leave for a bit? I'd like a little peace and quiet...

C: 哦…你说的是俱乐部的老板史考特先生吧？没有，我跟他不熟。
E: Umm... You must be referring to the Fight Club's owner, Mr. Scott? No, I'm not acquainted with him.

C: 我要先歇一会儿再去做下一组锻炼，正好可以陪你聊两句！
E: I was just resting for a bit before getting to my next set of exercises, and I'm just in time to chat with you!

C: 一众泥巴听得声泪俱下…你真害怕它们会融化在自己的眼泪里。你大笑，对着翻译官摊手：「这颗星球已经没有希望了——因为黏土人根本活不过雨季！」
E: The crowd of Claymen cry as they hear you speak... you worry they might dissolve in a puddle of their own tears. You laugh and shrug toward the interpreter as you say, "This planet doesn't have a shred of hope, because the Claymen won't make it past the wet season!"

C: 我的穿墙术终于练成了嗡，现在我也是{RUBY_B#雅努斯}「双开门」{RUBY_E#}的祭司了嗡~
E: I finally learned how to phase through walls! Now, I too am a priest of the {RUBY_B#Janus}"twin doors"{RUBY_E#}!

C: 真怀念我们的大大…也不知它现在过得怎样嗡。
E: I really miss our boss... Hope everything is going well for them.

C: 贝洛伯格的铁门居然会说话？
E: Belobog's iron gate can talk?

C: 是，后、「后巷」……
E: It's, the ba— "back alley"...

C: 我、我的那些个朋友啊、邻居啊…都莫名其妙消失了！
E: Th—Those friends and neighbors of mine... they've mysteriously disappeared!

C: 眼睛、鼻子、嘴巴…全都一个模样，分毫不差……
E: Eyes, nose, mouth... they all look the same, not a speck of difference...

C: 喀！角斗太惊心动魄，我一连看了三天三夜，不小心睡着了喀！
E: Crrk! The fight was so thrilling I had to watch it back-to-back for three days straight — so I ended up falling asleep!

C: 没想到躲在远离污浊的高处，也无法摆脱尘世的纷扰…事到如今，我只有一个请求。
E: Who knew that the grief and turmoil of the mortal world could not be shaken, even by hiding all the way up here in this filthy place... Yet here we are. I have but one request.

C: 与亦敌亦友的同伴并肩杀敌，这是诗人们口述的长诗中才有的段落喀。
E: Fighting shoulder-to-shoulder alongside someone neither fully friend nor foe is the kind of detail you only read about in the epic odes passed down via the poets' word-of-mouth recitals.

C: 叮！
E: Ding!

C: 呃…理解，有这么好的路子，你不想轻易松口也是自然。
E: Hmm... I understand. With connections that can get you something this good, it's only natural you'd want to keep it to yourself.

C: 第二口蟹肉…你的嘴巴已经被填满了。有些油腻，但还算得上美味。你确信自己能完成这次挑战。
E: The second bite of crab meat fills up all of your mouth. It's a little greasy, but you would still consider it tasty. You are certain that you can see this challenge through to the end.

C: 出于好奇，你将耳朵贴上门板，仔细辨认其中的声音……
E: Curiosity gets the better of you. You press your ear to the door and try to figure out what the sound is...

C: 哎呀，我虽然什么乐器都会，但也不能一人分饰两角呀！要是你来了，乐队正好能补上贝斯的缺口……
E: Well, I can play any instrument, but I can't be a one-man band! If you join, the band will be able to have a bass player...

C: …不对，我要效忠的主人似乎并不用剑？有些记不清了喀……
E: ...No, no, I don't think the master I serve wields a sword? I can't quite remember...

C: 完美的角度！精确的设计！艺术就是碾压喀！
E: The perfect angle! Exquisite design! Crushing is an art form!

C: 这算「幸运」吗？
E: This is good luck, right?

C: 啧啧啧，这可是…难得一见，实在是难得一见……
E: Tsk tsk, this is... A rare sight. Truly a rare sight, indeed...

C: 唔…你那是什么眼神？反正你就是想拿这些宝贝换钱吧？喏，这些你拿走吧，石头我就收下了——记住，这件事你可不许跟别人乱说啊！
E: Uh... Why are you looking at me like that? All you want anyway is to just exchange these treasures for some money, right? You take this, and I'll take the stone... Remember, don't go snitching about this deal!

C: 听我讲，{M#先生}{F#小姐}——「后巷」想要看看更大的贝洛伯格。
E: Listen to me, {M#mister}{F#miss}: The "back alley" wishes to see a bigger Belobog.

C: 而在「握手会」的第四个钟头，这场欢闹的盛会终于迎来了尾声——
E: The commotion finally wore down by the fourth hour of this "Meet the Hero" event.

C: 噹！
E: Dong!

C: 痛快！我就喜欢跟你这种人做生意。来吧，一手交货，一手交钱。
E: Delightful! I love doing business with people like you. Come on then. You take the money, and I take the goods.

C: 飞蛾总是向往光明，但一头扎进火里并非明智之举，实现梦想也得循序渐进！
E: Moths are always drawn to light, but diving straight into fire is not wise. Dreams should be pursued step by step!

C: 是的，船长！
E: Aye-aye, Captain!

C: 曾经盘踞于此的若虫们…消失了。
E: The nymphs that once resided here... have disappeared.

C: 不出。
E: I won't leave.

C: 他们还会再回来吗？
E: Will they ever come back?

C: 怎么，我挡着你看风景了吗，稍等一下，我马上就飞走了。
E: What? Am I blocking your view? Just a moment. I'm about to fly away.

C: 这…这就是…我感觉…啊，仙舟，在我的头顶上飘荡…我看见了…宇宙！
E: This... This is... I feel... Ah, Xianzhou. It's floating above my head... I see... the universe!

C: 这也算狠？
E: This is ruthless?

C: 紧接着，恶龙卖了一个破绽，它将自己的白色肚皮露了出来，挑衅你的怯懦。它从不畏惧人类，它要杀就杀，要吃就吃，没有人敢阻挡它。
E: Immediately after, the dragon flaunts its weakness, exposing its soft white underbelly to taunt you. It has never feared humans. It kills them whenever it wants to, and eat them whenever it feels like it... And none dare stop it.

C: （讲究稳敲稳打，但过程缓慢）
E: (Strive for a slow but assured success)

C: 你说让我修我就会修吗？
E: Do you think I'll fix you because you asked?

C: 这位{F#小姐}{M#先生}请不要自作多情了。我愿意付出生命为你战斗，可是对面那位丑陋的机巧却并非如此。
E: {F#Miss}{M#Mister}, don't flatter yourself. I may be someone with conscience in battle, but that disgusting ingenium over there does not.

C: 你打算开战之前解释自己的信念？
E: Are you going to monologue about your convictions before you go to war?

C: 不要再说耍帅的话了。
E: Stop saying things just to sound cool.

C: 好奇的旅人啊，你是否震撼于这柄巨锤的伟力？这与吉奥里亚无关，而是彼时若虫们锤炼世界的巨锤！
E: Curious traveler, are you awed by the power of this mighty hammer? It has nothing to do with Georios — this is the great hammer nymphs once used to forge the world!

C: 你也是虚构史学家？
E: Are you also a History Fictionologist?

C: …没了，让比赛开始吧。
E: ...Nope, bring it on.

C: 你望了望那位兴奋的女孩…好吧，她还在吃，拼命地吃。她根本没有注意到你。
E: You look over at the excited girl... Well, she's still eating, desperately eating. She doesn't notice you at all.

C: 老板我决定向你送上安慰奖，以兹鼓励！
E: I've made a decision to award you a consolation prize as encouragement!

C: 相传，古海之水具有特殊药性，不仅可被导入丹炉炼制药物，还可作抗爆剂，抑制淬炼过程中发生的爆震——理论上，你可以在这里销毁那只危险的包裹。
E: It is said that the water of this ancient sea has special medicinal properties. Not only can it be used in the elixir crucibles to refining medicine, but it also serve as an antiknock agent that suppresses the shocks and popping during the quenching process — In theory, you can destroy the dangerous package here.

C: 你是认真的吗？！这只包裹里装着的可是「小型中子辐射炸弹」啊！
E: Are you serious!? That package contains a mini-neutron bomb!

C: 嗐，浪费我时间，我还以为你就是那家伙呢——就是个前几天追着我回复的，取了个阴阳怪气的名字叫什么「纯路人」的混账。
E: Tsk, what a waste of my time. I thought you were that person who was harassing me a few days ago with a weird username called Pure_Passerby.

C: 结果来的人太多，搞得工造司都分单双号限行了，哈哈！现在我这载客专线火爆得不行！真是多亏了他们！
E: In the end, so many people came for the fun that the Artisanship Commission had to implement odd-even license plate restrictions. Haha! Now my passenger transport hotline is booming! I really have to thank them!

C: 哎，怎会如此……
E: Ah, how could this be...

C: 所以我就好心回复，建议那孩子去报考工造司，结果就被这个叫「纯路人」的家伙追着咬，骂得我狗血淋头。
E: I responded with a well-meaning piece of advice for that kid to apply for the Artisanship Commission. Then, this Pure_Passerby guy chewed me out just for that.

C: 电视机正常开启，正常播放，只是当前并无节目可播。
E: The television turns on without any problems. It's working as per normal, except that there are no programs available right now.

C: 解决了？
E: It's done?

C: 塔兰顿的试炼好难啊…
E: The trial of Talanton is so hard...

C: 护身符丢了…呜呜……
E: My lucky charm is gone... *sobs*

C: 你俩这水平笑死人了。
E: You two are laughable.

C: 没有不习惯，会习惯的。
E: I'm fine. I'll get used to it.

C: 命和遗物哪个重要？
E: What matters more — your life or the keepsakes?

C: 要在诗歌中永垂不朽…
E: To be immortalized in song...

C: 非要扔硬币才肯坐？
E: Must you toss in a coin before you go anywhere?

C: 你接过三枚硬币，瞄准玦轮的正中心。
E: You take the three coins, and aim at the center of the jade wheel.

C: 好啊，没想到你真有两把刷子！这下咱俩的功德可都积攒了不少啊。那么下次再见吧，我要去永狩原了。
E: Alright, I didn't see that coming — you actually did it! Now, we've both guaranteed our sacred virtue. I'll see you next time. I have to shoot off to the Ever-Hunt Plains.

C: {NICKNAME}乘客…这么短时间，你就长大了…啊不对，你的身高倒是没有变动帕。总之就是…变化好大帕。
E: {NICKNAME}... you've grown up so quickly... Uh no, your height hasn't actually changed. But all-in-all... you've changed a lot.

C: 出门在外，得准备好充足的物资帕！这可不是开玩笑的。
E: You have to always prepare adequate supplies before you strike out! Pom-Pom is not kidding here.

C: 你成功地令帕姆停止了哭泣。
E: You manage to stop Pom-Pom from crying.

C: （看来帕姆记错了果汁的名字，怪不得也想不起来原材料是什么了。）
E: (Looks like Pom-Pom completely bungled the name of this juice. No wonder they forgot what the ingredients were.)

C: 在问啦在问啦，你别管别的乘客怎么想，说你的意见就好啦！
E: Pom-Pom is asking! Pom-Pom is asking! Don't worry about what other people think for now. Just state your own opinion!

C: 在你的搀扶下，帕姆的双腿总算恢复了正常。
E: With your help, Pom-Pom can finally move their legs.

C: 黑塔…吧？
E: Herta, I guess?

C: 诶{NICKNAME}乘客来得正好！请公平公正的回答帕姆的问题吧：你觉得现在这节车厢的灯光，真的太过沉闷了吗？
E: Hey, {NICKNAME}! You're here at just the right time! Please offer your unbiased answer to my question: Do you think the lights in this coach are too dull?

C: 我喜欢绿色通道纯粹配色。
E: I like the green-lane colorway.

C: 留声机摆在这儿，就是给大家听歌用的，当然欢迎。
E: The Phonograph is here for everyone to listen to music, of course you are welcome to use it.

C: 细心地搜集每个人的资料，梳理出有用的部分，根据实际情况分门别类备份整理…基本就是这些了。
E: Carefully collect everyone's information, sort out the useful parts, and organize them according to the actual situation... Basically, that's it.

C: 其实我没这么伟大…
E: Really, I'm no big shot...

C: 听好，{NICKNAME}，这次的作战目标很简单，<color=#dbc291ff>全灭「残响回廊」里出现的裂界怪物。</color>
E: Listen up, {NICKNAME}. The goal of this operation is simple: <color=#dbc291ff>Destroy all the Fragmentum monsters in the Corridor of Fading Echoes</color>.

C: 这照雪灯炉的效果的确不同凡响，应该多加利用才是。
E: Snowshine Lamps are simply incredible. We really should deploy them more often.

C: 周围已经没有怪物活动的迹象了，我猜这回廊里应该能暂时消停一阵。
E: There are no more traces of monsters in the surroundings. The corridor should be peaceful from now on.

C: 很好，这次不会让它再跑了，上吧！
E: Good, the Trotter won't get away this time. Catch it!

C: 您也可以抢先体验我们的服务——本社为有入社意向的候选人提供一次免费试用机会。只要通过电话提交您的需求，我们即刻安排！
E: We also offer a one-time trial service for free. Just call us and let us know what you need, and we'll arrange it for you!

C: 滴答，滴答。
E: Tick tock, tick tock.

C: 这似乎是某种机械装置读秒的声音。令人沉静，但出现在这里可不太妙——人来人往的车站、会发出滴答声的可疑提箱……
E: It appears to be some kind of mechanized device knocking a sound with each passing second, calm, soothing. But, wait... Having this thing here is probably problematic. This suspicious suitcase making ticking sounds in a transportation station this busy...

C: 我必须打开这个箱子！
E: I have to open this suitcase!

C: 调查
E: Investigate

C: 此处贴着一幅狂放不羁的画像…或者说，通缉令。不得不说，此画艺术造诣之高堪称…骇目惊心。
E: There's an expressively unbridled portrait here... or rather, a Wanted poster. It has to be said that the aesthetics of this artist are... shocking to the eye.

C: 真不知道？
E: You really have no idea?

C: 你拒绝释放内心深处那无处发泄的破坏欲，只给办公桌留下了一个潇洒的背影。
E: You refuse to unleash your pent-up destructive desires, instead turning away to show your best side.

C: 原来如此…对不起！
E: I understand... My apologies!

C: 你耐心等着愿望实现，却听见身后传来一声厉喝——原来这里禁止投币。你赶紧转身走开，也无暇思考愿望到底成真了没有。
E: You patiently wait for your wish to come true, when you hear a loud shout from behind — It turns out that you're not allowed to toss coins here. You hurriedly turn to walk away, with no time left to wonder if your wish came true.

C: 你摸出一枚本地硬币，掷入空中，同时心中默默许愿。愿望许完，硬币已经沉入泉水，成为无数反光物中平平无奇的一员了。
E: You pull out a local coin and make a wish as it flips through the air. Afterwards, the coin sinks down into the water, becoming just another unremarkable reflection among all the others.

C: 你的饮料洒在我铁皮上了。
E: You spilled some drink on my chrome.

C: 那也得它有这个意愿才行啊……
E: Then it has to have the will to do so...
Zero.

C: 这个男人的声音分外耳熟，你仿佛在哪里听过？
E: This man's voice seems very familiar to you. Where have you heard it before?

C: 扔？我以为是你故意看的…
E: Throw it out? I thought you were watching it...

C: 你怎么钻到这里面去的？
E: How did you get in there?

C: 如您所见……
E: As you can see...

C: 客户告诉我，他看到三余书肆里卖铁盒，实在是太感兴趣就买下来了。
E: The customer told me that he saw these for sale in the Spare Time Book Shop and couldn't help getting them out of curiosity.

C: 果然我们俩聊得来啊，看来这就是「物以类聚，人以群分」啊，哈哈。
E: Looks like we've something in common. Birds of a feather flock together, haha!

C: 我只是路过的寻宝者…
E: I'm just a treasure hunter passing through...

C: 那只是口号罢了。
E: Well, that's just a slogan.

C: 但我知道，如果我真接触并沉迷这些东西，就是因一时的快乐葬送了未来。
E: But I knew that if I ever got addicted to those things, I'd be consigning my future to ruin for the sake of temporary pleasure.

C: 或许那次经历激发了我的叛逆心，让我一听见笑声就浑身难受…谁知道呢？
E: Maybe that experience is what inspired my rebellious spirit, and what left me feeling uncomfortable whenever I heard others laugh... Who knows?

C: 说起来，你看起来也是M会喜欢的类型。可千万小心别被那家伙缠上，哈哈。
E: Speaking of which, you seem just like M's type. Just be careful not to get tangled up with that guy, haha.

C: 如果是在现实中，这些人将会是危险的代名词。但这里是匹诺康尼——家族会在保证我们与宾客共同利益的前提下，对事态进行妥善处理。
E: In the realm of reality, these people would be the very personification of danger. But we are in Penacony — The Family will handle things appropriately while ensuring the best interests of us and the guests.

C: 他们的灵魂摊开在我面前…不断拉扯着我的…我因他们的喜怒而喜怒，为他们的哀惧而哀惧。
E: Their souls are spread out before me... ceaselessly pulling at me... I am happy because of their joy, and I dread because of their fear.

C: 我也曾试图将自己对艺术的热爱、对生活的憧憬通过作品传达给人们、传达给整个世界，可……
E: I once tried, too, to pass on my love for art and lust for life to the people — to the whole world — through my films, but...

C: 我们的关系，最好就是没关系。
E: The best relationship we could have is no relationship.

C: 「那孩子给你添麻烦了吧？她还小不懂事，我替她道歉」——虚伪！
E: "Did that kid cause any trouble for you? She's young and still doesn't know squat. Please let me apologize on behalf of her"... Hypocrite!

C: 你以为她敢到梦境里来找我吗？不…艾丽，那家伙，她根本没有胆量直视我的眼睛。直到今天，她也还是在逃避！
E: Do you think she dares come into the dreamscape to pay me a visit? No... Alley doesn't have the guts to look me straight in the eye. To this day, she's still been avoiding it!

C: …很疼…非常非常疼…「我」的心跳很得快，却喘不上气来……
E: ...It hurt... so much... "My" heart was beating so fast, yet I couldn't breathe...

C: 一去才发现，信标早就不在原来的位置了。某个意外让它脱离了固定点，正朝着黑洞所在的方向一路飘去，很快就会越过事件视界。
E: Upon arrival, we discovered that the beacon wasn't in its original spot. An accident had dragged it away from its fixed location, and it was drifting toward the black hole — soon to cross over the event horizon.

C: 跨越如此漫长的时间到底是机缘还是诅咒，恐怕只有时间本身能给出答案。
E: Whether skipping such a long passage of time is a blessing or a curse, I'm afraid only time itself can deliver an answer...

C: 在生命的最后时刻到来前，他们将至关重要的信息——可能是史书，也可能是对星核的研究——以文字形式{RUBY_B#记忆}记录{RUBY_E#}在了这些小行星表面。
E: Before the final moments of their lives, they {RUBY_B#memories}recorded{RUBY_E#} vital information — maybe histories, or research into Stellarons — in the form of glyphs carved into the surfaces of these asteroids.

C: …可我却不知该怎么把奖品交给他。
E: ...But I've got no idea how to give him his prize.

C: 还没人知道钟表匠是谁吧。
E: Nobody knows who the Watchmaker is yet, right?

C: 爽快人啊，那就交钱吧。
E: You're frank, I like that. Show me the money.

C: 打工是不可能打工的，何况是给公司这样的大企业。实际上，我还挺让他们头疼的……
E: Me, working for someone? Impossible, let alone for a large conglomerate like the IPC. In fact, I ended up giving them quite the headache...

C: 坏事？也许吧，这取决于你对「坏」的定义。不过，大部分人应该都觉得我很坏吧……
E: Bad? Perhaps, but that depends on your definition of "bad." However, most people do seem to find me bad...

C: 我打劫商船，走私矿物，有时也倒腾一些贵重玩意。但这都不是出于贪欲，而是为了自由地冒险…以及赚点小小的路费。
E: I've robbed trade vessels, smuggled minerals, and sometimes even peddled precious cargo. But I did it not out of greed, but for the freedom of wayfaring... and to make a little money for traveling.

C: 对吧？那些护卫看不出也情有可原。
E: Exactly, right? So, it was no surprise when those guards couldn't tell so, too.

C: 拿过奖吗？
E: Have you won any awards?

C: 毕竟有黄金的时刻铺下的底子，在这个基础上换个皮也不至于有多差。
E: After all, it's built with Golden Hour as its foundation. The result shouldn't be too bad.

C: 班尼的眼神黯淡了下来，举手投足间的自信气质刹那间消失得无影无踪。
E: Benny's eyes have lost their usual glint, and he no longer exudes his typical air of confidence.

C: 我也不知道到底哪儿出问题了。团队还是那个团队，我也还是那个我…这个市场真的已经把我们抛弃了吗？
E: I have no idea what went wrong. Everything is the same, be it the team or me... Have we really been abandoned by the market?

C: 嗯嗯…您说的对，小孩子…哈哈，要真是小孩子就好了……
E: Hmm... You're right. Kids... haha. If only I were a kid...

C: 他们现在应该就在【艾迪恩公园的吧台】。快去吧，我等您好消息！
E: You should be able to find them at the bar of Aideen Park. Go on! I'll wait for your good news.

C: 我们不过就是顺应市场需求做了些小生意，不过就是为客户提供了些优质便捷的服务……
E: We were merely doing a small business as per market demands. It's about providing high-quality and convenient services for our clients.

C: ——未来的某天，我一定要点燃心底的烈火！哪怕烧尽自己，也要让梦想大放光彩！
E: That I'll one day ignite the ferocious fire of my heart! I'll illuminate my dream, even if I burn myself to embers!

C: 你在干嘛？
E: What are you doing?

C: 丢东西了？
E: Have you lost something?

C: 怎么，被事实猛敲一棍就遭不住了？
E: I see. Can't handle the truth, huh?

C: 还想和你聊两句。
E: I'd like to have a chat with you.

C: 咻咻…为保障一切专利创造者的合法权益，现在将对「斯坦威游隼」豪华飞车施行强制锁定操作。锁定将在现存的侵权风险彻底清除后自动解除！
E: *Beep*... To protect the rights of patent creators, a mandatory lock has been put on your "Steinway Falcon" luxury speedster. Please don't worry. The lock will be automatically unlocked once the infringement risk is resolved!

C: 男人深情地盯着身旁的无脸拼图架，他的执着居然还透着一股可怜劲。
E: The guy gazes affectionately at the puzzle rack next to him, looking pitiful with his possession.

C: 没时间等了，我在四个半系统时后还有会议要开——
E: I can't afford to wait anymore. I have a meeting coming up in four and a half system hours...
Yes...

C: 让我给你说个我听说过的例子吧：两个琥珀纪前，星际和平娱乐举行了一场歌手比赛，希望能挖掘宇宙中的音乐人才。
E: Let me give you an example I've heard of: Two Amber Eras ago, the Interastral Peace Entertainment hosted a singing competition, hoping to discover musical talents across the universe.

C: 呼——所以无论艺者们想做多么标新立异的事，只要我的商业方案够精妙，都能把他们包装成明星！
E: Hmm... Therefore, no matter how unconventional our artists want to be, we can turn them into stars as long as we have a brilliant enough business plan!

C: 等他们得到了自由，就能充满干劲地去追逐梦想…也许还能开辟鸢尾花从来没有发现过的娱乐业蓝海——我说不定也能沾点光，在家族里混个一官半职！
E: Once they have freedom, they'll be able to chase their dreams with enthusiasm... They might even stumble upon a blue ocean of the entertainment industry for the Iris Family! I might even benefit a little from it and secure a nice position in The Family because of them!

C: 拉洛丝再次唱起「纯美之歌」，她的歌声像之前一样低沉嘶哑、野蛮粗糙，但不再饱含活力与喜悦，而像是一种放肆的宣泄，宣泄压抑已久的痛苦。
E: Larose sings the Song of Beauty once again, her voice as low, hoarse, savage, and rough as before, but no longer filled with vigor and joy. Instead, it became an unbridled catharsis of long-suppressed pain.

C: 真是粗暴的救援方式…
E: That's some rough hostage-rescue tactics you employed there...

C: 最开始还算有用，繁多的娱乐让我无暇回忆过往。可随着时间推移，只剩下苏乐达能稍微让我快活一些了——这也是我那么爱它的原因。
E: It worked in the beginning when the plethora of entertainment options kept me too busy to think about my past. However, as time went on, those familiar sensations came crawling back to me... Now, only SoulGlad can make me feel better, which is why I'm so obsessed with it.

C: 要是有机会，我非好好治治他们不可！
E: I'll knock some sense into them if I have the chance!

C: 你、你这人怎么这样说话！我这是在对你表示感激，这都听不出来吗？
E: Wh—What are you talking about!? I'm expressing my gratitude to you. Can't you tell?

C: 从前有个年轻人，出生在艾普瑟隆星系边陲的某颗星球。那里贫瘠、闭塞、落后，那里的人从出生的那刻起，一辈子就能望到头。
E: Once upon a time, there was a youngster born on a remote planet on the edge of the Epsilon system. The planet was barren, isolated, and backward. The future of the people there was very much predictable from the moment of their birth.

C: 我倒是不讨厌你，不过我们或许可以将这件事安排在…你帮我完成「取材」之后？
E: I don't hate you, but can we put off this thing until... you finish helping me gather inspiration?

C: 交给我吧。
E: Leave it to me.

C: 一座建在地上，朝天空发射的巨炮。它开火时，能量从四周涌向底座，光芒足以刺破最浓厚的雾霾。
E: It looks like a giant rocket on the ground, aiming at the sky. When it is fired, energy surges to its base from all sides, emitting a radiance so bright it can penetrate the thickest of smoke.

C: 格-蕾的身体突然发出一阵颤抖。即便她的脸只是纯色金属，你还是能从中品出些许愤怒。
E: Go-Ray's body shudders all of a sudden. Although her face is made of metal, you can still discern a touch of rage in her expression.

C: 为了匹诺康尼整体的和谐着想…希望您往后能够加倍慎重。
E: For the sake of Penacony's comprehensive harmony... I hope you will be more discreet moving forward.

C: 我不记得公馆近期有安排贵宾参观的计划，这到底——
E: I don't remember seeing any VIP guests scheduled to visit. What's all this...

C: 记住，谨言慎行。
E: Remember, be careful with everything you say and do.

C: 我的快乐就像唱歌的红巨星，在真空里缓慢膨胀，变成数字增长。
E: My happiness is like a red giant star singing as it slowly expands in the vacuum of space, shooting high like a growing number.

C: 看着他们的惨状，无论是谁都会同情，基金会就是在这样的基础上建立的。
E: Anybody would sympathize with them when confronted with such tragedy, and that forms the basis for why our foundation was established.

C: 她也把武器卖给了对面。
E: She was selling to the other side, too.

C: 就这，那些蒙在鼓里的暴民还得谢谢她呢！
E: Those ignorant thugs should be thanking her for all this!

C: 说真的，基金会做事已经尽量低调了。但每次就是有些好心人，不顾生命危险跑去战场，把我们的援助活动给拍下来。
E: To tell you the truth, we try to keep things as low profile as we can at the foundation. But every time there'll be some kind-hearted people who risk their necks out there on the battlefield taking photos of our aid.

C: 我忍不了了！
E: I can't take it any more!

C: 麻烦你离我远点，咱们井水不犯河水，这样对彼此都好。
E: Please stay far away from me. Let's keep to ourselves. It's much better for everyone.

C: 感觉这间屋子好久没收拾了…你还有什么事吗？
E: This room feels overdue for a tidying... Did you need anything else?

C: 更别说每天批不完的请示和拿不到的经费了，谁想谁头疼。
E: This is even before mentioning the endless mountain of requests waiting for my approval and the funding that always seems to be far from reach. It would give any person a major headache.

C: 对上，各大家系都密切关注着折纸大学的发展，那些权贵可不是校长能得罪起的……
E: Above the dean, the various Lineages are closely monitoring the developments in Paperfold University. The rich and powerful are not people that the dean can offend...

C: 酸汤才是全银河系统一认证的做法！不信你去问那些公司的员工！
E: Sour soup is the only recipe recognized across the entire cosmos! If you don't believe me, go and ask the IPC employees!

C: 豪华空艇上竟然还有路边摊…
E: I can't believe there are hawkers on such a luxurious airship...

C: 连声谢谢都没有吗？
E: Not even a word of thanks?

C: 走走走！
E: C'mon, let's go!

C: 所以，我们打算把各自的想法集中到一起，由你选出在你看来最恰当的提案——当然，你自己有什么想法也可以提。
E: So, we're going to put our ideas together, and you can select the plan you feel the most appropriate... Of course, if you have your own ideas, you can suggest them, too.

C: 其他方案都会耗费额外成本，而且可能会出现意想不到的问题。
E: Other plans will cost extra expenses and may even lead to unforeseen problems.

C: 该进入梦乡的时间啾！
E: Enter the dreamscape, tweet!

C: 我总有一天会找到宝藏的啾！
E: I'll find some treasure one day!

C: 暖暖的阳光和管子里的热风都能让鸟温暖起来啾~
E: The warm sunshine and the pipe's hot air can heat me right up, tweet~!

C: 客官，如果您有「魔法硬币」就好了，魔法硬币可以唤醒人家的记忆啾！
E: Dear guest, it'd be fantastic if you have a "magic coin." Magic coins can reawaken my memories, tweet!

C: 整理房间的时候太认真，不小心掉进抽屉里了啾…
E: I was too engrossed in tidying up the room and fell into the drawer, tweet...

C: 啾——啾！你怎么把我拔出来了啾！这下恐龙先生可怎么办呀啾！
E: Tweet! Why did you pull me out, tweet! What is Mr. Dinosaur going to do now, tweet!

C: 他说要带好看的叶子回来。
E: He said to bring some nice-looking leaves back.

C: 好像听到了什么声音…
E: I think I hear something...

C: 啾？
E: Tweet?

C: 播报今日美梦小镇大新闻啾…
E: Today's big news from Dreamville... Tweet~

C: 用八分音符！
E: Use eighth notes!
...Tweet!
...Tweet.

C: 在下会努力回想新线索的啾，请您先把提到的那个孩子带回来吧！
E: I'll try my best to recall any clues. Please help bring back that kid from before!

C: 啾啾，这场戏已经毫无悬念了，我要赶去其他片场了啾。
E: Tweet tweet, this outcome is a done deal. I have to hurry to another set, tweet.

C: 你说，如果我把时钟拨快点，是不是就能更快见到他了啾？
E: Hey, do you think if I wind the clock ahead of time, I'll be able to see him sooner, tweet?

C: 哎呀，现场已经够乱了，你就别火上浇油了啾。
E: Ahh, this is messy enough, stop adding fuel to the fire, tweet.

C: 在短暂且专业的处理后，你的舌头和栏杆分离了。但娜塔莎看向你的眼神却变得复杂起来。
E: After a brief and professional treatment, your tongue is separated from the fence. However, the look in Natasha's eyes has grown a little complicated.

C: 后续要是还不舒服的话，就抹上这个药吧。
E: If you feel any pain later, use this balm.

C: 下次小心就好。如果你再被困在哪座冰山上，我可帮不了你。
E: Just be careful next time. If it's a snowy mountain you end up getting stuck on, I can't help you.

C: 不太好看。
E: Not really.

C: 啾，钟表小子，你终于回来——什么呀，是个不认识的新面孔，害我白高兴一场啾。
E: Tweet, Clockie, you're finally back... Huh? An unfamiliar face. You got me all enthused for nothing, tweet.

C: 我立马回湛蓝爵士那里，再也不乱跑了啾！
E: I'm gonna go back to Dr. Blues' place. I won't wander around anymore, tweet!

C: 恐龙暴揍猩猩！
E: The dino wrecked the gorilla's face!

C: 小鸟也会恋爱脑吗？
E: Do birds get lovestruck too?

C: 我只是随手按了下攻击。
E: I just accidentally pressed the attack button.

C: 那就…染上你的颜色。
E: Then... paint on your color.

C: 我们躲在大雕像后面啾。
E: We'll hide behind the large statue, tweet.

C: 哎，你也是《以太战线》的玩家吗？怎么看你有点眼熟......
E: Oh, do you play Aetherium Wars as well? Why do you look so familiar...?

C: 实验田很安静，没有「阮•梅」造物在此酣睡，只有杂草丛生。
E: The experimental plant nurseries are very quiet and none of Ruan Mei's creations are here — just weeds covering the ground.

C: 不要丧失生活的希望啊！
E: Don't give up on your life!

C: 不，若月老板太准了。
E: That's not true. Ruoyue is an excellent fortune-teller.

C: 就在你准备放弃之时，胸腔中有数道暖意翻涌而上。或许这是对你高尚品行的某种回应吧，在你耳畔回荡着一道微妙的声音——
E: Just as you're about to give up, you feel several gushes of warmth wash over you. Maybe this is a response to your noble sensibilities. You hear a faint ringing in your ears:

C: 就在你从供品的细节推测着墓主生前的种种时，背后却传来一声严苛的呵斥声。
E: Just as you are speculating all kinds of hot takes about the grave occupant's life, a severe castigation comes from behind.

C: 「无尽的童年长埋于此，小风。」并非所有仙舟人都能平安顺遂地活下去，你默读着墓碑上短短几行字，这似乎是记录了某位仙舟孩子不幸的一生。
E: "My neverending childhood is buried here, Xiaofeng." Not all Xianzhou people get to live happily ever after. You pore over a few lines of the tombstone, which seems to recount the tragic demise of a young Xianzhou child.

C: …这么说吧，你就把我当成是一团留在古琴上的怨念吧！
E: ...If that's so, then just think of me as a ball of resentment left stuffed inside the guqin!

C: 怎么样，能完成琴曲吗？
E: How's it going? Did you finish the song?

C: 但无论如何，我还是会继续在这里唱下去，哪怕这舞台下空无一人。
E: But no matter what, I will still keep singing here even if there's nobody in the crowd.

C: （将它往里面推一点）
E: (Push it in slightly)

C: 不过，我感觉大部分人都不会搬石头，我会一直躲着，不见天日。
E: But something tells me most people won't move the boulder, and I'll just be left hiding there in pitch blackness.

C: 所以，我想附身于你，可以吗？
E: So then, I would like to attach myself to you. Do I have your permission?

C: 太好了，这份恩情在找到我朋友之前，我是不会忘记的。
E: Great. I will never forget this show of kindness... until I get to my friends.

C: 你再考虑考虑吧………
E: Please consider...

C: 哈哈！原本我还以为，想要掌握娱乐的诀窍，必须像学知识一样下苦功夫才行……
E: Haha! I was under the impression that if you want to grasp the secrets of entertainment, you have to work and really study...

C: 被你好一阵蹂躏后，玩偶变成了一个…皮皮西人？
E: After you give it a good fondling, the doll transforms into... a Pepeshi?

C: 你有点出息好不啦~
E: Can you at least do something worthwhile~?

C: 小佩……
E: Pennie...

C: …是心诚？
E: ...A pure heart?

C: 灰色的朋友——你来了啊。上次真是要感谢你的帮助，要是还有机会，我会请你喝苏乐达。
E: My gray friend, you came! Thank you so much for your help before. If I get a chance, the SoulGlad is on me.

C: 我在此想…冒昧地提出请求，要是您手头碰巧有多余的闲置资金，是否可以考虑……
E: Perhaps... this is a bold request but, I don't suppose that you happen to have a little spare change that you would consider using to...

C: 多别离…无人怜惜…空悲戚……
E: So many partings... No one to pity... Full of sorrow...

C: 淡影离群叹惜怜。
E: Faded shades depart, sighing with pity.

C: 怎么样，{F#女士}{M#先生}？您觉得我该选谁呢？
E: How did it go, {F#Miss}{M#Mister}? Who should I choose?

C: 唉，要是有什么能骗过怪物的伪装就好了……
E: Gah, if only there's something we could use to disguise ourselves...

C: 我们三瓶都是这里最香醇的酒，你的阴谋绝不会得逞。
E: All three of us are the finest wine here, your plan shall not succeed!

C: 不敢当，只是个半吊子而已。
E: Oh no, I just dabble in this kind of thing.

C: 论世间，也只有你能懂我，原味兄。
E: In this whole world, only you truly understand me, Brother Original-Flavor.

C: 无糖兄真乃神探，这般细节，究竟是如何推断出来的？
E: You are surely a master detective, Brother Sugar-Free. Pray tell, how did you come to this conclusion for that detail?

C: 朋友，现在可不是开玩笑的时候，死者还等我们还他一个公道呢。
E: My friend, now is not the time for jokes. The deceased is waiting for us to bring him justice.

C: 感谢你的邀请，{NICKNAME}。但愿我能为你留下难忘的回忆。
E: I appreciate your invitation, {NICKNAME}. I hope that this serves to create a wonderful memory for you.

C: 是不是桶王，我们看得一清二楚。莫要在这里妖言惑众，否则你必永堕桶底之狱。
E: We can tell with our own eyes whether that is the King of Cans. Stop spouting nonsense here, or you'll be punished at the bottom of the can for eternity.

C: 额，抛开部分特殊爱好，整体来说银河巨星还是更受欢迎的。
E: Eh, putting unique hobbies aside, a cosmic superstar is still more popular overall.

C: 大家一起上，给{F#她}{M#他}好好讲讲这儿的规矩。
E: Get' em you guys! Looks like we need to teach {F#her}{M#him} how things work 'round here!

C: 你来骂我，骂得越难听越好。
E: I want you to insult me, the harsher the better!

C: 我要向博识学会举报，居然有疯狂科学家做出这种违背苏乐达伦理的口味。
E: I'm going to report this to the Intelligentsia Guild. I cannot believe that some mad scientist would defy the ethics of SoulGlad like this!

C: 我们不会买。
E: We're not interested.

C: 就是…呃…老板你能带点乐谱回来吗？之前那些曲子我们早就腻歪得不行，就连观众们也都听出茧子来了……
E: It's... er... Boss, can you bring some music scores back? We've tired of those pieces since a long time ago, and even the crowd's spinning cobwebs just listening to the same tunes...

C: 无论如何，非常感谢您能给我这次机会。
E: No matter what, I truly appreciate you for giving me this chance.

C: 你明白自己是多么武艺高强、风华绝代——硬要说缺点什么，那恐怕就只是那么一点*运气*了。你开始畅想，未来的某一天，你是如何靠这枚硬币赢下整个匹诺康尼……
E: You are innately aware of just how powerful and talented you are. However, if you really have to name a weakness of yours, it would be that you are just a little bit unlucky. You start to imagine a day in the future when you'll use this single coin to win the whole of Penacony for yourself...

C: 邀请流萤！
E: Invite Firefly!

C: 给自己留点隐私，就不放映了。
E: I'd like to keep something for myself, I'll pass.

C: 原来如此…这和浏览网络社区是一样的。
E: I see... So this is similar to browsing online communities.

C: 你注意到逃犯看了你一眼，随即他将目光移开，假装自己什么也看不见。但这只不过是在掩耳盗铃罢了，你又不是为了和他成功对上眼神才来到这里的。
E: You notice the fugitive look away hastily after glancing at you, pretending that he hasn't seen anything. But that's just how the cat-and-mouse game is played — you haven't come here just to make eyes at him.

C: 哎，多事。
E: Tsk, meddlesome.

C: *无奈的叹息*
E: *resigned sigh*

C: 现在退下，我便饶你一命。
E: Stand down and I'll spare you.

C: 向左，向上，向上，向右。
E: Go left, up, up, and right.

C: 实不相瞒，是一张存着集装箱内部空间位置的芯片。有了它，我可以将它安装在机巧鸟上，自由获取证物仓库里的赃物了！
E: I suppose I can be honest with you: It's a microchip containing navigation data on the spaces within the freight containers. After I install this baby on the cycrane, the spoils in the evidence storage warehouse will all be ripe for the picking!

C: 放心，我这「演武仪典二十一响」最厉害的就在于，没炮它也照样能响！
E: Relax, the amazing thing about this "Wardance <unbreak>21</unbreak>-Gun Salute" is that they can still roar out without even being loaded!

C: 你看我说啥了，我倒要看看，老白还能整出什么活来。
E: What did I tell you! I actually want to see what Old Bai is playing at this time.

C: 说走咱就走。
E: Alright, let's go.

C: 唉…灰毛高手，请让我的下一位孙子进来吧！
E: Ah... Gray-haired master, please send in my next grandson!

C: 就要上课了，快坐好！
E: Class is about to begin. Take your seats, everybody!

C: 别问，问就是我有这个天赋，也有这个需要。仅此而已。
E: Don't ask me. My answer is that I have the talent, and there is a need for it. That's all.

C: 事不宜迟，我们开拍吧。
E: Without further ado, let's start the shoot.

C: 你不清楚金色酒瓶的真实想法，对它而言这样的结果算是幸福吗？
E: You're unsure of the gold bottle's true thoughts. Is this outcome really worth it for the bottle?

C: {F#阿姨}{M#叔叔}，你没事吧？我看你好像很困的样子，一个人在露天睡觉的话，很容易着凉的。
E: {F#Ma'am}{M#Sir}? Are you okay? I saw how tired you looked. If you're sleeping out in the open like this, it's easy to catch a cold.

C: 说明您喜欢古典重甲。
E: It means you like classic thick armor.

C: 你是说，你凑巧走进派对车厢，凑巧来到宣传单面前，凑巧与它互动了？好吧，触发范围或许应该设置得再小一些。
E: You are saying that you accidentally walked into the Party Car, accidentally found the flyer, and accidentally interacted with it? Well, the interactive trigger range should probably be set a little smaller.

C: 开着灯吧。
E: I'll leave the lights on.

C: 信息发出去了，孩子们回复的速度一如既往地快。
E: The message is sent, and they reply in their usual speedy manner.

C: 好痛！这狮子看起来没几颗牙齿，咬起人来却格外地厉害啊……
E: Yowch! This lion looks like most of its fangs are gone, but its bite hurts more than usual...

C: 你想吼，门扉时人们起床，脑袋离开了枕头，这不就相当于枕头把脑袋给弄丢了？幕匿时上床睡觉，对枕头来说，这不就是把脑袋又找回来了？
E: Think about it. People wake up at the Entry Hour, and their heads leave the pillow. Doesn't that mean the pillow's lost its head? And going to sleep at the Curtain-Fall Hour, doesn't that mean a pillow has found its head once more?

C: 墙上有一尊石头雕成的狮子脑袋，大张着嘴巴。
E: There is a sculpture of a lion's head on the wall, its maw wide open.

C: 可以叠高高，但是很危险。实在太高了，比小白、小敌都要高…会不会，城里很多人都够不到？看起来，除了大工匠外，根本就没人能把手放进去呢~
E: We can stack, but it's dangerous. It's so tall, even taller than Snowy and De... Perhaps plenty of folks in the city also can't reach it? Looks like no one will be able to put their hand in other than Grand Craftsman!

C: 吼？吼吼？厉害啊，居然答对了。但不知道你想的和答案是否一样吼！
E: Ho? Ho-ho? Well done, you actually got it right. But I wonder if what you think is the same as the answer!

C: 吼吼，本狮还是揭示真相吧！题目说的是「罪人」，但并没有说是「导致城主遇害的罪人」。毕竟，整场事件只是纯粹的意外事故吼！
E: Ho-ho, I shall reveal the truth then! The question speaks of the guilty, but did not state the guilty party who caused the lord's demise. After all, this entire incident was an accident of sheer coincidence!

C: 亲兄弟也要明算账。用了我的冰箱，那就要给我交费，嘿嘿嘿～
E: There's a saying that goes, "don't mix family and business." If you use my fridge, prepare to fork out money for it. Heh heh~

C: 呼呼。你好啊，这里的风景可太美了，空气也很新鲜，我好喜欢这里。
E: *crackle* Greetings. The scenery here is beautiful, and the air is refreshing. I love it here.

C: 一切尽是虚无…
E: Everything is but void...

C: 花坛。
E: Flowerbeds.

C: 用手直接指向目标地点。
E: Point directly in the direction of the destination with my hand.

C: 想真正让人长教训，必须得这样！
E: To ensure the perpetrator really learns their lesson, there's only one way to do it.

C: 你这站台害人不浅啊。
E: This station of yours has certainly committed much evil.

C: 咕，我可是塔塔洛夫的心腹大臣，怎会去做如此不体面的事情，你怕不是在羞辱本垃圾桶！
E: I am a trusted minister of Tatalov. How could I be involved in such unsavory acts? Your question is an insult!

C: 不愧是师傅，换做其他桶，定然会因为我是只柔弱的桶就怜惜我，不敢使出真实本领。师傅你就不一样了，几番切磋下来，我筋骨都活动开了。
E: Master is powerful indeed. If it were any other trashcan, they'd definitely take pity and hold back from using their true power on a weak trashcan like me. However, you are not like them, Master. After a few bouts, I feel as though my muscles and joints have been thoroughly warmed up.

C: （首先，白厄被称作救世主，我也拯救过很多世界；其次……）
E: (First, Phainon is known as the Deliverer. I've saved plenty of worlds too. Second...)

C: 怀着忐忑不安的心情，你在信箱附近等了一整天。但这次，你等来的不是新的来信……
E: With a nervous heart, you waited by the mailbox all day. But this time, what arrived wasn't a new letter...

C: 碰上什么麻烦了？
E: Did something happen?

C: 小奇美拉一溜烟地逃走了。也许正是因为它这般警惕，才能够免于劳役吧？
E: The little chimera darted away in a flash. Maybe it's this sharp sense of caution that's kept it free from a life of toil.

C: 是个好愿望，但看上去这就是小奇美拉的日常。
E: That's a good wish, but it's probably the daily routine of a little chimera.

C: 就像现在，{NICKNAME}心里在想什么呢？介意与我分享吗？
E: Kind of like now. What's on your mind, {NICKNAME}? Want to share it with me?

C: 也许答案很简单，只需小小换位思考一下：{NICKNAME}为什么认识我呢？
E: Maybe it's a simple answer. Try flipping the question: Why does {NICKNAME} know me?

C: 有些多愁善感吧？
E: Feeling a little sentimental, huh?

C: 村民不知道它的存在吗？
E: Don't the villagers know of its existence?

C: 我相信，{NICKNAME}一定也符合受欢迎的标准，要试试看吗？
E: I trust that {NICKNAME} has the traits of those who can enter. How about giving it a try?

C: 我不知道。
E: I don't know.

C: 这片麦田可是我们的宝贝，不能随便踩进去哦。会把希望踩坏的。
E: This wheat field is our baby! You can't just stomp on it willy-nilly. You'll stomp all over our hopes.

C: 没钓上鱼，但给口还挺沉的…来看看钓了个什么吧。
E: Didn't catch a fish, but the tug was pretty strong... Let's see what it did reel in.

C: 真奇怪，会掉哪儿了呢…呀，{NICKNAME}？
E: Strange, where did I drop it... Oh, {NICKNAME}?

C: 只记得挺充实的。
E: I can only recall feeling content.

C: 咚、咚、咚——清脆的敲击声在神殿中回荡，其音空灵悠长，像是从遥远的时空传来。
E: Knock, knock, knock... The crisp knocking sound echoes through the temple. The sound is ethereal and drawn-out, as if it had originated from a distant space-time.

C: 真睡迷糊了？
E: Still caught in that slumber?

C: 这不是无名客该做的事！
E: This is not something a Nameless should be doing!

C: 这个名词闯进你的脑海，有些突兀。你摸了摸背包，好像没有。
E: The term suddenly bursts into your mind, feeling somewhat out of place. You check your backpack, but it doesn't seem to be there.

C: 你是…之前在店里大呼小叫，被我赶走的那位客人？
E: Aren't you... the customer who was making a scene in my shop and got kicked out by me?

C: 秘酿…给我秘酿…我准备了更多的宝贝…为了你…宝贝儿……
E: Ambrosia... bring me the ambrosia... I've got more treasures... for you... darling...

C: 它看上去已经充分理解了新绰号的含义。
E: It seems to have fully comprehended the meaning of its new name.

C: 我叫阿德勒，是界种科室的科员。你有什么想问的，就尽管问吧。只要是我知道的，都会为你解答的。
E: I am Adler, a researcher from the Department of Ecology. Ask me if you have any questions. I'll answer anything I know.

C: 这次的军团就是最好的证明！
E: This Legion is the best way to prove this!

C: 你的每个动作和说话方式都好像精心设计过……
E: Your every movement and your ways of talking seem calculated...

C: 但如果只是一些皮毛，那还可以说说。
E: But I can tell you something less important.

C: 虽然我手里还没拿到决定性的证据，但时间一定会证明我是对的。
E: Although I haven't found any conclusive evidence yet, time will prove me right.

C: 你…唉，现在的年轻人，一点耐心都没有。
E: You... *sigh* Young people these days have no patience at all.

C: 用坏了就扔，不好用了就换，这样的思维模式是非常危险的。
E: People get rid of them when broken, and replace them when they start to slow down. It's a very dangerous mindset.

C: 这个……我也说不准。毕竟本琥珀纪，只有她一个人有幸前往丰饶星域。
E: Well... I'm not sure. After all, she's the only lucky one who got to visit the Abundance Segmentum in this Amber Era.

C: 你连波少都不认识？拜托，你不会今天才到空间站吧。还是说之前军团入侵的时候，把你脑袋伤到，导致失忆了？
E: What? You don't know Master Capote? You didn't only arrive today, did you? Or did the Legion break your head during their invasion and gave you amnesia?

C: 我是医疗科的成员乔安。具体负责的工作…或许比医生还杂乱一些。
E: I'm Joanne, a member of the Medical Department... My scope of work... may be even more complicated than the doctors'.

C: 要不我来帮帮忙吧？
E: I can help too!

C: 你们年轻人赶时髦的那些玩意儿，我也平时留心关注着。喏，你看我今天的口红色号，是不是不一般？星际流光系列的最新雾面唇釉，好看吧。
E: I pay attention to all the fashionable things young people do. Just look at my lipstick color. It's quite special, isn't it? It's the latest matte lipstick from the Galaxy Luminous collection. It looks good, right?

C: 不着急，我也要好好想一想。
E: Same. Take your time.

C: 没事做的话就去测试「模拟宇宙」，别带着星核在空间站里乱窜，炸了怎么办。
E: If you don't have anything better to do, go test my Simulated Universe. Quit wandering about the station carrying a Stellaron. People will have to wipe you down everywhere if it explodes.

C: 说吧，想知道什么？
E: Ask me anything!

C: 啊，又见面了，这次是有什么事吗？
E: Oh, we meet again. What can I do for you this time?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have no more questions.

C: 你在这儿忙什么呢？
E: What are you working on here?

C: 你的「管理规划」？
E: Your management plan?

C: 你既然已经见过阮•梅创造的生命体，那想必也能感受到，在她无穷尽的智慧之下，我们无法确定哪些是绝对的规则。
E: After meeting some of Ruan Mei's creations, you should have realized there are no definite rules as to how Ruan Mei uses her boundless intellect.

C: 你要是感兴趣，或者有什么想问的，我会尽量回答你。
E: If you're interested or have any questions, I'll do my best to answer them.

C: 你在这干什么？
E: What are you doing here?

C: 呜！
E: Woo!

C: 我可以拒绝吗？
E: Can I reject it?

C: 小贩有些不情愿地摆放好了盾牌。
E: The merchant reluctantly positions the shield.

C: 卷轴底部绘着一个简单但诡异的图案：一只由树枝构成的眼睛注视着被藤蔓缠绕的神像。
E: A simple but strange pattern is drawn on the base of the scroll: An eye formed of branches staring at a divine statue ensnared in vines.

C: 我们从未见过刻法勒的真身，却笃定它为奥赫玛支撑起了天地；我们不理解欧洛尼斯的话语，却执着相信命定的预言；我们都未经历过死亡，却假定塞纳托斯的存在。
E: We have never seen the true form of Kephale, yet we are certain that they support the world for Okhema. We do not understand the words of Oronyx, yet we stubbornly believe their prophecy. We have never experienced death, yet we assume the existence of Thanatos.

C: （质疑：结论有误。）
E: (Question: The conclusion is flawed.)

C: 半晌，赫卡忒稍稍冷静下来，指了指你手中的卷轴。
E: Hekate later calms down enough to point at the scroll you're holding.

C: 我觉得吧，波瑟芬妮大概率遭了哈德斯的毒手。
E: I think there is a very strong chance that Possephone was killed by Hadez.

C: 你们奥赫玛人玩挺大…
E: You Okhemans really know how to play hardball...

C: 听说她是跟着一群外邦人来到奥赫玛的，父母都在途中走散了…「走散」是委婉的说法。
E: I heard she came to Okhema with a bunch of outlanders, and her parents got "separated" from her along the way... And I'm speaking a euphemism, you understand.

C: 把钱袋给我！
E: Give me my money pouch!

C: 用木箱和其他容器简单围成的小家，希瑞雅长久以来的藏身处。
E: A small, simple home made out of wooden crates and other containers. This has been Serena's hiding place for a long time.

C: 如果这人之前从未来过树庭，我不相信这里错综复杂的结构没有让他产生困惑。
E: If he had never visited the Grove before, I find it hard to believe he wouldn't be baffled by its intricate layout.

C: 或许他开了自动导航？
E: Perhaps he used navigation?

C: 所以，他行凶的方向是……
E: Their path of destruction led...

C: 算了吧。
E: I'll pass.

C: 前天就写完了，但这事吧，哎…说来话长了。
E: I finished it two days back, but y'know... well, it's a long story.

C: 你还有闲心看书？
E: Are you still in the mood to read a book?

C: 什么意思？
E: Why do you ask?

C: 没有，你先把这个理论吃透……
E: No, you have to get to grips with this theory first...

C: …对大地兽说「我爱你」就可以吗？那我很擅长哦。
E: ...Would saying "I love you" to the dromas work? I'm pretty good at that.

C: 列队！齐步跑！紧跟殿下的步伐！
E: Line up! March in step! Keep pace with His Highness!

C: 不行！今天谁都不许离开！我要残酷的命运血债血偿！
E: No! No one is leaving today! I want the cruel fate to pay my debts with blood!

C: 以塔兰顿之名，我发誓…
E: In the name of Talanton, I solemnly swear...

C: 好呀！我不认得路，要麻烦{F#女士}{M#先生}你带路啦。
E: Great! I don't know the way, so please lead on, {F#miss}{M#mister}.

C: 啊，对哦，谦逊也是重要的美德呢！要是过会儿，刻法勒能亲自告诉我一些答案就好啦……
E: Ah, you're right — humility is an important virtue, too! If only Kephale could personally give me some answers soon...

C: 你这么做，有什么理由吗？
E: So... why'd you do it?

C: 现在我居高临下，如果您能把怪物们引到这里，我就可以用货箱把它们砸晕。
E: Now that I'm in a high position, if you can lure the monsters here, I can use the cargo box to knock them out.

C: 为了捍卫竞技场英雄的荣耀，短暂的沉思后，柯库翁冲了出去。
E: To defend the honor of the arena hero, after a brief moment of contemplation, Glykon charged out.

C: 再创世不是用来任性的啊！
E: Era Nova is not meant for recklessness!

C: 你是？
E: And you are?

C: 去黎明云崖转一圈看看吧。
E: Let's case Dawncloud first.

C: （去他说的地方找找吧，说不定还能帮上卫兵们的忙……）
E: (Go to the place he talked about. Maybe you can lend the guards a hand even...)

C: 然后用你的谎言，亲自完成孩子们、也是斐第斯最后的心愿。
E: And then you use your lies to complete the children and Phedes's final wish.

C: 都说了我没骗人，你们祈祷吧！先说好，要虔诚，心怀信仰…天父一定会像当时回应我那样，认真地回应你们的心愿。对吧，守卫叔叔？
E: Told you I wasn't lying! Go ahead and pray now! Oh, and you have to do it with piety and devoted faith... The sky father will definitely respond to your wishes as genuinely as he did mine. Ain't that right, Mr. Guard?

C: 保持沉默。
E: Remain silent.

C: 谢谢你{F#女士}{M#先生}，相信我们也会在「再创世」再相见的！
E: Thank you, {F#young madam}{M#young sir}. We'll meet again in the Era Nova!

C: 如今，风已有归处。不只是她，还有塞涅卡、拉比努斯…一路走来，他们都太辛苦了。
E: Now, the wind has found her place. Not just her, but Seneca, Labienus too... they've all been through so much on this journey.

C: 再见，曳石爵。
E: Farewell, Dux Helkolithist.

C: 「变幻波光的化身啊——我向您倾诉，请择清忆为实，赐人们的杯中蜜酿满溢——」
E: "O embodiment of the shimmering tides, hear my call. Turn their memories into honey brew and bless this gathering with cups that never run dry—"

C: 啊啊，感谢您，海瑟音大人…我们成功了，救世主阁下。
E: Oh, blessed be Lady Hysilens! We've done it, Great Deliverer.

C: 我觉得还是有区别的…
E: I think there's a difference...

C: 所以在登上列车的那一刻，我就迫不及待调整至休假模式，全力睁大眼睛，寻找下一个论文选题。
E: That's why I went into vacation mode the second I boarded the Express — thesis topics don't unearth themselves y'know.

C: 答案是他们还想赚普通合成机的钱~
E: Well, why make "omni" money when you can make ordinary money first~?

C: 呵呵…你还是这么热心。只是……
E: Haha, kind-hearted as usual. It's just...

C: 那…我恐怕也没有踏上旅途的必要了吧。
E: ...then perhaps there won't be any reason for me to go on the journey with you after all.

C: 唔…星琼是什么？克拉拉好像没听过这个名字……
E: Huh? Stellar Jade? What's that?

C: 嗯…感觉不错啊。听起来像是什么老牌乐队的巡演开场曲……
E: Hmm... not bad. Sounds like something one of those old bands would play at the beginning of their sets...

C: 我几乎都不睡觉…
E: I hardly ever sleep...

C: 在众多俱乐部天才里，以利亚萨拉斯算是个异类。他不愿意人为增寿，活了一百零三岁就去世了。据说他至少有一百种延长生命的办法，但他就是不用。
E: Out of the many members of the Genius Society, you could say Elias Salas was... different. He didn't want to extend his lifespan, and so passed away at the age of <unbreak>103</unbreak>. It's estimated he had at least a hundred different methods for prolonging life, yet he chose not to use them.

C: 这怎么好意思…
E: I really shouldn't...

C: 一些薄礼，聊表谢意……
E: A few meager gifts as tokens of my appreciation...

C: 但最后是星核猎手先找到了我——或者说，是我找到了他们。用艾利欧的话讲，这就是「命运」。
E: But in the end, it was the Stellaron Hunters who found me first — or rather, it was I who found them. In Elio's words, this is called destiny.

C: 啊，说得我自己都饿了……
E: Even speaking about all this is making me hungry...

C: 今天做个好梦吧。
E: I wish you pleasant dreams this evening.

C: 比如列车的构造之类的，但他都回答得好简洁……
E: I asked all about what the Express was made of, but his answers were super short.

C: 你在写什么报告书？
E: What report are you writing?

C: 伯纳德你认识吧？就是地概科那个倔老头，一看就不好惹， 眉毛比眼睛都有精神的那个。
E: You know Bernard, don't you? The stubborn old guy from the Department of Cosmic Geography who doesn't look very approachable. His eyebrows are fiercer than his eyes.

C: 有洛奇的下落了吗？
E: Any news about Rocky's whereabouts?

C: 谢谢你邀请我登上列车。我就自己随意转转吧，不用劳您大驾专门陪我了。
E: Thank you for inviting me to board the Express. I'll take a look around on my own. You don't have to accompany me.

C: 到时候可一定不要拒绝我哦，说好了。
E: Don't turn me down when the time comes, okay?

C: …不行，完全没有头绪。我的笔记里好像也没有类似的记录……
E: ...Nope. I'm completely lost. And my records aren't helping...

C: …给你。
E: ...Here.

C: 还有…呃，我发现，列车长给的盒饭里总会掺些奇奇怪怪的蔬菜…不知道，反正我是吃不惯。
E: And, uhh... it seems like the conductor likes to include these weird vegetables in the lunches... I don't know what they are, but I don't like them.

C: 我也希望有。
E: I wish there was one.

C: …就是没有的意思？这可不行啊……
E: ...So you don't have one? That won't do...

C: 原来车厢里面长这样~
E: So this is what the inside of the Astral Express looks like...

C: 我从来不喝这玩意。
E: I never drink that stuff.

C: 里面记录的内容给了我很大的冲击…贝洛伯格的很多筑城者都认为，世界上只有克里珀一位神明——很显然，他们的结论是片面的。
E: What I saw surprised me... A good number of the Architects in Belobog believe that Qlipoth is the one and only Aeon... It's clear that their conclusion was limited and lacking in perspective.

C: 原来这个宇宙间真的有那么多伟大且神秘的存在…和祂们相比，我们真的如雪花般脆弱、渺小。
E: I didn't know there were so many great and mysterious beings in the universe... It goes to show just how tiny and fragile we really are.

C: 应该是前者。
E: Probably the former.

C: 你说的这些，我都不吃。
E: I don't like either of those.

C: 果真是百闻不如一见。列车比神策府有趣多了。
E: Some things must be seen to be believed. The Express is so much more interesting than the Seat of Divine Foresight...

C: 雪衣大人勾摄镇伏要犯，执行机要任务；寒鸦大人梦占因果罪愆，书写业报判罚…但是我呢，我是害怕岁阳却要抓捕岁阳的胆小鬼……
E: Madam Xueyi catches criminals and executes secret missions. Madam Hanya uses dreams to predict karmic offenses and write judgements... but what about me? I'm just a scaredy-cat who's afraid of heliobi... and yet it's my job to catch them...

C: 下次如果有空当，要回家乡看看父亲才是。
E: When I get a moment's respite, I ought to make a trip home to check on my father.

C: 可惜「开拓」的星神阿基维利陨落了，「开拓」的旅途也受到了阻塞。
E: It's a shame that the fall of Akivili has obstructed many Trailblazing paths.

C: 秘密~还好我跑得快，要是再晚一点，你就看不到我准备的烟花了。
E: It's a secret — and it's a good thing I got here so fast, otherwise you would have missed the fireworks I prepared.

C: 那后来呢，你们没有同行吗？
E: What happened later? Did you not travel together?

C: 看来绒球的魅力仅能保存八个系统时，我为此深感遗憾。
E: Looks like the fluff ball's charm only lasts eight system hours. I'm deeply saddened.

C: 类似赛车？
E: Is it like car racing?

C: 它说我剑技超群，我说它冠绝古今。也算是…十分认可彼此了，对吧！
E: He says my swordsmanship is outstanding, and I think he's a master both in the past and present. So you could say we completely approve of each other now!

C: 好香的味道！
E: That smells so good!

C: 我也不知道。
E: I have no idea.

C: 师父别担心，我来监督她！
E: Master, don't worry, I'll supervise her!

C: 人的过往与记忆，还真是复杂呢。
E: People's memories and pasts are complicated indeed.

C: 一个超大的惊喜！
E: A massive surprise!

C: 已经…不会再爱了。
E: I'll never... love again.

C: 是她，是她抛弃了我们…我们的心也随她而去了。
E: It's her. She's the one who left us... and took our hearts with her.

C: 你们该不会都有什么隐藏的天赋吧？
E: Don't tell me you all have some kind of hidden talent?

C: 当初阮•梅女士创造我们时，用的一定是同一袋面粉。
E: Miss Ruan Mei must've used the same bag of flour when she was creating us.

C: 有意思，没想到我居然有机会认识莱姆士汀家族…
E: Interesting. I didn't expect to meet a Limestein...

C: 你说…外面的世界，是什么样的呢？
E: So... the outside world. What do you think it's like?

C: 我前几天花了点小钱——啊，也就是几个古董花瓶的价格——托人搞到了下层区的机械宠物。可惜吧…组装完之后，也就那么回事。
E: A few days ago, I spent a small sum of money — as much as the price of a few antique vases. I requested for someone to fetch a mech-pet from the Underworld. Unfortunately... once it was assembled, it was nothing special.

C: {F#是长得太美了的意思吗？}{M#是长得太帅了的意思吗？}
E: {F#Do you mean I'm very pretty?}{M#Do you mean I'm very handsome?}

C: 这套书在市面上可买不到，但是非常有意思的动物学科普读物哦。这两本书就送你啦，有空的时候翻翻看吧。
E: These interesting books on zoological science can't be found on the market. So, here, take these two books. Read them when you have the time.

C: 市政厅还给我发了一些户外用具——我准备之后去考察下野生动植物的生存环境，然后把它们记录成册！
E: The Town Hall gave me some outdoor gear. Once my preparations are complete, I'll go and investigate the habitat of the wild flora and fauna out there. I'm going to record them to make a manual.

C: 话只能说到这个份上了，你回去再好好想想，别做会让自己后悔的决定！
E: I've probably said enough. Anyway, think about my proposal. Don't make a decision that you will someday regret.

C: 那你都创作了什么文字？
E: What do you write then?

C: 什么案子才算大？
E: What kind of cases do you consider important?

C: 你说得对，我也觉得没戏。也许这亚历珊德拉广场就是我的归宿吧……
E: You're right. There's no way it'll work out. Maybe Alexandra Plaza is just where I belong...

C: 您想知道？
E: You want to know?

C: 你不喜欢「地火」？
E: You don't like Wildfire?

C: 你这是当调查记者还是商业间谍啊？问得这么仔细…不过我信得过你，毕竟你是救了我们矿区的恩人。
E: Are you an investigative reporter, or is this commercial espionage!? All these detailed questions... But I know I can trust you — after all, you're the generous soul one who saved our mine.

C: 我这儿就缺你这种人才，怎么样，有没有兴趣跟我签约，成为本赛季的常驻拳手？
E: I need people like you here. Do you want to join the club and be a resident boxer for this season?

C: 才没有啦，嘿嘿……
E: Not really... Hehe...

C: 呃、呃，苔藓晒干以后用法和熏香差不多，就点燃了烧一下，闻闻味道——
E: Well... um... dried moss is similar to incense. You burn it and enjoy the scent...

C: 最近过得怎么样？
E: How have things been?

C: 只要你别被原来的名字吓跑就行…哈哈哈。
E: Don't get scared away by its original name... Hahaha.

C: 没想到啊，这位歌德可是个大能人，居然在行政区最豪华的地段拿下了商铺！所以，上层区的「歌德宾馆」就是这么来的。
E: That Goethe must be very talented to be able to buy a shop in the busiest area of the Administrative District! That's how the Goethe Hotel in the Overworld was started.

C: 不过自从上下层区封锁之后，我们就再也没聚过了。这都过去多少年了呢……
E: But we haven't been able to get together since the Overworld and the Underworld were blocked. It's been many years...

C: 我叫巴列维，是古代遗物鉴定的专家，这里认识我的人都叫我「矿灯」。幸会幸会。
E: My name is Balaway. I am an expert in relic appraisal. People all call me Miner's Lamp. Nice to meet you.

C: 最近？我正打算去上层区找点兼职呢，嘿嘿。
E: Well, I plan to look for some part-time jobs in the Overworld, hehe.

C: 接下来有什么计划？
E: What plans do you have next?

C: 说来奇怪，有关那场战斗的细节我已经记不太清了。我只记得你被那个女人的武器贯穿，然后又神奇地站了起来……
E: Weirdly enough, I can't remember any details from that fight. I just remember you getting impaled by that woman's weapon, and then miraculously getting straight up again...

C: 啊…是「外来者」{NICKNAME}{F#姐姐}{M#哥哥}！欢迎来到机械聚落……
E: Ah... It's the outsider, {F#Miss}{M#Mister} {NICKNAME}! Welcome to the Robot Settlement...

C: 嘿嘿，这是克拉拉应该做的。
E: Heehee, all in a day's work.

C: 公司的事已经解决了。
E: The problem with the IPC is taken care of.
Hmm...

C: 要叫我漆黑的虎克大人！
E: You will call me Pitch-Dark Hook the Great!

C: 不过，除了禁止鼹鼠党搞大探险，娜塔莎姐姐对虎克还是很好的。每次烧洞螈肉的时候，她都会特意给虎克多夹一点呢！
E: Though, besides barring us from adventures, Natasha's pretty good to me too. When she's roasting olm meat, she'll always give me bigger portions!

C: 哦？这么说，你是特地来跟我聊天的？哈哈哈，当然没问题！我就喜欢跟年轻人沟通。
E: Oh? You've really come to just chat with me? Hahaha, fire away! I like talking to young people.

C: 下雪的国度，车轮在辗转，时代将完成它最后的清算
E: The wheels they keep are turning in the snow nation. Our era will complete its reconciliation.

C: 嘿，亲爱的——你最近可有听说？
E: Yeah, baby — have you heard the news?

C: 怎么样，要不要上台切磋切磋？
E: How about a friendly spar! What do you say?

C: 老实说，我不太喜欢他搞的那套规矩，拳手经纪人什么的…我觉得没必要，太浮夸了。我只想靠自己的实力说话，其它的一概不感兴趣。
E: To be frank, I'm not a fan of his rules, especially the ones about agents and all that... I prefer to focus on my own strength and abilities and not worry about all the fancy stuff.

C: 回见，卢卡。
E: Until next time, Luka.

C: 怎么说呢...
E: How should I put it...

C: 您是指「星际决胜庆典」的运营吗？那我还是非常乐在其中的。
E: You mean working as an operator for the Interastral Tournament Festival? Yeah, I do enjoy it.

C: 扑满试图引起你的注意，它好卖力，你好无情。
E: The Trotter is trying to get your attention. It's working so hard, and you're cold as ice.

C: 咱买票了吗？
E: Have we bought our tickets?

C: 那都是传言…我还听说他找着门路去上层区享受了呢。
E: That's just a rumor... I heard that he hustled his way up to the Overworld and is living his best life.

C: 我好像也听过这个说法。他们说有个蓝色头发的手眼通天……
E: I heard the same thing, too. They say there's this blue-haired guy who can do anything...

C: 妈妈，「牛奶」是什么？
E: Mom, what's "milk"?

C: 这诗写得真有文采。
E: This poem is beautifully crafted.

C: 三十二、三十三……
E: Thirty-two, thirty-three...

C: 要不先跟克拉拉商量……
E: Should I discuss with Clara first...

C: 我知道，那只扑满…
E: Yeah, that Trotter...

C: 我是佩拉小姐派来帮忙的。
E: Pela sent me to help.

C: 不打扰你了。
E: I'll leave you to it.

C: 呜，{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}，阿丽娜真的不能收下你的礼物！阿丽娜现在可是志愿导览员……
E: *sniffle* {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, I can't take your gifts! I'm a volunteer tour guide right now...

C: 你确信自己曾经与这位把狡猾写在脸上的小孩子打过照面，但你不确定她有没有意识到自己现在是博物馆的志愿导览员。
E: You're sure you've met this little kid who has craftiness written all over her face, but you're not sure if she realizes that you're now a volunteer tour guide at the museum.

C: 别说话，专心看展览。
E: Hush now, pay attention to the exhibits.

C: 建木又长起来了…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor is growing again...

C: 我这家陈机铺主营的业务，主要是贩卖二手货、修理旧物还有收购古董。但是仙舟人嘛，一个个都活得老长了，对旧物没什么兴趣，也不觉得有什么值得修理……
E: The Oldies Depot mainly buys and sells second-hand appliances, fixes up old stuff, and buys antiques. But Xianzhou people live so long that they have no interest in anything old, let alone bothering to fix anything...

C: 你喜欢旅游吗？我挺喜欢旅游的。在办了一大堆的破手续后，我去过一个仙舟外的旅游胜地，叫伊须磨洲。
E: Do you like traveling? I do. I got through all the paperwork and went to this tourist resort off Xianzhou called Insumousu.

C: 建木不再生长了…
E: The Ambrosial Arbor has stopped growing...

C: 你现在还写诗吗？
E: Do you still write poems now?

C: 我会说自己是蘑菇。
E: I'd call myself a mushroom.

C: 有时候我也会想，地衡司执事的工作是不是耽误了人家姑娘的大好前程。不过，事到如今我也说不出口，这地衡司公廨已经少不了她了。
E: Sometimes I even wonder whether this work at the Realm-Keeping Commission is hindering her future career prospects. But I've never actually said it out loud, and she's become an indispensable part of the Chancery.

C: 当然了！不然还能是什么？
E: Of course! What else could there be?

C: 哟，您问这个啊。那我得想想……
E: Oh, that's a great question. Let me think...

C: 但作为策士，清晰地认识自我也很重要。论用智，我们不如景元，尽可能帮到他，便是我们工作的意义。
E: But as a counselor, it's important to have a clear understanding about yourself. We're no match for Jing Yuan's intellect, but we help him out as much as we can and derive great meaning from this work.

C: 这个疙瘩在我心里积郁多时，想问将军却又怕唐突。但有一天，将军却开口问我，为何每日值守时愁眉不展。
E: This used to fester inside of me for quite some time. I meant to ask the general himself about it but was scared I'd offend him. Until one day, the general himself asked me why I always seemed so down at work.

C: 你们姐弟俩关系太好了吧…
E: You two have a great sibling bond between you...

C: 老姐你也没当成飞行士啊！你这不是文职人员吗！
E: C'mon sis, you never became a pilot either — you're a civil servant!

C: 人们都说，十王好过，书吏难缠～让我看看，今天又有谁阳寿已尽～
E: Everyone always says: "The Ten Lords have it easy. It's the scribes that are hard to deal with~" Let's see who has expired their wakespan today~

C: 太卜司最重要的日常工作，就是观察这些环境变化，收集信息，计算事件发生的概率，提出应对之策。
E: The Divination Commission's most important day-to-day work is observing these changing phenomena, gathering information, calculating the probabilities of certain occurrences, and proposing contingencies.

C: {F#好妹妹}{M#好兄弟}，找我是有什么想聊的吗？工作免谈啊。
E: How's it going, {F#miss}{M#man}? Got anything you'd like to talk about? Anything but work!

C: 不过嘛…让他们俩打一打倒也是好事。每次他们俩陷入这种竞争，两人的报价都会一降再降。
E: Nevertheless... It's great that there's competition between the two. Every time the two of them get into this kind of trade war, their prices drop like crazy.

C: 另外，我感觉…只是我感觉啊，仙舟人对时间的感受有一些问题。
E: Also, I just feel... It's just a feeling I've got that Xianzhou people have an unusual conception of time.

C: 所以他想压价钱，我也奉陪。我还会比他更早拿到天舶司的批文，让他看看正经的行商都是怎么做的。
E: So if he wants to lower the price, I shall accompany him down. I'll get my documents from the Sky-Faring Commission approved before he does, too. That'll show him how a serious merchant gets business done.

C: 哈哈～我小时候参加选秀节目时，节目组确实就用的是「人肉录像机」这个称号。
E: Haha! I participated in a talent show as a child. The crew of that show did give me the title of "biological recorder."

C: 你这业务范围挺广啊？
E: Your scope of operations sounds pretty broad, huh?

C: 有什么内幕消息吗？
E: Do you have the lowdown on the situation?

C: 听说有持明族不服管制。
E: Speaking of which, I've heard there are some Vidyadhara who refuse to comply?

C: 强求那些富贵做什么，出来贩药，迟早要还的…我只想做个普通的…哎……
E: Pursuing greed in medicine will eventually come back to bite you, sooner or later... I just want to live out an ordinary life... *Sigh*...

C: 鳞渊境是什么地方？
E: What kind of place is Scalegorge Waterscape?

C: 先不打扰你了。
E: I'll stop bothering you for now.

C: 成嘞，咱就喜欢好说话的客人。
E: Alright! I love customers who are open to new things.

C: 毕竟咱也不是丹鼎司的医士，说不出个一二三四五。但是咱听说，这些药材在仙舟外也大受欢迎，不知道是真的假的。
E: I'm no Alchemy Commission doctor or anything, and barely know the basics. But still, I hear this medicine is really popular beyond Xianzhou. Though I can't vouch for whether that's true or not.

C: 最后我终于混够了资历，发够了论文，回到丹鼎司总部等着升迁。结果还没过几个月呢…您猜怎么着？丹鼎司造反啦！都加入那什么「药王秘传」啦！
E: After I had finally gained enough experience and published enough articles, I came back to headquarters, waiting to be promoted. Guess what happened just months after my return? The Alchemy Commission revolted and joined the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus!

C: 你多保重，再见。
E: Take care and goodbye.

C: 那我恭喜你啊。
E: Congratulations!

C: 至于这玩意从哪来的…可能是狱卒们废弃的吧，反正我找到的时候它已经破成一坨废铁了，为了修好它废了不少力气。
E: As for where I got this thing from... I imagine one of the prison guards chucked it out. Either way, when I found it, it was just a pile of scrap metal. I had to put a lot of work into fixing it.

C: 若月后来也因为各种原因离开了这里，她说自己满足于现在的生活，哎，我不知道这话里有几分真心。
E: Later, Ruoyue left the Commission due to various reasons. She said she was satisfied with her current life, but I'm not sure she meant it.

C: 还得是他们工造司项目多、收入高，随便搞个发明就能躺在专利费上舒舒服服地混上几十年，这不比太卜司好多了？
E: Those at the Artisanship Commission handle lots of projects and are paid well. With just one invention, they can live off the royalties for decades. Isn't it much better than the job at the Divination Commission?

C: 说不定离开这里也是一桩好事。
E: Perhaps, it's a good thing to leave here.

C: 你都在哪儿放生？
E: Where do you usually release things?

C: 毕竟我妈从小就教育我，男孩子出门在外要多注意，要做个干净的男人！
E: After, my mother had taught me as a boy that males need to pay particular attention to maintaining our virtue in the adult world, and try to keep ourselves pure from the inside out!

C: 当然啦，这只是咱个人的坚持。咱们尚滋味还是什么食材都肯提供的哈，请您不必担心。
E: Of course, that's just my personal mantra. The Spices Supreme serves everything. Don't worry.

C: 客人要是有所担心，可以不作言语，我没有挖掘客人秘密的嗜好。
E: If my words don't reassure you, please feel free to stay silent. As I said, I have no interest in prying into the souls of my customers.

C: 原来是这样，我明白了。看得出来，您这样浪漫的客人与容易凭空摔倒的女孩总会很熟悉。
E: So that's how it is. I can see a romantic customer like you getting acquainted with a girl who tends to fall down for no reason.

C: 信不信由您了。
E: It's up to you to believe it or not.

C: …请问一下，您能从刚才的演奏中收获平静吗？
E: ...May I ask you a question? Did my performance soothe your mind?

C: {NICKNAME}大人，别来无恙。您再度造访幽囚狱，是有什么事情要办吗？
E: Good day, {NICKNAME}. I trust you've been well? What brings you here again to The Shackling Prison? Official business?

C: 你要是闲来无事，可以来我这逛逛，放心，我不是要急着推销。
E: Feel free to look around here. Don't worry, I'm not in a haste to sell my fandangles.

C: 最初我自己做了一些牙膏，阿合马从里面看到了商机，就索性拉我入伙了。
E: All I made in the beginning was toothpaste, but when Arma noticed what I did, he spotted a business opportunity and roped me into his venture.

C: 你这家伙很会洞察人心嘛～当然不是了。人活一世，总要保留点梦想，对吧？
E: You're perceptive, aren't you? Well, the answer is no. Since we only have one life to live, we shouldn't give up our hopes and dreams so easily, don't you think?

C: 嘿嘿～阿合马铁窗集团竭诚为您服务～
E: Hehe, the Arma Correctional Group is glad to be of service!

C: 联盟的态度很快就会来到罗浮，只是现在无可奉告。
E: We'll know about their attitude soon enough, but I do not have anything at the moment.

C: 想问你些事。
E: I would like to ask you some questions.

C: 嗯…请问吧。只要不涉及机密，我都尽可能回答你。
E: ...Please go ahead. I'll try my best to answer you, as long as it doesn't touch upon confidential matters.

C: 你不想做将军吗？
E: Do you aspire to be the general?

C: 你还在寻找停云吗？
E: Are you still looking for Tingyun?

C: 言归正传，汝到吾这里来，是有事相商吗？
E: Joking aside, why have you come here today? Is there something you wish to discuss?

C: 可惜现在还没有演出安排，你要想看杂技可能要失望了。不过小桂子可以跟你聊会天～
E: Unfortunately we have no performances scheduled, if you want to see an acrobatics show, I'm afraid we'll have to let you down. Although, I can talk with you for a while if you like~

C: 嗯，十王司将这偃息馆用作临时办公地点是有些时日了。我已经下意识把这里当成是上班地点了，要我说，这里的工作环境比之幽府还是宽敞多了……
E: Yes. The Ten-Lords Commission has been using this Pavilion of Cessation as a temporary office for some time. I've started thinking of it as my workplace. If you ask me, the work environment here is much more spacious than in the Netherworld...

C: …欸，找我有什么事吗？
E: Is there anything you need?

C: 你一直在十王司工作吗？
E: Have you been working at the Ten-Lords Commission for a long time?

C: 「十恶」是什么？
E: What are the Ten Sins?

C: 简而言之：接引魔阴身、处理恶性犯罪、管理生死秩序。
E: In short, it guides those who succumbed to mara, deals with vicious criminals, and manages the order of life and death.

C: 请说！
E: Do tell!

C: 十王圣断，业报恒常。
E: The Ten-Lords' Verdict of Karmic Atonement.

C: （关于十王司的工作）
E: (About the work at Ten-Lords Commission)

C: 是啊！不过亲亲的消息好像有点滞后呢，建木已经静止下来了哦，这可是官方最新消息。
E: Exactly! But I'm afraid that's old news, darling. According to the latest official update, the Ambrosial Arbor has already stopped growing.

C: 想要置换一些宝贝。
E: There may be a few things.

C: 有的有的，这位「招财猫尊」快过了当期，无人交当。
E: Of course! This Supreme Fortune Cat is about to reach its maturity date, and no one has redeemed it.

C: 既然是客人要求，那我就讲一段「无罅飞光」的故事。
E: If the customer wishes for it, then allow me to regale you with a tale from the Transcendent Flash.

C: 咱们得说到那一年云骑征兵日，校兵场上人头攒动。云骑士兵将场地中央的擂台围了个里三层、外三层，可以说是水泄不通。
E: We have to start off with that day of the year when Cloud Knights draft soldiers. The parade square was bustling with movement. Rows upon rows of Cloud Knights Soldiers surrounded a boxing ring in the middle of the square, forming a veritable moat.

C: 茶汤的讲究、饮茶的规矩…样样都是学问，还望老师不吝赐教。
E: Brewing tea, rules of the tea ceremony... it's all knowledge. Please be generous with your tips and tutelage.

C: 留在仙舟遇到什么不顺利了吗？
E: Are things not going well for you on Xianzhou?

C: 再接下来，就是在仙舟上到处逛逛，谋划下次旅行的机会吧。
E: Next up, it's time to walk around Xianzhou and plot my next chance at a voyage.

C: 食不厌精，脍不厌细。仙舟上人活千年，饮食之道上必须这样讲究。
E: No such thing as food too fine, or meat too minced. Those of Xianzhou have lived for a thousand years, we must be meticulous with what goes in our mouths.

C: 建木的事，你应该也知道吧？
E: I suppose you know what has happened to the Ambrosial Arbor?

C: 是{F#本姑娘我}{M#本大爷我}。
E: It is me!

C: 在仙舟，未经天舶司的审核，擅自前往其他世界可是重罪。对你这样的化外民来说可能有些难以理解，你听说过「丰饶之民」对吧？
E: On Xianzhou, leaving for other worlds without the Sky-Faring Commission's permission is a serious crime. It may be hard for you Outworlders to wrap your heads around, but you've heard of the Denizens of Abundance, right?

C: 「鳞渊春茶芽细嫩，炒成后干茶条索紧结，白毫显露，色泽银绿，冲泡之后杯中白云翻滚，清香袭人……」
E: "Whale-Tide Spring buds are tender. Bake-drying results in knotted strips as fine hairs appear with a silvery green hue. Brew to create swirling clouds in your teacup. Its mild fragrance is striking..."

C: 对呀，这里可是九天之境，在这里生活的都是神仙！咦？{F#大姐姐}{M#大哥哥}不是神仙吗？那你一定也是和我一样，来找神仙的吧？
E: Yes, this is the Novenus Empyrea, where all celestials reside! Huh? {F#Big sister}{M#Big brother}, you're not a celestial? Then you must be seeking celestials, just like I am?

C: 好，那你路上小心。之后要是遇到什么适合我的工作，可以介绍给我。要是听到什么长生之秘…你懂的，别独占秘密呀。
E: All right, be careful on your travels. If you find any work I can do, please let me know. If you hear anything about the secret to immortality... you know, don't hog it all.

C: 没关系啦！但是下次不要偷偷靠近春分哦！很吓人的。凌解留下的笔记本上说，她以前是名角儿，有很多坏东西对她居心叵测，千万要小心……
E: That's okay! But next time, don't sneak up on me like that — you freaked me out. Ling Jie's notebook says that she used to be famous, but lots of bad guys harbored ill intentions toward her. So please, be really careful out there...

C: 就是随便聊聊天。
E: It's just a casual chat.

C: 你说凌解是你的前世？
E: This Ling Jie — was that you in a past life?

C: 所以凌解和春分是两个人，凌解就是凌解，春分就是春分！
E: So Ling Jie and I are actually two people. Ling Jie is Ling Jie, and I am me!

C: 拒绝？为什么要拒绝，我真的不理解，他们是在拒绝「存护」的爱！
E: Decline? Why would they decline Preservation?

C: 你来和他们商讨什么？
E: What did you see them about?

C: 不打扰你啦。
