E: I should stop bothering you now.

C: 嘿嘿，其实方法很简单。所谓「天下武功，唯快不破」，追星也一样，只要跑得足够快就行。
E: Hehe, it's actually very simple. As the saying goes, "in the world of martial arts, speed is king." It's the same thing with chasing after your idol. All that matters is being fast enough.

C: 我那时才一百岁开外，不懂事…
E: I was barely a hundred years old back then. I didn't know anything...

C: 仙舟特色美食！
E: A Xianzhou specialty!

C: 特殊时期要加强警备…
E: Society must be protected during special times...

C: 一路保重，注意安全。
E: Take care and stay safe along the way.

C: 都是机密，无可奉告。
E: No comment. I'm not at liberty to say anything.

C: 你想要的通稿、黑稿、水军，我应有尽有……
E: Mass-published press releases, disparaging articles, bots... You name it, I have it.

C: 有没有什么要饭的经验？
E: Do you have any experience in begging?

C: 引擎工程师具体做些什么？
E: What do engine engineers exactly do?

C: 我不是来观赏演武仪典的…
E: I'm not here for the Wardance...

C: 人没事…脑袋有事。
E: By and large, yes. My head, on the other hand...

C: …好了好了，你听得也差不多了，别来烦我了。拜拜！
E: ...That's about it, you've pretty much heard it all. Leave me alone. See ya!

C: 明桴。
E: Regratta.

C: 十王司认定我好像没什么危害性，允许我在这附近溜达溜达。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission determined me to be harmless, so they let me wander around this area.

C: 老子凭什么要做自我介绍？给你们人类惯的，等等，你怎么骂人呢。
E: Why should I do that? You humans are all spoiled brats. Wait, were you cursing me out?

C: …让我品一品，嗯…你的味道有些苦涩，就好像是痛苦回忆而无半点结果——看来你真的不记得我，我就这么没有存在感吗？
E: ...Let me have a taste, um... Your flavor is a little astringent, like you're trying hard to remember but can't recall anything — it seems like you really have no memory of me. Do I really make such a small impression?

C: 所以说，寻常的动手动脚可满足不了我，你可得用点劲狠狠地打我～
E: Which is why ordinary fondling won't ever be able to satisfy my thirst — you have to hit me really, really hard!

C: 先前倒是见到了一位朱明穿着的小姑娘，扛着一柄比她还大的剑呢！不过好可惜啊～那个小姑娘似乎对人家没什么兴趣。
E: I met a little lady in Zhuming garb recently who was carrying a sword that towered over her! It was a pity, though, that she wasn't interested in hitting me.

C: 灵砂大人不会是在谦虚吧？
E: Are you being modest, Master Lingsha?

C: 这棵树都枯萎了几千年…
E: This tree has been withered for thousands of years...

C: 你好好动动脑子！
E: Use your brain.

C: 是呀，怎么上来就劝别人离婚呢。走吧，别理会这蠢货执事了。
E: Yeah, how can you persuade people to get divorced from the get go? Let's leave. Ignore this stupid officer.

C: 参了静斋大人一本。
E: To complain about Jingzhai.

C: 这是跨星企业的本地化。
E: This is the localization of a multi-planetary company.

C: 你说，我们之后会去向何方？
E: Where do you think we will be heading next?

C: 你好，健身武术要了解一下吗？
E: Hi! Interested in fitness and martial arts?

C: 「公司」那边给出的报价你看了吗？我觉得这价格还算厚道。
E: Have you checked IPC's offer? I think it's quite generous.

C: 嗯，她在那儿…总之，过几天吧，过几天爸爸就带你去见她。
E: Yes, she's there... Let's wait for a couple more days, then I'll bring you to her.

C: 以后都不会了…不会了……
E: Never again... Never...

C: 我出门的时候，听见我们家对门的大姐姐哭得好惨哇……
E: When I was heading out, I heard the lady across the street bawling her eyes out...

C: 卡吕普索女士，你肯定知道不少小夏长大后的故事吧？请务必都讲给我听！
E: Ms. Calypso, you must know a lot of stories about Naxy growing up! Please, you absolutely have to tell me all about them!

C: 来，索芙洛尼娅，跟我念，太阳——纺锤——花朵——
E: Come on, Sophronia, repeat after me: Sun, Spindle, Flower—

C: 说说多洛斯侠盗大战扎格列斯？
E: How about that showdown between the Dolos Rogues and Zagreus?

C: 回家的感觉如何？
E: How does it feel to be home?

C: 嗯…只是，我从小孤身长大，前往冥海后，也只身迎送来往灵魂。
E: Mhm... But I grew up alone, and after going to the Sea of Souls, I've been ferrying souls back and forth by myself.

C: 好呀！我会为灰宝准备好茶点的，要常来哦！
E: Great! I'll prepare some snacks and tea for Grayie, so make sure to visit often!

C: 巴特鲁斯知道这个决定吗？
E: Does Bartholos know about this decision?

C: 这囚室缺面镜子！我就算修剪了枝条，也看不到盆景上身的整体效果，哎，真是可惜。
E: That this cell lacks a mirror! Even if I trim the branches, I cannot see the full glory of the bonsai tree. *sigh* It's such a shame.

C: 你很不老实呢，幽府武弁诗琳。
E: You're not being honest at all, Wraith Warden Shilin.

C: 那您高寿。
E: May I ask how old you are, sir?

C: 如有警报，请停留等待二次检查。
E: If there's an alarm, please stay behind for a second inspection.

C: 听说彦卿宝宝这次守擂。
E: Little Yanqing is defending his title.

C: 「机巧鸟剑法」…
E: Cycrane Swordplay...

C: 那我倒要考考你了。
E: Now I want to test you.

C: 在俯瞰幽囚狱之前，需要提醒你——恐高症，又称畏高症。基本症状表现为眩晕、恶心、食欲不振，并使身体失去平衡。换句话说，站在这里的人会变得非常危险。
E: Before you look down at the Shackling Prison, I have to remind you of acrophobia, which is otherwise known as the fear of heights. The basic symptoms include vertigo, nausea, loss of appetite, and loss of balance. In other words, it can be very dangerous for the person standing here.

C: 有机会的话，还是找艘游轮再说这句话吧。
E: If you get the chance, perhaps you should repeat this on a cruise ship.

C: 狮子猿。
E: Lionape.

C: 星历<unbreak>7500</unbreak>年
E: Star Calendar Year <unbreak>7500</unbreak>

C: 先恢复引擎，保持航速！
E: Restart the engine, and maintain cruising speed!

C: 偷懒的人也调整了自己的动作，看来大家都进入状态了。
E: The slacker has fixed up their movements. Looks like everyone is in shape.

C: 托帕总监实力那么强…
E: Director Topaz is so skilled...

C: 他们说要练气得有丹腑。
E: They say you need Core Esse to cultivate your Qi.

C: 我也是第一次听说…
E: It's my first time hearing too...

C: 那肯定是子弹更强…
E: Definitely bullets...

C: 「越古博戏，陡增智力——好玩尽在帝垣琼玉！」
E: "Come and play the ancient game that keeps your mind sharp! Celestial Jade has all the fun games you ever need!"

C: 「鹤运物流，想寄就寄，随时随地都能寄。」——化外民{NICKNAME}。
E: "Heron Express — Mail anything you want anytime, anywhere." — {NICKNAME}, an Outworlder.

C: 巨大的瓷罐，说不定能把你整个装进去。
E: The giant porcelain jar might be large enough to fit your entire body.

C: 比起香炉更像是落地灯，但绝大多数卜者坚称它是一尊香炉。
E: It looks more like a floor lamp than an incense burner, but most diviners insist that it is the latter.

C: 阵基如同从宇宙万事万物中接受信号的接受器，只有通过特定的阵型才能锁定特定的信息阵列。
E: The base terminal functions as a receiver that detects signals from everything in the universe. Only through the use of specific matrices can you locate the strings of information you need.

C: 毕业后包分配吗？
E: Does it include job placement after graduation?

C: 在家睡觉。
E: Sleeping at home.

C: 我才刚嗨起来呢！
E: I'm just getting started!

C: 打开看一下吧！
E: Open it up!

C: ——竟然有人在这箱子里塞满了成打成打散装的刀片！它们差点割伤了你的手。你又发现，箱子的一侧还有一封信：
E: Someone has actually stuffed this box with dozens of loose razors! They almost cut your hand. You also find a letter stuck to the side of the package:

C: 你拨开箱盖，把手伸了进去，掏出一大蓬稿纸。
E: You lift the lid, reach into the package, and take out a large pile of manuscripts.

C: 哦，不…这人还是在卷子上写了些东西的。在意见和建议一栏里充斥着难登大雅之堂却十分地道的仙舟俗语，应试者的激愤之情跃然纸上。
E: Hold on... The respondent did write something on the survey. The suggestion column is filled with indecent yet authentic phrases in the Xianzhou language. The respondent's outrage is well-expressed.

C: 想必丢失假期作业的小孩看见册子失而复得，一定会流下激动的泪水吧。
E: No doubt this child will weep tears of joy after being reunited with their lost homework!

C: 你站哪边？
E: Whose side are you on?

C: 十王司研发了些道具。
E: The Ten-Lords Commission has devised a few... gadgets.

C: 「海珍达兹冰淇淋——梦境的味道，就是这么鲜明。」
E: "Hygen Daaz Ice Cream — This is how distinct the taste of the Dreamscape is."

C: 这橱窗让你回忆起某个童话故事——你不禁开始想象，要是点燃一根火柴、或者捏碎一个梦泡，里面的东西会不会活过来。
E: This display sparks your memory of a fairy tale. You cannot help but imagine — what if you light a match, or crush a dream bubble? Will the things inside come to life?

C: 奢侈品是种奇妙的东西：它们身价高昂，却从不拒绝被人拥有。
E: Luxury goods are truly wonderful. They carry a hefty price tag, but are still willing to be owned by people.

C: 不是所有来宾都能用到这项服务——因为大家在现实里也未必有钱。
E: Not all guests are able to use this service — as not everyone has money in reality.

C: 被气球吊死的钢琴。偶尔还会发出几声沙哑的、不和谐的颤音。
E: A piano lynched by balloons, occasionally emitting raspy, discordant trills.

C: 这架望远镜透出了正对面的苏乐达工厂大楼，清晰无比——总算有个能用的望远镜了。
E: This telescope is functional and provides a clear view into the SoulGlad factory building.

C: …今天是个快乐的日子，我先…敬你们一杯。朋友们，为了健康！
E: ...Today's a joyous day. Let me first... raise my glass to you all. To health, my friends!

C: 平平无奇的储物架。上面没有子弹、火柴、草药…洗手液或是灌装凝胶。
E: An ordinary storage shelf. There are no bullets, matches, herbs on it... nor are there hand sanitizers or filling gel.

C: 指尖大小的一点便蕴含着人的一生。
E: Something the size of a fingertip is enough to contain a life's worth of experiences.

C: 禁止在酒吧内嬉戏打闹。违反者将被罚去清洁地板。
E: No fooling around within the bar premises. Violators will be punished to mop the floor.

C: 嗯，没听过也不奇怪。那不是什么著名的理论，只是一种…流行于评论家群体间的无用技巧罢了。
E: Well, I'm not surprised if you haven't. It's not some famous theory. Just a... useless technique popular among critics.

C: 简而言之，「心灵测绘法」等同于透过作品解读作者本人。不是粗暴地将作品展现出来的价值观套在作者身上，而是从潜意识流露出来的小细节入手进行剖析……
E: In essence, psychological topography is about interpreting the writer's personality through their works. Rather than directly associating the values shown in the works to the writer, we will analyze the subtle details that come from their subconscious...

C: 惠特克爵士面无表情，寒冽的目光穿透了你的脸庞。
E: Sir Whittaker's visage is expressionless, his cold gaze piercing through your face.

C: 不过，你愿意陪我聊天，还对证书感兴趣…唔，就让你轻轻碰一碰吧。
E: But, you're so willing to chat with me, and you're interested in certificates too... I'll let you touch it just a little.

C: 不可能存在完美的事物，绝对有什么地方不对……
E: There's no such thing as a perfect thing. There's always a flaw...

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 那我呢？
E: What about me?

C: 你的手指张开，指尖微微颤抖。很好，你就要触碰到它了。
E: Your hand spreads wide, fingers quivering slightly. Good, you're about to pet it.

C: 你不会再给这只呜呜伯任何捉弄你的机会。趁它还在转圈的时候，你迅速溜走了。
E: You won't give this Wubbaboo another chance to trick you again. You sneak off while it's still spinning around.

C: 不想和你辩了。
E: I don't want to debate you any further.

C: 看看这地方，它哪里还有一点梦想之城的样子？放眼望去，周围尽是些习惯了靡衣偷食的家伙。他们早就忘了「梦想」为何物，来到这里只是为了享乐和纵欲。
E: Just take a look at this place. How exactly is it like a dreamscape anymore? There are people living hand-to-mouth as far as the eye can see. They've long forgotten what "dreaming" actually is, and come here just for pleasure and overindulgence.

C: 唉…其实，我当年并没有想过要做一个裱糊匠。
E: *sigh* I've never actually thought about being a reality fixer-upper before.

C: 训练…道具？
E: Training... props?

C: 到最后，只有不会说话的道具能倾听我的诉说……
E: In the end, only voiceless props will listen to my grumbles...

C: 我父亲是一位智械。他曾是巡海游侠的一员，当年提着两把采矿钻歼灭过一整船的海盗，人送外号「铁皮煞客」。
E: Dad is an Intellitron. He used to be a Galaxy Ranger, who wiped out an entire shipload of pirates with two mining drills. His nickname was "Tin Fury."

C: 广告牌停下动作，像是从酣醉中猛然清醒。
E: The billboard stops moving, as if suddenly awakening from a drunken haze.

C: 这确实是大多数人的印象。与「钟表匠」相关的记录虽少，但他的成就举世皆知，可以说是当下匹诺康尼盛世的最大功臣。
E: That's the impression that most people have. There are very few records on the Watchmaker, but his achievements are known by all. You could say that Penacony's prosperity is mostly thanks to him.

C: 你不是家族成员，不了解这个道理也很正常。我原谅你的失礼。
E: You're not a Family member, so it's only natural you don't understand our ways. I forgive your insolence.

C: 当然，这可没有夸大的成分。家族之所以能把梦境打理得井井有条，就是因为各家系能精诚团结，全无冲突与分歧。
E: Of course. That is not hyperbole. The only reason that The Family was able to make sure the Dreamscape runs in such an orderly manner is due to the various families' earnest unity. We are all without conflict or disagreement.

C: 我不住豪宅、不买豪车，吃穿用度能省就省，家务维修亲力亲为…说实话，我一直过得很辛苦。
E: I don't live in a spacious mansion, I don't buy luxury cars, I scrimp and save on what I eat and wear, and I do my own chores... Honestly, I've been living a harsh life.

C: 或许能哦。
E: Maybe.

C: 阿锡卡的脸上并没有露出任何羞愧的神情。
E: Asika's face shows absolutely no signs of embarrassment.

C: 你会这么说，我并不意外。有机生命大都热衷于歌颂某种并不实际存在的「艺术性」，来掩盖自己在技术上的无能。
E: I'm not surprised that you would say this. The majority of organic lifeforms love to extol and obsess over this "art" that does not even exist, so as to cover up their technological incompetence.

C: 我这话不好听吧？但我这可是真心话！哎…我发自内心希望他们能明白，他们的阿锡卡教授绝不是无法理解他们的「艺术」！
E: I imagine that sounds terrible? But it is my truth! Ah... I truly wish that they will come to understand, it is not that their Professor Asika could never understand their "art"!

C: 你蓦然惊醒，徒留音符与它的造主，继续着他们不知休止的旅途。
E: Abruptly, you awaken, leaving the notes and their creator to continue their eternal journey.

C: 从个人角度出发，我的回答是：每个人都有一杯属于自己的「独家特饮」。
E: Well, I believe each guest has their own "exclusive special drink."

C: 你很喜欢八卦？
E: Do you enjoy gossiping?

C: 但作为护理师，我建议您至少保持每个系统月内至少7小时的现实活动时间。
E: However, as a nurse, I recommend maintaining a minimum of 7 hours of real-world activity time each system month.

C: 算了…既然你都诚心诚意地问了，我也不妨大发慈悲地给你讲讲——
E: Well... What a question, how brazen indeed! I'll answer these questions when I feel the need!

C: 啧，原来你也不懂。不说了，我得找个真正玩过机动球的人来帮忙……
E: Tsk, so you're clueless, too. Well, guess I'll need to find someone who has actually played Roboball to give me a hand...

C: 你为什么叫爱德华医生？
E: Why does everyone call you "Dr. Edward"?

C: 回答您的问题，这个名字是很久之前的一位鸢尾花家系的家主为我起的。据说那位家主非常喜欢电影，「爱德华医生」是他喜欢的电影里的主要角色。
E: About your question, this name was given to me by a certain leader of the Iris Family long ago. He had a great love for movies, and "Dr. Edward" was a prominent character in his favorite film.

C: 啊…那种感觉…它又向我袭来了……
E: Ah... That feeling... It has come at me again...

C: 长枪。
E: Lance.

C: 客人您是在担心画面上的鲱鱼吗？别怕，我们很早就不用这类食材了。
E: Are you bothered by the herring in the picture? Fret not. We've stopped using it a long time ago.

C: 开车而已嘛，我生来就是干这个的。小意思！
E: You want to drive me, don't you? I was born for that. No big deal!

C: 啊？喂喂，这个不是我干的，别怪到我头上。真的，我发誓！
E: Huh? Wait, that's not my doing. I swear!

C: 我是您购买的尊享豪华独轮飞车。很荣幸为您服务。
E: I'm the premium luxury monowheel speedster you purchased. It's my honor to serve you.

C: 冰冰凉凉的感觉包裹了你的舌头，没什么比酸甜可口的冷饮更清爽了。
E: Your tongue is enveloped by an icy sensation. Nothing is more refreshing than a sweet and sour drink served chilled.

C: …因为我不想。
E: ...Because I don't want to.

C: 仓鼠球骑士、哈努兄弟、音符小姐、还有{NICKNAME}…滴答！你们就是钟表小子最珍贵的宝藏，美梦小镇上最可爱的居民！
E: Hamster Ball Knight, Brother Hanu, Miss Note, and you, {NICKNAME}... Tick-tock! You are all my most cherished treasures! The most beloved inhabitants of Dreamville!

C: 回去之后，记得要对同伴展露真心，对生人展现热情，如此便能抵消过错。
E: When you return, you must remember to treat your companions earnestly, to spread kindness to strangers — then can you atone for your mistakes.

C: 谁曾想他被嫉妒占据了头脑，居然在半路截杀了一位来宾，夺取了对方的邀请函……
E: Who knew envy would take over his mind, intercepting and killing a guest on the way, then stealing the victim's invitation...

C: 可以聊聊吗？
E: Are you up for a chat?

C: 我们有过很多很多次争吵。起初他谴责、而我试图辩解，后来我们互不相让，再后来我们之间只剩数不尽的、令人难堪的谩骂。
E: We've argued many, many times. When he condemned me at first, I tried to defend myself. As time went on, neither of us gave in. We just kept hurling insults at each other in the end.

C: 数种情绪在短短一瞬间划过里奥的脸颊。最终，他仿佛大梦初醒般露出了一抹微笑。
E: Several different emotions flicker across Leo's face in a short time. In the end, he breaks into a faint smile as if he's just woken up from a dream.

C: 哦，天呐，天呐…我都错过了些什么！
E: Oh, dear... What have I missed?

C: 下次再见。
E: See you around.

C: 干脆就这样冲上云霄吧，突破天际！
E: Why don't I just soar through the clouds and traverse across the sky like this!

C: 有空再见！
E: See you again soon!

C: 哈努兄弟，最可靠的老大哥，滴答！他不仅带我和汽水先生去钟表餐厅吃大餐，还邀请我们去大剧院听音乐会，滴答！
E: Brother Hanu is my most reliable companion, tick-tock! Not only did he take me and Mr. Soda to Clock Diner for a feast, he even invited us to the Grand Theater for a recital, tick-tock!

C: 刚才你所看到的一切都是瞎掰的，或者说，虚构的历史。匹诺康尼历史上最多曾有过七大家系，由于种种变故形成了如今的五大家系，但根本不存在所谓的「影子家系」。
E: Everything you read just now was nonsense. Or, should I say, a fabricated history. In Penacony's history, the maximum number of Families that have existed is seven, and various changes over time formed the five lineages that we have today. There is no such thing as a "Shadow Family."

C: 梦境给了我们生命，却没有赋予我们对等的地位和自由。人们都将我们视作纯粹的自动演奏工具，没有灵魂，坏了就换，不值得投入任何感情。
E: While the Dreamscape has granted us life, it hasn't granted us any social status or freedom. People view us as mere automated machines, devoid of souls, conveniently replaceable when damaged, and unworthy of emotional attachment.

C: 更何况，酒吧里发生的事我都听说了，遭噩梦侵袭的被遗忘者，和不离不弃的照看者…这样的温柔的故事在哪都会受欢迎的。
E: What's more, I've heard about what happened in this lounge. The forgotten ones plagued by nightmares and the carer that refused to abandon them... A heartwarming story like this would be popular anywhere!

C: 加到六个瓶子！放心，我肯定不会失手。
E: Make it six! No worries, I've got this.

C: 此刻，你眼前的人似乎一下子老了几十岁，深沉而无奈。
E: Just at that moment, the person in front of you seems to have aged several decades. It's as if she were sinking deeper and helpless.

C: 要是他们哪天突发奇想，亲自跑来监工，那可就再好不过啦。我可是巴不得有人来接手这烂摊子……
E: If they suddenly decided to show up on a whim to check in on my progress, that would be even more wonderful. I can't wait to palm this horrid job off to someone else...

C: 你不是超级骇客吗？
E: Aren't you a super hacker?

C: 气死我了，气死我了！为了这么个小节目请了一大帮子执行导演，没想到个顶个的都是关系户，干不了一点活的废物！
E: I'm so angry, just livid! I hired a small army of executive directors just for this little skit. I never thought that they'd all be useless good-for-nothings scratching each other's backs while they do nothing all day!

C: 男人如鲠在喉，再也吐不出半个音节，只兀自大喘着气，像极了报废的鼓风机。
E: The man has become too upset to speak. He is fighting just to get a single syllable out. All he can do is fight for air, like a punctured air pump.

C: 这不是自相矛盾吗？我就觉得他们在骗我…他们肯定在酝酿一个大阴谋！我本打算把这些事情公之于众…可他们竟打算以「疗养」的名义软禁我，还密谋要消除我的记忆！
E: Isn't this just a contradiction? I feel like they're trying to fool me... They must be cooking up some huge conspiracy! I was going to take this information public... But they put me under house arrest in the name of "treatment" and planned to erase my memory!

C: 你是什么人？
E: Who are you?

C: 您慢走。如果遇到了什么恐怖…有趣经历，可以随时分享给我啊！
E: Take care. If you come across any terrifying— interesting experiences, you can always come back and share them with me!

C: 「开拓」之道…呵呵，还真是深奥啊。
E: The way of the Trailblaze... Hah, how profound.

C: 你似乎有些…
E: You seem a little...

C: 期待着那一天的到来。
E: I look forward to that day.

C: 我的付出不值一提，是梦境之中所有人共同的努力才使得这些贫苦的孩子们拥有了受教育的机会。
E: My hard work is nothing really. It is the hard work of everyone in the Dreamscape that has allowed these poor children to receive an opportunity to be educated.

C: 虽然不是忆者，但我也渴望了解忆质的本质，渴望探寻生命所能抵达的深度。
E: I may not be a Memokeeper, but I too am curious to find out more about the nature of memoria and explore the depths to which life can reach.

C: 一定是很多人共同的努力。
E: I'm sure it's a team effort.

C: 哈哈，她的人格魅力如此超群，即便未见其面也能感受到她的活力。
E: Haha! What an outstanding personality she had! You could even sense her energy without meeting her.

C: 你们已经在精神层面沟通过了！
E: You two have communicated on a spiritual level!

C: 遇到迷因的时候，保持情绪的平静有助于延缓迷因的行动，然后就找准时机迅速把自己强制唤醒。要是让某些可怕的迷因缠上了，那可没完没了了。
E: When encountering a meme, maintaining your composure is the key to slowing its actions, and then it's just a matter of seizing the right moment to forcibly jolt yourself awake. There's no way out of its clutches if certain terrifying memes get too familiar with you.

C: 咳咳…最近流梦礁可真热闹，匹诺康尼上一次聚集这么多无名客，还是古老的囚笼时代呢……
E: Ahem... The Dreamflux Reef is really swarming with visitors these days. The last time Penacony saw so many Nameless gathered here was during the old prison days...

C: 听说很多人都是因为意外从美梦那边过来的，你瞧着应该也差不多……
E: I heard lots of people are coming over from the Dreamscapes because of accidents. You look to be the same...

C: 本店是流梦礁的老字号，品种一应俱全。翠丝的面包要说第二，没人敢在流梦礁说第一。
E: We're a vintage Dreamflux Reef brand with everything you could possibly need. If someone says Jessie's bread is only second best, then there is no champion bread in the Dreamflux Reef.

C: 广泛的群众认知，足够充分的执念，再加上一点点来自于神秘的「谎言」…捏个折纸小鸟也不是什么难事。
E: With widespread audience awareness, ample determination, and a hint of Enigmata's lies... making an origami bird isn't such a hard task.

C: 小鸟矜持地叼过你拿出的代币，然后…吃掉了它！
E: The bird gingerly picks up the coin you give it, and... swallows it!

C: 让我想想…对了，<color=#dbc291ff>听说镜子房间里有面特殊的镜子</color>，有个爱美的孩子，想必它肯定不会错过这面镜子啾～
E: Let me think... Oh, that's right, <color=#dbc291ff>I hear the mirror room has a special mirror</color>. We've got a vain child that definitely won't want to miss out on this mirror, tweet!

C: 听起来有点恶心。
E: Sound a little disgusting.

C: 看吧，我的顾客，想怎么看就怎么看~
E: Look away, customer. Look at them any way you want!

C: 亲爱的顾客，玩具产业已经锈迹斑斑了，在这座破工厂坍塌之前，或许我该及时撤离……
E: Dear customer, the toy industry is already reaching its twilight. Perhaps I should evacuate this rundown factory before it collapses...

C: 感谢您的慷慨，我会铭记您的承诺。
E: Thank you for your generosity. I will always remember your promise to me.

C: 她将自己制作成精美的人偶，与一具具同样工艺制成的人偶共同悬吊在半空。
E: She crafted herself into an exquisite puppet and hung in midair, alongside other puppets that had been crafted the exact same way.

C: 他们都说我被污染了…或许吧，但这于我而言大概并不算一件坏事。
E: They all said that I had been corrupted... Perhaps, but this wasn't a bad thing to happen in my eyes.

C: 用我的眼睛…用我的镜头……
E: With my eyes... With my lens...

C: 一个摄影师。
E: A photographer.

C: 不过请容我小小澄清一下，我从未玩弄过他人的感情，至少「洁身自好」这个词，我自诩还是担得起的。
E: However, please allow me to make a small correction: I have never toyed with another person's feelings. Not to brag, but I do believe that I am an honest and upright person.

C: 至于我为什么会站在这里……
E: As for why I'm standing here...

C: 接下来，请您敲定要用哪种食材来进行最终的混音吧。
E: Next, decide which ingredient you'd like to use for the final mixing.

C: 在倒数还没结束时，管状容器中突然亮起了几点荧光，虽然惹眼，但又一闪即逝。
E: Before she can finish her countdown, fluorescent spots light up across the tube-shaped container. They are very bright but quickly fade.

C: 就算公司会支付绝大多数费用，但方案中经过的这些星球，消费水平都有点…吓人了。
E: Although the IPC takes care of most expenses, the cost of living on the planets featured in the package is somewhat... alarming.

C: 让我想想…对了，有个调皮的孩子最喜欢藏起来吓唬人，上次就藏在了<color=#dbc291ff>一堆纸钞</color>里啾~
E: Let me think... Oh right, there's a playful child who loves hiding to give people a scare. Previously, it hid under <color=#dbc291ff>a stack of banknotes</color>, tweet~

C: 你怎么长得跟我一样？
E: Why do you look just like me?

C: 那个…船长，我、我之前在工作上有些疏漏，没有及时处理之前的周边，导致客人原定的零食礼盒发错货了…发成了前任船长的周边。
E: Umm... captain, I—I failed to sort out the previous batch of merchandise in time because I was negligent. A customer received the previous captain's merchandise instead of the snack box they ordered.

C: 我选钟表小子！
E: I'll go with Clockie!

C: 行啊，我喜欢和年轻人聊天，说吧说吧，想让我教你点什么？
E: Sure. I love talking to youngsters. Tell me, what do you want me to teach you?

C: 我没什么想问的了。
E: I have nothing else to ask.

C: 年轻人，听好——音乐这东西，享受别人的成果就好，别把自己给搭进去了。
E: Listen, young one — for something like music, just enjoy what others have produced. Don't sacrifice yourself for it.

C: 行，别太久，我的时间很宝贵。
E: Sure, but let's not drag it out too long. My time is money, after all.

C: 天真的女孩，支撑她的梦想就和她的出身一样单纯，但…我欣赏她的才华。
E: She's just a guileless girl keeping her dream alive with a passion as bare as her background, but... it's her talent that attracted me.

C: 「当本人二十五岁时，已经拥有了长达三十二年的工作经验。」
E: "By the age of <unbreak>25</unbreak>, had already amassed <unbreak>32</unbreak> years of work experience."

C: 但…这里是匹诺康尼，梦境里的人们大多身世显赫，对地位与价值更在乎，也更敏感。
E: But... this is Penacony. The majority of people from the Dreamscape are from notable backgrounds and are far more interested in and wary of status and value.

C: 再讲讲那个老教授吧。
E: Tell me more about this professor.

C: 问我，我都知道！
E: Ask me, I know!

C: 啊，你好，是新来的社员吗？我好像没见过你...噢，看你这打扮，我想起来了——
E: Ah, hello! Are you the new member? I don't think I've met you before... Oh, I recognize that outfit...

C: 顾名思义，主要是搞即兴表演和小品创作的社团，除了现场演出，我们还会不定期地制作一些梦泡，把表演录好去外面售卖，给大家一个沉浸式体验喜剧的机会。
E: As the name suggests, we're a club that mainly puts on improv shows and creates skits. As well as live performances, we also occasionally produce dream bubbles, recording our performances to sell externally and giving people a chance to experience an immersive comedy.

C: 还记得当初满怀热忱地加入喜剧社时，我以为自己找到了人生的归宿。总想着凭一己之力为匹诺康尼带来更多欢声笑语。
E: I remember that, when I first joined the comedy club, my heart was filled with passion. I thought I had found my destiny. I wanted to use my skills to bring more laughter to Penacony.

C: 工程作业已经够多了，还要出去搬砖…从基层做起，这就是筑梦师的生活。每天光是活着就已经很累了，根本没时间去构思脱口秀的内容编排……
E: I'm already buried in engineering homework, then I have to go and do physical construction tasks... Working your way up from the lowest builder is the life of a dreamweaver. Just living in that way is already exhausting. How am I supposed to have time to think up content and jokes for talk shows after all that...

C: 可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
E: Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

C: 你们当时演奏的乐器呢？
E: Where are the instruments you guys used for the show?

C: 能有所成长就是好事。
E: It's good enough as long as she grows.

C: 啊，原来是大佬！你记得我吗？
E: Ah, it's the boss! You remember me?

C: 奸商，退钱！
E: Charlatan! I want my money back!

C: 你父亲他还好吗？
E: Is your father doing well?

C: 嗯呐，有空再聊哦！
E: Mm-hmm, swing by when you've time!

C: 你的成绩怎么样了？
E: How are your grades?

C: 而、而且，比起学习，我现在找到了更重要的事情要做哦。请{NICKNAME}同学期待一下吧……
E: A—And besides studying, I've found something more important to do. Please look forward to it, {NICKNAME}...

C: …呃，您不喜欢这个笑话吗？这是{RUBY_B#虚空万藏}前任主人{RUBY_E#}教给我的，我还以为您会喜欢。
E: ...Uh, you didn't like that one? It was taught to me by my {RUBY_B#Void Archives}previous master{RUBY_E#}. I thought you might enjoy it.

C: 你是把它当作经文一类的典籍了么？这也不算误解，其中有些相关内容，不过是我自行写下的。
E: Did you mistake it for some type of classic text or something? It's not entirely inaccurate, though. I wrote some pages myself.

C: 关于公司…
E: About the IPC...

C: 或许某一天，就会有人找上门来，要我偿还自由的代价。我对此已有预期，也定然不会累及各位。
E: Perhaps one day, someone will find me and ask me to pay the price of freedom. I am ready for that, and I will certainly not be a burden to any of you.

C: 她并不需要我操心…其实我早该承认这点。
E: She can take care of herself... I should have admitted that long ago.

C: 在闹剧中惨死的人偶，吐息结束的最后一刻。
E: A puppet dying tragically in a farce. This is the moment of its last breath.

C: 每当贵宾们需要放松时，就会在这个环形的怀抱中寻找灵感，就像现在你那样。
E: When guests need to relax, they will seek inspiration in this circular embrace, just as you are right now.

C: 纵使无缘黎明，仍会将时光铭记——
E: Even if dawn remains out of reach, time shall still be etched in memory...

C: 亲爱的，你听我解释。
E: Darling, please. I can explain.

C: 老奥帝？那个皮皮西老头？哈，他昨天就来了，不过是来提车的。
E: Old Oti, the ancient Pepeshi fellow? Ha, he already arrived yesterday, but he's here to pick up the car.

C: 麻烦让让！我来拍个照，
E: Excuse me! I need to take a photo.

C: 你喜欢什么口味的？
E: What's your favorite flavor?

C: 你懂什么？不开洞，怎么让苏乐达糖浆像瀑布一样从天而降？
E: What do you know? Without making a hole, how can I let SoulGlad syrup fall from the sky like a waterfall?

C: 时间还够不够了…
E: Is there enough time left...

C: 我也要飞！
E: I want to fly too!

C: 建议你冷静一下。
E: I recommend you to calm down.

C: 显然不是，你看颜色。
E: Of course not. Look at its color.

C: 叫什么名来着？
E: What's its name, by the way?

C: 新款腕表现已面世…
E: The new watch just hit the market...

C: 欢迎到店垂询详情。
E: Please feel free to visit our store for more details.

C: 听说艾迪恩公园不错。
E: I've heard Aideen Park is a great place to go.

C: 梦里哪会饿啊？
E: Come on, how can you be hungry in a dream?

C: 焦虑？这玩意有什么可焦虑的？
E: Body image anxiety? What's there to be anxious about?

C: 难道你做梦也要提醒我给公司卖命吗？
E: Are you trying to remind me to work for IPC, even in my dream?

C: 你■■■到底有没有在听我说话啊！
E: Are you even ■■■■■■■ listening to me!?

C: 呃…冷静…好、我冷静…冷静…呼，好多了……
E: Uh... yeah... I'll chill... Yeah... I'm much better now...

C: 等等等—别说了！你还想不想回去了？！
E: Wait, wait! Stop! NEVER say something like that!

C: 这世界上真的有谁能拒绝毛茸茸吗！反正我不行！
E: Is there anyone in this world that can resist something fluffy like this? I know I can't!

C: 至少这一次，我们要尽情游玩、不留遗憾……
E: At least this time, I will indulge to my heart's content and leave no regrets...

C: 嗯…可能他刚巧有什么事呢，要不再等等？
E: Hmm... Maybe he has something he needs to do, why don't we wait a little longer?

C: 红色的骑士真是可惜了。
E: What a shame for the Red Knight.

C: 你，值得拥有。
E: Because you're worth it.

C: 唉，我期待了这么久的演出居然没了。
E: *sigh* I can't believe the performance I've been looking forward to for so long is gone.

C: 等待会儿下班，咱哥俩一起去撮一顿，我请客！
E: When we're done with work, let's go get dinner! I'm buying!

C: 输给他，我心服口服。
E: I'm blown away by him. I concede.

C: …可是这甲板是防水速干的材质吧，怎么会滑倒呢？
E: ...But this deck is made from wetproof and instant-dry material. How did you slip?

C: 谐乐大典上有一项新增的流程，届时其他流程都要往后挪。
E: The Charmony Festival has a new process in place. The other processes will have to be pushed back then.

C: 立刻生效的那种……
E: The kind that takes effect immediately...

C: 唯有等待……
E: Nothing left to do but to wait...

C: 听说我们领导…
E: I hear our boss...

C: 放心吧，老大！
E: Don't worry, boss!

C: 于是，你决定向梦想发起冲击，哪怕会遭遇无数次失败。你颤巍巍地在申请书上写下「吹奏乐部」几个字，递交给学生会，然后发现……
E: So, you decide to pursue your dream, even if you will be met with countless setbacks. You write down "Concert Band Club" on the request form with trembling hands, submit it to the student council, and later realize...

C: 一台设计十分荒诞的电话机被固定在这里，等待路过的好奇宾客拿起它的听筒。
E: A peculiarly designed telephone is fixed in place, waiting for curious passersby to pick up its receiver.

C: ——然后让您听到对方正在梦到什么！怎么样，是不是很有趣？是不是很心动？
E: ...and let you know what your friend is dreaming about! Isn't it thrilling and fun?

C: 不摸它。
E: Don't pet it.

C: 它说：「遵命！」
E: It says, "At your command!"

C: 你先去忙吧。
E: I'll leave you to your work.

C: 我不怪他，如果瞒着他能让他省份心的话，我宁愿自己辛苦点。
E: I don't blame him. I'd rather work harder on my own if keeping everything a secret makes life easier for him.

C: 这道菜原本的做法极为复杂，至少需要几十道工序。我在保留其主要风味的基础上极大简化了做法，但进餐顺序仍会影响口感…介意我稍稍为您讲解一下吗？
E: Originally, this dish was a complex masterpiece with several dozen steps. I've greatly simplified it while retaining its main flavors, but the order you taste the ingredients in is still crucial... Do you mind if I delve into it?

C: 必然能收获一段独处的时间。
E: It's certain to get a moment of solitude.

C: …我宁愿相信我是被传送来的。
E: ...I'd rather believe I was teleported here.

C: 我猜不透，所以在菜里加水果。大家吃一口菜，吃一口水果。
E: I can't figure them out, so I started adding fruits to dishes. A bite of the meal, then a bite of fruit.

C: 金色的{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}或许嫌贫爱富，但漆黑的{RUBY_B#死亡之泰坦}塞纳托斯{RUBY_E#}会平等地叩响所有房门。
E: The golden {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia{RUBY_E#} might fancy the rich over the poor, but the dark {RUBY_B#Death Titan}Thanatos{RUBY_E#} knocks on every door equally.

C: 「此人将会发现，没有哪个有才智的人（不论是多么有天分的），可以将这些知识表述成仅需一目十行的阅读就可以明白的方式。」
E: "Through this exploration, one will find that no intellectual (regardless of their talent) can articulate such intricate concepts in a manner that can be understood through skim-reading."

C: 可曾听闻圣山之上，最后的城邦\n不朽神明岿然背负，永恒的太阳
E: Have you heard of the last city, on the Holy Mountain high?\nWhere the immortal deity carries the sun across the eternal sky?

C: 唔…那段历史可是相当残酷而混乱呢。那么这首《纷争事纪》献给您——
E: Ah, those were tumultuous times. Enjoy this poem titled Era of Strifes dedicated to you...

C: …白厄比我更合适。
E: ...Phainon is better suited for that than I am.

C: 给我讲些泰坦的故事吧！
E: Tell me about the Titans!

C: 能和我聊聊你的事吗？
E: Can you tell me about yourself?

C: 让我想想...有一次，我们遇到了一群特别可怕的黑潮生物。它们像是某种巨大的水母，但又带着人的面孔。那些面孔...那些面孔看起来非常眼熟。
E: Let me think... One time I came across a group of terrifying black tide creatures. They looked like a kind of giant jellyfish, but they had human faces. Those faces... Those faces looked so familiar to me.

C: 你要是喜欢大地兽，希望你能多来看看它们，它们再怎么反常，表现出来还是很温柔粘人的…而且…说不定哪天它们就恢复正常了呢！
E: If you like dromases, I hope you can come visit them often. No matter how weird they might be, they're still always gentle, cuddly, and... maybe one day they'll make a return to normal!

C: 原来如此，请不要介意。
E: I see. Don't mind me.

C: 我又不小心触发了对话。
E: I accidentally triggered this conversation again.

C: 某种意义上，这也算人类文化自然发展的一部分吧。
E: In a way, this is also a natural part of human cultural development.

C: 你就站在此地，不要走动。
E: Stay here and don't wander around.

C: 潮汐声音重归涣散，语句如水花般破碎——看来这盆水欲壑难填，是位喂不饱的饮客。
E: The tide's voice is languid once more, its words fragmented like water splashes — it seems this basin's desire for liquid is insatiable, an ever-unquenchable patron of ambrosia.

C: 叮，叮，叮。这名身材高大的工匠正在打铁。
E: *ding* *ding* *ding* This tall blacksmith is forging iron.

C: 好的武器，锋利、坚韧…如同巉岩，红土。
E: Sharp and strong, a good weapon is... Like a hard rock, the red earth is.

C: 于是「翻飞基金」就成立了。人们可以给兄弟投一笔利衡币，他们会用来添置抢劫，不是，交流用的设备。最后不管抢到…聊出来什么东西，都会拿去给金主算分成。
E: And so the Whimsy Fund was founded. People could invest Balance Coins in the brethren, and they would use the money to fuel the device for robbery, I mean, communication. No matter what they ro... received through communication, the proceeds would be split with the investor.

C: 搞不好你有法吉娜的血统。
E: Who knows, you might have Phagousa's bloodline.

C: 我们在哪见过吗？
E: I'm sorry, do we know each other?

C: 我倒要看看你怎么掀。
E: I wanna see how you're gonna lift it.

C: 不必了！我记得你，帕西提亚。
E: No need! I remember you, Pasithea.

C: …开玩笑啦，我从没跳过舞。而你呢，一定不要浪费这样好的心境啊。
E: ...I jest. Never danced in my life. And you, you must not squander such a wonderful inner state.

C: 探索奥赫玛里不为人知的秘密，这难道不是令人兴奋的冒险吗？
E: Isn't delving into the unknown secrets of Okhema an exhilarating adventure?

C: …我没懂你的意思。
E: ...I don't understand what you mean.

C: …战士说的话，更有意义。
E: ...Words of warrior, more important.

C: 我想跟你聊聊天。
E: I'd like to chat with you.

C: 一个月，会弄坏一次。好在，不用赔。听说，会有我们专用的。不知道，要多少光历年。
E: Breaks once a month. No repayment required. Heard specialized ones, being made for us. Not known, how many Light Calendar years needed.

C: 我与你恰好相反。「阿卡索斯」不会因为覆灭而消失，我们依旧可以谈论它、怀念它，就好像它仍是个真实存在的城邦似的。
E: I believe precisely the opposite. Icatus does not simply stop existing because it was destroyed. We can still discuss it and reminisce on it as if it were a city that still truly exists.

C: 「阿卡索斯」当然不存在。你这个结论本身就是错误的。
E: Of course "Icatus" does not exist. Your very conclusion is incorrect.

C: 若是「阿卡索斯」真实存在，请问——它到底以什么方式存在？
E: If "Icatus" truly exists, then allow me to ask you... In what form does it exist?

C: （论证：是通过思考得到的。）
E: (Theory: We learn through thinking.)

C: 唉，真是不能细想！算了算了，还是打工要紧——{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}满溢之杯{RUBY_E#}保佑，多来点客人吧，只有落袋为安的工资才能令人安心！
E: Ah, I mustn't think too much! Work is more important right now... Blessed be the {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Chalice of Plenty{RUBY_E#}. Please bring me more customers. Only a stable salary can truly bring comfort!

C: 我借你私人浴池。
E: I'll lend you a private bath.

C: 但再怎么说那也是扎格列斯的物件，听说总有人拿它做些偷鸡摸狗上房掀瓦的事。久了，那东西惹出来的麻烦越来越多，老头子我又无能为力，愁啊。
E: But no matter how you put it, that was an artifact of Zagreus. I heard that some people have been using it for all sorts of sneaky, underhanded deeds — climbing walls, stealing chickens, you name it. Over time, the trouble it caused kept piling up, and here I am, an old man, powerless to do anything about it. It's really troubling.

C: 明明是你挑衅在先，现在还好意思乱发脾气……
E: You were the one who provoked me first, and now you have the nerve to lose your temper...

C: 哈哈，这谁记得清嘛，老师你肯定也不会记得自己吃过多少块面包吧。
E: Haha, who even remembers that? Master, you probably don't remember how many pieces of bread you've eaten either, right?

C: 最近在画什么？
E: What have you been painting lately?

C: 理论上来说，用生命树种还原出来的，理应是那些消失于黑潮之中的古代生物…可如你所见，得到的奇美拉却是全新的物种。
E: In theory, what is restored from the Seed of Life would be ancient creatures that disappeared in the black tide... But as you can see, the chimera we grew is an entirely new lifeform altogether.

C: 啧，行吧，那就全体休息一刻钟，然后再来二十组俯卧撑。
E: Pfft, fine. Take a quint, then finish twenty sets of push-ups!

C: 至于「智种学派」…啧，姑且不论{RUBY_B#「智种学派」贤人}那刻夏{RUBY_E#}那些不敬神的疯言疯语，单就他那张嘴啊…为了你的身心健康着想，还是能离多远离多远吧。
E: As for the Nousporist school... Tsk, ignoring the blasphemous rantings of that {RUBY_B#Nousporist Sage}Anaxa{RUBY_E#} for now, just that yapper of his... For your own health, please stay far, far away from them.

C: 晶体表面的光芒变得暗淡。它静静地漂浮在空中，任你如何敲打都无动于衷。
E: The light on the crystal's surface dims. It floats before you quietly, resistant to any taps or knocks.

C: 真是高手在民间啊。
E: It's true what they say, there are undiscovered geniuses among us.

C: 哎呀呀～之前不是跟你说过了吗～塔米拉小姐被「公司」的经纪人看中，现在离开贝洛伯格去外面发展了。
E: Oh, didn't I tell you? Miss Tamila was discovered by an agent from the IPC and has left Belobog to further her career.

C: 客官真不好意思，这「海的味道」已经下架了，因为核心材料——波月古海的水弄不到了。
E: I'm sorry, guest, "Taste of the Sea" is no longer available as the core ingredient — water from the Lunarescent Depths can't be obtained anymore.

C: …好、好的，我这就……
E: ...O—Okay, I'll just...

C: 翁法罗斯可没有哪条河叫做银河，冥河倒是有。怎么，你在冥河里游过？
E: Everyone in Amphoreus knows that one cannot traverse the sea of stars! The River of Souls is always available, though. Have you tried a dip?

C: 自那以后，妈妈就把家搬到了神殿附近。她总说，既然受过圣女大人的帮助，就应当把她的恩情传下去。
E: My mother decided to move near the temple after that. She always maintained that since she had benefitted from the Holy Maiden's generosity, it was her responsibility to continue spreading that goodness.

C: 圣女总不会浪费吧。
E: The Holy Maiden would never waste anything.

C: 怎会…是圣女大人的客人吗！
E: How could it be... are you a guest of the Holy Maiden?

C: 尽管他未能承载尼卡多利的火种…但这并不意味着他有失资质。
E: Although he could not bear Nikador's Coreflame... that does not mean he lacks the qualifications.

C: 冰冷的死荫…将由我来照亮。
E: I will illuminate the cold shadow of death.

C: …无缺的英雄。时至今日，我仍会如此评价白厄。作为最完美的黄金裔，他注定在逐火之旅中背负沉重的救世使命。
E: ...The perfect hero. To this day, that is still the opinion I have of Phainon. As the most-perfect Chrysos Heir, he is fated to bear the heavy fate of saving the world in the Flame-Chase Journey.

C: 是吗？其实，初次听闻昏光庭院的许多人，也都觉得这只是个美好的梦。
E: Really? Actually, many who first hear about the Twilight Courtyard think it's just a lovely dream, too.

C: 您误会了，我并非是向你索赔，我也不是警告…等等，你是不是因为我在给元老院做事，就暗自将我当成坏人了？
E: Look, I'm not seeking reparations, and I'm not here to threaten you either. Wait, do you think I'm some kind of bad guy just because I work for the Council of Elders?

C: 我的过去啊…要从何说起呢？正如你所知道的，我是米里奥斯人，不是奥赫玛人——不过我定居奥赫玛的起因，可能和大部分外地人不太一样。
E: My experiences, huh... Where should I begin? As you can see, I'm a native of Milios, not Okhema. But the reason I settled here might be quite different from most outsiders.

C: …可以这么说。
E: ...You could put it that way.

C: 你放心，我不会瞎误会了。你来找我，单纯是为了聊天对吧？
E: Don't worry, I understand now. You're just here for a simple chat, right?

C: 你知道吗？这其中最引人瞩目的就是掷铁饼！而我，是三届掷铁饼冠军！
E: And you know what? Discus throw is the most eye-catching event of all! And yours truly is the three-peat discus throw champion!

C: *临终遗言*，出自最接近死亡之人。生者与逝者的身份，就在这只言片语中交汇——像是那*临终遗言*带着死亡的分量，让微妙平衡的生命天平最终倒向一侧。
E: Last words are from those closest to death. In this fleeting phrase, the identities of the living and the deceased converge — as if the weight of these words would tip the delicate balance of the scale of life irrevocably toward one side.

C: 我对*临终遗言*很感兴趣。
E: I'm interested in some last words.

C: 讲讲不同城邦的主人…
E: The rulers of the different city-states...

C: …我记得，还有一位君王临终前只说了一句「水」。
E: ...I remember one of the rulers only said "Water" before dying.

C: 讲讲寂寂无名的平民…
E: The nameless commoners...

C: 我叫涅柔娅，是名再普通不过的祭司，承蒙{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}眷顾，愿为信众尽些绵薄之力。
E: I'm Nereia, just an ordinary priest. By the grace of {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#}, I strive to offer whatever small comfort I can to the faithful.

C: 再见，年轻人，愿{RUBY_B#负世之泰坦}刻法勒{RUBY_E#}指引你。
E: Goodbye, young one. May {RUBY_B#Worldbearing Titan}Kephale{RUBY_E#} guide you.

C: 是吗？那就好。
E: Are you sure? Alright.

C: 你本该更敏锐些的。我可以提醒你，只要提供<color=#dbc291ff>「记忆残晶」</color>就好。
E: You should have been more perceptive. I can remind you, as long as you provide <color=#dbc291ff>Memory Crystal Shards</color>.

C: 抱歉，贵客，我也不清楚自己为什么会出现在这儿…或许这是阿格莱雅大人计划的一部分？
E: Sorry, honored guest, I'm not sure why I'm here either... Perhaps it's part of Lady Aglaea's plan?

C: 衣匠缓缓接过记忆残晶，不慌不忙地炼化。
E: The tailor slowly takes the Memory Crystal Shard and refines it without haste.

C: 我想起来了…有位织者喜欢思考哲学问题。它正位于<color=#dbc291ff>沐浴阳光的瀑布上</color>，思考瀑布的变化呢。贵客或许得用些特殊手段才能找到它。
E: I remember now... A weaver enjoys pondering philosophical questions. It's located <color=#dbc291ff>above the sunlit waterfall</color>, contemplating the changes of the waterfall. You might need special means to find it.

C: 而耳畔末日的呢喃…也从未如此清晰。
E: And the whispers of doom in my ears... have never been so clear.

C: 但没有一卷乐谱不会以休止符作结，所有的美都需要在毁灭里将自己凝为永恒。
E: But no musical score ends without a rest mark, and all beauty must crystallize into eternity through its own destruction.

C: 啊…是你啊。有你在这里，大家应该都会安心很多。
E: Ah... it's you. With you here, everyone should feel much more at ease.

C: 你这是在……
E: What are you doing...

C: 您真该亲眼看看他拿着长剑的样子——那柄剑刚从锻炉里取出，淬火之前，彤红的火光映照在他的肌肉上，别提多帅气了。
E: You really should have seen him holding that longsword, freshly taken from the forge, glowing red hot before the quenching. The fiery light reflecting off his muscles... it was an incredible sight.

C: 是的，没有未来…也是一种动力。因为那也意味着没有过去。
E: Yes, the absence of future... is also a kind of motivation. For it also means there is no past weighing us down.

C: 接下来有什么打算？
E: So what's your plan now?

C: 建筑体、墙壁上镌刻的誓言，甚至尚未腐败的碗中食物……透过这些遗迹，我们得以窥见千年前的多利安文明的辉煌与温度。
E: Its structures, the oaths carved into its walls, even bowls of untouched food... Through these ruins, we glimpse the brilliance and warmth of the Dorian culture, frozen in time.

C: 一点没感觉是吗…呵呵，你的神经紧绷，战胜了法吉娜的神力。
E: No feeling at all, huh? Heh, your nerves are so tense that you've resisted Phagousa's divine power.

C: 再创世意味着什么，我搞不明白。
E: What does the Era Nova mean? I don't understand.

C: 所以，即便黎明已经逝去，即便我们的使命或许再无意义…但只要继续下去，就能证明我们并未屈服于命运。
E: So, even if dawn has passed, even if our mission may no longer have meaning... as long as we continue, we can prove we haven't surrendered to fate.

C: 如今尘封的大门再度开启，不知在这里蛰伏千年之久的若虫，又会告诉我们什么呢？
E: Now, the long-sealed gates are reopened. What will the nymphs, dormant here for a thousand years, tell us?

C: …藏哪儿好呢…诶呦，你干嘛，吓我一跳！
E: ...Where should I hide... Ah! What the... You scared me!

C: 白厄哥哥啊…他又温柔、考试成绩又好、做事又可靠，村子里的大家都喜欢他。
E: Phainon? He's super gentle, always gets good grades, and you can count on him for anything. Everyone in the village likes him.

C: 再见。有空的话，记得来找莉维娅一起去看蝴蝶哦。
E: Bye-bye! Come find me anytime if you want to go see butterflies together!

C: 呼，原来只是虚惊一场。
E: ...Whew, guess it's just a false alarm.

C: 听村长说，岁月为妖精揭晓的预言里，就是用这个音念诵我们的名字的迷！
E: The chief says that in the prophecy revealed to the fairies by Time, our names were chanted with this very note, mem!

C: 这是…妖精手背上的毛发。迷迷？
E: This is... hair from the back of a fairy's hand. Mem?

C: 每次大树开始抽芽，我们就会举办新的舞会，然后采最鲜嫩的枝条做成桂冠，戴在最出色的舞者头上。
E: Every time the big tree sprouts new leaves, we host a new dance. We pluck the freshest twigs to weave into a crown for the finest dancer.

C: 唔…睡得好沉……
E: Mmm... that was a long nap...

C: 暂时不聊啦。
E: Done chatting for now.

C: 哥们，你别这样……
E: Bro, don't be like that...

C: 佳肴、秘酿，笑语、欢歌…这宴席好似一场幻梦，当真令人沉沦……
E: Delicacies, ambrosia, laughter, song... This feast is like a dream, truly all-consuming...

C: 关于你和上一任凯妮斯…
E: About you and the previous Caenis...

C: 也，也不尽然。那么好的蜜酿，总不能浪费……
E: N—Not entirely. We can't afford to waste such fine honey brew...

C: 但这根本…不是流水嘤！
E: But this... isn't a water current, eep!

C: 奇怪的装置，奇怪的虫子，似乎在进行一轮漫长的计数。
E: A strange device with a strange bug. Seems to be caught in an endless cycle of counting.

C: 哦，是店长啊。请站远一些， 汤汁溅到你身上就不好了迷。
E: Oh, manager, it's you. Please don't stand too close. I wouldn't want soup to splash on you, mem.

C: 算了，之前那些我也懒得跟你计较。但我问你，昨天新买的香氛呢？
E: Forget it. I don't want to bring all those old mistakes up now. But let me ask you this: Where's the new perfume from yesterday?

C: 下一个订单，定制，瑟希斯权能，锤子。
E: Next order. Custom-made Cerces' authority, hammer.

C: 大姐，小本生意，真不能再便宜啦。
E: Madam, I run a small business. That price was the best I can do.

C: 我再重申一遍！我们的肉体乃是灵魂的容器，就像作物成长须得倚赖泥土的滋养，灵魂的完满也离不开肉体的丰盈——
E: I will say this one more time! Our bodies are the vessels of our souls! Just as the growth of crops relies on the soil's nourishment, the nourishment of the soul cannot be separated from the abundance of the body...

C: 请…不要忘记我。
E: Please... don't forget me.

C: 咕咕…噢！有个乐于分享知识的孩子，总带着它的小黑板在树林里给人补习…多留意下路过见到的<color=#dbc291ff>小黑板</color>吧。
E: Hoot hoot... Oh! There's a child who loves sharing knowledge, always carrying a small blackboard to tutor others... Keep an eye out for any <color=#dbc291ff>small blackboards</color> you might pass by.

C: 它们的语言习惯和我们不是同一个维度，经常一个音节就能表示很多意思。
E: Their languages are not in the same dimension as ours. They use one syllable to express many different meanings.

C: 你在这里真的不是在添乱吗？
E: Are you sure you are not causing trouble here?

C: 你可以不与我为伴，也可以不理解我的行动。但请你不要污蔑、践踏我的尊严！
E: I never asked you to join me or to understand my actions. But, please do not slander or trample on my dignity!

C: 前些日子我就听说有两位同科室的科员好像偷偷确定了恋爱关系……哇，这可是研究室恋爱哦！
E: A few days ago, I heard two researchers from the same department started a secret relationship... Hey, this is a love story in a lab!

C: 小年轻，又见面了。坐坐坐，别见外。
E: Kiddo, we meet again. Take a seat.

C: 哎哟哎哟，说一次就好啦。一直这样夸，我也会不好意思的。
E: Oh, I am flattered. I'll be embarrassed if you keep talking like that.

C: 你真是太贴心了，我愿意将你称为「救世主」。
E: You're so thoughtful. I'd gladly call you my "Deliverer."

C: 不许说我幼稚…踩到燃烧的地面是真的很烫喀！
E: Don't call me naive... The floor is literally lava, crrk!

C: 哪里还有没搜集的若虫？
E: Where are the remaining nymphs?

C: 「踏入近在眼前的兔子洞吧。」
E: "Take the plunge down the rabbit hole right before you."

C: 你们俩的关系真是好啊…
E: You two really get along well...

C: 那可不，这也算是一种孽缘了。
E: You bet. Talk about a twisted fate!

C: 我打算先绘制一幅星图，恩维尔和玛格什都在帮忙。你要是有空，记得过来……
E: I'm planning to draw an astral chart first. Avilius and Margusa are helping out. If you're free, remember to drop by...

C: 孩子们，站好，挺直身子，回答我：你们缘何想要成为战士？
E: Alright, kids, stand up straight and answer me: Why do you want to become warriors?

C: 或许，就这样也不错。
E: Maybe this isn't so bad after all.

C: 扎格列斯信徒，纯的。
E: You Zagreus disciple, zealous as they come.

C: 红土好，我吃过！
E: Redsoil's good, I've tried it!

C: 呵，没想到我的剑艺，竟能在裁衣方面有所作为。
E: Heh, who would've thought my swordsmanship could come in handy for tailoring?

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 嗯，万敌，抱歉，我想正式和你说一声……
E: Um, Mydei, sorry, I want to formally tell you something...

C: 如果是他的品味…
E: If it's his taste...

C: 有什么希望我铭记的东西吗？
E: Is there anything you want me to remember?

C: 「和我组一辈子的黄金裔吧」…嗯？
E: "Share your lifetime as Chrysos Heirs with me"?

C: 你说多巧，人家也是这么想的。
E: What a coincidence, I was thinking the same thing!

C: 果然，我也收到了一封同样形式的邀请函，信中还说，这次会有来自天外的异世界美食厨神参赛，带来全新的银河口味菜品，我一时疏忽…大意了。
E: Sure enough, I also received an invitation in the same format. The letter mentioned that this time, there would be a legendary chef from another world beyond the sky participating, bringing new cosmic-flavored dishes. I let my guard down... I was careless.

C: …顺道满足一点恶作剧心理。
E: ...while satisfying her urge to pull a few mischievous pranks.

C: 所以…我这次种下的都是更绚烂的花朵。
E: So... this time I planted even more dazzling flowers.

C: 只需一些记忆，我便能提供协助。
E: With just a memory shard, I can help you out.

C: 之后再说。
E: Maybe later.

C: 到了那时，就去找衣匠吧。
E: When the time comes, go find the Garmentmaker.

C: 关于同伴…
E: About companions...

C: 关于姬子…
E: About Himeko...

C: 有惊无险，回家看看。
E: We narrowly averted disaster, and now we're home.

C: 哦？姬子竟然还会提到那家伙，看来她也不是那么生气嘛…
E: Hmm? Himeko did? Looks like she's not that mad, then...

C: …还是看不懂，嘿嘿。
E: ...I still can't figure it out, hehe.

C: 滴、答…宾客，您去找其他迷钟聊天吧，我不想干了……
E: Tick-tock, please go chat with another Ticker, dear guest. I wanna quit this job now...

C: 滴、答。
E: Tick, tock.

C: 滴、答，今天的天气很好啊，太阳是紫色的，您想尝尝椒盐味的钟表小子吗？
E: Tick, tock, the weather's good today, and the sun's purple. You wanna try some salt-and-pepper Clockie?

C: 滴答！这里不是我的工作地点！坏了坏了，要迟到了！
E: Tick-tock! This isn't my workplace! Oh no, oh no, I'm going to be late!

C: 滴答…你说得对，现在美梦小镇还处在起步时期，没有那么多资源去顾及这些。
E: Tick-tock... You were right: Dreamville has only just begun to burgeon. There are not enough resources to waste on such frivolities.

C: 石头老板和他的那群狗腿子们，心眼忒坏了！不把他们全部打倒，我就浑身难受啊啊啊啊！
E: Boss Stone and his lackeys are downright nasty! If I don't beat them all to a pulp, I won't be satisfied, ahhh!

C: 但听说有些宾客的世界没有加班补偿，真难想象他们的生活有多辛苦啊，还是家族好……
E: Although, I hear some visitors come from places that don't pay overtime... I can only imagine how hard their lives must be. The Family really is great...

C: 滴、答！我看了热砂的直播，你一定就是这届盛会巨星吧！
E: Tick, tock! I saw the Scorchsand live stream. You must be this season's Festive Superstar!

C: 我很难受…别管我…让我的表盘空着，我好喘口气…我习惯了…喘口气就好……
E: I feel terrible... Leave me alone... Let my dial remain empty so that I can breathe more easily... I'm already used to this... I just need to catch my breath...

C: …你是哪位？
E: ...Who are you?

C: 软件的安装包我已经发送到您的移动设备上了，或者您也可以用我旁边这台终端进行测试。希望您玩得开心……
E: I saved the installation package onto your mobile device — or you can just keep using this testing terminal next to me. Hope you have lots of fun playing...

C: 知道，我击退了好多虚卒。
E: I know. I fought off a bunch of Voidrangers.

C: 目的是什么？拖延时间…还是分散注意力？我不知道，黑客的心思谁能理解呢……
E: What's her purpose? Buying more time... Or a misdirection? I don't know, who even understands the motivations of a hacker...

C: 离开。
E: Leave.

C: 那…艾丝妲站长是怎么说的？
E: Well... What did the Lead Researcher Asta say?

C: 「我说了，只是玩个游戏而已，这事很不可思议吗，非得有个目的才行？」
E: "I said, it's just a game. Isn't it incredible? Do I have to have an ulterior motive?"

C: 「好啦，谢谢你，我终于攻略了《太空大战争》——和陌生人一起游戏的感觉还不坏，对吧？」
E: "Alright, thanks. I've finally mastered Cosmic Warfare — It's not too bad playing online with strangers, right?"

C: 谢谢你，朋友！我现在就把它送到于尔丹那个老混蛋手里——我要让他知道，我每一次拖稿都是值得的！
E: Thank you so much, my friend! I'm sending it in to that old man Uldan right now — I want him to know that every delay of mine was worth it!

C: 完成了！这幅画的名字就叫…《劳动者》吧！
E: And so, it is done! I shall name this painting... The Laborers!

C: 欢迎回来，{NICKNAME}。这次是准备收集<color=#dbc291ff>「贝洛伯格风景画」</color>，对吗？
E: Welcome back, {NICKNAME}. You're here to collect <color=#dbc291ff>Belobog Landscape Paintings</color>, right?

C: 当然可以——我们还有很多时间。
E: Of course. We have plenty of time.

C: 一台古董收音机，七百年前对抗反物质军团时幸存的遗物之一。
E: An antique radio, one of the relics that survived the Antimatter Legion's invasion <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago.

C: 冰冷的钢铁桥梁与山崖显得有些凄清，但在矿工眼中十分亲切——它是工人们回家的必经之路。
E: The cold, hard steel bridge and the cliff look a little bleak, but the miners hold them in great affection — it is the path leading home to the miners.

C: 可它为什么叫「齿轮与智慧」，而不是齿轮与其他的什么东西？不过，能让人产生思考，也算是与智慧有关。
E: But why Gears and Wisdom and not Gears and Some Other Things? Then again, being that it elicits reflection and thoughts, calling it Wisdom doesn't seem to be too far-fetched.

C: 路边随处可见的「铜墙」型汽车，由「拉塔」汽车公司生产。
E: A Bronze Wall model automobile that can be seen all over the city. It is manufactured by Ratta Motors.

C: 对了，一会你们去找妈妈的时候，我不能在场，不然她就知道我去找过幽灵星槎了。
E: Right, I cannot follow you to meet my mother. Otherwise, she will know that I went to investigate the phantom starskiff.

C: 有人曾目击你登上幽灵星槎。
E: Someone saw you board the phantom starskiff.

C: 你的女儿，不…是我们的女儿，晴霓，她很好。
E: Your daughter, no... Our daughter, Qingni, is doing very well now.

C: 各位，我会向晴霓讲讲这几天发生的一切，她应该知道的。
E: Everyone, I will explain to Qingni about everything that happened in the past few days. She has the right to know.

C: 是你啊，{NICKNAME}。这次幽灵星槎的事麻烦你了，替我向捉鬼小队表示感谢。
E: It's you, {NICKNAME}. Thanks for your help with the phantom starskiff this time. Please help me thank the ghost-hunting squad as well.

C: …有点道理。
E: ...Fair enough.

C: 我今天原本计划整理一下相机里的相片，结果……
E: I was planning on sorting my photos in the camera today, but...

C: 拍完记得给我看看，等你哦！
E: Don't forget to show me the photos. I'm waiting!

C: 喂！荣誉队员，快帮帮虎克！
E: Hey, honorary member! Quick, help me out!

C: 你看，我这不是出镜了吗？
E: Look, I'm in the shot, aren't I?

C: 喏，好好保管，不要弄丢或者弄坏了……
E: Take care of it, okay? Don't lose it or damage it...

C: 没关系的，您可以作为商会的顾问来参与此事。就算搞砸了也没关系…毕竟现在的状况已经很糟了呀，坏又能坏到哪儿去呢。
E: Don't worry, the situation is already bad as it is, so it's no big deal if things don't pan out. You can be on this project as our consultant.

C: 我果然没有看错！你们就是能帮助金人巷复兴的救星。
E: I knew it! You're the heroes who can help us revitalize Aurum Alley.

C: 我要是说不来帮忙呢？
E: What if I refuse?

C: 稍等一下，我问问会长的看法。
E: I'll go ask the president's opinion on the matter. Please wait a moment.

C: 别抱太高的期待…
E: Don't get your hopes up too high...

C: 哈——？你说我的快递有问题，我还说你们有问题呢。
E: Ha...? A serious issue? I think you'll be the ones with the serious issue!

C: 码头现在可是蒸蒸日上。
E: But the business on the dock is flourishing.

C: 空口无凭，<color=#dbc291ff>拿出证据来呀</color>。
E: Empty rhetoric — <color=#dbc291ff>let's see some evidence</color>.

C: 出示。
E: (Present evidence)

C: 多亏了各位，我们成功在码头的债务危机中顺利通过。
E: Thanks to all of you, we managed to pull through the dock's debt crisis.

C: 我无意干预商会决策，但作为老友我要提醒你，金人巷永远是当下的，它不在过去。
E: It is not my intention to interfere with the Merchant Guild's affairs, but as an old friend I would like to remind you that Aurum Alley only exists in the present, not in the past.

C: 胡闹！别对客人失礼。
E: Nonsense! I never said I needed more hands!

C: 我们是真的想和您聊聊。
E: We just want to help.

C: 同功坊与码头合作以来，业务范围扩展，收入提升的同时，还获取了好的口碑。
E: Since Artistry Hardware partnered with the dock, its scope of operations has expanded, and its revenue and customer satisfaction have both increased.

C: 我能理解孩子们对金人巷的热情，这一点我也一样，我们都想让这里更加繁荣。
E: I can tell that the opposing side is eager to see Aurum Alley thrive. Your passion resonates with me.

C: 看来是我太过自信了，请各位继续加油，我们谈判桌上见。
E: ...Maybe I'm getting ahead of myself. In that case, keep up the good work. I'll see you at the negotiation table.

C: （我自己再想一句）
E: (Need to come up with one more...)

C: 欢迎常来金人巷！
E: Welcome to Aurum Alley!

C: （我自己再想一句）
E: (Need to come up with one more...)

C: 小秘书，我问问你，商会竞标金人巷胜算大吗？尚滋味还会留下来吗？
E: Mingxi, how likely is it that the guild will win the bid? I'm trying to work out what the future holds for Spices Supreme...

C: 我没法确切保证，但是燕翠师傅加入以后，我感觉胜算更大了。
E: I can't say for certain, but with you on board, our chances have greatly increased.

C: 我就讲最后一句。
E: One last word from this old piece of metal:

C: 我准备好了。
E: Ready.

C: 天舶司确认完各方的投标文件之后，按照招标文件的评标办法开始审核工作。
E: The Sky-Faring Commission confirms all parties' bidding documents and bidding evaluations commence.

C: 不是没有人会在意，我们就很在意。

C: 我懂了，你是黑市商人。

E: Sounds scary. What's the situation?

E: Of course not! I'll make it worth your while.

C: 对，就是这个。

C: 那可太好了，属实是买金的遇上卖金的。
E: That's great. Then it looks like we have a deal.

C: …我和青雀小姐是牌友。

E: Hello there, I'm the custodian, Qingque, from the Divination Commission. I sincerely regret to inform you that I am feeling unwell due to contracting an "incurable disease," and must request a period of sick leave in which to rest and recuperate.

C: 我、我……
你所描述的过去并不客观。

C: 无关人等，不要影响公务。
E: Nothing to do with you. Don't interfere in official business.

C: 你这导航有问题吧？
E: Navigation issues?

C: 你搭档长什么样啊？
E: What does your partner look like?

C: 好的，不急，你慢慢想，想起来了再出发。

C: 嘎？

C: 饶命饶命！逃个班而已，不至于动手吧！

C: 我整理了一下过去的随笔记录，大概还原了「<unbreak>223</unbreak>号」的初始情况。可惜具体的设计用途我不太记得…只知道这个仪器会给我反馈一些「异常」坐标。
E: I tidied up the notes I had and have roughly reset No. <unbreak>223</unbreak> to its default stage. Pity I don't quite remember the exact use for it... All I know is, this machine will give me some coordinates of "anomalies."

C: （怎么感觉这个售货机正在…微微发抖？这就是雷金之前说的「与交易有关的物体」吗？）

C: （躲在雪堆底下这么久，看来是真的不怕冷啊！）
E: (It must be cold-proof if it can hide underneath the Snow Drift for so long!)

C: 感应仪的反应…
E: The sensor's reading...

C: 奶奶奶奶！你让我试试看嘛！妈妈之前也夸过我很聪明的！
E: Grandma! Grandma! Let me try! Mum always says I'm smart!

C: （不过雷金今天口口声声拒绝了和我一起来，怎么现在还提前跑过来做起科普讲座了？）
E: (But Regin refused to come with me today, why would he come over even before me and give lectures?)

C: 你动作好慢啊，车…我是说球笼都准备好了。大部队已经基本撤离，我们差不多也该跟上了。
E: You're moving too slowly. The car... I mean, the spheroid is all set. Everyone else has left, and we should catch up soon.

C: 非常儿戏…

C: 因为石头老板的压迫。
E: Boss Stone's oppression.

C: 滴答…怎么办啊滴答……

C: 等您准备好了就和我说一声吧，我们动身去白日梦酒店。

E: Let's go.

C: 屏幕上播放着…一个垃圾袋的特写？你揉了揉眼睛，思忖这会不会是户外垃圾桶的推销广告。
E: There is... a close-up of a bin liner on the screen. You rub your eyes, wondering if this might be an advertisement for outdoor trashcans.

C: 它们原本是为家族服务的美梦剧团成员，但…我想你应该知道了，这片梦境正在坍塌，它们受到负面情绪的熏染，脾性发生改变，成为了难以控制的怪物。
E: They used to be the members of the Sweet Dreams Troupe that served The Family... As you should know, the Dreamscape is collapsing. The negative emotions have altered the temperament of the troupe members, turning them into uncontrollable monsters.
...Phew! ...Phew!

C: 自从遇到了你以后，感觉生活充满了快乐。我要更积极地生活！
E: Life feels full of joy since I met you. I want to be more positive!

C: 要是轻易就把真心表露出来…不是会显得太急躁了吗？
E: If I reveal my true feelings so easily... won't I seem too impatient?

C: 小心点，这些怪物都没有理智，凶得很，可别放松警惕了。

E: No way... This gray-hair is way too tough...

E: That's why your idealism can't solve any problems. So, stop being naive and be more realistic.

C: 明明说好了，我帮你修复和鸢尾花家系的关系，保住这家酒吧，你答应我要复出，重新回到舞台上，和我共同演出才对！
E: We agreed that I'd help you restore your relationship with the Iris Family and keep this lounge. In return, you promised me a comeback to the stage and to perform together with me!

C: 真是直接的提问啊～
E: You really went right for it, huh?

C: 我就在这，哪也不去。要是我说的是假话，您尽可以来找我！

C: 如果是您的话，一定可以打败石头老板的！

C: 而克劳克影业却连最基本的修复资金都拿不出来，还急着想要开张营业，真是可笑……

C: 只是劈了一刀。
E: They only made a sword slash.

C: 对吧，我相信您一定能让他们让步的！
E: Absolutely. I'm sure you can convince them!

C: 失敬失敬，容我重新自我介绍一下——我是鸢尾花家系的成员米莫萨，除了商务沟通工作，还负责匹诺康尼影视作品的管理工作。
E: Please forgive my rudeness earlier and allow me to introduce myself again. I'm Mimosa, a member of the Iris Family. Aside from business liaisons, I'm also in charge of managing the film and television productions in Penacony.

C: 「我倔强的小马，你在美梦中过得还好吗？什么时候才能看到这封信呢？」
E: "My stubborn pony, how's life in the dream? When will you ever see this letter?"

C: {NICKNAME}，我一定会想办法把胶片还给克劳克影业的，请一定要让它登上银幕！
E: {NICKNAME}, I'll think of a way to pass this film reel to the Clock Studios. Please, you must make sure it hits the screen!

C: 你们可要尽快啊，观众们都急坏了！
E: You need to hurry. The audience is getting antsy!

C: 这个嘛……
E: Well...

C: 嗯…说不定木头老爷和石头老板才是真正的好人，美梦小镇的幕后黑手是钟表小子才对……

C: 期待与您的下次合作。
E: I look forward to our next collaboration.

E: You bid the director farewell and head to the next set...

E: "Swing your bat and defeat enemies from across the universe. Find treasures and synthesize the most powerful weapons in the cosmos. Then finally, ascend to the pinnacle of the Galactic Baseballer!"

C: 稍等，你的信息我已经内推给「公司」那边了，这次的专项委托是「公司」发起的，要等他们核实下你的身份——噢，{NICKNAME}，你可真了不得， 那边秒批了。
E: Hang on, I've already passed on your info to the IPC. Today's special assignment was issued by the IPC, so we have to wait for them to verify your identity... Oh, {NICKNAME} — you're incredible. They approved it in a heartbeat.

E: You're the best. I'll just have a small bite.

E: Cut!

E: Firefly's Related Memories

C: 我会在这里继续等待，直到你做好准备。
E: I'll continue my wait here until you are fully prepared.

C: 我没其他问题了。

C: 剑术修行从来都是苦修，三月小姐既然决心习剑，就得在正式修行前找到能够让自己坚持下去的理由，这个理由可大可小，但是不可暧昧不清。
E: Swordplay requires rigorous training. Before we start, Miss March, you need to find a clear reason to keep you motivated while you train. It doesn't have to be something huge, but it needs to be clear.

E: This discussion has been most illuminating. May we meet again.

C: 你好像很会说一些劝学的话…
E: You seem to be very good with motivational phrases...

C: 我听说三月七小姐还没拜师学艺，那我也不欺负人。你回去跟你的师父学剑，随便学，十五天后我会登门拜帖，诚邀三月七小姐与我司的机甲切磋一番。
E: So, I can see you're no master yet, March, but I'll play fair. You go back and learn swordplay from your teachers here, and in fifteen days, I'll come find you and challenge you with my mechs.

C: 仙舟没有这么多江湖规矩，主要还是怕你受伤。

C: 实际上，我并没有战胜彦卿师父……
E: Actually, I didn't defeat Master Yanqing...

C: 我特意选在金人巷，那是因为我得让当初那些嘲笑我的父老乡亲们前来围观。
E: That's why I chose this place. I want to show all those people who laughed at me that I can stand on my own two feet again.

C: 够了——也不是第一次了，我道歉！

C: 不是本大爷说你呀，你太顺着那个斯科特的思路走了。
E: Listen kid, I'm not trying to rag on you, but you're always playing into Skott's hands with your approach.

C: 好、好，跟大家一起商量一下，可能更容易打开思路！
E: Okay, okay. Something might click if we put our brains together!

C: 唔，受害者有一个共通点——他们都是演武仪典的选手。看起来凶手专挑演武仪典的选手作为目标！

C: 我已经切身体会到了，刚才那只能算是精神冲击，根本就不是学习。
E: I've personally learned that painful lesson. What happened was not learning at all, it was nothing more than sheer mind shock.

C: 啊，这老东西被抓了。哈哈。
E: Ah! The old guy got caught. Haha.

C: 这人竟然还有朋友…搞不好这里能找到些让他洗心革面的关键要素。

C: 我们都在出主意想办法，怎么只有椒丘大夫一直都不说话？
E: We're all brainstorming ideas, why are you so quiet, Doctor Jiaoqiu?

C: 为什么要执着于物理破坏呢？对黑客来说，最理想的战斗是从内部攻破对手。

C: 斯科特专员带着手下们仓惶逃离了金人巷。
E: Skott leaves Aurum Alley with his subordinates in a panic.

C: 这真的是人畜无害的小麻雀吗？
E: Is this really the same harmless little sparrow we all know? More like one ferocious eagle.

C: 我听说公司每年入职的人和离开公司的人，比热夜之都的总人口还多…你不做，有的是斯科特能做。

C: 一段小插曲结束了，而三月七的剑术学习还将继续。
E: This brief interlude has concluded, yet March 7th's pursuit of the art of swordplay shall continue.

C: 那有什么不敢，旁边就是医馆。

C: 那我们先走吧，两位再见！
E: We'll take our leave then. See you around!

C: 那不是还有人活着吗？

E: I never thought you were a bard.

C: 哎，也算是有个保底奖励吧。
E: Well, I guess there's at least a guarantee in the pulls.

C: 我们是来找符玄大人的。
E: We're here to see Master Fu Xuan.

C: 哎，今天应该不会有什么收获了。<color=#dbc291ff>下次再来太卜司时，再找找看吧。</color>
E: Ah, looks like we made no progress again today. <color=#dbc291ff>Let's have another look next time we're at the Divination Commission.</color>

C: 三月…
E: March...

C: 我还有别的事。
E: I've got something else to do.

C: 总之先完成最后的拍摄采样吧！
E: But first, let's take care of the final photography session!

C: 觉得累了就要好好休息，得了病就要按照医嘱吃药。虽然我没有去到过那么多的世界，但我相信这些小小的日常道理不论在哪里都适用。照顾好自己，{NICKNAME}。
E: If you feel tired, you must rest properly. If you fall ill, you must take the medicines your doctor recommends. Though I may not have been to many worlds, I imagine these simple truths are applicable anywhere. Take care of yourself, {NICKNAME}.

C: 这就是那位「新朋友」——小桶宝力先生，很不可思议，对吧？他委托我寻找一位「爱翻垃圾桶的灰发{F#女子}{M#男子}」，直觉告诉我，他要找的是你。
E: This is the "new friend" I mentioned: Mr. Litter Pony. He's really something, right? He asked me to find a "young gray-haired {F#lady}{M#man} who loves trashcans." My instincts told me that must mean you.

C: 还有这种好事？
E: Really? There's no catch?

C: 这是我们冒险之旅的起点。
E: This was how our adventures began.

C: 刚和宝力大大聊得有些入迷，我俩喜欢的作品很类似，宝力大大还送了我一个签绘…没想到北极圈作品还能吃上热乎的饭，我真是太幸福了！
E: I was just having a fascinating conversation with Pony. It turns out that we like a lot of the same works, and he even generously gifted me an autographed painting... I never thought I'd see fresh new works from such an obscure fandom. I'm so happy!

C: （机会难得，去竞锋舰的后台看看吧。搞不好后台还真有什么观众席上看不到的乐子呢。）
E: (A rare opportunity. Let's check out the backstage of the Skysplitter. Maybe there's something exciting going on backstage that you won't be able to see from the spectator seats.)

C: 那我拭目以待！
E: In that case, I'll keep my eyes peeled!

C: 我是教练。
E: I'm his coach.

C: 也许那些信息能告诉你们，他为什么到了仙舟。如果有了新进展，我们会再通知你们的。
E: Perhaps the subsequent data will be able to tell us why he arrived on the Xianzhou. We'll contact you if there are any new findings.

C: 这是个医学研究所一类的地方？直接带我来这里看病，你可真厉害啊！
E: Wow! Cutting edge medicine. You must really be something to bring me straight here to get treated!

C: 啊？我也要吗？
E: Ah? Me too?

C: 你好，卢卡。
E: Hello, Luka.

C: 我会上报，以受邀贵宾的标准，为贝洛伯格的代表队安排食宿，请放心。
E: Please be assured that I will report this incident and ensure that the Belobog representative team receives the same accommodation and treatment as all other esteemed invited guests!

C: 哈哈哈哈哈！他呜呜伯的，有点胆色！枪弹无眼，你别怪我心狠啊！
E: Hahahaha! Screwubbaboo, you've got some guts! Bullets don't have eyes, so don't blame me for bein' ruthless!

C: 看，{NICKNAME}好像到了……
E: Look, {NICKNAME} is here...

C: 卢卡现在人在哪儿？带老子去见见他吧。
E: Where's Luka now? Take me to him.

C: 再见！请二位下次再来看我的比赛！我一定不辜负你们的帮助！
E: Goodbye! Please come see my match again next time! I won't disappoint you, after all the help you've given me!

C: 打完这场比赛，我就要登上「竞锋守擂」的擂台，对阵彦卿了。
E: After this match, I'll be up against Yanqing in the "Ringmaster's Challenge."

C: 放心吧，我很自律的，我平时连含糖饮料都不喝的。
E: Relax, I'm pretty self-disciplined. I usually don't even take drinks with sugar in them.

C: 我要离开罗浮了，来杯仙舟才有的单一麦芽浓茶给我送行吧——无年份的「穷奇血」就行。
E: I'm fixin' to leave the Luofu, so give me a send-off with a cup of that single malt strong tea you only get on the Xianzhou — no need for the fancy stuff, "Pauper's Blood" will do just fine.

C: 你已经注定会上历史课本了。
E: You're already destined to be in the history books.

C: 你已经是大人物了。
E: You're already a big shot.

C: 这次能顺利转正吗？
E: Will you be able to get that permanent position you're after?

C: 伊戈尔，你真是个奇迹。边陲行星上打出来的选手，能杀进庇尔波因特的决赛，历史上满打满算都没有十个。小子，给我高兴点！
E: Igor, you sure are a miracle: For a competitor hailing from a frontier planet to get into the final at Pier Point, it's something only a handful have achieved, so cheer up a little!

C: 针对这些个体，星际和平公司向赏金猎人发出的指令只有一个——不惜一切代价，将它们全部销毁。
E: Against these individuals, the IPC has issued an order to all bounty hunters — eliminate them at all costs.

C: 我知谛苦真实，死生缘起，故不放逸，以待涅槃。
E: I know the truth of suffering, of death, and of life, thus I shall not be indulgent in my wait for Nirvana.

C: 不止卢卡，你也可以利用这只可爱又无私的小动物，来在梦中完成一些高难度的战斗。梦貘是很温柔的动物，非常喜欢帮助人类。
E: It's not just Luka, even you can use this adorable benevolent critter to simulate really challenging combat scenarios while dreaming. The tuskpir is an exceptionally gentle animal that loves helping humans out.

C: 赛前赛后卢卡选手都是接受过药物检查的，还用得着他们提出？卢卡选手是名值得尊敬的参赛选手，我只能说「事实胜于雄辩」。
E: Luka was subjected to drug tests both before and after the competition, is there any need to have it done again? Luka is a respectable contestant, and all I can say is, "facts speak louder than words."

C: 走，卢卡选手，我们去办退赛手续。这场绝对不能打。
E: Come on, Luka, time to fill out the tournament forfeiture form. You absolutely cannot fight in the next round.

C: 让我来鉴定一下吧！是他的「铁盾」硬，还是我的「铁臂」更硬！
E: Then let's see if his "iron shield" is tougher than my "iron arm"!

C: 带上我和扑满们的份，继续前进吧，卢卡。
E: Carry on our hopes with you and keep moving forward, Luka.

C: 好了，这次提问就到这里了。
E: All right. That's it for your questions.

C: 前排左手边第三位。
E: Front row, third from the left.

C: 好了，这次提问就到这里。
E: Okay, the questioning ends here.

C: 只不过我相信，比我更专业的教练随处可见，最重要的还是自己的实力！
E: But I believe that there are many coaches who are more professional than me out there. What's crucial is your own ability!

C: 当教练只是我一时兴起，全职工作并不适合我，我还是更喜欢做无名客。
E: I just became a coach on a whim. A full-time job isn't suited for me, and I much prefer being a Nameless still.

C: 要问就问史瓦罗吧…
E: Just go ask Svarog...

C: 你这个问题还是问史瓦罗吧，不过我相信他尊重比赛，不会放水的。
E: You're better off asking Svarog instead, but I trust he did honor the tournament and gave it his all.

C: 坏劫星群，距演武仪典开始还有<unbreak>51</unbreak>个系统日。
E: Destroyed Star Cluster, <unbreak>51</unbreak> System Days before the start of the Wardance.

C: 混小子，还有场外支援是吧，你可真行！
E: You rascal... You've got helpers outside the ring now, do you?

C: 呸呸呸
E: I spit on you.

C: {NICKNAME}，要不要再来逛逛庙会呀？
E: {NICKNAME}, do you want to take a tour of the temple fair?

E: Prisoners can also grant their image rights?

C: 总之看到你还算顺利，我的任务也就完成了。
E: Anyway, it's good to see you're still in one piece. That's mission accomplished for me.

C: 为什么要演奏这首…
E: Why're we playing this song...

C: 无妨，命名流派并非小事，阁下应当深思而后行。

E: Are you serious? You sure you want to reject a passionate, helpful student, and choose to run yourself ragged all over the cosmos?

C: 谢谢安慰。但您是乐队经理，根本不需要登台表演啊。
E: Thank you for comforting me. You're the band manager though, you don't have to get on stage.

C: 记得付版权费。
E: Remember to foot the license fee.

C: 这是筑梦学院特意为这次音乐派对设计的形象，既时髦又炫酷，还很符合舞台表演的主题，布设好后，很快就成为了整个校园的焦点。
E: This design is specifically created for this music party by Dreamweaver Academy. It's both trendy and cool, befitting the theme of the performance. Once it's set up, it'll become the highlight of the entire school.

C: 啾！很多键盘手还要负责作曲工作，超辛苦的，大家都要好好对待键盘手啾！
E: Tweet! Many keyboardists also compose songs. It's super tiring! Everyone should treat keyboardists better, tweet!

C: 哇！真的很好玩！既然能帮上忙，那我就拜托群友继续收集信息啦！
E: Woah! That sounded really fun! Since that helped, I'll continue asking my group to keep collecting info!

C: 我被你们骗过一次了！
E: Fooled me once, shame on me...

C: 太受欢迎也未必是好事，就连原本定好的外出交换都被迫推迟了，哎。
E: But being popular isn't always a good thing. I even had to push back the dates for that exchange that was organized for me. Ah...

C: 有点伤人吧…
E: That's not very nice...

C: 这其中也少不了我的支持！无论何时，我都是乱破小姐最真诚的拥护者。音符激奏！喔！
E: Let's not forget all my indispensable support! I will always be Miss Rappa's most faithful supporter. Note blast! Yeah!

C: 先向乱破道歉吧。

C: 所以…我才不适合成为乐队核心吧。
E: So... that is why I'm unfit to be a band leader.

C: 呜…艾尔菲，我最优秀的学生，我总算明白你是怎么变成那个模样的了。
E: Ooh... Arfey, my most prized pupil, I now finally know how you have fallen into such a state.

C: 我…
就这样，你们被赶出了排练室……
E: Just like that, you were all kicked out of the rehearsal room...

C: 舞台竞技，实力说话。我们在最近的训练赛中可是无人能敌，轻取所有对手，观众都说我们是见过的*最强天团*。
E: Ability speaks for itself when competing on the stage. We were undefeated in the recent training matches, easily beating all our opponents. Even the audience says we're the "strongest group" they've seen.

C: （嘲讽它）
E: (Taunt it)

C: 别浪费时间了，快出发吧。
E: Let's not waste any more time and go.

E: I suppose...

C: 全剧终
E: The End

C: 来试试吧，只需体验三分钟，相信你就会像我一样，爱上这款游戏！
E: Give it a try. Just three minutes and I'm sure you'll love this game just like I do!

C: 非常简单！
E: It was super easy!

C: 哈哈，其实我以前也不是专门做游戏的，而是乐队的键盘手，没写过程序，但作曲能力是一流。
E: Haha, I didn't specialize in making games before. I was a band keyboardist. I never wrote code, but my composition skills were top-notch.

C: 放心，家人：脏活累活，都是外包机器人的活。
E: Don't worry, buddy: The tiring, dirty work will be outsourced to robots.

C: 抽成为零，主要是想多些人脉多条路，就没想从你身上赚钱——而且艾丝妲站长警告过科员，不许我们克扣你的待遇。

C: 这样就算我们不在，帕姆也能保护列车的安全了！
E: In times when we're not around, Pom-Pom can protect the Express with ease!

C: 动手吧，我不会阻止你的。
E: Please do. I won't stop you.

C: 竟然找代打…{NICKNAME}，电子竞技讲究公平公正，作弊可不好。你要好好反省一下。
E: So you got a stand-in... {NICKNAME}, esports is all about fairness. Cheating is frowned upon. You need to reflect on your actions.

C: 与其喝这些糖水，不如试试我的手调咖啡。
E: Why not try my home-brewed coffee instead of downing all that sugar water?

C: 嗯，逐渐掌握窍门了。以后也可以用这招来打扫卫生了。
E: Yes, I think I'm getting the hang of it. I can use this move again to clean in the future.

C: 滋滋滋…滋滋滋…滋滋滋……

E: At least there's something to drink, so it's not a total loss.

C: 今天好悠闲～这样悠闲的日子，还是要听点温柔的歌。换这首吧，《使一颗心免于哀伤》～
E: What a leisurely day... On such a lazy day, cozy tunes are the best. I'll change to this one, If I Can Stop One Heart From Breaking!

C: 听起来好危险帕！但是没关系，瓦尔特乘客，我们相信你。
E: Sounds super dangerous! But it's fine, Welt. We believe in you.

E: Miss Asta shared a knowledge bank index system with us. After installing it, our data bank seems to be infected with a virus.

C: 昨天我戴着耳机听广播剧，听着听着就睡着了。今早醒过来，发现只剩下右耳耳机了…我把房间翻了个遍，可还是没找着另一只。
E: I was listening to a radio drama on my earpieces yesterday, and then I dozed off. When I woke up this morning, I noticed I only had my right earpiece... I flipped the room upside down, but I still didn't find the other one.

C: <unbreak>2158</unbreak>纪第<unbreak>435</unbreak>号亚空间风暴「萨梅迪男爵」近日于萨米恩托一带生成，风圈半径及中心亚粒子浓度已突破历史极值。
E: Year <unbreak>2158</unbreak>, No. <unbreak>435</unbreak> subspace storm "Baron Samedi" recently formed near the region of Samiento — the storm's radius and core sub-particle concentration have already broken historical extremes.

C: 改变措辞。
E: Phrasing.

C: 看来这两份*低风险*的工作，都有些潜在的风险。是得好好斟酌一下…该接下哪一单呢？
E: Looks like these two low-risk jobs still have some element of risk to them. We'll have to consider carefully which one to take.

C: 真是时髦的雕像呢…咱们就拍它吧！
E: What a stylish statue... Let's use it in our picture!

C: ……零分。
E: ...Zero points.

C: 哎呀，没时间掰扯这些细节了，总之快抓住它！
E: Argh, there's no time to bicker over such trivialities. Just catch it now!

C: 就因为这个？
E: All just 'cuz of that?

C: 我的本质怎么就是猫糕了呢！
E: Why am I a cake cat!?

C: 数罪并罚，立即执行！
E: With multiple crimes as witness, the sentencing commences now!

C: 不如叫「判官岁阳一家亲」吧。
E: How about "Judge-Heliobus Collab"?

C: 本大爷的指导功不可没啊。
E: Not without credit to my excellent instructions.

C: 捕捉到了每个人的笑容……
E: Everyone's smiles are captured...

C: 相比之下，{NICKNAME}，尽管同样毫无行为逻辑，怠于思考，但愿意从失败中汲取教训这点，你就超过了<unbreak>90</unbreak>％的学者。
E: In contrast, {NICKNAME}, while you are equally lacking in behavioral logic and indolent in thought, you are still willing to learn from your failures. That makes you better than <unbreak>90%</unbreak> of scholars.

C: 滚回来！
E: Get back here!

C: 卷轴发出的声响停止，你感到被一股力量拖进其中……
E: The noise from the scroll stops, and you feel some unseen force pulling you within...

C: 但你的队伍名次目前岌岌可危，再不做点什么，就要面临解散了。提前准备好罚金吧。
E: But your squad's ranking is currently tanking. If you don't do something soon, they'll soon face disbandment. You'd better prep to pay a fine soon.

C: 嗷呜…果然，最快乐的时刻，就是提离职的那一刻。
E: Awoo... So the happiest moment is indeed tendering your resignation.

C: 是呀。不知道灰宝有没有听过，小奇美拉并非原本就存在的生物，而是花园的园丁用收集来的生命信息培育得到，也就是…*制造*出来的。
E: Yeah... I don't know if you've heard of this, but chimeras aren't creatures that originally existed, but were nurtured by the Gardeners using collected life data, which means that they... were created.

C: 你太卑鄙了！
E: You're despicable!

C: 得到了珍贵的合影。尽管持续工作了这么长时间，照片里的小奇美拉依旧笑得很开心。
E: You obtained a precious group photo. Despite your prolonged work hours, the little chimera in the photo is laughing happily.

C: 「豹豹碰碰好玩到不行的水上小海豹冲撞对战」的冠军奖杯<color=#dbc291ff>「金海豹杯」</color>！光是想一遍这个名字你就有些喘不上气了。
E: Champion trophy for the So Dang Fun Seal Bumping Duel Challenge Seal Slammers — <color=#dbc291ff>Gold Seal Cup</color>! Just thinking about the name makes you gasp for breath.

C: 小灰，调查一下池水，当然也可以问问小海豹有什么有线索……
E: Little Gray, go ahead and investigate the bath water. Feel free to ask the baby seals if they've got any clues...

C: 桀桀——溜了！

C: 缇宁大人，我们都相信，你做到了！
E: You already have, Lady Trinnon, we've all seen it!

C: 很可惜，我从来就没变。千年前我会偷走你的宝贝，千年后我大发慈悲，照偷不误。

C: o((〒ω〒; )o「我理解了」)∋

C: 嘿，好搭档。你总算醒了。

E: Attention contestants!

C: 难道不用我亲自跑图去抓？
E: I don't have to leg it myself this time?

C: 找个地方把奖杯藏起来吧。

C: 难道我真的要被*不讲道理的预言*左右，跟你一起充当拯救奖杯的英雄？啧！还真是无聊的过家家。

C: 啊…我的斗篷，真希望我们永远都不要分开……
E: Ahh... My cape... I wish we'll never part...

C: 不好，玉兆又响了，肯定是太卜大人又在催我回去了...我得赶紧走了。祝你好运！
E: Fishsticks, the jade abacus's buzzing again. Master diviner's on my tail... Gotta run! Good luck!

C: 没办法，颜值决定人气。
E: What can I say? Guess good looks determine your popularity.

C: 我最近组装了套超棒的赛车游戏外设，把《球笼飞车》和《模拟球笼竞速：<unbreak>26</unbreak>》的模块都整合进去了。
E: I recently assembled an awesome set of racing game peripherals, integrating modules from "Spheroid Racing" and "Simulated Spheroid Racing: <unbreak>26</unbreak>."

C: 你们还挺上道的。
E: You're pretty sharp about these things.

C: 您就在一旁玩着游戏等待，咱们的筑梦师工程小队立刻展开施工——
E: Just enjoy some games while you wait. Our Dreamweaver engineering team is starting construction as we speak —

C: 我就知道能指望你{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}！

C: 青雀小姐别担心，真正的藿藿应该找到你在现实酒店的房间了。
E: Don't worry, Miss Qingque, the real Huohuo should've already found your hotel room in reality by now.

C: 这口味本来也不健康，少吃点不要紧。电视机，你呢？
E: That herring toy wasn't good for them anyway. They're better off without it. What's your news, TV?

E: (Hands over the drink.)

C: 实在是太有自知之明了。你没有逃避自己的缺点，这真的非常难得。

C: 不是物理意义上的干掉…我就说你该学学物理。

C: 无妨。有诸位将军坐镇，仙舟上下一心、同仇敌忾，定能将那绝灭大君彻底剿灭！
E: Fair enough. With all of you holding the line, and the whole Xianzhou standing united, we will bring down that Lord Ravager!

C: 这个阵容太豪华了，是不花信用点能看的吗？
E: This lineup is insane! Are you sure we can watch this without using any credits?

C: 谢谢各位评委，谢谢到场的嘉宾朋友和支持我的每一个人。也由衷地感谢惊梦酒吧，感谢酒馆，感谢星穹列车——
E: Thank you, judges. Thank you to our wonderful audience, and to everyone who believed in me. Special thanks to Dreamjolt Hostelry, to this fine establishment, and to the Astral Express—

C: 「昏睡铁道」。

C: 哦，我需要提醒您注意：这只是一个笑话，星期日先生其实并不能延长周末。虽然他的确尝试过。
