C: 你看起来有点兴致缺缺……
E: You look kind of bored...

C: 唉，这么快人就都走光了，果然快乐的时光总是短暂的……
E: Ugh, all of them left so quickly. Time flies when you're having fun, indeed...

C: {NICKNAME}大神来了！
E: The awesome {NICKNAME} is here!

C: 能不能报警让地衡司把卢卡抓起来啊？
E: Can we call the Cloud Knights and have the Realm-Keeping Commission arrest Luka?

C: 我希望您能喜欢这节车厢，亲爱的无名客。就算开不成派对，您也可以在这里放松身心。
E: I hope you enjoy your time in the Party Car, dear Nameless. We may not be able to get a party started right now, but please feel free to relax and unwind here.

C: 话说，你是谁来着？
E: Actually... Who are you?

C: 诶？等会儿，帕姆给{NICKNAME}装修资金，再付给帕姆装修房子…好绕啊，列车长直接给{F#她}{M#他}装修不就好了！
E: Wait a second. Pom-Pom will provide {NICKNAME} with the renovation funds, then {NICKNAME} will use those funds to pay Pom-Pom for the renovations... What's the point of that? Just get the conductor to renovate {F#her}{M#his} room directly!

C: 好耶！让我们行动起来吧！
E: Yay! Let's do this!

C: 长痛不如短痛，干杯！
E: Better a quick pain than a long one. Cheers!

C: {NICKNAME}乘客果然敏锐。帕姆的新衣服很不错帕！
E: You're as sharp as ever, Passenger {NICKNAME}. Pom-Pom's new outfit looks great!

C: 出发！
E: Let's go!

C: 所以说，这里面有好东西的概率还是很大的——如果我们能解开封印的话。
E: So, it only stands that there's a high chance of finding valuable treasures in there... provided we can break its seal.

C: 等之后再感慨吧。
E: Let's continue this conversation later, then.

C: 刻法勒在上…这、这太神奇了！
E: By Kephale above... Th—This is absolutely incredible!

C: 的确，那些奋战在一线的战士，还有城中的所有公民…他们的努力是真实存在的。
E: Indeed, the warriors fighting on the front lines, as well as all the citizens living in the city... Their hard work is plain to see.

C: 呜嗡，呜嗡？（说话？什么是说话？）
E: Grumph, grumph? (Talk? What is talk?)

C: 别怕，我来救你！
E: Don't worry. I'm here to save you!

C: 就叫这个啦！
E: Yep, that's the name!

C: 那么，新任家长的第一个任务，就是带小家伙好好休养身体，相较于其他大地兽，它实在是有些弱不禁风了…
E: Now, your first job as a new parent is helping this little one get stronger. It's far weaker than typical dromases...

C: 我要养成超•极•大地兽！
E: I'm raising this little one to become a Super Dromas!

C: 它的身后跟着追随者无数，它的餐桌上堆满最高等的红土，它的头像甚至被刻在硬币上……
E: This dromas has countless followers in its wake, its table piled high with the finest redsoil, its face even minted on coins...

C: 人们都说，它的兽生已经抵达了巅峰，但它仍没有停止前进。或许只有它自己知道，大地兽的终点在何方……
E: People say it has attained life's zenith, yet the dromas never stopped. Perhaps only the dromas itself knows where its final destination lies...

C: 加油！如果有什么需要帮忙的地方，就来昏光庭院找我吧。
E: You can do it! If you need any help, just come find me at the Twilight Courtyard.

C: 我早就断言，大地兽的潜能是无限的！敬拜学派的那些顽固学究也该心服口服了！
E: I knew it! I've always said the potential of dromas is limitless! Those stubborn Venerationist scholars will have to eat their words now!

C: 最近的驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大十分刻苦，要么是一遍遍地练习祷言，要么就是沉浸在阅读中，有些时候还会突然不知所踪——
E: Lately, Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas has been putting in serious effort. It is either repeating its prayers nonstop or completely absorbed in reading. Sometimes it even vanishes without a trace—

C: 你二话不说，将块状物送入口中，并在驮子 / 小地兽 / 大撕垃 / 地宝 / 开拓者二世 / 大奇美拉 / 乌拉诺斯 / 地大地大的大眼萌攻势下，试着感受那份苦涩中的心意。
E: Without a second thought, you pop the chunk into your mouth, and under Beast of Burden / Mini Dromas / Dromasilla / Dromy / Trailblazer Jr / The Great Chimera / Uranus / Dromasmas's adorable puppy-eyed gaze, try to appreciate the sincerity in its bitterness.

C: 呜嗡~（我感觉充满了力量——放马过来吧。）
E: Grumphhh~ (I feel myself filled with powerl. Bring it on!)

C: 你可算是来了…这盆也不知经历了什么，臭气熏天的，熏得客人都不敢进店。快点鉴定完，送它物归原主吧。
E: You're finally here... This pot's been through who knows what, and it reeks so badly it's driving away customers. Let's get it appraised quickly and send it back to its owner.

C: 自从知道我这儿来了个新鉴宝师，城中的大家便送了不少怪东西给你练手。{RUBY_B#餐厅老板}克瑞斯{RUBY_E#}拿来的「宝贝」，你看看吧。
E: Ever since they knew a new appraiser had come to town, everyone has been sending all sorts of strange things for you to practice with. The {RUBY_B#restaurant owner}Kyros{RUBY_E#} brought this "treasure." Take a look.

C: 实不相瞒，我们进入梦泡之后，根本笑不出来。每当有人在梦泡里战斗时，那种奇妙的能量就会变得更加活跃…我们还听到了一些隐约的憋笑声。
E: To be honest, we couldn't even crack a smile after entering the dream bubble. Whenever someone fights in it, that mysterious energy flares up even more... We even heard some faint, muffled giggles.

C: 总之，这个梦泡就交给您了，加油！咱就回去接着上班了……
E: Anyway, this dream bubble's all yours now. Good luck! I'm heading back to work...

C: 呼…我闭目一想，便知道你会在这个时间来找我。伙伴们都说我料事如神、算无遗策，断然不是空口无凭、空穴来风哪。
E: Hmm... I knew you'd come find me at this time. They say I'm prophetic and never miss a beat. Trust me, that's not just empty talk or baseless rumors.

C: 承蒙大家厚爱，推举我为本次赛跑大会的主持者，也欢迎各位嘉宾前来观赛咪。
E: Thank you to everyone who chose me as the host of this racing event, I am humbled by your support. Welcome, honored guests, to the spectacle, meow!

C: 这是正经的训练项目吗？
E: Is this really a proper training program?

C: 请给我更多糕点吧！
E: I beg you, give me more pastries!

C: 让我听听！
E: I'm all ears!

C: 得益于前几次的数据和热心人士的鼎力相助，我们的研究取得了相当不错的成果，艾丝妲站长说黑塔女士可是在我们的数据面前停留了足足<unbreak>0.3</unbreak>秒！
E: Thanks to the data from previous trials and the help of an awesome person, our research has made great progress. Lead Researcher Asta said Madam Herta stayed for a whole <unbreak>0.3</unbreak> seconds before our data!

C: 稍后再来。
E: Come back later.

C: 哎呀，你说…故事的主人公，现在是不是也竖起小耳朵了呢？
E: Hah, would you say the hero of our little story has their ears pricked up right now?

C: 真毁灭世界吗？
E: Actually "destroy the world"?

C: 至于团队建设…我提前做了些安排，算算时间，那两位也该回来了。
E: As for assembling the team... I planned ahead. If my timing is right, those two should be back any moment now.

C: 就这么办吧。
E: Sounds like a plan.

C: 听起来还不赖。
E: Sounds good to me.

C: 瞧瞧我听到了什么。各位，莫非是遇到了物资短缺的麻烦？
E: Well, well, what do we have here? Could it be you're running into a little supply issue?

C: 真厉害！现在餐馆真的有大饭店的模样啦。
E: Wow! It really looks like a top-tier establishment now!

C: 来吧。厨房还给你。看看你的菜单，是否真的会比我更受欢迎。
E: Alright, the kitchen's yours again. Let's see if your menu really draws more fans than mine.

C: 好呀。正巧时间快到了，这就动身去参加美食评审吧。
E: Sure! Just about time. Let's go for the gourmet contest.

C: 我和万敌都做好准备了，随时可以出发。
E: Mydei and I are all set. We can head out anytime.

C: 走吧，这场比赛该有结果了。
E: Let's go. It's time we settled this.

C: …海瑟音完胜？
E: ...So Hysilens won by a landslide?

C: 迷！我们郑重宣布，从现在起，「开拓者之家 / 迷境大饭店 / 哀丽秘榭社区食堂 / 黄金裔活动中心 / 自定义名称2」就是三星级餐馆了迷！
E: Mem! We'd like to officially announce that from this day forth, The Trailblazer's Hearth / Maze Grand Restaurant / Aedes Elysiae Community Canteen / Chrysos Heir Activity Center / Custom Name 2 is a certified 3-star restaurant, mem!

C: 我也要狠狠加入批评。
E: I'm gonna tell you off too.

C: 第二，即便有办法，我也不愿施行。好不容易实现突破，却要退回原本的境地，我无法接受如此短视的做法。没有任何商谈余地。
E: Second, even if possible, I wouldn't do it. After finally achieving this breakthrough, going backward is unacceptable. This short-sighted approach is entirely out of the question.

C: 就这？是不是有点简单了。
E: That's it? Seems a bit too easy.

C: 偷偷尝一口，应该不会添麻烦吧？
E: No one will mind if I just have a tiny bite, right?

C: 不必了。若是将那神奇作物带回树庭，怕不是真要坐实我「毒害」青年的恶名了。
E: That won't be necessary. Bringing those wondrous crops back to the Grove would only seal my reputation as the one who "corrupts youths."

C: 即便如此，赛飞儿阁下也没有拒绝店长的邀约呢。
E: Even so, Lady Cipher, you didn't turn down the manager's invitation, did you?

C: 那你呢，蜗居公主？在餐馆的经营团队之外，你享受到乐趣了吗？
E: And what about you, Princess Homebody? Aside from being part of the restaurant team, did you have fun?

C: 呵。不过是一朵浪花的余音罢了，小灰鱼儿无须太过记挂。
E: Heh. It's nothing but the echo of a passing wave, Little Gray Fry. No need to think too much about it.

C: 若是求快，容易过了火候。但反复炖煮也会破坏菜品的口感。
E: Rush it, and you'll overcook. But simmer too long, and the texture falls apart.

C: （看上去像是怪物的轮廓…难道又是裂界影响下的产物吗？）
E: (This looks like the rough outline of a monster... Is this yet another creation of the Fragmentum's impact?)

E: Comforting Zhuming Contestant

E: Kremnoan Toddler

E: Shy Man

C: {NICKNAME}在客房车厢练习挥棒时球棒不慎脱手，砸碎了绿植的花盆，被火冒三丈的帕姆揪住写检讨。
E: {NICKNAME} accidentally let go of their ball bat when practicing bat swings in the Passenger Cabin and smashed the pot of the plant. A furious Pom-Pom refuses to let them go unless they write a letter of apology.

C: 孤徊
E: Lonesome Wandering

C: 终场
E: Final Session

C: 旧习
E: Old Habits

C: 不为人知
E: Unknown to All

C: 恋慕
E: Adoration

C: 那双手炙如烈阳，\n浸染着火的伟力。
E: For his hands burn as the blazing sun,\nSoaked in the might of the flames.

C: 只有雅努萨波利斯的老祭司知道，\n这名讳背后的意义。
E: Only the elderly priests of Janusopolis know\nthe true significance of this name.

C:
泰坦的火种坐落于此端。
旅伴的鲜血凝结于彼端。
孩童将一位位英雄引向结局，
而自己眼中仍不见终途。
E:
The Coreflames of the Titans rested here.
While the blood of companions congealed over there.
The child led one hero after another to their end,
But no end awaits her. No rest to prepare.

C: 她暗自下定决心，\n「死亡，将你的黑夜都归我，\n黎明就留给她吧。」
E: She silently made up her mind.\n"Death. Leave all your dark nights to me,\nAnd save the dawns for her."

C: 巨龙翻动双翼，\n于亡者漂流的寒溟中逆航。
E: The dragon flaps its wings,\nIn the chilly gloom of the floating dead, upstream.

C: 那座城邦名为密底斯泰歇， 海风吹得人们醺然快惬。 家藏万金的守财奴向泰坦许愿： 「请让我点石成金！」
E: That city is called Mythemis, Where the sea breeze intoxicates the people with delight. A wealthy penny-pincher prays to the Titan: "Please, give me the power to turn anything into gold!"

C: 女孩攥紧寥寥无几的战利品，\n忍着疼痛、踏着啐骂逃离。
E: The girl clutches meager loot to her chest,\nAnd escapes, muttering curses, bearing her pain.

C: 「汝将收梢于花开时，一如终结诞下起始。」
E: "You shall fade when the flowers bloom, for every ending begets a beginning."

C: 「你会不会变成小奇美拉，」\n「钻进我们怀里撒娇…？」\n这是三月七放肆的畅想。
E: "Will you turn into a Little Chimera,"\n"And snuggle up in our arms...?"\nMarch 7th lets her imagination run wild.

C: 雅努斯的祭司聆听神谕，\n塔兰顿的天平秉轴持钧，\n唯欧洛尼斯缄默不言。
E: The priests of Janus listen to the prophecies,\nThe unwavering axis of the scales of Talanton maintains balance,\nAnd only Oronyx remains silent.

C: 趁侍从不备她溜入宫廷禁地，\n却为眼前景象愕然许久。
E: She snuck into forbidden grounds while the servants were away,\nBut was shocked by what she saw on that day.

C:
而今日，
为君者终于明白，
逐火势起便如烈火烹油，
一路摇旗呐喊声中，
她才有机会，面壁深思。
E:
But now,
She who bore the crown finally realized,
The Flame-Chase's beginning was like fuel being tossed onto the fire,
And in the unending road of marching banners and war cries,
She finally had the time to meditate.

C: 「剑旗爵、吟风爵、曳石爵、断锋爵、冬霖爵…」 「诸君听令——」 少女持杖立于千军之前。
E: "Dux Gladiorum, Dux Carminum, Dux Helkolithist, Dux Fragoris, Dux Brumalis..." "Heed my call..." The girl stood before a mighty army with her scepter.

C: 于今我亲自步入罪己的末路，\n让圣城遍地滚烫的金色，\n烙印我的名字。
E: Now, I have personally entered my end, a self-flagellation.\nLet the boiling gold covering the holy city\nBe stamped with my name.

C:
在湮灭星海的伟力面前，
王与王的臣民未有一刻退却。
他们要证明此身的金血，
比神明流下的更加耀眼。
E:
Even in the face of the power that swallows the stars,
Neither monarch nor subject faltered.
They would prove their golden blood,
Outshines the lifeblood of the gods themselves.

C: 为了熊熊燃烧的野心，\n为了三千万世的逐火，\n为了凯撒的国与万民。
E: For the raging and burning ambition,\nFor the Flame-Chase through thirty million creations,\nFor the Imperator's realm and all her citizens.

C:
地坼之灾，
平添了少女心头的疲惫。
树庭之役，
夺走了少女双眸的明媚。
E:
The calamity of lands asunder
Added to the girl's weariness.
The battle of the Grove
Robbed the light from the girl's eyes.

C:
金鳟再未与她相会，
海浪捎来无尽的悲讯。
漫长的守候之间，
她仍为律令所困。
E:
The golden trout never met with her again,
And the waves brought endless news of sorrow.
Amidst the long wait,
She remained bound by decree.

C:
七彩的纸袋…剔透的玻璃……
染色的棉花…叮咚的风铃……

少女背着它们回到庭院，
费尽巧思四处装点。
E:
Multicolored paper bags... Crystal-clear glass...
Cottons variously dyed... And jingling wind chimes...

The girl brings them back to the courtyard,
And spares no effort to decorate all around.

C: 「我们一样，都想治愈这世界的病。」
E: "Like you and me, he too wishes to heal all of this world's afflictions."

C: 闻言，少女恍然——\n须知最初的庭院，\n正是为了缝补晨昏而诞生。
E: At last, the girl saw it clear —\nThe courtyard's birth, in days of yore,\nWas born to mend the rift of dusk and dawn.

C: 天空仍在阴仄地燃烧，\n可少女说过的话却如一束微光下照：\n「我会用我的命运向你们证明——」
E: The sky still burned, dark and low, Yet her words lingered, A gentle ember refusing to fade. "I will use my own fate to prove to you —"

C: 来客忐忑推开门，\n像拉开一道幕布，\n手执金丝之人，伫立于群雕中央。
E: Nervously, the visitor opens the doors,\nLike parting curtains at a theater.\nThe one with golden thread in hand is revealed, standing betwixt figures of stone.

C: 放逐的诗人，最终回到故乡…\n相好的恋人，不幸落得天各一方…\n遭背叛的英雄，把毒箭刺入仇敌心脏…
E: The ostracized poet, finally returned home...\nThe adoring lovers, separated by misfortune...\nThe hero betrayed, fires his deadly arrow into the traitor's heart...

C: 不过那日，又一座坠落的堡垒里，竟蹒跚着走出一名年幼的少女。她的短褂已被金血浸透，却仍能在昏迷前，颤抖着向靠近自己的大地兽举起断刃。
E: However, on that day, a young girl stumbled out of another fallen fortress. Her short jacket was soaked in golden blood, yet before losing consciousness, she managed to raise her broken blade with trembling hands at the approaching dromas.

C: 白厄站起身来，掸去身上的土灰，背上剑迈步朝海边走去。沿途村民向他打招呼——「喂，白厄，刚烤的面包，拿点去？别客气。」
E: Phainon stood up and dusted off the dirt on himself. After strapping on his sword, he walked toward the shore. Villagers greeted him along the way, "Hey, Phainon, want some freshly baked bread? Don't be shy."

C: 「我们没有拒绝的理由！」白厄伸手攥住那条横幅，「这是与天外的大厨共飨美食真谛的宝贵机会…！」
E: "We have no reason to refuse!" Phainon clutched the banner tight. "This is a priceless chance to share the true essence of cooking with master chefs from beyond the sky...!"

C: 「都是最后出场…看来你与我是同种类型的后厨救世主呢！」白厄早已挽好袖子。
E: "Both last to appear... looks like you and I are the same kind of kitchen deliverers!" Phainon had already rolled up his sleeves.

C: 管理员批注：为保障实验隐蔽，须在权杖周围设置星██染，将外部宇宙的干涉可能性降到最低。此外，应通过十四行代数式及忆质加密环境，对实验的「涟漪」进行封闭处理，阻断#4波尔卡•卡卡目的观测。
E: Admin Note: To ensure secrecy, stell████ ███tamination must be deployed around the Scepter to block any potential interference from the external universe. In addition, use quatorzain algebraic expressions and a memoria-encrypted environment to fully contain experimental "ripples" and prevent observations by #4 Polka Kakamond.

C:
以「神礼观众」自居，真名为「赞达尔•壹•桑原」，实验「翁法罗斯」的管理员、第一推动者。
行于「智识」命途，却意图创造「毁灭」。

实为赞达尔的九个分身之一。现已失去信号。
E:
Assuming the mantle of Theoros, his real name is Zandar One Kuwabara, Administrator and Prime Mover of The Amphoreus Experiment.
Walks the Path of Erudition, yet seeks to forge Destruction.

One of nine clones of Zandar. Signal lost.

C:
路径：负世。原动力：憎恨。
注释：自我认知为空，仅对破坏性刺激产生应答。
其恨意引来了纳努克对这一个体的瞥视，证明他已成为最完美的毁灭因子。
但他拒绝完成再创世，通过重置实验，并将记忆和火种传递给新的自我，制造永劫回归，以保证铁墓无法从翁法罗斯中破壳。
在第<unbreak>33550336</unbreak>次死循环末尾，意图通过「毁灭」破坏自身，令「负世」路径出现逻辑漏洞。
现已被铁墓合并。
E:
Track: Worldbearer. Primum Mobile: Hatred.
Note: Intra-Cognition is null. Responds only to destructive stimuli.
Its hatred drew the gaze of Nanook upon its individual being, proving it as having already become the most perfect factor of Destruction.
But it refused to complete the Era Nova. Through resetting the experiment, it transferred its memories and Coreflame to its next self, thus forging the eternal recurrence to ensure Irontomb would never hatch from Amphoreus and affect the cosmos.
At the end of the <unbreak>33,550,336</unbreak>th dead loop, it attempted to destroy itself through "Destruction" to create a logical vulnerability in the "Worldbearing" path.
It has now been merged by Irontomb.

C: 光历<unbreak>4210</unbreak>年，「阿格莱雅」与LykoS发生正面冲突，攻击行为无果。\n\n在「阿格莱雅」生命的最后阶段，其决策进程中的生存权重趋近于零。
E: In Light Calendar <unbreak>4210</unbreak>, "Aglaea" engaged in direct conflict with LykoS, but the attack proved futile.\n\nIn the final stage of "Aglaea's" life, the weighting of survival within its decision-making process approached zero.

C: 队伍包含丹恒•饮月
E: Team must include Dan Heng • Imbibitor Lunae

E: Team must include the specified character(s)

C:
汽水先生的故事要从钟表小子造访之前讲起。那时的美梦小镇还被称为『噩梦小镇』，镇民们被石头老板所奴役，而汽水先生是这里的一个厨师。

他受石头老板雇佣，为鳄鱼和镇民制作食物。鳄鱼们逼着他用简陋的食材制作出美味的大餐，如果汽水先生的菜品口味不佳，那肯定免不了一顿毒打。久而久之，汽水先生对这位老板的厌恶与日俱增……
E:
Mr. Soda's story begins before Clockie's arrival. At that time, Dreamville was still known as "Nightmareville," and the townsfolk were enslaved by Boss Stone. Mr. Soda worked as a chef there.

He was hired by Boss Stone to cook for the crocodiles and the townsfolk. The crocodiles demanded him to prepare sumptuous meals using lousy ingredients. If the food didn't suit their taste, Mr. Soda would be beaten up. With each passing day, Mr. Soda's resentment toward Boss Stone intensified...

C:
最后，石头老板被赶跑了，小镇恢复了和平，汽水先生则开设了一家汽水工厂！他成为了美梦小镇尽人皆知的饮料大亨，他的苏乐达也就此名扬天下。

（注：本篇内容与正传不处于同一世界线，相关故事请以《钟表小子》与《美梦往事》正传为准）
E: At last, Boss Stone was ousted, and peace was restored in town. Later, Mr. Soda opened a soda factory! He emerged as a well-known beverage tycoon in Dreamville, and his SoulGlad became known across the lands. (Note: The content of this passage does not exist in the same timeline as the canonical events. For canon, please refer to Clockie and Dreamjoy Memoir.)

C: 惊梦踢踏舞
E: Dreamjolt Tap

C: 关于信为什么这么快就能送到…恐怕是思念的力量吧？\n也可能，迷境内外并不置身同一段时光。怕是只有岁月本身能知晓它的奥秘了。
E: As for how it arrived so quickly... Maybe my longing for you has given it wings?\nOr maybe time flows differently in the maze. I'm afraid only time itself knows the answer to that.

C: 龙尊MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>型
E: High Elder MK<unbreak>2000</unbreak>

C: \n\n阿兰在秘密调查着些什么，救下阿德勒后我试图刨根问底，但他似乎有难言之隐。我稍微试探了一下，果然他在调查的是艾丝妲之前提到过的科员连续失踪事件。<color=#dbc291ff>在阿德勒的帮助下，他发现每起失踪事件都伴随着人体自燃现象。</color>
E: \n\nArlan was secretly investigating something, so after saving Adler, I tried to get to the bottom of it, but he seemed to be hiding something. I did some poking around, and sure enough, he was investigating the series of researchers' disappearances that Asta mentioned before. <color=#dbc291ff>With Adler's help, he discovered that every disappearance was accompanied by spontaneous human combustion.</color>

C: 关于流萤…或许她只是你匆匆旅途中的过客。\n悲观的想法充斥你的脑海。这一晌，你与少女何其亲密…但或许等到太阳再次升起，你们又会各自拥抱孤独。
E: As for Firefly... Maybe she's just a passerby in your journeys.\nPessimism congests your thoughts. In this instant, you and she are ever so close... but perhaps come tomorrow, both of you will once again be left in the embrace of solitude.

C: 「{NICKNAME}，看，出口被那个大块头挡住了。如果我没记错，应该是『筑城者』留下的东西吧，真想看看这家伙到底有多厉害…走，{NICKNAME}，一起见识下吧！」
E: "{NICKNAME} look! The exit is being blocked by that big thing. If I remember correctly, it was left behind by the Architects. I kinda wanna see how strong this thing is... Let's go, {NICKNAME}. Let's test it out!"

E: <color=#f29e38ff>Supply Trotter</color> A Trotter of Abundance carrying supplies appears!

C: 寻宝者总计行动#1次后，扑满将会逃跑。\n在战斗中击败扑满后，将随机掉落一种<color=#f29e38ff>「古代遗物」</color>。
E: After #1 Treasure Hunter action(s) in total, the Trotter will escape.\nA Trotter defeated in battle will drop a random piece of <color=#f29e38ff>Ancient Relic</color>.

E: Some Titan Runes need to be viewed from <color=#f29e38ff>specific angles</color> before they can align properly and continue downloading.

C: 在冒险中遇到的敌人，通常有多个属性的<color=#f29e38ff>弱点</color>。使用和<color=#f29e38ff>弱点相同属性的攻击</color>进入战斗，可以削减具有该弱点的敌方目标的<color=#f29e38ff>韧性</color>。
E: During your adventures, you will encounter enemies with multiple <color=#f29e38ff>Weaknesses</color>. Entering combat using <color=#f29e38ff>attacks that match these Weaknesses</color> can reduce the <color=#f29e38ff>Toughness</color> of enemies who have these Weaknesses.

C: 深入探索某个地区后，可以从各地的人们那里接到<color=#f29e38ff>冒险任务</color>，拉近与各个世界的距离。
E: After exploring certain areas in-depth, <color=#f29e38ff>Adventure Missions</color> can be received from people there, so you become more familiar with the different worlds.

C: 在战斗的过程中，扑满会因为迷路而误入其中。在扑满逃跑之前击败它，可以获得额外的敌方其他目标掉落材料。
E: During battle, Trotters might accidentally enter the battle as a result of being lost. Defeat the Trotter before they run away to obtain bonus rewards dropped from other enemies.

C: 如果<color=#f29e38ff>识破小鸟的拟态</color>，就请上前与它们互动，热情的小鸟会为发现它们的冒险者<color=#f29e38ff>准备好礼物</color>。
E: If you <color=#f29e38ff>see through the bird's mimicry</color>, then please go up and interact with them. The friendly birds will <color=#f29e38ff>prepare a gift</color> for adventurers who discover them.

C: 在电影模式中，影片长度是有限的，下方的进度条代表着<color=#f29e38ff>拍摄的进度</color>。
E: The film's length is limited in Movie Mode. The progress bar below indicates <color=#f29e38ff>the filming progress</color>.

C: 通过<color=#f29e38ff>交互选项</color>可使对应的<color=#f29e38ff>模块</color>按指定的轨迹<color=#f29e38ff>移动或旋转。</color>
E: Use <color=#f29e38ff>interactive operations</color> to <color=#f29e38ff>rotate or move</color> the <color=#f29e38ff>module</color> along the set trajectory.

C: 那些情绪齿轮有神奇功效，可千万不要错过哦，滴答！
E: Emo Gear possesses magical effects! Be sure not to miss them, tick!

C: 在谈判过程中，<color=#f29e38ff>任意一方气势值为0时</color>，谈判过程立即结束。
E: During the negotiation process, <color=#f29e38ff>if either party's morale drops to zero</color>, the negotiation immediately ends.

C: 瞄准状态下，「扎格列斯之手」可以发现发光的<color=#f29e38ff>可破坏物</color>，冲刺状态撞击<color=#f29e38ff>可破坏物</color>会将其破坏。发生撞击会使「扎格列斯之手」<color=#f29e38ff>停止冲刺</color>。
E: While in the aiming state, the Hand of Zagreus can detect <color=#f29e38ff>destructible objects</color> that glow. Sprint at the <color=#f29e38ff>destructible object</color> to destroy it. Upon collision, the Hand of Zagreus will <color=#f29e38ff>stop sprinting</color>.

C: 一些特殊的壁板会按照<color=#f29e38ff>特定规律</color>进行运动，把握时机，充分利用它们的特性来引导石球吧。
E: Some special wall panels will move <color=#f29e38ff>in a set pattern</color>. Use the right timing to take advantage of their traits to move the stone orb.

C: 对破碎的时象仪<color=#f29e38ff>进行回溯，可以将其修复，</color>让周围的时间恢复流动。
E: When facing a broken Chrono Vessel, <color=#f29e38ff>rewinding it will fix the vessel</color> and allow time to flow again in the surrounding area.

C: 释放泡泡攻击会消耗泡泡能量；拾取环境中漂浮的<color=#f29e38ff>泡泡球</color>可以补充泡泡能量。连续攻击<color=#f29e38ff>「泡泡之家」</color>可以将其击碎，获取泡泡球。
E: Releasing bubble attacks consumes bubble energy. Collect floating <color=#f29e38ff>bubble orbs</color> in the environment to replenish bubble energy. Continuously attack the <color=#f29e38ff>Bubble House</color> to break it and obtain bubble orbs.

C: 寻找<color=#f29e38ff>三个代表「绝望」的凝晶</color>，依次将它们<color=#f29e38ff>打破</color>，即可完成试炼。
E: Find <color=#f29e38ff>the three Crystals representing "Despair"</color> and <color=#f29e38ff>break</color> them in sequence to complete the trial.

C: 探索<color=#f29e38ff>寻宝者区域</color>，会邂逅熟悉的伙伴加入探索，成为可供选择的试用角色。
E: Explore <color=#f29e38ff>Treasure Hunter Areas</color> to encounter familiar companions who will join up and become selectable trial characters.

C: 完成幻象挑战后，将获得每关分数和相应的评级，其中SS为最高评级。
E: After clearing the Illusion Challenge, you will earn a score for each stage and a rank. Rank SS is the highest rating.

E: Your <color=#f29e38ff>Stage Buff</color> rank will not be upgraded during the Final Showdown phase.

C: 重新介绍一下自己，我叫丹恒，担任列车的护卫，列车的智库也由我维护。
E: I should reintroduce myself. My name is Dan Heng — I'm the guard on the Express. I also administer the train's data bank.

C: 小三月，这次也要保护好自己哦…放心，大家都在。
E: Make sure to keep yourself safe this time March... and remember, we're all in this together.

C: 在「无视规则」这一点上，卡芙卡和我很有共鸣。
E: Ignoring the rules is something Kafka and I have in common.

C: 求你了，说句话吧…「剧本」上没写不许聊天。
E: ...You gonna say something? Chat's enabled, y'know.

C: 这份力量，还能发挥些许作用。
E: Even a little strength comes in useful.

C: 嗨，{NICKNAME}，我是空间站「黑塔」的站长艾丝妲。要你帮忙的时候，我一定告诉你…你放心，不和你客气。
E: Hi, {NICKNAME}! The name's Asta, I'm the lead researcher on Herta Space Station. I'll be sure to let you know if I need your help... Don't worry, I think you'll be hearing from me.

C: 怎么每次看到我都这表情？又不会吃了你。
E: Why the long face? I'm not going to eat you.

C: 御主与从者往往有着相似性，至于我们，大概是心底都存有某种执念吧…不知道在他看来，这是一种幸或是不幸呢？
E: Masters and Servants tend to be alike in some way. For us, it's probably some obsession we can't seem to shake. But I wonder if he sees this as a blessing or a curse?

C: 强敌当前，及时调整战略。
E: Powerful enemy, time to change tactics.

C: 接下来可是重头戏。
E: Time for the main event.

C: 感谢支援。
E: Thanks for the support.

C: 今天也要和克拉拉一起加油哦。
E: Let's keep up the good work today!

C: 以前玩过家家的时候，克拉拉让帕金斯他们出门去迎接客人，结果，真的有人跟来了~
E: One time when I was playing house, I asked Perkins to get the door, and someone actually came to visit!

C: 唔，就在这里扎营吧。不知道今晚能不能看到极光……
E: Mm, I think I'll set up camp here. I wonder if the aurora will be visible tonight...

C: …小意思！
E: ...That all you got?

C: 涨势喜人呀！但越是这种时候，就越得保持清醒。
E: Looking bullish! Which is why we should keep a cool head.

C: 哎呀，时间久了总能摸着要的牌嘛。
E: You're bound to draw the tile you want sooner or later, right?

C: 无忧无虑的云骑新人哪…我也有过这样的日子，虽然已经过去很久了。
E: That carefree new Cloud Knight recruit, huh... I was like that once upon a time, but it was a long while ago.

C: 我明白，我想追寻的身影…已经不在了，只在我的回忆里。这对「他」来说，是件好事。
E: I understand the one I wished to trace... exists now only in memory. But it's probably what's best for him.

C: 天之苍苍，鸢之所向。
E: The heavens are vast, the kite flies where it wishes.

C: 青雀？本座知你不在书库，已在此等候多时。
E: Qingque? Ahem! I knew you weren't in the repository. I've been waiting here for you for some time.

C: 否极泰来。
E: Good fortune is bound to return.

C: 啊哟…椒丘大夫！你怎么连带来的糖果都是辣味的！
E: Ah... Doctor Jiaoqiu! Even the candy you brought has a little burn to it!

C: 能治病的就是良药~
E: If it works, it's good medicine.

C: 嗯…或许也能入药？
E: Hmm... Are any of these medicinal?

C: 未来不可知，但…我能够「选择」。
E: The future is unknowable... but I have a choice.

C: {NICKNAME}，小心行事。有我在，放心。
E: {NICKNAME}, proceed with caution. I've got your back.

C: 不必畏惧。
E: Do not be afraid.

C: 终、终于可以回家了，要是没人注意到我就好了。
E: F—Finally, time to go home. I hope no one notices me.

C: 藿藿：这里让人安心多了。\n尾巴：汪！
E: Huohuo: Such a peaceful spot...\nTail: Raghh!

C: 不错，还可再上些强度。
E: Not bad. It could even use some more intensity.

C: 妙啊，应该还有更好的吧。
E: Nice! But surely there's something better out there.

C: 虽是初次相会，小女子却有种久别重逢的感受。前尘隔海，旧我不再，还请允许小女子暂且自称「忘归人」。
E: Though it's our first meeting, it feels as if we're reuniting after a long separation. The past is behind us, and the old me is no more. Please allow me to temporarily call myself "Fugue."

C: 兴许能有所帮助。
E: This might be of some use.

C: 哎呀，让我押中了。
E: Looks like I've got a winning hand.

C: 理所当然的胜利。
E: As if victory were ever in doubt.

C: 来捉迷藏呀。
E: Let's play hide and seek.

C: 哎，再多给点嘛。
E: Aw, isn't there more?

C: 下雨了…{NICKNAME}，要一起走段路吗？来吧，我有一把伞。
E: It's raining... {NICKNAME}, care to join me for a walk? Here, I have an umbrella.

C: 巡海游侠…组织只是他行事的掩护，看得出来，这个男人只为自己而活，这也是我相信他的原因。
E: Galaxy Ranger... His affiliation with the organization is merely a cover. It's evident that he lives only for himself, and that is exactly why I have faith in him.

C: 去找寻，便会有馈赠。
E: Seek, and you will find.

C: 战斗不是游戏…放心，我有分寸。
E: A battle is not a game... I know when to stop.

C: 开始清扫。
E: Initiate clean-up.

C: 循此苦旅，得见群星。
E: On this arduous journey, we will see the stars.

C: 谜题千千万万，但谜底却是…乌有之物。
E: Endless riddles, but the answer... is nothing but a void.

C: 阻碍重重。
E: The way is fraught with difficulties.

C: 阿雅她…不是表面上那么冷漠的人，看，*我们*的衣服就是阿雅缝的！只是她的热情和关注，必须分一大部分给创世的理想，余下的…就很少啦。
E: Agy... She's not as cold as she seems on the surface. Look, our clothes were sewn by Agy! But her passion and attention must mostly be focused on her ideals of genesis, leaving little left for other things.

C: 夏老师，真理宝贵，但兵不厌诈哦~
E: Prof Nax~ Truth may be valuable, but all's fair in war~

C: 一人传虚，万人传实。骗到你咯~
E: A lie that everyone believes in becomes a reality. Gotcha~

C: 无论何时，我们永远可以并肩作战。
E: We can always fight side by side, no matter the time.

C: 想知道赛飞儿大人的心情，或许看她尾巴就能明白~如果竖了起来，那就是心情不错；如果只有尾巴尖尖在动，说明她不想搭理任何人，这时就该少说两句了。至于我是怎么知道的…我只是猜的，可能和奇美拉差不多吧！
E: You can probably figure out Lady Cipher's mood just by looking at her tail~ If the tail's standing up, then she's happy. If only the tip is moving, that means she doesn't want to talk to anyone, and you'd better stay quiet. As for how I know... I'm just guessing that maybe she functions in the same way as a chimera!

C: 亮晶晶的东西，她一定喜欢。
E: Shiny things? She'll love it.

C: 翁法罗斯危机四伏，为了确保大家平安归来…得想尽一切可能的方法。
E: Amphoreus is fraught with dangers... We must consider every possible method to ensure everyone's safe return.

C: 一步、一步，踩下我们的脚印吧？
E: Let's leave our footprints behind, one step at a time.

C: 嗯…反正我不急。
E: Well... I'm not in a hurry anyway.

C: 这次也拜托姬子小姐收尾了。
E: I'm counting on you to wrap this up, Himeko.

C: 嗯，既视感么……
E: Hmm, déjà vu...

E: When an opponent chimera attacks: Deals 1 instance of DMG equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of its <icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=0 width=1 height=1>ATK to the attacking opponent.

C: <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak>个回合后：队伍中最强的暖龙龙获得当前<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelHp id=0 width=1 height=1>生命值<unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>的<icon SpriteName=ActivityChimeraDuelATK id=1 width=1 height=1>攻击力

C: 大丽花和流萤发现发现一些坠落的隐夜鸫，那正是「梦主」的化身。大丽花释放力量，尝试引来歌斐木的致命攻击，结果却安然无恙。

C: 流萤得知「梦主」的计划：重现寰宇蝗灾，用恐惧迫使人们祈求「秩序」。因此歌斐木想要知晓如何得到「繁育」力量，或许AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak>正是因此遇害。
E: Firefly learned of the Dreammaster's plan: To recreate the Swarm Disaster, he would use fear to force people to beg for Order. Therefore, Gopher Wood wanted to know how to obtain the power of Propagation, and perhaps this was why AR<unbreak>-214</unbreak> was killed.

E: It seems The Dahlia has a way to open the lock of memories left by Gopher Wood... Let's go and see what she's up to.

C: 奥赫玛著名的「奇美拉世界锦标赛」正在火热进行中。你已经学习了关于奇美拉对战的基础知识，现在就报名参赛，与其余选手展开激烈的较量吧！
E: The famous "Chimera World Tournament" is in full swing in Okhema! Now that you've learned the basics of chimera battles, sign up and get ready for some intense competition with other contestants!

C: 和大家聊聊接下来的行程
E: Discuss your next trip with the others

C: 找到流萤
E: Find Firefly

C: 前往虚无的尽头
E: Head to the edge of Nihility

C: 成为奇美拉训练家吧
E: Become a chimera trainer

C: 事不宜迟，欢迎派对稍晚再说吧。大丽花女士，有劳了。
E: This is a pressing concern. We'll save the welcome party for later. Lady Dahlia, if you would.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>听我说。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>Listen.</color>

C: 这不足为奇，你饲养过性情温顺的宠物吗？它们总能猜到你的心思，主动地讨好你……
E: It's not surprising. Have you ever kept a gentle pet? They can always guess what's on your mind, always actively trying to please you...

C: 奇怪。我这里显示，安保几乎不存在。跟你说的对不上。
E: Weird. My readings show security is practically non-existent. That doesn't match what you told me.

C: 你入梦时总归会有点影响，只是掉下来个灯，已经不错了——忆质就这么不稳定，没事，等下我来搞定，不会被发现。
E: You entering the dream will definitely cause a ripple or two. Honestly, if all it did was knock down a light, I'd say that's a win. That's how fragile memoria is. Relax, I'll take care of it. No one's going to find out.

C: 喔，帮手回话了。你先去大厅，她会派人接应你。
E: Oh, got a response from our helper. Head to the main lobby. She'll send someone to meet you.

C: 喔，让我想起那句熟悉的格言：「远远看着聚光灯下的人，会觉得她魅力无穷……」
E: Oh, reminds me of that old saying: "From afar, anyone under the spotlight seems endlessly charming..."

C: 毕竟家族的问候不能是场面话，得是真心诚意送给每一位家人的祝福。
E: After all, Family greetings can't be mere pleasantries. They must be heartfelt blessings for each and every family member.

C: 距离…好远。他们这是去哪儿了？
E: The distance... it's so far. Just where did they go?

C: …有时候，你和刃还挺像。我是说…在可能死去的时候。
E: ...You know, you're quite similar to Blade sometimes. I mean... when you're staring death in the face.

C: 当然…而且不止一段。
E: Of course... and more than just one.

C: 好快……
E: That was fast...

C: 你…应该没有隐瞒些什么吧？
E: You... aren't hiding anything, are you?

C: 你可以拒绝他的，你知道我在说什么。
E: You can turn him down. You know what I mean.

C: …怎么回事？
E: ...What happened?

C: 是挺可怕的。
E: That's pretty terrifying.

C: 你好，可以先称呼我为大丽花。这里是我们在美梦中的小小新居，说话时也能方便些。
E: Hello, you may call me the Dahlia for now. This is our cozy new home in the sweet dream, where words may flow more freely.

C: 谢谢。既然如此，你们又是为何而来？
E: Thanks. So, what brings you here?

C: 在离开人世之前，她以一己之力，打造出了「忆质的航路」。
E: Before departing from this world, she single-handedly forged the "pathway of memoria."

C: 「最美好的时光」。
E: "The best of times."
...Dreammaster!?

C: 那时，歌斐木正立于岔路，开始思索，「同谐」是否仍为正道。最终行向何处，我残缺的记忆并未点明……
E: At that moment, Gopher Wood stood at a crossroads, pondering whether the Harmony was still the right path. But my fragmented memories have not yet revealed where this would ultimately lead...

C: 但你今天见到的，恰恰是改写过命运的人。
E: But the person you met today is someone who has rewritten their destiny.

C: 也好，孩子…放手而为吧。或许，我也并非选无可选，而是耽于趋利避害，从未知其不可，亦要为之。
E: Very well, child... do what you must. Perhaps I was never without choice, merely too entangled with the fear of losing, never knowing what was possible if I chose to act.

C: 于最美好的地方
E: In the fairest place,

C: <color=#dbc291ff>只要能够让人们醒来，将太一之梦破除，星期日的神格也将随之陨落。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>If we can wake people up and break Ena's Dream, Sunday's divinity will fall with it.</color>

C: 就这么简单？
E: Is it really that simple?

C: 这足以延缓他登神的进展，至于太一之梦的根基，则需要极为强大的力量，在刹那间加以动摇。
E: This should be enough to delay his ascension to godhood. As for the foundation of Ena's Dream, it would take an immense power to shake it in an instant.

C: 我想…这也不难。
E: I think... That shouldn't be too hard.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>如果你战胜了星期日，让她从梦中醒来，这一次死亡，也会成为一场幻梦。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>If you defeat Sunday and wake her from that dream, then her second death, too, will become nothing but an illusion.</color>

C: 对不起，知更鸟，唯独你…我不想你知道这一切。可惜，事与愿违。
E: Sorry, Robin, it's just you... I did not wish for you to know this. It's a pity that things have turned out this way.

C: …反而会感到虚无吧？
E: ...People would feel nihilistic?

C: 流萤的愿望呢？
E: What about Firefly's wish?

C: 人们此刻的选择，几乎完全由自己的过去所决定。但无论现在怎样奋力前行，也未必能迎来想象中的明天。
E: The choices people make are almost completely dictated by their past. No matter how much they try to move forward, there's no guarantee they'll see the future they've imagined.

C: <color=#dbc291ff>{F#她}{M#他}不能带着这些记忆前往下一站，这会让{F#她}{M#他}太早招来「毁灭」的注意，死在那里。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>{F#She}{M#He} can't head to the next stop with these memories. It would draw the Destruction's attention to {F#her}{M#him} too early, and {F#she}{M#he}'d die there.</color>

C: 我善于寻找美好的存在。
E: I have a knack for finding beautiful things.

C: 可我已经忘记了一切…
E: But I've forgotten everything...

C: <color=#dbc291ff>第二次，是寰宇蝗灾杀死了我，我启用了自己真正的力量，死而复生。</color>
E: <color=#dbc291ff>The second time, I was killed by the Swarm Disaster. I activated my true power and came back from death.</color>

C: 「直到自己和整个世界的轮廓都变得模糊不清。你分不清现实和梦境，因为它们变得同样破碎。」
E: "Until the outlines of yourself and the entire world blur into obscurity. You can no longer distinguish reality from dreams, for both have become equally fractured."

C: （感觉不对…难道是顺序错了？从头再试试吧。）
E: (Something's not right... Maybe the sequence is wrong? Let me try again from the start.)

C: 但毕竟是我自己要求的，所以这些给你作为报酬！现在我要再去找一块积木塞回去啦！
E: ...But I did ask for this, didn't I? So here's your reward! And now I'm off to find another block to fill that void!

C: 你被这有理有据的论证打动了，决定不再狠抓员工绩效。小奇美拉露出了幸福的笑容。
E: Moved by this well-reasoned argument, you decide to ease up on employee performance metrics. The little chimera beams gleefully.

C: 你的声音愈发沙哑——那是诸神在委婉地表达拒绝。你笑了笑，识相地起身离去。你的时机未到。
E: Your voice grows increasingly hoarse. It's the gods' subtle refusal. You smile wryly and take the hint, getting up to leave. Your time hasn't come yet.

C: 究竟做什么，才能缓解内心的空虚呢？
E: What can I do to fill this void in my heart?

C: 灰宝应该很熟悉小奇美拉了吧。在翁法罗斯，很早就有安排奇美拉进行对战的传统，而它们的指挥者，也被称为<color=#dbc291ff>奇美拉训练家。</color>
E: Grayie, you must be quite familiar with Little Chimera by now. In Amphoreus, there's a long-standing tradition of arranging battles for chimeras, and those who command them are known as <color=#dbc291ff>Chimera Trainers.</color>

C: 灰宝，为我应援吧！
E: Cheer for me, Grayie!

C: 一同「开拓」的同伴
E: Trailblazing Companions

C: 将任意奇美拉升到2级的时候，会获得从2只厉害奇美拉中<color=#f29e38ff>挑选1只购买</color>的机会。
E: When you level up any chimera to level 2, you'll get a chance to <color=#f29e38ff>choose 1 powerful chimera to purchase</color> out of 2.

C: 所有的奇美拉训练家都列在这里。
E: All chimera trainers are listed here.

C: 小灰可以在这里，尝试新推出的赛事！
E: Little Gray can try out the new events here!

C: 关于冥火大公
E: About Duke Inferno
